| | Peter,

We reached out to you earlier today about a critical donor drive to stop Marjorie Taylor Greene.

We told you we need to boot her off her committees. We told you how powerful she’s become. And we’ve even told you that she’s _**a potential VP pick for Donald Trump!**_

**BUT** – at this rate, we won’t defeat MTG unless things turn around.

Here’s the deal folks – _**if things DO turn around, today could be the day that we stop Marjorie Taylor Greene.**_

* * *
**Donald Trump was just indicted AGAIN for inciting Jan. 6th.**

And Top Democrats like Robert Reich and Jamie Raskin are calling for Congress to invoke the 14th Amendment — meaning _he can NEVER hold office again._

**But despite Donald Trump currently facing 78 felony counts from THREE _different_ _indictments_ , _**he’s still the clear front-runner for the Republican nomination.**_**

Congress has more evidence than ever before to ban him from office — but if we don’t hear from 487 more Democrats in your district, _he could win the Presidency!_

name: Katie Porter
subject: Oversight and labor unions go hand in hand
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
As a champion for good government oversight, I’m proud to stand with labor.
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=27881%2E3422442%2E_E1zfw)
**This weekend I joined Service Employees International Union (SEIU) members to listen and learn about the challenges facing care workers**. The union leaders I met with at both a health center and an in-home child care facility represent folks in a variety of careers in schools and healthcare—from medical assistants, to bus drivers, to cafeteria workers.
[****](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230808-2?refcode=EMAK08_2_HEA_20230808_V1_F&refcode2=27881_3422442__E1zfw&akid=27881%2E3422442%2E_E1zfw)
As a single parent, I couldn’t do my job without the many people who keep my kids’ public schools running. These workers are essential partners to parents and, like all workers, deserve to be compensated fairly for their work.
Here in California and across the country, we’ve seen a summer full of strikes in all sorts of industries.
Unions and government oversight go hand in hand. **It’s one thing to pass laws that are supposed to help people, but too many politicians show up at the press conference and then disappear**. That’s not good enough. I’ll always do the work of _overseeing_ our laws, making sure they’re working as intended and corporations are actually following the law. **Unionized workers are often the folks on the ground holding these big companies accountable** , and as a Senator I’d be in close contact with labor so we can hold bad actors accountable together.
[****](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230808-2?refcode=EMAK08_2_HEA_20230808_V1_F&refcode2=27881_3422442__E1zfw&akid=27881%2E3422442%2E_E1zfw)
Many thanks to the SEIU members who took the time to meet with me!
Katie Porter
[**Can you chip in $5 to help keep Katie on the campaign trail?**](https://act.katieporter.com/go/18655?refcode=EMAK08_2_HEA_20230808_V1_F&t=2&akid=27881%2E3422442%2E_E1zfw) She is the only candidate in this race who has never taken a dime from corporate PACs, so we truly rely on supporters like you. You can use this link: **[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230808-2](https://act.katieporter.com/go/18655?refcode=EMAK08_2_HEA_20230808_V1_F&t=3&akid=27881%2E3422442%2E_E1zfw)**
---

Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. Our campaign is people-powered, we don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Oil or Big Pharma. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-footer?refcode=EMAK08_2_HEA_20230808_V1_F&t=4&refcode2=27881_3422442__E1zfw&akid=27881%2E3422442%2E_E1zfw)**
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/receive-fewer-kp4s-emails/?t=5&akid=27881%2E3422442%2E_E1zfw)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/kp4s-em-update-info-footer)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.katieporter.com/unsubscribe/kp4s-unsubscribe/?t=6&akid=27881%2E3422442%2E_E1zfw)

To give by check:
Katie Porter for Senate
PO Box 5176
Irvine, CA 92616
Email us: [info@katieporter.com](mailto:info@katieporter.com)
Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate

| The battle for the Senate majority will come down to our race in Wisconsin — we know it and Republicans know it too.
# [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1&akid=869%2E35263%2E77y20P)
**🚨 First GOP candidate officially launches U.S. Senate campaign against Tammy Baldwin 🚨** Breaking news, Peter: A right-wing activist just announced their campaign to flip Wisconsin and Tammy’s Senate seat red, and we know this is only the beginning... MAGA extremist David Clarke, Jr. and TWO mega-millionaire Republicans with the ability to pour **$15 to $20 million of their own fortune into this race** are all eyeing Tammy’s seat. With our first GOP opponent officially in the race, we’re expecting the others to follow closely behind and launch their campaigns any day now. The battle for the Senate majority will come down to our race in Wisconsin — we know it and Republicans know it too, which is why right-wing candidates are gearing up to take on Tammy and hand the gavel over to Mitch McConnell. Peter,

We haven't even been in this race for two months, but thanks to the support of grassroots conservatives like you, we have already made a _HUGE_ statement.

**Inside Elections just ranked Montana's U.S. Senate seat a TOSS-UP. [Your support is helping make this top-targeted race competitive.](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=24cfce348c9e4905a91068f39feeec66&_e=gNGFAqmaVU7JuZ8i3619KWvIr089otrCKB2hMfDj_anYfir5OAOZO3zJE8aWAjzPdpq9ME1hkvM8i6FzCrWsqD-oy6LYvt8Juhe-Z0Wn-7mwhpXLWh_XVuUVFoamPaWmKWFbd1uvxRVytky7RYbSS8M1C7sDvtPBcqAJd1fSsr57Trr-JdaqUXZwQCyBT81ZpriulG7bd2MQYEz3cf2dyDzbdWpGgWBQmrv8dzyC0S8thrjz67f5k6qgVC5kLv2XMPf-jFygVmbXYFpKdkt9tLgAaSNnnQ6cCDFjc26xw4lJCUrKOTwgJrPllDyxXBUyVS6mYe9mziGfujnTT8lv4lOG5iPg4OHFlDZUJB3n7sy2A65uSmoIE80aLJQsZkNUHvaD-SZxYUdEOeijmg4GBA%3D%3D)**

[](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=24cfce348c9e4905a91068f39feeec66&_e=gNGFAqmaVU7JuZ8i3619KWvIr089otrCKB2hMfDj_anYfir5OAOZO3zJE8aWAjzPdpq9ME1hkvM8i6FzCrWsqD-oy6LYvt8Juhe-Z0Wn-7mwhpXLWh_XVuUVFoamPaWmKWFbd1uvxRVytky7RYbSS8M1C7sDvtPBcqAJd1fSsr57Trr-JdaqUXZwQCyBT81ZpriulG7bd2MQYEz3cf2dyDzbdWpGgWBQmrv8dzyC0S8thrjz67f5k6qgVC5kLv2XJJpavOt7axbobv6tinX7_NiaU-fv6TDEKpT2ymWFRktau-0375R1XBXga-Ppu0kDajuDcdemYJFrc2nJfj1FS1MDrGmlJsLLXOjNXyKsFkKrYMR2IZC5PVUF4YSqJyw8wIl9XELQLiAH2Nl2nwOK2A%3D%3D)

But, Peter, we cannot take this for granted. **Montana may be in the toss-up category today,_but this race is far from over._**

This campaign is powered by grassroots patriots like YOU, and I need your continued support to carry this fight all the way to victory on Election Day. [**Can I count on you to step up TODAY to help keep our momentum going?**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=24cfce348c9e4905a91068f39feeec66&_e=gNGFAqmaVU7JuZ8i3619KWvIr089otrCKB2hMfDj_anYfir5OAOZO3zJE8aWAjzPdpq9ME1hkvM8i6FzCrWsqD-oy6LYvt8Juhe-Z0Wn-7mwhpXLWh_XVuUVFoamPaWmKWFbd1uvxRVytky7RYbSS8M1C7sDvtPBcqAJd1fSsr57Trr-JdaqUXZwQCyBT81ZpriulG7bd2MQYEz3cf2dyDzbdWpGgWBQmrv8dzyC0S8thrjz67f5k6qgVC5kLv2X1I1bsGnIZUahmK1qdS92swMv5eV-9PnurzKz4owCuLp1O_Fi7z1RA9V3cQGJ_QFd16WwqZTDK2AwSk9UnL6LnNw6ISM_Pr9RTUO2hMQpFrd74HULqtzKL3_pOhzlw31atlAHlOlnLyPVkLh3ncczIQ%3D%3D)

[**KEEP THE MOMENTUM
TAKE BACK THE SENATE **](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=24cfce348c9e4905a91068f39feeec66&_e=gNGFAqmaVU7JuZ8i3619KWvIr089otrCKB2hMfDj_anYfir5OAOZO3zJE8aWAjzPdpq9ME1hkvM8i6FzCrWsqD-oy6LYvt8Juhe-Z0Wn-7mwhpXLWh_XVuUVFoamPaWmKWFbd1uvxRVytky7RYbSS8M1C7sDvtPBcqAJd1fSsr57Trr-JdaqUXZwQCyBT81ZpriulG7bd2MQYEz3cf2dyDzbdWpGgWBQmrv8dzyC0S8thrjz67f5k6qgVC5kLv2XNFpbdTw8zY7dimlWqBllejLcYO_L6Ns_JNwnN761Gu6Sf_7U1hiyW9FtYHrGCZMxr90qgP6afMVdIkXZr1YhjiG_0VIq0Z6Cm11wydmHMYV78rRzDEH-qGAIgG9NjF2K87bO9Jdau0GdAF42JiEN7Q%3D%3D)

I’m not a career politician - but it’s clear as day to anyone that national Democrats will see this rating change as a signal that they need to double down and pour as much money into this race as humanly possible to keep this Senate seat in their column.

**After all, the 2024 Senate race in Montana will determine whether Republicans or Democrats control the Senate. **

That is why the other side is MOTIVATED beyond belief. Democrats continue to shower Senator Tester with millions every month, **meaning our campaign will likely be outspent for the remainder of the summer.**

**[Unless we use this TOSS-UP news to redouble our own fundraising efforts RIGHT NOW. This is a race in which every SINGLE DOLLAR is going to count. clean_body: Ratings Change: Montana's 2024 U.S. Senate seat now a TOSS-UP. Your support is helping make this top-targeted race competitive. | | Peter, We haven't even been in this race for two months, but thanks to the support of grassroots conservatives like you, we have already made a HUGE statement. Inside Elections just ranked Montana's U.S. Senate seat a TOSS-UP. But, Peter, we cannot take this for granted. Montana may be in the toss-up category today,but this race is far from over. This campaign is powered by grassroots patriots like YOU, and I need your continued support to carry this fight all the way to victory on Election Day. I’m not a career politician - but it’s clear as day to anyone that national Democrats will see this rating change as a signal that they need to double down and pour as much money into this race as humanly possible to keep this Senate seat in their column. After all, the 2024 Senate race in Montana will determine whether Republicans or Democrats control the Senate. That is why the other side is MOTIVATED beyond belief. Democrats continue to shower Senator Tester with millions every month, meaning our campaign will likely be outspent for the remainder of the summer. Jon Tester has over $10 MILLION in his campaign warchest. They tried to put roadblocks in the way of ballot measures that Ohioans care about. They tried to silence voters’ voices at the ballot box and _failed._ **Together, we have shut down the far-right’s attempts to chip away at our democracy.** [PROTECTING DEMOCRACY TOGETHER](https://click.everyaction.com/k/67796683/420911709/-1644345685?&refcode=E3673-20230808-Victory-SB-CampaignNews&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNWM5ZTFlOC01NjM2LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oWfAkKnlwsqvg7dQgdQ-teVihC_BcXf_G7xo6zwmeIk=) With this hurdle out of the way, it’s already time to pivot _fast._ **We have _another_ major battle ahead in Ohio – this time to secure reproductive freedoms once and for all. Peter, My name is Brandon Presley, and it is my honor to write to you for the first time as the official Democratic nominee for governor of the great state of Mississippi. If you make me your governor, I promise you this: I'll never forget who I am, where I came from, or who sent me. **[Can I count on you to make a donation before midnight to power our campaign to fire Tate Reeves? I need the full strength of this grassroots team now, at the very beginning of the general election.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67796758/420911987/-1470085607?amount=25&ms=ea.c09a2dad-5a36-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&refcode=ea.c09a2dad-5a36-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzMTAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYzA5YTJkYWQtNWEzNi1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=LhpO4wxPzcTBuyN8CYJyJXT-7KKz7Uh-Qj9NdC0ndPo=)** | **[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67796759/420911988/-1470085607?amount=25&ms=ea.c09a2dad-5a36-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&refcode=ea.c09a2dad-5a36-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzMTAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYzA5YTJkYWQtNWEzNi1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=LhpO4wxPzcTBuyN8CYJyJXT-7KKz7Uh-Qj9NdC0ndPo=)**

Know this: When my name goes on the ballot this November – your name goes on the ballot.
This campaign is about the people of Mississippi, who are sick and tired of the corrupt good ole boy system that has left working families behind.
This campaign is about a single mama in Vancleave.
The volunteer firefighter in Tunica.
The health care provider in Meridian.
A teacher in Jackson.
A small business owner in Tupelo.
And _you_.
**From now until November, Tate Reeves will spread lies and try to scare folks into voting for him. But one thing will remain constant: I am running for governor to move Mississippi forward for _all_ Mississippians.**
**[Your support is critical to our campaign. Will you contribute $25, or whatever you can afford, tonight?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67796760/420911989/-1470085607?amount=25&ms=ea.c09a2dad-5a36-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&refcode=ea.c09a2dad-5a36-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzMTAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYzA5YTJkYWQtNWEzNi1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=LhpO4wxPzcTBuyN8CYJyJXT-7KKz7Uh-Qj9NdC0ndPo=)**
Together, we’ll tell Tate and his cronies, in the words of that old Willie Nelson song, “turn out the lights, the party's over.”
Thank you, Peter.
Brandon Presley

name: Tim Scott [Personal]
subject: My grandfather’s 2 really important lessons
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TIM SCOTT FOR AMERICA
body:
Today, America is standing at a time for choosing. We can choose greatness, or we can choose grievance. We can choose victory, or we can choose victimhood.

| |
---
| Today, America is standing at a time for choosing. We can choose greatness, or we can choose grievance. We can choose victory, or we can choose victimhood. | | |
---
| | | | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z3lfcrm2t0na804upe04bp1e3sm015ql3gfj7jso_rp22sh2s8i66p74cljm6p36c3h2bs "TIM SCOTT - FAITH IN AMERICA")
---

My grandfather taught me 2 really important lessons about being an American:
**1. ****We kneel to the Father in prayer**
**2\. We stand for the flag in respect**
He was born in 1921 in the Deep South. And although he never learned to read nor write, he knew wisdom that's been forgotten by far too many today. _He said our American flag is a symbol of freedom, liberty, and justice for all._

---
| | | [CHOOSE FREEDOM](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zf8kmir8pvkhb9j1b558me3lc1f2dmhhr8kltf98_rp22sh2s8i66p74cljm6p36c3h2bs "CHOOSE FREEDOM")
---

I know what my grandfather knew to be true. We live in the greatest country on God's green earth! You can go as high and as far in America as your character and your hard work will take you.

_But Joe Biden 's liberals would have you believe we live in an evil, declining country._

Today, America is standing at a time for choosing. We can choose greatness, or we can choose grievance. We can choose victory, or we can choose victimhood.

I know where I stand. I'll choose freedom, hope, and opportunity every time.

**_[Will you choose it with me?](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zkou1saclq6e8hprt1anaj87qe3bde83u0tf4c58_rp22sh2s8i66p74cljm6p36c3h2bs "Will you choose it with me?")_**

---
| | | [CHOOSE HOPE](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z9o68vu699mng0v3lf7o3nbtmcr1gdhl3phjbc4g_rp22sh2s8i66p74cljm6p36c3h2bs "CHOOSE HOPE")
---

Will you help me restore faith in America, create new opportunities for everyone, and protect the country we know and love?

_**We must make this choice today. Our campaign for America is facing a major obstacle, and I 'm hoping, praying, and counting on your help before the clock strikes midnight.**_

**_[If you will chip in just a few dollars today, I believe we can keep Old Glory flying over the freest and fairest land this world has ever seen.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z0pjstbdhrmrls5vl4i6ma3k0g6d84l0qres2p0o_rp22sh2s8i66p74cljm6p36c3h2bs "If you will chip in just a few dollars today, I believe we can keep Old Glory flying over the freest and fairest land this world has ever seen.")_**

---
| | | [CHOOSE OPPORTUNITY](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z6bmt89s042dril6tp9i4be286lsd3h8pb87kifg_rp22sh2s8i66p74cljm6p36c3h2bs "CHOOSE OPPORTUNITY")
---

Thank You & God Bless,

Tim Scott

---

---

North Charleston, SC 29406

If you have $50,000 or more in retirement savings... * There’s **NO Cost** or Obligation

Inside you’re going to discover how simple it is to protect your retirement savings, **and how you can do it 100% TAX FREE & PENALTY FREE.** Look, I’ve done my research... And this is what I recommend to my audience, friends, and family...

name: Trump Train News
subject: The key to Lincoln’s rhetorical success
body:
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills

| This sponsored message from Trump Train News is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zqh76us5enjcandc4pdf57gop2mq4tmb20vj6fdo_rp22sh2s8i66p74cljmep72cph2bs)
---
| | Dear fellow American,
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid.
While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law.
Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father’s cabin, and did not return until he could “give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight.”
By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly—plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun.
That’s why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic **“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry.”**
Through**“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,”** you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life.
---
| | **Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group.** **** **You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.**
Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because...
Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.
---
| [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zdmjfvvn0jqjftv6u1s2upt1maciurd94ib3lot8_rp22sh2s8i66p74cljmep72cph2bs)
---
| | That’s why we need the support of friends like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.
Quantities of this special DVD box set are limited, so reserve your copy today. I’ve included a secure link for you to make your tax-deductible gift below:
[_**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/dvd-mathematics-and-logic-course**_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z1h29srgph72qqr77k2vnt60rngit56f8lbpfa50_rp22sh2s8i66p74cljmep72cph2bs)
Thank you for partnering with Hillsdale in its mission on behalf of liberty.
Warm regards,
Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

body:
Join us in a song of Happy Birthday | | | | [ ](https://davidcanepa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c7592558e548bc8cc150aa5&id=9c2403dbb6&e=c0babbc643)
---
| | | My birthday celebration is TODAY and I'd love to see you at my party in Burlingame! Come by to dance, eat and meet new friends. Wednesday, August 9th
5:30 pm Plumbers Union Hall
1519 Rollins Road, Burlingame

[](https://davidcanepa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c7592558e548bc8cc150aa5&id=0dab870e2a&e=c0babbc643) Turning another year older is a good reminder of how much I love the job of representing you on the Board of Supervisors, and how much important work we still have to do together:
* Preparing for climate change by making investments to combat wildfires, flooding and sea level rise
* Improving health care, including greater access to mental health services and interventions
* Housing homeless individuals and families and providing intensive wraparound services such as job training

[](https://davidcanepa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c7592558e548bc8cc150aa5&id=c0797d7f2d&e=c0babbc643) I would still very much appreciate anything you can donate – the limit for this race is $2,000 per donor and every dollar helps get our message out! Hope to see you August 9th! Best regards, David Canepa, San Mateo County Supervisor, District 5 P.S. No matter the size of your contribution, donating today is the best birthday present you could give me – I would be so grateful if you could [pitch in](https://davidcanepa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c7592558e548bc8cc150aa5&id=367c4d0d95&e=c0babbc643) today. **Paid for by David Canepa for Supervisor 2024, ID# 1399463**

body:

| |
---
| | | **FIRST: Tucker Carlson** called out the witch hunt against President Trump: | _The Democrats ' attempt to put Trump in jail is a "GREATER ASSAULT" on our democracy than Jan 6._

name: Conrad Black
subject: Our nation desperately needs The New York Sun
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vsNsiKeDNq

You may already know that I spent most of my career in publishing
and helped build the third largest newspaper company in the
western world.

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/osNsiKeDNq

FROM THE
DESK OF CONRAD BLACK

You may
already know that I spent most of my career in publishing and
helped build the third largest newspaper company in the western
world.

We
published over 400 titles, including the London Daily Telegraph,
Chicago Sun Times, Jerusalem Post, Spectator, and most of the
leading newspapers in Canada and Australia.

I am
proud to have also been one of the founders of the modern New
York Sun, and believe that now, more than ever, it is a paper
that is uniquely suited for this moment of crisis in journalism.

Too many
journalists are not only failing to live up to public
expectations but are actively abusing public trust. Instead of
policing the powerful on behalf of the public, they police the
public on behalf of the powers they favor.

The New
York Sun has never lost sight of who it serves. It's a patriotic
newspaper that places principle over politics and people over
party. That is why I am happy to be a weekly contributor to it.
It maintains the highest professional standards without being
pedantic or boring. It's a community where I am proud to belong.

The Sun
is a lone voice among a sea of major publications owned by
multi-billion-dollar corporations that generally try to stifle
dissent.

The only
one way the Sun can win is if we all join in its effort.
Collectively we cannot be overwhelmed by any media conglomerate
or oppressive, woke, media groupthink. The Sun has long advocated
on our behalf. Now, if we join the Sun's movement to restore
American journalism, we will be unstoppable.

Membership starts at just 1¢ a day. I encourage you to sign up
now. Every single person counts.

Join the
Sun now →

Please
join us in the fight to restore America's journalism.

This is a
newspaper that our country desperately needs.

Conrad
Black
Columnist
for The New York Sun

Join the
Sun now →

name: Monica Crowley
subject: The Sun puts the Times to shame
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| | | | [](http://trk.secureandprosper.-lFkjSaG8tOXU3rC9ygEw)
---
|
---
[](http://trk.secureandprosper._Afis5KWpjdVw)
---
**FROM THE DESK OF MONICA CROWLEY** Throughout my career, I've been on both sides of the media equation.** ** I've been honored to serve two presidents and to have seen the inside of newsrooms from Fox News to MSNBC.** ** Bad journalism is everywhere. Most newspapers have chosen a side, and it's not yours. Instead of holding the corrupt and powerful accountable, they are protecting them. They are a menace to our republic.** ** But good journalism still exists - and it's thriving at The New York Sun! Founded in 1833, 18 years before the New York Times, the Sun puts that paper to shame.** ** The Sun is committed to "safeguarding liberty" and "speaking out the sentiment" of the American people. Principled and relentless, it's a paper that fights for us. Its editors are some of the smartest and fairest in the business, including famed editor-in-chief Seth Lipsky.** ** The Sun is making waves, but it's up against the biggest and best funded media giants in the industry.** ** The Sun has a secret weapon though: readers like you and me who are committed to joining the effort to build a better press. That's how we do it in America.** ** Membership starts at just 1c a day. You can't beat that! So please join me in this groundbreaking effort.** ** The New York Sun needs us, and America needs The New York Sun.
---
[**Join the Sun Now →**](http://trk.secureandprosper.)
---
**Sign up today and make a real difference.**** ****See you on the other side!**
---
---
**Monica Crowley** Subscriber, The New York Sun

clean_body: Background on report of FBI official lying under oath about Hunter Biden laptop [NEWSLINK] BREAKING NEWS... [600x300] [] FBI’s Chief Censor Made False Statements Under Oath About Hunter Biden Laptop Suppression, Jim Jordan Reveals [] Source: Daily Caller [] FBI Special Agent Elvis Chan appeared to make false statements under oath about the Bureau’s suppression of the Hunter Biden laptop story ahead of the 2020 presidential election, Republican Ohio Rep. Jim Jordan revealed. He appears to have lied about his meetings with tech companies regarding the Hunter Biden laptop story, according to new documents from Jordan. [13x13x1] [] READ MORE [] Background Notes from Judicial Watch [180x150x1] [] 2023-01-24 Judicial Watch Files Lawsuit for FBI Documents on Big Tech Censorship of Hunter Biden Laptop Story [] Source: Judicail Watch [] Recent “Twitter files” released by Elon Musk show that FBI pressure on “Russian disinformation” led to the censorship: San Francisco FBI agent Elvis Chan “[sent] 10 documents to Twitter’s then-Head of Site Integrity, Yoel Roth, through Teleporter, a one-way communications channel from the FBI to Twitter,” the evening before the release of the Post story. [13x13x1] [] READ MORE [] [180x150x2] [] 2022-03-22 FBI Had Hunter Biden's Laptop for Almost a Year -- Nothing Was Done [] Source: Judicial Watch [] Judicial Watch President Tom Fitton: "The FBI and Justice Department have had this information since December 2021 and evidently have done nothing with it. And in fact have probably hidden it." name: David Hogg via Blue Amp Action
subject: Help us elect more Gen Z leaders
body:
This is the biggest thing I’ve ever been a part of.
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[ unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T67a5b51b-7e56-4689-a937-3a8d6168868e/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | Hey, Peter, it’s David Hogg, gun safety advocate and co-founder of March For Our Lives. Many of our elected officials can be described as one word: Cowards. Our kids, our planet, our freedoms, our democracy — are all under attack by far-right extremists, from the State House to the U.S. Senate, who are willing to let children be slaughtered at school and watch our planet burn for their own personal gain. We refuse to back down. There were many who said after Parkland that we couldn’t change anything because we were just a “bunch of kids.” But we proved them wrong — we passed gun laws in a state owned by the NRA. There were many who said young people would never vote. But we proved them wrong in 2018 — defeating more NRA backed politicians than ever before in U.S. history. Then, in 2020, we defeated NRA puppet Donald Trump. Both of these victories enabled us to pass the first federal gun law in 30 years. There were many who said Maxwell Frost, March For Our Lives' first National Organizing Director, could never be the first Gen Z Member of Congress. But we proved them wrong, again. Badass young people have a habit of being underestimated — and I have a habit of scaring the shit out of Republicans by proving that, while we might be young, we are powerful. That is why today, myself and Kevin Lata, Maxwell Frost’s Campaign Manager and 2022 Campaign Manager of the Year, are launching Leaders We Deserve — a grassroots organization dedicated to electing young leaders to Congress, and especially our State Legislatures, across the country to help defeat the far-right’s agenda and advance a progressive vision for the future. Leaders We Deserve will work in partnership with a stacked Advisory Board, including Maxwell Frost, Justin Jones, and other influential leaders. [Are you in? Split a donation between Leaders We Deserve and Blue Amp Action so we can win back our country and advance a progressive agenda.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T2f61b46e-2f76-4c2b-8c55-26c009e6b979/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [CHIP IN NOW!](https://default.salsalabs.org/T54c2340b-ab7e-4ede-a690-4566de7635d9/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | Why is this important? Despite making up 45% of the electorate, Gen Z and Millennials only hold 21% of State Legislature seats. Conversely, Republicans have made significant investments in down-ballot races, leading to the absolute assault on our rights and freedoms that we’re seeing happen across states — from abortion bans to taking away LGBTQ+ rights to repealing life-saving common sense gun laws put into place after the Parkland shooting. Our political system is stacked against us, but incredible young leaders have fought back and beat the odds to get elected to office. It’s time to take more young people from movements like March For Our Lives and elect them to office to be the leaders we deserve. But grassroots support is what moves the needle, and it’s what we need from you today. [Join us by splitting a donation of any amount between Leaders We Deserve and Blue Amp Action today. ](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tdef9160f-e079-4c68-99f5-532c2f8e6c51/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) So how are we going to fight back against the 50-year chess game conservative special interest groups have been manipulating? Leaders We Deserve will invest in young people, knock down barriers, and elect more young people to office. We’re doing this by:
1. Recruitment: Identifying candidates who will have the biggest impact on their states (that's where the real work is happening).
2. Providing Day-to-Day Support: We’re helping campaigns build from the ground up and will work with them directly on fundraising, messaging, coalition building, voter contact, and volunteer recruitment.
3. Volunteer Network: Our grassroots volunteer army (that’s you, NAME) will have person-to-person conversations with voters all across a candidate’s district, advocating on their behalf.
4. Running Paid Media Campaigns: We’ll run well-funded independent expenditure programs.

But there’s a reason our political system favors those who are older, wealthier, and white — running for office takes serious resources. Which is one of the reasons I’m reaching out today. Young candidates aren’t seen as viable and often struggle to raise money. They have lower personal wealth and smaller donor networks. [So I’m asking: Will you join our movement by splitting a donation between Leaders We Deserve and Blue Amp Action today?](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tab91b9d5-1d8e-4ef9-ae44-5d12d22c6247/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---
| | | | | | [DONATE NOW](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td225dfd6-c9eb-43ad-8c43-11461232d696/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| There’s so much more I could say, Peter, but I’ll end with this — we absolutely cannot do this work without you. [Please, consider joining us so we can defeat the far-right extremists who have taken over our communities and our nation — and elect the leaders we deserve. ](https://default.salsalabs.org/T24a48b1e-4b30-40a6-978c-8867eb5276c3/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Thank you. More soon, David Hogg
Co-founder
Leaders We Deserve
---
| | |
---
|
---
| | | | | | [DONATE NOW](https://default.salsalabs.org/T30ab179d-6fd3-41f1-a79a-96fb8a03fab9/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---
| | | | Cliff Schecter President, Blue Amp Action Amplify Good
---|---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country.
---
|
---
| | Follow Us | [](https://twitter.com/intent/follow?screen_name=cliffschecter)| [](https://linkedin.com/in/cliffschecter-0873a448/)
---|---

1776 Mentor Ave. #411 | Norwood, Ohio 45212
513.438.0171 | info@blueampaction.com

clean_body: This is the biggest thing I’ve ever been a part of. | | | | | | | | | | | You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can . | | | | | | Hey, Peter, it’s David Hogg, gun safety advocate and co-founder of March For Our Lives. Many of our elected officials can be described as one word: Cowards. Our kids, our planet, our freedoms, our democracy — are all under attack by far-right extremists, from the State House to the U.S. Senate, who are willing to let children be slaughtered at school and watch our planet burn for their own personal gain. We refuse to back down. There were many who said after Parkland that we couldn’t change anything because we were just a “bunch of kids.” But we proved them wrong — we passed gun laws in a state owned by the NRA. There were many who said young people would never vote. But we proved them wrong in 2018 — defeating more NRA backed politicians than ever before in U.S. history. Then, in 2020, we defeated NRA puppet Donald Trump. Both of these victories enabled us to pass the first federal gun law in 30 years. There were many who said Maxwell Frost, March For Our Lives' first National Organizing Director, could never be the first Gen Z Member of Congress. But we proved them wrong, again. Badass young people have a habit of being underestimated — and I have a habit of scaring the shit out of Republicans by proving that, while we might be young, we are powerful. That is why today, myself and Kevin Lata, Maxwell Frost’s Campaign Manager and 2022 Campaign Manager of the Year, are launching Leaders We Deserve — a grassroots organization dedicated to electing young leaders to Congress, and especially our State Legislatures, across the country to help defeat the far-right’s agenda and advance a progressive vision for the future. Leaders We Deserve will work in partnership with a stacked Advisory Board, including Maxwell Frost, Justin Jones, and other influential leaders. | | | | | Why is this important? Despite making up 45% of the electorate, Gen Z and Millennials only hold 21% of State Legislature seats. Conversely, Republicans have made significant investments in down-ballot races, leading to the absolute assault on our rights and freedoms that we’re seeing happen across states — from abortion bans to taking away LGBTQ+ rights to repealing life-saving common sense gun laws put into place after the Parkland shooting. Our political system is stacked against us, but incredible young leaders have fought back and beat the odds to get elected to office. It’s time to take more young people from movements like March For Our Lives and elect them to office to be the leaders we deserve. But grassroots support is what moves the needle, and it’s what we need from you today. So how are we going to fight back against the 50-year chess game conservative special interest groups have been manipulating? Leaders We Deserve will invest in young people, knock down barriers, and elect more young people to office. We’re doing this by: 1. Recruitment: Identifying candidates who will have the biggest impact on their states (that's where the real work is happening). 2. Providing Day-to-Day Support: We’re helping campaigns build from the ground up and will work with them directly on fundraising, messaging, coalition building, voter contact, and volunteer recruitment. 3. Volunteer Network: Our grassroots volunteer army (that’s you, NAME) will have person-to-person conversations with voters all across a candidate’s district, advocating on their behalf. 4. Running Paid Media Campaigns: We’ll run well-funded independent expenditure programs. But there’s a reason our political system favors those who are older, wealthier, and white — running for office takes serious resources. Which is one of the reasons I’m reaching out today. Young candidates aren’t seen as viable and often struggle to raise money. They have lower personal wealth and smaller donor networks. | | | | | | | | There’s so much more I could say, Peter, but I’ll end with this — we absolutely cannot do this work without you. Thank you. More soon, David Hogg Co-founder Leaders We Deserve | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Cliff Schecter President, Blue Amp Action Amplify Good ---|--- | | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. | | | Follow Us | | ---|--- | Blue Amp Strategies 1776 Mentor Ave. #411 | Norwood, Ohio 45212 513.438.0171 | info@blueampaction.com | Having trouble viewing this email? | | or

name: Shift WA
subject: Local Election Coverage
body:
We now have a clear picture of which candidates remain standing as we head to the General Election. One thing is evident: the choice between improving public safety and supporting failed liberal crime policies has never been clearer. | | [](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/62119713:WKzEdeDNM:m:1:2610672541:5656CBB4A3EC5852F62A1A081752C0FC:r "Shift Washington")
---
| Friends, The August Primary is behind us, and the final votes are almost all counted! We now have a clear picture of which candidates remain standing as we head to the General Election. **One thing is evident: the choice between improving public safety and supporting failed liberal crime policies has never been clearer.** We here at Shift WA are dedicated to providing our readers with the news needed to make informed voting decisions. Communities across our state are suffering from the impact of terrible public safety policies passed by Democrats. Mainstream media outlets will rarely investigate the truth of these failures in a timely manner - but we won't hesitate to shed light on what's really going on. **Voters deserve to know which candidates will continue pushing the same failed, crime-enhancing policies and which candidates will fight for public safety.** From the very important race for Mayor in Spokane to the city council races in Seattle, you can turn to us for analysis on local races in our state. As we gear up for the upcoming November General Election, we need your continued support to continue our efforts. **_[Your contribution of $100, $50, or even $25 means an investment in the only daily communications outlet dedicated to holding Democrats accountable in our state.](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/62119714:WKzEdeDNM:m:1:2610672541:5656CBB4A3EC5852F62A1A081752C0FC:r)_** **_[Please consider contributing today and help us make a difference in the future of our state.](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/62119714:WKzEdeDNM:m:1:2610672541:5656CBB4A3EC5852F62A1A081752C0FC:r)_** Thank you, The Shift WA team | [ DONATE ](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/62119715:WKzEdeDNM:m:1:2610672541:5656CBB4A3EC5852F62A1A081752C0FC:r)
---
|

You can also stay up to date on our efforts to shift the debate in Washington State by following us on [Facebook](https://www.facebook.com/shiftwa/) & [Twitter](https://twitter.com/ShiftWA). If you believe you received this message in error or no longer wish to receive emails from Shift Washington, [click to unsubscribe](http://click.shiftwa.org/p/oWKzEdeDNM).

After we delivered the historic upset to Biden & Pelosi in the TX-34 special election last summer, the liberal media & woke Democrats immediately sunk to disgusting lows to defeat me in the November midterms.

My opponent hired a twisted left-wing pervert to attack me & sexually degrade me. The liberal journalists called me a "white nationalist Latina" and a "self-hating Latina."

To sum it up- the woke liberals in America showed their true colors.

They truly hate free-thinking Hispanic women who don't buy what their party is selling.

My existence, my story, and my firm adherence to the values of God, Family, Country drives them completely nuts.

But they'll spend, say, and do whatever it takes to punish me for not falling in line & they won't stop until they permanently destroy me. They're leaving no stone unturned in this election & the polls are already tied- making it the closest race in America right now & your support today will give us the extra inch to take the lead & never look back.

[**SUPPORT MAYRA FLORES**](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zeqkb2if6a8rbtrrou3ga29rld0o86ev21rndq9g_rp22sh2s8i66p74clge6o31c5h2bs)

Look, I immigrated to America when I was 6 and grew up working in the fields. I know the value of a hard earned dollar so I wouldn't ask you to donate if it truly wasn't important.

_**But everything is on the line in this election & I mean EVERYTHING. **_

[**SUPPORT MAYRA FLORES**](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zemg8jv9nq6abpaugmu8pinibasei5895emqe6og_rp22sh2s8i66p74clge6o31c5h2bs)

With great respect & admiration,
Mayra Flores

name: Your America
subject: Lincoln’s secret weapon
body:
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills

| This sponsored message from Your America News is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c20026%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=CEy4R2T8R3EC3IByW9G54Q&sysid=1)
---
| | Dear fellow American, Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid. While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law. Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father’s cabin, and did not return until he could “give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight.” By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly--plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun. That’s why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic **“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry.” ** Through** “Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,”** you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life.
---
| | **Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group.** ** ** **You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.** Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because... Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.
---
| [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c20027%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=2KmuTsDwv5%2fmUKMCAAGsVA&sysid=1)
---
| | That’s why we need the support of friends like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty. Quantities of this special DVD box set are limited, so reserve your copy today. I’ve included a secure link for you to make your tax-deductible gift below: [_**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/dvd-mathematics-and-logic-course**_](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c20028%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=BE12TDd2C8DxQngjnqR%2fNg&sysid=1) Thank you for partnering with Hillsdale in its mission on behalf of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

Your America News
---

While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law. Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father’s cabin, and did not return until he could “give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight.” By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly--plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun. That’s why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic “Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry.” Through “Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,” you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life. | | Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group. You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because... Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. | | | That’s why we need the support of friends like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty. Quantities of this special DVD box set are limited, so reserve your copy today. I’ve included a secure link for you to make your tax-deductible gift below: Thank you for partnering with Hillsdale in its mission on behalf of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 Your America News Your America News • 625 First Street #183 • Alexandria, VA 22314 |

## Ferocious Storms Lash U.S.
A heavy storm system hit the U.S. Monday, leaving hundreds of thousands without power, [killing two](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskL1urDAQRp_GdKBhzN8ULm5Dt7dNiYw9LI4MrOxZyL59tJHSpfmaTzpHOh-36WZDDPv9v93YyHJM1kk4eYKhpBL1hIU3CzOyLtjUHdVtTz3oYjXcznNHFgh1Tc6x7yz1HtF5GmacsQgGATUMQEC6r5uqdn5eoCVgXpqZWtUA-yBHqj6PsMvKS3wdJ6fKHVsRzSryyEr_UzgqHK_rqty-vz-F45uscIThdy62snJSOLLNUj5zmfnkxGWWI225lCdnb18Kx7B7_qpW2WKRjH9cIcaQu141cN9siD9y-TPFdwAAAP__y8dfYQ), and snarling thousands of flights in and out of the East Coast. The storms continued Tuesday across the country from Wyoming to Georgia. Air traffic was hit hard, with [more than 1,300 flights canceled](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskL2SrCAQhZ8GM622UZGA4CZkc9MNLQbasbcYmRJ2KN9-y4k3OdH5q-_rttwcR94f_92TTFnT4nzhNy0wt7pFuWATzEqEJBsy_aT7UWkFstmM00FpPVMArby8Yw8DgkI_aexnP40NGwSUMIMGLVU_dL0P9xVGDUTrcNejGIACl3R034n3stEaz_Smo_Pp2USzlfLKQv4TaAXaWmv3k11JwZ2XQaDNJR2nQFsO96Yo0Do-Iu_U7lSzQHvNC7QwX6IE2jXyYyu59W73FCm0gaI7KbSVwk45uKtNwThMcpLwiTSHCa_KMXKelBjg8XQcPwfLn7h-AwAA__8zQmj_) and another 5,700 delayed as of last night. [The two deaths](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsz7tuwyAUgOGnsTesw834DAxdsqVrR4vLcUwFJjIkUd6-aufO__Dr-7quV5dyOm6frpDtW11d6OlJKywMmZCrGKPdiATJkSyfkWuDBuS4W-JK-7DgApordMbPi1bgPUoPFFQckxUgJCyAgNJwNfEQ_QYagWhTHvWggGLq9Zy-azr6Tlt-1yedU6hlzHbv_d4G-TGIyyAuB73a9HZ7rb95EJfW61lYdMXdKLJQS3kcqSdqjFzrdB7s0RifNSquDE57L3k8bby_Us6pzWZQcCsu5b9b_9f-EwAA__-xhlsd) were a 15-year-old who died when a tree fell on him in South Carolina and a 28-year-old worker in Alabama who was struck by lightning.
## Credit Card Debt Surpasses $1 Trillion
American credit card debt [soared past $1 trillion](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLFurDAQRb_GdEbDGNa4cPEaun1tSmTMeJnI4JXtLNm_j0id-l6dI52P-3x3HPl4_Hc72RrS7HzlF80wSiNRzdisNhAhqYZsdzPdoI0G1WxWOwceez0M5DSSR30bRg0KwhhQjdCwRUAFIxgwSnd92_l1CTAYIAr9YgbRA61cU24_Ex91oxDf6UW59Wlvot1qfRah_gmcBE7nebYhfS9fhQ8q5foInMinI-1vgZPPF0t6l1e50lLlxrXITtbMMXI6ZOBcqqy8k6QX5Sbb9XleW7lp0cNjdxx_zfXPDj8BAAD__zQ9YG0) for the first time in history at the end of June as people continue to spend with plastic.

That's an increase of 5% from last quarter, fueled by high interest rates. The average credit card annual rate hit a new record of 20.33% last week. The previous record was 19% in July 1991.

At the same time, consumer debt in general [grew $18 billion](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0LFu6yAUxvGngY0IHyCYgeEu3nLXjhaGQ0wFJgKSqG9fuV07fvoPP-n7uK03l3I67v9dQTtiXZ0f6YUrn5lhIFagwUZEQEHRTlczKW00F3S3ys1Oc6WdAIEeUAmpjYshzlLNwSFNFjgIPnPDjdCTvEw-bJErwxGj3IwikmNIo7bLZ03H2DHmr_rCdvG10Gz3MR6diH8EFgLL2HFPOZ-NwLLXgge-O4FFThIEB-br0Z8FGwu4DeZzKltnrjPfToR518Jv6s_2cL1jZxMbLeWc6kFgoc2Gx_uc_aqJ5Pfi0g9Hx5_HfAcAAP__0mxlmA) from May to June, double the $9.4 billion increase the previous month. High interest rates for home sales, student loans, and car purchases were a major driver.

## DeSantis 'Reloads' With New Campaign Manager
Florida Gov. Ron [DeSantis replaced his campaign manager](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskL2unDAQRp_GdEbjH9a4cJGGbtOmRIM9sBMZG4G1KG8f7ZVud5uv-qRzdP485ydy5rL9xp1CW-uMsfGbZhill9rMukthJdJkOgrq4dXgvAPTvQKsCWFU0bqIC5KzMJCy4ExM45Lco-OgQRsYwYM3TtlexbSsMHggWu3iB2GBErd69n8rl_aiNf-rbzr7WPcuh1drxyXML6Enoaf7vvujZm4c6-cg9FTovoSePhShJxi_56xFJrqwNL7kSUfGSJeMuB_IW5E7FtzolABKgR5Md4Z03JwzXw8nLGw7cv5yaD8W-R8AAP__ZxlgsQ), Generra Peck, with DeSantis' trusted chief of staff James Uthmeier in the third reshuffling of his operations in less than a month. DeSantis has been struggling in his presidential campaign against Donald Trump. Trump holds a big lead [in New Hampshire](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0LGu2yAUgOGnge1EGGxjBoYu3tK1o4XhOJwIgwUkad--une-8z_80vfnvt0dJcqP3-5E24-yOd_pjZtYwIBUm-TBHogSFUc7zGaYtNFC8WjDbPTitRdqn4xCY2YlFn-4CQc363nhZKWQSizCCKP0MN4GH_ZDTEYgHuNuJjYKDNRLvT0L5R7xSP_KG-vNl5MnG3u_GlO_mFyZXHN8llfNLn1VJlf869Or0RvhKilBr6_zglhSaLDTAxK6AJQhRwjYXO7UINRyNegFOiF8qEfwsVLrhEyuvNpwfSglarNmo3icjr5fvP_o8j8AAP__3wFmqA), where DeSantis is tied with Chris Christie, and also in Arizona, according to [a new poll](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskL1u9CAQAJ8Gd5zWC_6hcPE17u5rU1r8LMcmGCwfuVPy9FGSNt1IU4w0L9ftajlzuf23Oy0t1s36xg_aYJZGotqwC0skQlIdLf1o-mEyE6guLUSjG4hAeWecCX7WYz9DVD2CmygOHS8IqGAGA0ZNvb70PrgIgwGiqJ0ZhAYK3Op5ea1cWqKYP-qDzouve5eX1NpxF-qfwFXg2hIlzvnbCVxT3anQ8y5w9XY_LN-KwFX3GtU8yXa-74d0HKjIQv5N2hJ-gYu0J3_WYqVNZIOsUSKglkfNWeDanUs4npwz38dJaLjtln-aXfvzzlcAAAD__7FDZgY). The DeSantis campaign has twice cut costs and staff but prefers not to call this latest move a "reboot." Instead, they're [calling it a "reload"](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsz7FuqzAUh_GnMRvR4UAADx7uwpa7dkSO_TecyjYRdpP27Su1a_dP-vR7u603K1Hy9t8mmBqO1boqT6w0t7rlfuXGmwAw-gamG3V3nfREfbObab7P2s7sR5B1QJiC09qNIDeOzF0jhol7mkmT7qduuHTO3wNdNQFhuOurGghe6nFe3g_JdUeIX8cT58UdqYlmr_VRVP9P8aJ4qTsSSkHefgPFS8arKF48is1VSpvxap1NDytbbpPNdsPZ4tPFjyJPNKfxj5fEKGWc1EBbshJ_VvVP-HcAAAD__30KXEI) and say they're in it to win.

clean_body: A heavy storm system hit the U.S. Monday, leaving hundreds of thousands without power, killing two, and snarling thousands of flights in and out of the East Coast. | | | | | | WEDNESday, August 9, 2023 ---|--- Good morning! On this date 78 years ago, the U.S. dropped its second atomic bomb on Japan in Nagasaki. A week later, the Japanese surrendered, ending the war they began at Pearl Harbor on Dec. 7, 1941. If this is your first time reading The Flyover , and make sure you don't miss our next edition. Want to follow along on Facebook? . Enjoying the Flyover? Take a moment to check out today's sponsor, | Ferocious Storms Lash U.S. A heavy storm system hit the U.S. Monday, leaving hundreds of thousands without power, , and snarling thousands of flights in and out of the East Coast. The storms continued Tuesday across the country from Wyoming to Georgia. Air traffic was hit hard, with and another 5,700 delayed as of last night. were a 15-year-old who died when a tree fell on him in South Carolina and a 28-year-old worker in Alabama who was struck by lightning. Credit Card Debt Surpasses $1 Trillion American credit card debt for the first time in history at the end of June as people continue to spend with plastic. That's an increase of 5% from last quarter, fueled by high interest rates. The average credit card annual rate hit a new record of 20.33% last week. The previous record was 19% in July 1991. At the same time, consumer debt in general from May to June, double the $9.4 billion increase the previous month. High interest rates for home sales, student loans, and car purchases were a major driver. DeSantis 'Reloads' With New Campaign Manager Florida Gov. Ron , Generra Peck, with DeSantis' trusted chief of staff James Uthmeier in the third reshuffling of his operations in less than a month. DeSantis has been struggling in his presidential campaign against Donald Trump. Trump holds a big lead , where DeSantis is tied with Chris Christie, and also in Arizona, according to . The DeSantis campaign has twice cut costs and staff but prefers not to call this latest move a "reboot." Instead, they're and say they're in it to win. Enjoy reading The Flyover? mailto:?cc=editor@jointheflyover.com&subject=My%20new%20favorite%20newsletter!&body=Hey!%0D%0A%0D%0AI%E2%80%99ve%20been%20reading%20a%20new%20newsletter%20every%20morning%20called%20The%20Flyover.%20I%20love%20it!%20I%20think%20you%27ll%20love%20it%20too.%0D%0A%0D%0AIt%E2%80%99s%20my%20new%20favorite%20source%20for%20news%20first%20thing%20in%20the%20morning.%20They%20cover%20important%20and%20interesting%20stories%E2%80%94usually%20politics%2C%20sports%2C%20finance%2C%20science%20%26%20tech%2C%20etc.%0D%0A%0D%0AI%20think%20you%20should%20give%20it%20a%20try.%0D%0A%0D%0AJust%20copy%20this%20link%20and%20paste%20it%20into%20your%20browser%3A%20https%3A%2F%2Fjointheflyover.com%2F%3Futm%3D83%0D%0A%0D%0ALet%20me%20know%20if%20you%20like%20it.%20I%20think%20you%20will!%0D%0A to share with your friends and family. ➤ The Supreme Court revived President Biden's restrictions on so-called ghost guns that a lower court had invalidated, at least until the case is heard next month in an appeals court. It could ultimately return to the Supreme Court. ()➤ Ohio voters surged to the polls Tuesday to vote on whether to make it harder to amend the state constitution. At issue is whether the state's abortion law can be changed by a simple majority of voters, or require 60 percent approval. ()➤ Massachusetts Gov. Maura Healey declared a state of emergency Tuesday over a surge of migrants that have overwhelmed the state's social services. She called for more funding from the federal government. ()➤Tampa Mayor Jane Castor hooked a surprising catch while on a family fishing trip in Florida: She reeled in a 70-pound package of cocaine, which she recognized immediately. Castor is a former narcotics officer and police chief. () Flying together with: The FEDNOW Dollar is LIVE. In a cashless society, you might be forced to use the government's new "digital dollar," giving the government a stranglehold on everything you love and believe in. This new Digital Dollar IS going to redefine the very nature of money as we know it. There is a way to opt-out of the digital dollar before it's too late. ➤ University of Colorado football players have begun wearing practice jerseys that display their social media handles to help build their financial value in the new Name, Image, Likeness endorsement market. ()➤ The Baltimore Orioles came under heavy criticism for suspending Kevin Brown, its longtime announcer, after he mentioned their historically poor record against the Tampa Bay Rays. The Orioles now say the announcer will return this Friday. ()➤ NY Jets star quarterback Aaron Rodgers suffered an injury scare at practice when a teammate pass-rushed right into his pinky toe. Rodgers was OK, but the team got a lecture about never touching the franchise player. () Market Report 8/8/23 | ▼ | NASDAQ Natl. ()➤ Eli Lilly raked in nearly $1 billion in second-quarter sales--$200 million more than Wall Street expected. The revenue was driven by its diabetes drug Mounjaro, which is also used for weight loss. ()➤ Beyond Meat revenue plunged 30% in the second quarter as consumer demand for its plant-based "meat" fell despite price cuts. The company says it's battling perceptions that its products are unhealthy and overly processed. That's why we wrote Inside, you'll find the little-known secrets that can free you from the grip of the government so you can achieve YOUR American Dream. ➤ U.S. scientists achieved net energy gain from a fusion reaction for the second time, duplicating results seen in December and offering the promise that fusion could become a practical energy source. ()➤ SpaceX launched 15 new Starlink satellites Monday night and landed the returning launch rocket safely on a ship at sea. There are now 4,500 Starlink satellites offering Internet service in 60 countries. ()➤ It 's official: European scientists say July 2023 was Earth's hottest month on record. Recorded temperatures only go back to about 1850, but researchers say this could be the hottest month since the ice age 120,000 years ago. () ➤ A Burger King cook who never missed work for 27 years received $400,000 in crowdsourced donations to make up for the stingy gift bag his employer gave him, which included a Starbucks cup, a bag of Reese's candy, and two packets of life-savers. ()➤ The World Dog Surfing Championship drew hundreds to the Pacific Coast to watch dogs compete in specially designed wetsuits and goggles. name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: What are your thoughts?
body:
There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried

|
---
| | | [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c20035%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=lKlpLLrYvo7UBm4fMTPSEw&sysid=1)
---
| Fellow American,

There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried for Americans who hold to biblical & faith-based values. [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c20036%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=0uW1IE5MDjWRJJnJbahAqg&sysid=1) After the _Respect for Marriage Act_ was passed by a bi-partisan effort and signed into law, I am fearful that legal persecution will only intensify against Americans holding to faith-based values and who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

[**Are you concerned that America is abandoning a basic tenet of our founding -_Religious Liberty?_**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c20037%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=OciR%2fGBQrQQLAiAxW7EKgA&sysid=1)

In addition to the passing of the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , numerous examples over the past decade have concerned me: KENNEDY v. BREMERTON SCHOOL DISTRICT, MASTERPIECE CAKESHOP v. COLORADO CIVIL RIGHTS COMMISSION, and 303 CREATIVE v. ELENIS are just a few examples of legal persecution against Americans holding to faith-based values who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

Furthermore, an amendment to the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , brought forth by Senator Mike Lee, prohibiting the Federal Government from retaliating against schools, businesses, and organizations because of their religious beliefs about same-sex marriage failed.

**This has the potential to only intensify legal persecution against individuals, businesses, churches, and nonprofits holding to faith-based values. **

The American Cornerstone Institute is a non-profit that I founded to preserve and promote the cornerstones that laid the foundation for the greatest nation the world has ever seen: Faith, Liberty, Community, and Life.

Whether it is a football coach losing his job for praying at midfield after a game, or a baker being sued for not wanting to bake a cake that violates his religious values, **are you concerned as I am with the increase in legal persecution against Americans who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith?**

Please share your thoughts in this quick 2-minute survey concerning religious liberty in America.

**[https://offers.americancornerstone.org/religious-liberty-survey/](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c20038%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=gAt2ZrfHO3IVCRW4%2fdCmrg&sysid=1)**

Thank you for your consideration.

Regards,

Dr. Ben Carson
Founder & Chairman American Cornerstone Institute
---
---
| |
---
---
Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country’s most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government’s role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation’s citizens.

body:

---|---|---

| | **Dear Friend,** | **Don’t let another wolf pup become an orphan at the hands of trophy hunters. Rush your $27 donation to Friends of the Earth today!** _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | [Donate $27 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1919509?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)

---

---
[Donate another amount](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1919512?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
One bullet. That’s all it takes to kill a mama wolf. It only takes one bullet to leave her pups orphaned and alone. To leave them to starve or fall prey. To decimate an entire wolf family.
As you read this, trophy hunters are tracking down and targeting wolves across the country. And right now in the Northern Rockies states, **there are no federal safeguards to keep gray wolves safe from them.** [**We can’t stand by and let vicious hunters rip apart wolf families: Donate $27 today and help us reach our $4,300 goal to protect wolves and our planet before we reach the point of no return.**](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1919513?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
Left alone, wolf pups can suffer from __hypothermia__ and __starvation__. But trophy hunters and Big Oil lobbies are actively fighting back **against** protections for these innocent creatures. Those actions contributed to the gutting of the Endangered Species Act and protections for wolves, bears, and other vulnerable species.
In the past decade alone, _**more than 3,200 wolves have been killed**_ \-- it’s cruel, and it’s wrong. We can’t let these ruthless practices continue. We need your help if we’re going to stop the senseless massacre of vulnerable wolves and protect our planet. We pulled your record, and here’s what we found:
| [ ](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1919514?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
**EMAIL: **dpwillis67@gmail.com
**VULNERABLE WOLVES** :** FACING EXTINCTION**
**SUPPORTERS FROM YOUR AREA NEEDED** :8
---
| | [DONATE NOW](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1919515?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
_Records reflect most recent available data. 11:59 p.m deadline._
---
Wolves aren’t just being killed -- they are being viciously murdered by trophy hunters and their merciless methods. Wolves are being left suffering for days with their **paws stuck in steel traps.** Neck snares cut into their necks, causing them to **slowly choke to death** while they try desperately to escape. **Hunters are even dynamiting nursing wolf mothers and pups in their dens.**
Over the past six decades, wolf populations had begun to make a slow recovery. But these barbaric hunting policies are gravely impacting wolves’ ability to rebound. And even though wolves are protected within Yellowstone, they aren’t bound by state or park lines. The second a wolf sets its paws across those borders, it faces extreme danger. That’s because states in the northern Rockies refuse to grant them protections through the Endangered Species Act.
Why are private interests pushing so hard against protections for wolves? So trophy hunters can keep killing wolves in the most vicious ways imaginable. And so Big Polluters can take over their lands and open them up to mining, logging, and other planet-harming practices. Friend, are profits and killing for “fun” really worth pushing wolves toward extinction, and putting their ecosystems at risk?
I don’t think so. That’s why I’m reaching out to you today. I won’t sugarcoat it: we’re running out of time to save wolves. If we don’t act soon, you and I could be part of the last generation to share the Earth with these beautiful creatures. That’s why wolves need you now more than ever. Will you join us today and fight to protect America’s remaining wolves and our planet before we lose them forever?
**Don’t let trophy hunters put their personal interests over the survival of innocent wolves and our planet. Donate $27 or more today and help us reach our $4,300 goal before the damage is irreversible.**
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
[Donate $27 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1919509?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---

---
[Donate $100 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1919511?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate another amount](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1919512?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
Did you know that wolves are vital to the ecosystems they live in? They help keep elk and deer populations in check, allowing other plant and animal species to thrive. What’s more, the remains of their kills redistribute nutrients and feed scavengers. They truly are a keystone species!
Yet, trophy hunters and Big Oil lobbies are pushing against protections for these precious creatures. Their hope is to kill them for sport and invade their habitats for the sake of corporate greed. **Now, only 6,000 wolves remain in the lower 48 states.**
And for trophy hunters, it’s not enough to just take the lives of innocent wolves -- they resort to helicopter chases and torturous snares that fill a wolf’s last hours with _**panic, dread, and insurmountable pain.**_ To make matters worse, wolf pups are left orphaned after their mothers are gunned down in the woods. Without their mothers, wolf pups can suffer from _**hypothermia, starvation, and predation.**_
Friends of the Earth is fighting back and working to end the bloody violence against our last surviving wolf packs and protect our planet. That means we’re fighting with everything we have to protect the Endangered Species Act. The ESA allows us to shield endangered species from senseless violence and block destructive industries like Big Oil, logging and factory farming from destroying vital habitats for profits. Friend, your membership gift today can help save wolves from relentless attacks on the ESA and protect the future of our planet.
But we are facing pushback from private trophy-hunting interests, and we need to step up our efforts before it’s too late. If just 8 more activists from your area contribute today, we can reach our $4,300 goal -- will you rush your $27 membership donation now?
**Protect the remaining wolves and our planet from greedy private interests. Donate $27 before the clock strikes midnight and help us reach our $4,300 goal.**

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: Can I get your thoughts on religious liberty in America?
body:
There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried

|
---
| | | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z78veek45nq6hqdg8fnup9lllkca7lb9t7f2tjq0_rp22sh2s8i66p74clieao32cdh2bs)
---
| Fellow American,

There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried for Americans who hold to biblical & faith-based values. [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zpk7obh7da5l6kp67rlq3dftskkgf9aa5vf2qr70_rp22sh2s8i66p74clieao32cdh2bs) After the _Respect for Marriage Act_ was passed by a bi-partisan effort and signed into law, I am fearful that legal persecution will only intensify against Americans holding to faith-based values and who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

[**Are you concerned that America is abandoning a basic tenet of our founding -_Religious Liberty?_**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z69efpslb3k3tfnpjvv5rt26epuompp9fh9uqfho_rp22sh2s8i66p74clieao32cdh2bs)

In addition to the passing of the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , numerous examples over the past decade have concerned me: KENNEDY v. BREMERTON SCHOOL DISTRICT, MASTERPIECE CAKESHOP v. COLORADO CIVIL RIGHTS COMMISSION, and 303 CREATIVE v. ELENIS are just a few examples of legal persecution against Americans holding to faith-based values who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

Furthermore, an amendment to the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , brought forth by Senator Mike Lee, prohibiting the Federal Government from retaliating against schools, businesses, and organizations because of their religious beliefs about same-sex marriage failed.

**This has the potential to only intensify legal persecution against individuals, businesses, churches, and nonprofits holding to faith-based values. **

The American Cornerstone Institute is a non-profit that I founded to preserve and promote the cornerstones that laid the foundation for the greatest nation the world has ever seen: Faith, Liberty, Community, and Life.

Whether it is a football coach losing his job for praying at midfield after a game, or a baker being sued for not wanting to bake a cake that violates his religious values, **are you concerned as I am with the increase in legal persecution against Americans who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith?**

Please share your thoughts in this quick 2-minute survey concerning religious liberty in America.

**[https://offers.americancornerstone.org/religious-liberty-survey/](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zhkh48mfajrhum12r4t6g91ff9ohhheqp4stpd5g_rp22sh2s8i66p74clieao32cdh2bs)**

Thank you for your consideration.

Regards,

Dr. Ben Carson
Founder & Chairman American Cornerstone Institute
---
---
| |
---
---
Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country’s most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government’s role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation’s citizens.
---
|
---
| _Copyright © 2023 American Cornerstone Institute, All rights reserved._

---

GOP Presidential
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_

| | On August 2, I was interviewed as an expert in constitutional law by Chris Stigall on Salem Media’s AM 990, the Answer, in Philadelphia; by Emerald Robinson’s Absolute Truth Show on Frank TV; and by Andrew Wilkow of Sirius XM radio’s The Wilkow Majority—all on the topic of Special Counsel Jack Smith’s latest indictment of former President Donald Trump. I explained why the charges brought by Smith are frivolous. I also explained that they violate the First Amendment, lack a sound basis in fact, and constitute a gross, unprecedented recreation of the law contrary to its plain and intended meaning. I said the prosecution is further confirmation of DOJ’s weaponization of the law against Biden Administration political opponents, its violation of bedrock constitutional principles of equal justice under law, and confirmation that the Biden DOJ and FBI adhere to a two-tiered justice system favoring Democrats and disfavoring Republicans.

clean_body: Friend, The campaign to Save Virginia and Save America continued this past week with an interview by Michael Martz of the Richmond Times Dis | | Can't see this message? | | | | | | Save Virginia, Save America Weekly Roundup | | | | | | | Friend, The campaign to Save Virginia and Save America continued this past week with an interview by Michael Martz of the Richmond Times Dispatch; an interview with Chris Stigall on The Answer in Philadelphia; an interview with Andrew Wilkow of Sirius XM Radio’s Wilkow Majority; an interview with Emerald Robinson on Absolute Truth on Frank TV; an interview on the Robert Scott Bell Show; a presentation before the York County GOP in Yorktown, Virginia; and a presentation at the Sully District Meet and Greet in Chantilly, Virginia. | | | | | STRAW POLL | | | | | | | | | | On August 1, I was interviewed by Richmond Times Dispatch reporter Michael Martz for an article concerning the 2024 Senate race. | | | | | | | | | | On August 2, I was interviewed as an expert in constitutional law by Chris Stigall on Salem Media’s AM 990, the Answer, in Philadelphia; by Emerald Robinson’s Absolute Truth Show on Frank TV; and by Andrew Wilkow of Sirius XM radio’s The Wilkow Majority—all on the topic of Special Counsel Jack Smith’s latest indictment of former President Donald Trump. I explained why the charges brought by Smith are frivolous. I also explained that they violate the First Amendment, lack a sound basis in fact, and constitute a gross, unprecedented recreation of the law contrary to its plain and intended meaning. I said the prosecution is further confirmation of DOJ’s weaponization of the law against Biden Administration political opponents, its violation of bedrock constitutional principles of equal justice under law, and confirmation that the Biden DOJ and FBI adhere to a two-tiered justice system favoring Democrats and disfavoring Republicans. | | | | | | | | | | I want to remind Team Emord's friends and volunteers to follow us on Facebook for daily updates and news. Share, Like, and Comment on posts to help spread awareness of our campaign to Save Virginia, Save America! | | | | | | | On August 3, I was interviewed, as I am weekly, on the Robert Scott Bell Show concerning the most pressing national issues affecting freedom and individual rights. | | | | | | | | On August 3, I was a guest speaker at the York County GOP meeting in Yorktown, Virginia. We were greeted warmly and welcomed the tremendous outpouring of support received that evening. There were approximately 50 members present. | | | | | | | On August 5, I welcomed the opportunity to address those attending the Sully District Meet and Greet in Chantilly, Virginia. We again welcomed the several kind words of support given us atthat event. | | | | | | | | | | | See you on the campaign trail, Jonathan | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Sign Up for Updates | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Share on social | | | | You've received this email because you are a subscriber of .
