name: Pro Life Update
subject: The key to Lincoln’s rhetorical success
body:
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills

| This sponsored message from Pro Life Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2za4djpre8h6g26cuodekfh1vp8ivleqemobtukr8_rp22sh2s8i66p74clie6o75cph2bs)
---
| | Dear fellow American,
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid.
While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law.
Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father’s cabin, and did not return until he could “give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight.”
By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly—plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun.
That’s why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic **“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry.”**
Through**“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,”** you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life.
---
| | **Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group.** **** **You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.**
Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because...
Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.
---
| [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z924mrec3r34pqek4uo68fuvl0klcgodv40u3qgo_rp22sh2s8i66p74clie6o75cph2bs)
---
| | That’s why we need the support of friends like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.
Quantities of this special DVD box set are limited, so reserve your copy today. I’ve included a secure link for you to make your tax-deductible gift below:
[_**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/dvd-mathematics-and-logic-course**_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z0edd7bajveo9r479vl075j0pr2799v1gs0om2mg_rp22sh2s8i66p74clie6o75cph2bs)
Thank you for partnering with Hillsdale in its mission on behalf of liberty.
Warm regards,
Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

name: Karen Greenhalgh
subject: Let me be clear...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Karen Greenhalgh for Delegate
body:
| | |
---
| | Hi there- Over the past few months, we have seen the Biden Administration [ramp up](http://sendpatriot.campstrategic.com/go/1/23a9f17af7861f4f16f79d307c796b93/37923/26c050fbd7dea962/6b9cec10fefc15e5c3d6b838967d376c/37923) their mission to over-regulate hard-working Virginians. From regulating gas stoves, dishwashers, and coal-fired pizza ovens, and now even to [water heaters](http://sendpatriot.campstrategic.com/go/1/23a9f17af7861f4f16f79d307c796b93/37923/26c050fbd7dea962/75f4408fcc2ecb1ac3d6b838967d376c/37923), the Democrats up in Washington have gone too far with their reckless policy decisions - which will end up costing you thousands. With high inflation continuing to hurt all of our wallets, I believe the last thing we need right now is _more_ big-government regulation coming from far away politicians. As your delegate, I have made it my mission to reduce taxes and cut consumer costs whenever possible, and I am nowhere near finished. **Let me make it clear: I will ALWAYS support cutting taxes.** Why? It’s simple - [your money](http://sendpatriot.campstrategic.com/go/1/23a9f17af7861f4f16f79d307c796b93/37923/26c050fbd7dea962/29eea2e80f9fc2e9c3d6b838967d376c/37923) belongs with you. I believe citizens can spend their money far better than any government - local, state, or federal - ever will. That’s why I supported cutting the income tax in Richmond, and that’s why I will never stop working to keep more of your own money to your pockets if I am re-elected as your delegate. ** ** The Biden Administration will not stop their efforts to expand the size of government, and the Democrats in Richmond are doing everything they can to follow its lead. As long as I’m your delegate, I promise to protect your wallet - both by supporting tax cuts and the de-regulation of critical household appliances. ** ** Do you agree that it’s about time we pushed back against unnecessary costs imposed by Democrat politicians? If you do,[ please think about giving ](http://sendpatriot.campstrategic.com/go/1/23a9f17af7861f4f16f79d307c796b93/37923/26c050fbd7dea962/67b3766b81986d53c3d6b838967d376c/37923) anything your budget allows to my re-election campaign. $10, $20, or $30 is all it takes to help ensure a more affordable future for everyone in our community.

Thank you so much for your consideration. If you want to learn more about my economic plan for Virginia Beach, please [check out my website](http://sendpatriot.campstrategic.com/go/1/23a9f17af7861f4f16f79d307c796b93/37923/26c050fbd7dea962/463ca477f6296621c3d6b838967d376c/37923)!

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: Can I get your thoughts on religious liberty in America?
body:
There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried

|
---
| | | [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zvosd1sp4ktedfl4fq0fihksvckvnn5530ros1d0_rp22sh2s8i66p74clie1or6cth2bs)
---
| Fellow American,

There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried for Americans who hold to biblical & faith-based values. [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z4acpr14cgft3c8hi3l527mocei2u69ip4m1gtr0_rp22sh2s8i66p74clie1or6cth2bs) After the _Respect for Marriage Act_ was passed by a bi-partisan effort and signed into law, I am fearful that legal persecution will only intensify against Americans holding to faith-based values and who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

[**Are you concerned that America is abandoning a basic tenet of our founding -_Religious Liberty?_**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zcs1og94dvpla0rjbs3ej9lca3aricbfna1ls0ro_rp22sh2s8i66p74clie1or6cth2bs)

In addition to the passing of the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , numerous examples over the past decade have concerned me: KENNEDY v. BREMERTON SCHOOL DISTRICT, MASTERPIECE CAKESHOP v. COLORADO CIVIL RIGHTS COMMISSION, and 303 CREATIVE v. ELENIS are just a few examples of legal persecution against Americans holding to faith-based values who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

Furthermore, an amendment to the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , brought forth by Senator Mike Lee, prohibiting the Federal Government from retaliating against schools, businesses, and organizations because of their religious beliefs about same-sex marriage failed.

**This has the potential to only intensify legal persecution against individuals, businesses, churches, and nonprofits holding to faith-based values. **

The American Cornerstone Institute is a non-profit that I founded to preserve and promote the cornerstones that laid the foundation for the greatest nation the world has ever seen: Faith, Liberty, Community, and Life.

Whether it is a football coach losing his job for praying at midfield after a game, or a baker being sued for not wanting to bake a cake that violates his religious values, **are you concerned as I am with the increase in legal persecution against Americans who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith?**

Please share your thoughts in this quick 2-minute survey concerning religious liberty in America.

**[https://offers.americancornerstone.org/religious-liberty-survey/](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zdpha7cb67oge56ifdtuvbbqe7tjft9jc8kfgcc8_rp22sh2s8i66p74clie1or6cth2bs)**

Thank you for your consideration.

Regards,

Dr. Ben Carson
Founder & Chairman American Cornerstone Institute
---
---
| |

clean_body: There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried | | | | | Fellow American, There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried for Americans who hold to biblical & faith-based values. After the Respect for Marriage Act was passed by a bi-partisan effort and signed into law, I am fearful that legal persecution will only intensify against Americans holding to faith-based values and who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith. In addition to the passing of the Respect for Marriage Act , numerous examples over the past decade have concerned me: KENNEDY v. BREMERTON SCHOOL DISTRICT, MASTERPIECE CAKESHOP v. COLORADO CIVIL RIGHTS COMMISSION, and 303 CREATIVE v. ELENIS are just a few examples of legal persecution against Americans holding to faith-based values who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith. Furthermore, an amendment to the Respect for Marriage Act , brought forth by Senator Mike Lee, prohibiting the Federal Government from retaliating against schools, businesses, and organizations because of their religious beliefs about same-sex marriage failed. This has the potential to only intensify legal persecution against individuals, businesses, churches, and nonprofits holding to faith-based values. The American Cornerstone Institute is a non-profit that I founded to preserve and promote the cornerstones that laid the foundation for the greatest nation the world has ever seen: Faith, Liberty, Community, and Life. Whether it is a football coach losing his job for praying at midfield after a game, or a baker being sued for not wanting to bake a cake that violates his religious values, are you concerned as I am with the increase in legal persecution against Americans who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith? Please share your thoughts in this quick 2-minute survey concerning religious liberty in America. Thank you for your consideration. name: Dan Crenshaw
subject: protecting our children
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DAN CRENSHAW FOR CONGRESS
body:
---
| | | | | | |
---
|
---
| |
---
| Peter-
There is a dangerous, new phenomenon that is sweeping across America and it's threatening the health and safety of our children.
The phenomenon is a radical ideology that seeks to encourage and even facilitate sex changes for kids. This phenomenon has crept into our schools, the mainstream media, and even prominent medical institutions like our children's hospitals.
I won't stand for this, which is why I am working in Congress to fight back.
I've introduced legislation to stop taxpayer funding for programs at children's hospitals if they engage in this pseudoscience. My legislation is simple - it says that if children's hospitals remain focused on evidence-based, quality medicine then they will continue to receive funding. If children's hospitals choose instead to bow to the far-left and engage in so-called "gender affirming care" on children, then taxpayers shouldn't be forced to fund programs that support these medical institutions.
That's not controversial, it's common sense.
What is controversial is this idea that it is "compassionate" to chemically castrate young boys or perform double mastectomies on young girls. In fact, there is ZERO QUALITY EVIDENCE of ANY long-term benefits of transgender surgery, puberty blockers, or hormone therapy for children. Moreover, many of our peer countries in Europe have taken steps to rein in these dangerous practices. They recognize that irreversibly changing a child's physiology without any quality scientific data that point to the benefits is ridiculous. We must recognize that too.
When, according to recent polls, 70% of Americans oppose puberty blockers for minors - to say nothing of sex change surgery - we should not be sending taxpayer dollars to medical institutions that are marching our children down a path from which they cannot return.
I have faced serious opposition to my legislative work on this issue from the far-left and their allies in the media, but I'm not backing down. I know that I am standing for what's right and standing up for our kids.
If you agree, I hope you'll sign the petition below to show that you want to stop this madness and protect our kids from this radical ideology.

body:
| | | Fellow Patriot, I don’t care what the Democrats think about this next sentence—it’s true: **We MUST secure our elections before 2024.**

I want you to rest assured that I will use my voice in Congress to question **EVERYTHING** they tell me to believe and ensure that we have REAL election integrity in our nation. **_I will never stop fighting for free and fair elections in the United States of America._** That statement shouldn’t be controversial, but it’s the reason that the liberal billionaires pulling the strings have made me a **TOP TARGET** in 2024. I can’t say that I blame them. **They don’t want to go up against an America-First veteran in Congress who listens to the American People.** I served our nation on the frontlines as a Ranger-qualified combat Apache Helicopter pilot. Now, I’m running in one of the closest races in the entire country.

clean_body: | | | Fellow Patriot, I don’t care what the Democrats think about this next sentence—it’s true: We MUST secure our elections before 2024. I want you to rest assured that I will use my voice in Congress to question EVERYTHING they tell me to believe and ensure that we have REAL election integrity in our nation. I will never stop fighting for free and fair elections in the United States of America. That statement shouldn’t be controversial, but it’s the reason that the liberal billionaires pulling the strings have made me a TOP TARGET in 2024. I can’t say that I blame them. They don’t want to go up against an America-First veteran in Congress who listens to the American People. I served our nation on the frontlines as a Ranger-qualified combat Apache Helicopter pilot. Now, I’m running in one of the closest races in the entire country. I’m always ready for a fight, but I’ll level with you. Right now, the leftist attacks are out of control. I’m falling out of the sky and I need your help. I need co-pilots if I’m going to stay airborne. I can’t weather this storm alone. name: Tim
subject: I’m out of time and options
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TIM SCOTT FOR AMERICA
body:
This could make or break my campaign. So I’m turning to the one person I know I can count on.

| |
---
| | | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zskamng3jo0r89pap6jg6fkm04v7vu6cnrgo8ih0_rp22sh2s8i66p74clie9pb2cph2bs "TIM SCOTT - FAITH IN AMERICA")
---

Hi Friend, it's Tim Scott!

I'm sorry, but I'm out of time and I'm out of options.

**First:** I announced my Presidential campaign to restore faith in America and save the American Dream.

**Then:** We launched TV ads in Iowa and New Hampshire and I've been traveling all over the country to earn the support of voters like you.

**Now: I need to hit my Donor Goal before the end of week deadline! This could make or break my campaign.**

**_[I need every patriot on my email list to rush $20 by 11:59pm!](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z1f01a82gn9n7in7b04mfgajgk0f09f0qbl8sc2o_rp22sh2s8i66p74clie9pb2cph2bs "I need every patriot on my email list to rush $20 by 11:59pm!")_**

Your immediate support can help me overcome a major obstacle and spring this campaign forward.

If you're ready to restore hope in our country, create new opportunities for everyone, and protect the America we know and love, **_[will you please rush a donation today?](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z1qnmgl5rrus00c5d1tdv6nvik249tf0iibmsmog_rp22sh2s8i66p74clie9pb2cph2bs "will you please rush a donation today?")_**

Tim Scott

---

Friend, I believe our country is hungry for positive, conservative leadership.

It is time for us to restore hope, create opportunities, and protect America. **It is time for us to be proud to be Americans and proud of our president.**

**_[That's why I announced I am running for President of the United States.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z6jht9g0sr7qdbuvg510d23b6sq7k3akqudncnc0_rp22sh2s8i66p74clie9pb2cph2bs "That’s why I announced I am running for President of the United States.")_**

---
| | [SUPPORT MY CAMPAIGN HERE](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zuvkbra0ncemiq73l6sp3s0mka0ouca4bas6ufvo_rp22sh2s8i66p74clie9pb2cph2bs "SUPPORT MY CAMPAIGN HERE")
---

The Democrats have chosen a culture of grievance over greatness. Here's the thing though - I know the power of the American Dream _because I have lived it._ My family went from cotton to congress in a **single lifetime.**

**This isn 't going to be easy.** I'll need your help to win.

---
| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z731votis89c3nr1jtiltgj0i0q8rhgenj2rjl8o_rp22sh2s8i66p74clie9pb2cph2bs "I NEED YOUR HELP TO WIN!")

**_[Can you chip in $5, $10 or even $15 to help me win?](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z7fpcdhot35a0vlklseeke0gr58b4f9empnfhri8_rp22sh2s8i66p74clie9pb2cph2bs "Can you chip in $5, $10 or even $15 to help me win?")_**

Thank you for your support!

-Tim

name: 1600 Daily
subject: Lincoln’s secret weapon
body:
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills

| This sponsored message from 1600 Daily is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z0al8efk7vsv6tv3vpm8r8nekhbvp1ugnuvdeamg_rp22sh2s8i66p74clie1or6cth2bs)
---
| | Dear fellow American, Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid. While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law. Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father’s cabin, and did not return until he could “give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight.” By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly--plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun. That’s why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic **“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry.” ** Through** “Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,”** you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life.
---
| | **Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group.** ** ** **You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.** Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because... Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.
---
| [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2znb99avbkc2hj54tg26krb9pvaiv5lmk8s68k2bg_rp22sh2s8i66p74clie1or6cth2bs)
---
| | That’s why we need the support of friends like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty. Quantities of this special DVD box set are limited, so reserve your copy today. I’ve included a secure link for you to make your tax-deductible gift below: [_**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/dvd-mathematics-and-logic-course**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z908go0r4ueeoikd4m68nodobpoccq9ud9omddho_rp22sh2s8i66p74clie1or6cth2bs) Thank you for partnering with Hillsdale in its mission on behalf of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

1600 Daily

name: Sydney Gallego
subject: Ruben’s with our newborn Isla
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
So I’m writing to you to help give him a little peace of mind.
#

[](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-aug23.NWxa9e&refcode=em230809-1-f&refcode2=899.734936.wepjy0&t=1&akid=899%2E734936%2Ewepjy0)
---
Peter -
I am proud of Ruben.
I am proud of the man he has become, and most of all I am proud of his fierce and unwavering commitment to making life better for everyone regardless of their background.
And a lot of you probably already heard, but our new daughter Isla was born last month. It’s been a busy first month, and Ruben’s been with us every step of the way. He’s a great dad.
But this campaign means a lot to him, too. It’s a lot of work, and he has to raise the money he needs to win. So as much as he’s got one eye on me and Isla, I know he’s got another on his fundraising goals.
While Ruben takes some time off to spend with our growing family, it means a lot less time making fundraising phone calls.
So I’m writing to you to help give him a little peace of mind.
If you could contribute $5, $10 or whatever you can afford today it'd help Ruben reach his fundraising goals as he transitions to time with family for a few weeks.
Just use this link:
[**Can I count on you to contribute $3 to Ruben Gallego's campaign for Senate in Arizona to get August off to a strong start?**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-aug23.NWxa9e&refcode=em230809-1-f&t=2&akid=899%2E734936%2Ewepjy0)

body:
We just filed an urgent lawsuit against Attorney General Merrick Garland and Biden’s DOJ
[View this message in your browser](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z809lbngaj3qg3547oijdciffoi71jn228okg6sg_rp22sh2s8i66p74cdg60ob4c3h238h5e8he485he5o7csn7kuij79hnmer7acjjegon9crl6crn2ct66uqrf91ieoob9crl6uie5sj2upp68cr0eapb1d1medrbappnchi66p72msq78sb0sppr8dbh6ur36s9j61j78s77q9o74oj6e2p6cs74mdhm0tr1coojecr0cup32phmc2p6co70mlhm1o5l64oracdle8iv0)

---

Fellow Patriot, **This is major news. ** We just filed an urgent lawsuit against Attorney General Merrick Garland and Biden's DOJ for failing to enforce federal law which requires Hunter Biden to register as a foreign agent.
| [**DONATE NOW HELP US DO MORE >> **](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z0uu0s7i7ehos9e10tugeju0899o0ghet1i07v50_rp22sh2s8i66p74cdg60ob4c3h2bs)
---
Further, we have uncovered more evidence of serious corruption at the Department of Justice, which points to a cover up of Joe & Hunter Biden's foreign influence peddling operation. In March, **our litigation forced** the National Archives & Records Administration (NARA) to **release emails that clearly show Hunter Biden directly represented Burisma** in its dealings with the White House. Hunter was both a board member of Burisma, a "foreign principal" under law, yet he was allowed to operate secretly as a foreign agent, violating federal law without consequence. I'm extremely proud that, once again, America First Legal is leading the investigations into, and the exposure of, the corruption of the Biden Family and Merrick Garland's DOJ. Many of the major news stories on the Biden Family's corruption, and the most damning revelations of DOJ's misconduct this past year have been fueled by the hard work of AFL's legal team - and by _YOUR_ steadfast support of our mission! [_**_That 's why we need your support again right now_ **_](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zv0el1rbbud8i5once52dv8ovdpr1ahp1nnss64o_rp22sh2s8i66p74cdg60ob4c3h2bs)_**> >**_ [**_DONATE HERE TO KEEP THE HEAT ON BIDEN_**](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zuadhni29fbj83qsp0e30n5i9r6dg2bms3ga46i0_rp22sh2s8i66p74cdg60ob4c3h2bs) _With deep thanks for your continued support of our mission, _ Stephen Miller President, America First Legal

name: Hung Cao
subject: Month one update
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hung Cao for Virginia
body:
| | | [](http://links.hungcaoforva.com/u/click?_t=c514f30bd6cd4b1bb0e09a0456675c53&_m=072788a4a0504378aac7ae896a313db4&_e=GukfnWrRgR9UF-FAyCsrL0lNrEKiuOjN1dTVzfv5-W307o4u2V7otWDXNwRXFQu1RE_FaI_yXpz805uaZWIL4MfGLWDVJA6wk0FtAvAIfADJpCjdDDs0jW3vxUyM173iUzhxWdoaXKvO4zUxH4dLhEFk_UKBWq5V83rZKz3hEoOOf8gZ6BxCgL9sbp661k49N2H3saAJ1agZ8VVVg8ACCFZjweK20y2gY7liOZeBdNTnRd_PJhOufVPJe8tDkWwutLx3ylPDiNvNz75-rsDgpyz7_Aln_L4FisUzzYeRYgyzc-o299bLyRRQArgEzdTG3PDOMXlRWQq1gef89DX4TDDYrjPzqFX8jyM70EM-G3vrxZorNSPQX22q42m6S_Vk)
---
Peter, As we get into August, I wanted to take a moment to recap our July fundraising and I also wanted to take a moment to say thank you from the bottom of my heart.

Last month, we had over 7,000 donations from patriots across the country!

And we did it ALL in TWO WEEKS. Simply Amazing.

All I can say is: THANK YOU.

**We proved that campaign is - and always will be - fueled by grassroots conservatives like you.**

Our momentum so far has been incredible, [but we can’t slow down now](http://links.hungcaoforva.com/u/click?_t=c514f30bd6cd4b1bb0e09a0456675c53&_m=072788a4a0504378aac7ae896a313db4&_e=GukfnWrRgR9UF-FAyCsrL0lNrEKiuOjN1dTVzfv5-W307o4u2V7otWDXNwRXFQu1RE_FaI_yXpz805uaZWIL4MfGLWDVJA6wk0FtAvAIfADJpCjdDDs0jW3vxUyM173iUzhxWdoaXKvO4zUxH4dLhEFk_UKBWq5V83rZKz3hEoOOf8gZ6BxCgL9sbp661k49N2H3saAJ1agZ8VVVg8ACCNlYlgEP70Kuely-m-RnURZ-hyarxlGR6LKF1iWxNHqNoI7RmWTYXDCFlg7OjANpf1DJz5vvBIvmKoOEwWawe7FSXqZ9HKMnpvFhyMwTAXEyC1GUAUOBFRN01dLkkjtXIFcOdsbub6Z0p26LiYf_3aznngwlsuncaJxtZfXTVlmT).
---
[**KEEP THE MOMENTUM GOING >>**](http://links.hungcaoforva.com/u/click?_t=c514f30bd6cd4b1bb0e09a0456675c53&_m=072788a4a0504378aac7ae896a313db4&_e=GukfnWrRgR9UF-FAyCsrL0lNrEKiuOjN1dTVzfv5-W307o4u2V7otWDXNwRXFQu1RE_FaI_yXpz805uaZWIL4MfGLWDVJA6wk0FtAvAIfADJpCjdDDs0jW3vxUyM173iUzhxWdoaXKvO4zUxH4dLhEFk_UKBWq5V83rZKz3hEoOOf8gZ6BxCgL9sbp661k49N2H3saAJ1agZ8VVVg8ACCE-9-lkcvgk3_gLHw32pvcBW14c03bC9MO8hlcIQeXkMJFjSJ4U3jjxwmybXibRURBnfBGf1QHg5yWtZ3Gq7UN16lOq7A0145nFpIpTxbLrgN49KZWNaaX_dw5mxukC6t4NrI3GXiMKwlP0f1qkryt0FpkBVBy2SjR0EAzuILAA0)
---
Peter, launching a campaign the summer is hard. Summer is notoriously the hardest season to fundraise in as people are away from their computers and enjoying the sun with their loved ones.

The few minutes it takes to pitch in mean the world to me. We’ve already achieved so much, but we’re just getting started.

clean_body: | | | Peter, As we get into August, I wanted to take a moment to recap our July fundraising and I also wanted to take a moment to say thank you from the bottom of my heart. Last month, we had over 7,000 donations from patriots across the country! And we did it ALL in TWO WEEKS. Simply Amazing. All I can say is: THANK YOU. We proved that campaign is - and always will be - fueled by grassroots conservatives like you. Our momentum so far has been incredible, . Peter, launching a campaign the summer is hard. Summer is notoriously the hardest season to fundraise in as people are away from their computers and enjoying the sun with their loved ones. The few minutes it takes to pitch in mean the world to me. We’ve already achieved so much, but we’re just getting started. In Liberty, CAPT Hung Cao USN (RET) Please mail checks made out to "Hung Cao for Virginia" to this address: PO Box 652 Purcellville VA 20134 | | Paid for by Hung Cao for Virginia | | Use of military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

subject: We deserve better.

body:
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67809488/420935017/-1487052648?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDcxNTkiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYTE1NGIyMDUtYjczNi1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=o_4L39XKARcHLXtA4J5mitA5Sw343oKEANdC2R9NjZU=&emci=338be0bf-b130-ee11-b8f0-00224832eb73&emdi=a154b205-b736-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=8062649)

| | Here is why I love Utah, Peter: The people. **Few other states have such a strong sense of community. Whether you live in downtown Salt Lake, Tooele, or down south in St. George, we are brought together by the same sense of community.** That sense of community lives in my bones. It's why, when it came time to pick a career, I followed my grandfather, my dad, and my brother into public service and became a teacher. **I stepped in front of a class for the first time on September 11, 2001.** My heart broke for our country, and my thoughts were with the first responders and my friends and family in active service that day. But I was proud and motivated as I talked with my students about the importance of serving our community and our country, especially in times of crisis. One of the things you learn as a teacher is that just about every challenge a community faces will show up in its schools: job losses, economic insecurity, difficulty accessing health care, divisive culture wars, government overreach – everything. Supporting my students as they struggled to navigate those issues inspired me to look for new ways to serve. In 2016, I was elected to the Utah State Board of Education (USBE) to make sure our state's education policy incorporated the perspective of an active teacher (and pragmatic Democrat). At USBE, **I saw up-close how the legislature's extremism and one-party-rule held up progress and hurt working Utahns.** So in 2018, I ran for State Senate to cut through the theatrics, end the gridlock, and actually _solve_ the problems facing our families. Utah Republicans _really_ wanted to hold this seat; they worked hard to try to undermine me, but our people-powered campaign won out, and I've been honored to serve in the State Senate since then. **I've always looked for the best opportunity to serve Utah; like I said, it's kind of the family business. Now I'm ready to bring the fight for our students and families – for our communities – straight to Washington.** We're building a movement of hardworking, community-minded folks who want to restore the importance of _service_ in public service. And, together, we're going to take back this Congressional seat for working Utahns. This is our chance, Peter. This is our moment. And I'm glad to be on this team with you. I'll be in touch from time to time to keep you updated on the campaign and to let you know about opportunities to pitch in. _Kathleen_ | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue But I was proud and motivated as I talked with my students about the importance of serving our community and our country, especially in times of crisis. One of the things you learn as a teacher is that just about every challenge a community faces will show up in its schools: job losses, economic insecurity, difficulty accessing health care, divisive culture wars, government overreach – everything. Supporting my students as they struggled to navigate those issues inspired me to look for new ways to serve. In 2016, I was elected to the Utah State Board of Education (USBE) to make sure our state's education policy incorporated the perspective of an active teacher (and pragmatic Democrat). At USBE, I saw up-close how the legislature's extremism and one-party-rule held up progress and hurt working Utahns. So in 2018, I ran for State Senate to cut through the theatrics, end the gridlock, and actually solve the problems facing our families. Utah Republicans really wanted to hold this seat; they worked hard to try to undermine me, but our people-powered campaign won out, and I've been honored to serve in the State Senate since then. I've always looked for the best opportunity to serve Utah; like I said, it's kind of the family business. Now I'm ready to bring the fight for our students and families – for our communities – straight to Washington. We're building a movement of hardworking, community-minded folks who want to restore the importance of service in public service. And, together, we're going to take back this Congressional seat for working Utahns. This is our chance, Peter. This is our moment. And I'm glad to be on this team with you. I'll be in touch from time to time to keep you updated on the campaign and to let you know about opportunities to pitch in. Kathleen | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | = | = | = | = ---|---|---|--- | | | Paid for and authorized by Riebe for Congress. |

body:
But our work is not done.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67810956/420940089/-849735382?refcode=EM_FR_230809Issue1Victory_SB_90DO_4_NG_N&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNDliOGJkYS1iODM2LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=n0nfvfKlsI_0MlEnmTbxkfxj4T-VcINSUXT6_2H8eRw=) Peter,

Yesterday, Ohioans spoke loud and clear at the ballot box, rejecting Issue One.

I couldn't be more thankful to everyone who volunteered, worked the phones, knocked on doors, and fought against this horrendous measure.

**_Issue One was nothing more than a political power grab by Republican extremists._** To stop a citizen-led initiative to restore reproductive freedom, they tried to change the rules and silence the voices of Ohio voters.

Our fight against the GOP's extreme agenda is not over yet. Now, we have more work ahead, to repair democracy in our state and solidify reproductive freedoms all across Ohio this November.

Now, we have more work ahead, to repair democracy in our state and solidify reproductive freedoms all across Ohio this November. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | | = | = | | = | = | | = Gratefully, Shontel Brown As a Cuyahoga County Council member and Chairwoman of the Cuyahoga County Democratic Party, Shontel Brown has spent the last decade serving the people of Ohio and building coalitions. name: Rep. Dana Criswell
subject: Developing Clear Principles and Values
body:
I often say the decisions I make are about policy, not personality. It is extremely important that a legislator have a clear set of principles by which every piece of legislation is judged if they are going to be successful in adhering to their values. If the principles are clear, it makes judging legislation much easier.

I often say the decisions I make are about policy, not personality. I believe it is extremely important that a legislator have a clear set of principles by which every piece of legislation is judged. If the principles are clear, it makes judging legislation much easier.
During a legislative session, each legislator is asked to cast over a thousand votes, either on the House floor or in a committee where the bill first comes to life. Often, these votes come fast with little time to research and study the purpose or consequences of the bill, which is a tactic used by those in leadership positions to force legislation through the process. A clear set of principles makes these decisions easier and faster.
The Mississippi Republican Party has a platform on which it claims to stand, and all politicians who run for office under the Republican name profess their allegiance. That platform is a good place to start when developing a set of principles to judge legislation. If all Republicans in the Mississippi House of Representatives had referred to this platform during the debate over increasing the gas tax or implementing an internet sales tax, the decision to oppose them would have been easy.
Here is an excerpt from the Mississippi Republican Party's platform on taxes:
_" Mississippi Republicans believe that people, not government, know best how to spend their own money. When people keep more of their hard-earned money, jobs and economic growth will flourish in the free market system._
_Mississippi Republicans support the reduction of the tax burden on our citizens. We believe our tax burden is too high, our tax code is too complicated, and our tax system is inefficient. We believe in the reduction of taxes to empower taxpayers, to create a more competitive environment for job creation, to incentivize work, entrepreneurship, and investment, and to prevent the excessive growth of government. "_
Clearly, the Republican Party Platform opposes an increase in the gas tax or the implementation of an internet sales tax.
Politicians without a clear set of principles and values hate going on record with an opinion and will often "take a walk" during the vote. Taking a walk generally means they actually walk off the floor of the House during the voting process to avoid taking a stand.
I have developed my personal set of principles over the past few of years by which I judge each bill. They are as follows:
**INDIVIDUAL FREEDOM:**
Protecting the personal liberty and freedom of our citizens is the primary role of government. The government does not exist to create liberties but to protect those that were granted to us by God. These liberties have been defined in the constitution of the United States, the constitution of Mississippi, and within the Word of God. Life, Liberty, and the Pursuit of Happiness are God-given rights that must be protected and cherished.
**LIMITED GOVERNMENT:**
Government by nature grows stronger; left unchecked, it erodes the freedoms of its people. Therefore, we must be constantly vigilant to control the growth of government and make efforts to reduce its size. Governmental authority should be concentrated at the lowest level possible because local government is the most responsive to the people.
**TAXES:**
Taxation should be restricted to the lowest possible level that allows the government to accomplish its purpose of protecting individual liberties and freedoms. The government does not exist to provide charity, recreation, or redistribute wealth. Individuals, not the government, are best equipped to spend their money, promote economic growth within the community, and help others less fortunate.
**VALUES:**
Our nation and our state depend on its people and its leaders adhering to the values given to us by God. The freedom to worship God and to raise a family is key to our existence. All decisions, such as education, medical treatment, or discipline, are reserved for the parents, not the government. The government must not interfere with the parents decisions as they rear their children in the nurture and admonition of God.
**Read all of Dana 's post and stay informed about politics in Mississippi**

name: VoteVets Alert
subject: POLL: Majority of Alabama voters oppose Tuberville’s hold
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS
body:
58% of Alabama voters think that Tuberville has made his point and should allow the promotions to move forward
#
Derek, some important news for you today.
A few weeks ago Tommy Tuberville said that if the people of Alabama turned against him over his blockade of promotions, he might consider backing off.
Well, a poll of Alabama voters was just released. And the numbers might surprise you.
**72% of Alabama voters** think that military promotions should not be politicized.
**55% of Alabama voters** think that Tuberville’s hold is harming our national security.
And **58% of Alabama voters** think that Tuberville has made his point and should allow the promotions to move forward.
This isn’t a national poll. This isn’t just Veterans. This is from ruby red Alabama, Tuberville’s home turf. It is overwhelmingly a sample of Trump voters. And they oppose his blockade.
Something’s gotta give here. And VoteVets will keep pushing until it does. But we need you with us.
**[Help us end Tuberville’s blockade on more than 300 senior military promotions. Help us hold Tuberville and the Senate GOP accountable on this. Support VoteVets with a $3 contribution today.**](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-pac-em-august23.WcYsFQ&refcode=em230809-1-30&t=1&akid=15602%2E3013755%2ENrUPft)

name: Jim Jordan
subject: Where have our donations gone?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jim Jordan for Congress
body:
Our fundraising numbers have dropped 40% from this time in August 2021
[Unsubscribe](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_s=60282d079d0a42eab66177e947dae82e&_t=uk6Aifuz2KmzDjxiPJHvfrhHPJct3cra4cC9VNcy9Y34VvHq3RleJ8I3sPar4wGZsONjleVdnrlZLKfZq7Zgu_3P7yZz6FX8qGxz7ger5UY%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_s=60282d079d0a42eab66177e947dae82e&_t=uk6Aifuz2KmzDjxiPJHvfrhHPJct3cra4cC9VNcy9Y34VvHq3RleJ8I3sPar4wGZsONjleVdnrlZLKfZq7Zgu_3P7yZz6FX8qGxz7ger5UY%3D)

[](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=60282d079d0a42eab66177e947dae82e&_e=snqL_t63ryaQ1UhFKVrMGZKp_NSHb4XHzKaqP_OnWir7_s1eQtYm3rb14d80_8kIxwhEzAz0vxzQk6dZmaF7EnKPBA_ZKjfFPU6cKnhOi4KCmvpSx1q-6sDlspaTp9SiKZW6suNhJhXAEgM8PFN76nKuV0mewsOatdtnzoBJF2PsMmtK1AepKHQP6pbZgCw_to5ujT0P_Ch4x6AjY8jPZalQIUvrEgRoeF4_IS9XHqIrmDbt2fCcwGjkZ9O5cjhl1S3Q4jqrozBzwvBM_V3JWyNU-xdOClTLfUAXme3Z_xXB4lsw9AHpuzkef4RZx95ssVYoeQ3aLZoH90yqX-f6EcxiV6BPISsN5jYw2pf-RSCh-ZDHRTl29FbC7VCOgQ_DJJgRsV_qLyRe2OXyItT-7cp5Ux2aookqmh0X7mDbfZ8%3D)
| **$23**

More than 10,119 donations were made to my campaign in July with **an average gift of $23**. And let me tell you that while $23 goes a long way in helping us to reach the voters we need to continue winning elections - not as many people are donating to campaigns like mine as they once did.**In fact, our fundraising numbers have dropped 40% from this time in August 2021**.

This email is on the longer side, so if you don't want to read to the end, **[would you be able to make a contribution of $23](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=60282d079d0a42eab66177e947dae82e&_e=snqL_t63ryaQ1UhFKVrMGZKp_NSHb4XHzKaqP_OnWir7_s1eQtYm3rb14d80_8kIxwhEzAz0vxzQk6dZmaF7EnKPBA_ZKjfFPU6cKnhOi4KCmvpSx1q-6sDlspaTp9SiKZW6suNhJhXAEgM8PFN76nKuV0mewsOatdtnzoBJF2PsMmtK1AepKHQP6pbZgCw_to5ujT0P_Ch4x6AjY8jPZalQIUvrEgRoeF4_IS9XHqIrmDbt2fCcwGjkZ9O5cjhl1S3Q4jqrozBzwvBM_V3JW_j_iW_q3HJHaUuklAmSIx32ZXmF7xqGAS4ZvXLUii53RU8gkBx1PnvASSuCVTCzL599495J8AoMUZrR_gDOhRb2ghuhYPXOd0vv5zJnis0JHNYd_hu130qt1NMWWgwO1a8BmDxVKjFSrfXtwqOB7AE%3D)** , our average July donation, to help us get a head start on our August fundraising?

[**CHIP IN $23
**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=60282d079d0a42eab66177e947dae82e&_e=snqL_t63ryaQ1UhFKVrMGZKp_NSHb4XHzKaqP_OnWir7_s1eQtYm3rb14d80_8kIxwhEzAz0vxzQk6dZmaF7EnKPBA_ZKjfFPU6cKnhOi4KCmvpSx1q-6sDlspaTp9SiKZW6suNhJhXAEgM8PFN76nKuV0mewsOatdtnzoBJF2PsMmtK1AepKHQP6pbZgCw_to5ujT0P_Ch4x6AjY8jPZalQIUvrEgRoeF4_IS9XHqIrmDbt2fCcwGjkZ9O5cjhl1S3Q4jqrozBzwvBM_V3JW5exvfVj0y0LC-773aaQmVnuRnJ8ZqtgYxh8oEiEYb5IbIKfAQ5_p8wR9Z1wPO0FOk_0ivUyIxA9CBeySj6lEaXNHh2NvgGMKnRasPDCh5K0J34dR7V9izwj7mVnlKVG9cgpeT-4swmL-0OTqF8zmbw%3D)
Some political pundits have written articles that spell doom for Republican candidates, opining that conservative candidates/causes have inundated you with too many texts and too much email to sift through in a day. While It’s true that nearly every congressional campaign in the 2024 cycle will attempt to utilize online fundraising to propel them into the House/Senate, not every email or text is created equal; and **not every email or text will deliver the entirety of your donation to the candidate you think you’re donating to.**

Bad actors and political grifters have figured out that online fundraising is a good way to make a quick buck off your generosity. **Not me. Not now, not ever.**

I know a couple of things to be true:
* We must do everything within our power to hold onto the U.S. House – the future of our country absolutely depends on it

* **Democrats are outraising Republicans 2-1 most months, sometimes it can even be as high as 3-1**

That’s why I’m reaching out today. **About Jim Jordan:** Leading the fight to hold Washington accountable.

**
In Washington, Jim Jordan is focused on his oversight role, helping lead investigations into federal agencies

In Congress, Jim Jordan continued to fight for fiscal responsibility,and he offered the only balanced budget of any member of the House or Senate.

As a state legislator, he took on the powerful special interests and the leaders from both political parties who wanted to put Ohio on an unsustainable path of higher taxes and spending.

He built a conservative, pro-family voting record, and authored an alternative state budget that balanced without raising taxes. He became the only legislator in state history to win both the Defender of Life award from Ohio Right to Life and the Pro-Life Legislator of the Year award from the United Conservatives of Ohio.

body:
I introduced two policy solutions to stop the climate crisis: | | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/ZsYp6Jc2ATNP3MkVzvte6Pmk0F4jS6NOytihmYTOZ1f-yWw6Cj7G9e1dlkX4TL0NMWtZ9DST5cFtdsPS-4D2fKNVbxdzSbLD9T9x2URiTkAkvV0OpQQCoNHFnrXrpjTvRLOtceFZ9DYnhss1_uWkAG85t31TmYK7uPe9H0_4T7yW4oOq71PRukghWLPCR3pW3P0wz5vV5ptJepKjw3sjHIVZp2-0HJnPWXuaMZNJ1eetntgVT-u8R1IYJURyzb4Y0bWBzw64j_AlJg6L74Md_Mtn709tipLxhtj-a2dMuUZvWmm9z37ciZWoEzFIOYsO2B3HSdQyMpEby7zsL-HpTvKtQPJF0MTDq7y8xdwaLuEArQwI4SRPgw_NeI24qAjBxegaANUsZQ7uaizXdEq26TKofW59q4GUQJU-SwwogQrbLapWKtluuVMYwfVThbmx/3yl/4yMBQyyxQ96P5rMQ9ENmEw/h0/kz8-Qcvl7US4kT9pHsLwklCuHVv_tfd4iab4r990SRQ)
---
Friend, Across the United States and the world, communities faced brutal heat waves throughout last month. July was the hottest month ever recorded on Earth, and the extreme heat will continue through August. As the UN Secretary General said in late July: _“Climate change is here. It is terrifying. And it is just the beginning... It is still possible to limit global temperature rise to 1.5C [above pre-industrial levels], and avoid the very worst of climate change. But only with dramatic, immediate climate action.”_ That's why I introduced two policy solutions to meet the scale of this crisis by pushing financial institutions and insurance companies to stop funding fossil fuel projects: the **_Fossil Free Finance Act_** __ and the **_Polluter Portfolio Disclosure Act_**. The **_Fossil Free Finance Act,_** introduced with Rep. Ayanna Pressley and Sen. Ed Markey, would require the U.S. Federal Reserve to finally address the climate crisis.
Under the Federal Reserve’s supervision, financial institutions provided trillions in direct fossil fuel financing. The Federal Reserve is supposed to protect our economy, not surrender our planet to corporate polluters or shepherd our financial system to its destruction.
The bill would mandate financial institutions to stop financing projects linked to increased greenhouse gas emissions, to prioritize withdrawing funding from companies and projects that have a disproportionate negative impact on low-income communities and communities of color, and to prioritize lending to companies that provide benefits to workers impacted by the transition to a clean energy economy. We must always center the people who already face environmental racism, including many in my community.
The **_Polluter Portfolio Disclosure Act,_** introduced with Rep. Adam Schiff, would require insurance companies to disclose their investments and underwritings related to coal, oil and gas projects, and fossil fuels.
As our communities face increasing climate risks, major insurers are refusing to cover communities most vulnerable to climate change. But at the same time, these insurers continue to invest in and underwrite the fossil fuel projects and companies driving the climate crisis. The American public deserves to know how the insurance industry is bankrolling the climate crisis.

July was the hottest month ever recorded on Earth, and the extreme heat will continue through August. As the UN Secretary General said in late July: “Climate change is here. It is terrifying. And it is just the beginning... It is still possible to limit global temperature rise to 1.5C [above pre-industrial levels], and avoid the very worst of climate change. But only with dramatic, immediate climate action.” That's why I introduced two policy solutions to meet the scale of this crisis by pushing financial institutions and insurance companies to stop funding fossil fuel projects: the Fossil Free Finance Act and the Polluter Portfolio Disclosure Act. | Check out my email below for more details on both critical bills. Together, we must keep fighting the climate crisis and defending our most vulnerable communities. This year, I introduced two policy solutions to meet the scale of this crisis by pushing financial institutions and insurance companies to stop funding fossil fuel projects: the Fossil Free Finance Act and the Polluter Portfolio Disclosure Act. The Fossil Free Finance Act, introduced with Rep. Ayanna Pressley and Sen. Ed Markey, would require the U.S. Federal Reserve to finally address the climate crisis. Under the Federal Reserve’s supervision, financial institutions provided trillions in direct fossil fuel financing. The Federal Reserve is supposed to protect our economy, not surrender our planet to corporate polluters or shepherd our financial system to its destruction. The bill would mandate financial institutions to stop financing projects linked to increased greenhouse gas emissions, to prioritize withdrawing funding from companies and projects that have a disproportionate negative impact on low-income communities and communities of color, and to prioritize lending to companies that provide benefits to workers impacted by the transition to a clean energy economy. We must always center the people who already face environmental racism, including many in my community. The Polluter Portfolio Disclosure Act, introduced with Rep. Adam Schiff, would require insurance companies to disclose their investments and underwritings related to coal, oil and gas projects, and fossil fuels. As our communities face increasing climate risks, major insurers are refusing to cover communities most vulnerable to climate change. But at the same time, these insurers continue to invest in and underwrite the fossil fuel projects and companies driving the climate crisis. The American public deserves to know how the insurance industry is bankrolling the climate crisis. Thank you for taking action to protect our communities. name: Steve Kerrigan
subject: Join VP Harris this Saturday at Martha’s Vineyard!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Massachusetts Democratic State Committee
body:
Friend,

We are pleased to share that Vice President Kamala Harris will be joining us on Martha’s Vineyard, MA, on Saturday, August 12. Your support will help ensure the Biden-Harris Democrats have the resources needed to win in 2024. We hope you can join Vice President Harris for one of the two exciting events! Make sure to reserve your tickets below:

A Grassroots Reception with Vice President Kamala Harris
Hosted by Judith Batty, Carol & C. Bernard Fulp, Vickee Jordan Adams, Robin Leeds, Wendell Pierce, Tarrus & Kimberly Richardson, and Kirk Sykes & Tammy Jones
Saturday, August 12, 2023
Martha’s Vineyard, MA
RSVP HERE: https://secure.joebiden.com/a/8-12-reception-new-england

Please do not hesitate to reach out to NEFinance@dnc.org or by calling (940) 230-0231 with questions.

I hope to see you there!

Sincerely,
Steve Kerrigan
Chair, Massachusetts Democratic Party

Paid for by the Massachusetts Democratic State Committee
Massachusetts Democratic Party
11 Beacon St
Suite 410
Boston, MA 02108
United States

#
Peter,

In just the last few months, we've managed to recruit dozens of volunteers all over Pennsylvania to help us beat the Democrats at their own game when it comes to the early vote. **But with election day less than 100 days away, it's time to get serious.**

As we expand our reach, we're looking for GOP campaigns, committees, and organizations that want to take up the fight to win the mail-in vote for our Republican candidates. Remember: the Democrats have a 3:1 advantage with mail-in ballots right now, and we can't turn it around unless we work together.

name: Colin Allred
subject: Why Texas Is So Important
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
Peter: This race is bigger than defeating Ted Cruz. Our
Democratic Senate majority and the White House are on the line in 2024.

The future of our democracy and so many of our fundamental rights, from
voting to reproductive freedom, depend on Democrats winning.
Unfortunately, the 2024 Senate map strongly favors Republicans.

But here's the thing: Experts at CNN and FiveThirtyEight are calling Texas
our BEST pickup opportunity – and if we can flip this seat, Democrats are
virtually guaranteed to defend the Senate!

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18996?t=1001&akid=3483%2E346206%2EZBnh2s ]Please, split a donation of $25 or more between my campaign and Charles
Booker before our midnight deadline to help Colin Allred beat Ted Cruz,
flip Texas blue and defend our Democratic Senate majority! →

Our chances have never looked better to flip Texas: This team raised more
in our first 24 hours than Ted Cruz raised in the first three months of
the year, causing Inside Elections to update their official Texas ranking
from "Solid Republican" to "Battleground." People are calling this the
political fight of Ted Cruz's life.

That’s why Mitch McConnell, GOP mega donors and shady special interests
are going to spend whatever it takes to save Ted Cruz and defeat Colin.

But we've got to keep up our momentum, friend, and that's where you come
in. We have an ambitious $150,000 daily fundraising goal because in a
battleground race, money could be the difference between winning and
losing. Right now, we're falling short, and we're counting on you to help
close the gap.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18996?t=1002&akid=3483%2E346206%2EZBnh2s ]Please, will you split a donation of $25 or more between our campaign
and Charles Booker to help us defeat Ted Cruz? Every dollar matters in our
fight to flip Texas blue and protect the Senate – and the future of our
democracy – from Cruz and his allies →

Thank you for being a critical part of this grassroots team.

Team Allred

Contribute to Charles Booker: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-email-donate?refcode=em20230809-3483-footer&t=1003&refcode2=3483_346206_ZBnh2s&akid=3483%2E346206%2EZBnh2s

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.charlesbooker.org/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=3483%2E346206%2EZBnh2s

Contributions to Booker for Kentucky are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.

Paid for by Booker for Kentucky

name: Eugene DePasquale
subject: a win for reproductive rights
disclaimer_text: Paid for by DePasquale for AG
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67817057/420964498/-531765509?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZjFkNjQzZS1jMTM2LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rBwYG0LAuMbB4sING1MQdPUAo-KdPg7Bu-yZhzfsghU=&emci=d34f7572-1336-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=ff1d643e-c136-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=10203249) Team,

This past week, Governor Shapiro terminated the government’s contract with Real Alternatives, the organization that runs scam Crisis Pregnancy Centers (CPCs) across our Commonwealth (and nationwide).

**This was a move I recommended after my audit showed the corruption of the organization and the dangerous, misleading tactics of Crisis Pregnancy Centers.** _That audit not only brought these injustices to light, but ignited the spark for change._

But this win is just the beginning. While anti-choice extremists fight to roll back the right to choose in Pennsylvania, as your next Attorney General, I’ll continue my work guaranteeing the rights of women across PA and ensuring their reproductive choices remain theirs and theirs alone. **[With your help, we can drive real change in Pennsylvania. My 2016 audit was critical in exposing the misuse of taxpayer dollars by anti-choice forces in Pennsylvania – and nationwide.

When I started my audit, my goal was to make sure the tens of millions of taxpayers dollars granted to Real Alternatives were being appropriately directed to provide services to pregnant women in Pennsylvania—I quickly discovered the fraud and abuse was worse than I imagined.

Leaders from both parties told me not to bother with my investigation, but I continued the work to find out what was really going on inside Real Alternatives – **_and what I found made my blood boil._**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67817080/420964523/-412144306?refcode=email_080923_cpcs_t2&amounts=5,15,25,50,100&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZjFkNjQzZS1jMTM2LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rBwYG0LAuMbB4sING1MQdPUAo-KdPg7Bu-yZhzfsghU=)
Real Alternatives was abusing taxpayer dollars and using deceptive practices to give PA women misleading advice and further their anti-choice agenda—all while using your hard-earned tax dollars to drum up business for themselves in other states.

When I called them out, they sued me in an attempt to scare me off their case.

**But listen, I’m not one to back down from a fight. I wasn’t then, and I certainly won’t as your Attorney General.**

I’ll take on the big fights, without fear or favor. I’ll take on big organizations and folks at the highest level of leadership to make sure your rights are protected.

I’ll continue to take action to protect the right to choose in Pennsylvania.

**[Join me in this fight by making a donation today to my campaign for Attorney General →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67817083/420964526/-412144306?refcode=email_080923_cpcs_t2&amounts=5,15,25,50,100&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZjFkNjQzZS1jMTM2LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rBwYG0LAuMbB4sING1MQdPUAo-KdPg7Bu-yZhzfsghU=)**

Thanks,

Eugene

That audit not only brought these injustices to light, but ignited the spark for change. But this win is just the beginning. body:
| | | Hey, I need to reach you.

Today is our fearless leader Annie’s birthday. I spoke to her this morning and there’s only one thing she wants this year: To hit our online fundraising goal before her birthday is over, so we can continue fighting for kids in DC.

So I’m emailing Their Future PAC’s top supporters to issue a challenge. We’re looking to add 500 grassroots donations to help us raise the funds needed for our big announcement coming up.

_“If you believe in our system and you want it to continue, you have to raise your hand and say stop, because this is too great an assault on our system”_

_The Biden DOJ just hit President Trump with THIRD INDICTMENT _

Why is this election so important? Our fundamental freedoms are on the line. If Republicans win, they’ll push their far-right agenda and destroy everything we’ve fought for. Abortion, voting rights, gun safety, and so much more are all on the line. Okay, I want to help defeat Republicans! What can I do? YOU, can make a huge difference. name: GIFFORDS
subject: Our kids deserve better
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Day after day, children’s lives are stolen by senseless acts of gun violence
#

Friends -
Our kids deserve better.
Our kids deserve to grow up in a country where their schools are safe havens for learning, not potential war zones.
Our kids deserve to feel safe when they walk down the street, or when they play outside with friends.
Our kids deserve to grow old.
Yet day after day, children’s lives are stolen by gun violence before they can even see their first double-digit birthday.
Gun violence is the NUMBER ONE cause of death for American children. Not car crashes. Not cancer. It’s guns.
This is not normal, and it doesn’t have to be this way.
We will not rest at GIFFORDS until we see a future where children no longer have to live under the constant threat of gun violence.
[**So please, will you make a contribution to GIFFORDS PAC today? Help fuel our work to create a safer country for generations to come.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-aug23.8Y_0mi&refcode=em230809-1-15&t=1&akid=6304%2E3935704%2EWWJKGf)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_

If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_ | | ** | | | | | | | ** \- The team at GIFFORDS Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org

name: Roy Cooper
subject: a few thoughts on the gun violence epidemic

body:
Will you join me in taking a stand?
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67819143/420971457/823540626?refcode=ea.39958722-c536-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ms=ea.39958722-c536-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzOTk1ODcyMi1jNTM2LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8SCiqSnC_GY4GRMHLkhpETWrEkqygO4FBilbzRbIAYI=&emci=d0a2c319-0f36-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=39958722-c536-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=1049176)
Peter — as of August 1st, more than 25,000 Americans have died this year as a result of gun violence. More than a thousand of the victims were children or teens. We’ve suffered more than 420 mass shootings including at least 20 K-12 school shootings. _It’s unacceptable._ **I’ve taken executive action to help curb gun violence in our state.** I issued an order putting 280,000 criminal convictions in the background check database, helped make our schools safer and started a safe storage campaign. I’ve long called for common sense legislation to reduce gun violence, Peter, but too often radical Republican politicians choose their allegiance to the gun lobby over protecting the lives of those they serve. **[The rest of us need to stand together and demand change. Please, add your name next to mine calling on the GOP to set partisanship aside and join with Democrats to take action on gun violence>>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67819146/420971460/-515936099?refcode=ea.39958722-c536-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ms=ea.39958722-c536-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzOTk1ODcyMi1jNTM2LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8SCiqSnC_GY4GRMHLkhpETWrEkqygO4FBilbzRbIAYI=&emci=d0a2c319-0f36-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=39958722-c536-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=1049176)** | [ADD YOUR NAME »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67819150/420971463/-515936099?refcode=ea.39958722-c536-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ms=ea.39958722-c536-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzOTk1ODcyMi1jNTM2LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8SCiqSnC_GY4GRMHLkhpETWrEkqygO4FBilbzRbIAYI=&emci=d0a2c319-0f36-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=39958722-c536-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=1049176)
---
Gun violence prevention is a deeply personal issue to North Carolinians, where our children are more at risk of death by gun violence than the national average and an average of five North Carolinians a day die of gun injury.
_It’s in our power to change that._
At the national level, we need to institute a new ban on assault weapons. Here in NC, we can pass reasonable reforms like red flag laws and stronger background checks — proposals that Democrats in Raleigh continue to introduce despite Republican opposition.
Gun violence is a public health crisis, and it’s time for all elected officials to treat it like one.
**[I’ll continue to do everything in my power to protect North Carolinians from gun violence, but we can’t get new laws passed when Republican legislators refuse to come to the table. Sign on now to tell the GOP to join us and take action to prevent gun violence>>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67819152/420971480/-515936099?refcode=ea.39958722-c536-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ms=ea.39958722-c536-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzOTk1ODcyMi1jNTM2LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8SCiqSnC_GY4GRMHLkhpETWrEkqygO4FBilbzRbIAYI=&emci=d0a2c319-0f36-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=39958722-c536-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=1049176)**

Peter,
Violent crime is SPIRALING out of control.
Even liberal special interest groups like the NAACP admit it: **the radical Democratic Party’s soft-on-crime agenda is literally DESTROYING American cities.**
_Peter, we CANNOT allow the far-Left to do to the_ _entire country what they’ve done to blue states like California. We need to put an END to this madness._

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: What are your thoughts?
body:
After the Respect for Marriage Act was passed by a bi-partisan effort and signed into law

|
---
| | | [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=599363e8c7f04d008825f70b9fe9a6f9&_e=otj6sqefKF_ChqP5h-AQDWg_Sw6gIygEPb3Kes114Ov3BdBZT-X3k7TxtZ33QlxHlWUoTy1w86JDZ6QR0QO9iwFwgtT2P__nhe1lyu0yUNaNqMRWmaeOb92LJ_j8OvQ7a4ajQAIZl7CYiSuQNgf7cxvkYo7TB0wl3deZzTRkEFwZ7vn8FPkpDnHMPVMn4TwBtNFwYhvENUffrehHhhhhu5j3FOp3rUgHyoIbUNRIwWI8MQJGBNfVA4kjF_dNN-XXy4p1-TUt03zTjqrynLAH8gz-sCN1H4fyJEZexfat_5MVMZ7z0PVQcaqBxzKIrtSuUCpvISXgT5SPDWg5HUiXzb7YgRG5jLPqemiT7w8aES56j5gUeL33anQUUerriZb4t-IKyRNynwHvNxJsuO_joiStt8zz5_bDoQ_9qohrHDw%3D)
---
| Fellow American,

There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried for Americans who hold to biblical & faith-based values. [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=599363e8c7f04d008825f70b9fe9a6f9&_e=otj6sqefKF_ChqP5h-AQDWg_Sw6gIygEPb3Kes114Ov3BdBZT-X3k7TxtZ33QlxHlWUoTy1w86JDZ6QR0QO9iwFwgtT2P__nhe1lyu0yUNaNqMRWmaeOb92LJ_j8OvQ7a4ajQAIZl7CYiSuQNgf7cxvkYo7TB0wl3deZzTRkEFwZ7vn8FPkpDnHMPVMn4TwBtNFwYhvENUffrehHhhhhu5j3FOp3rUgHyoIbUNRIwWI8MQJGBNfVA4kjF_dNN-XXy4p1-TUt03zTjqrynLAH8nWOOhkFOAnzoHqaD7ujyV3dNLlBteLSc0T60MaLb_Xyi0LSjPjgtiMuQ4GTP31NGj9Qt8z4CcuWtlqDm0xeX-NDT4380opftN997MhNVNdusf5UqSc8bYfjC3JdP4L-4EWus_2A-LH8TRTUhu7wCp8%3D) After the _Respect for Marriage Act_ was passed by a bi-partisan effort and signed into law, I am fearful that legal persecution will only intensify against Americans holding to faith-based values and who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

[**Are you concerned that America is abandoning a basic tenet of our founding -_Religious Liberty?_**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=599363e8c7f04d008825f70b9fe9a6f9&_e=otj6sqefKF_ChqP5h-AQDWg_Sw6gIygEPb3Kes114Ov3BdBZT-X3k7TxtZ33QlxHlWUoTy1w86JDZ6QR0QO9iwFwgtT2P__nhe1lyu0yUNaNqMRWmaeOb92LJ_j8OvQ7a4ajQAIZl7CYiSuQNgf7cxvkYo7TB0wl3deZzTRkEFwZ7vn8FPkpDnHMPVMn4TwBtNFwYhvENUffrehHhhhhu5j3FOp3rUgHyoIbUNRIwWI8MQJGBNfVA4kjF_dNN-XXy4p1-TUt03zTjqrynLAH8l0ZptscbliNlnzJTSZvanhAgkTGd8PYl49_FSK_ELaOY8yH042f5aXs6_D9i0yL6OfCtCowlE-tGKsdWjGgV2Cxec1S4yHC_JWr8NW522rhRgj9ysZM-QwrIGcW1hPPdk8rKbWSXxEazIlKqt00On0%3D)

In addition to the passing of the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , numerous examples over the past decade have concerned me: KENNEDY v. BREMERTON SCHOOL DISTRICT, MASTERPIECE CAKESHOP v. COLORADO CIVIL RIGHTS COMMISSION, and 303 CREATIVE v. ELENIS are just a few examples of legal persecution against Americans holding to faith-based values who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

Furthermore, an amendment to the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , brought forth by Senator Mike Lee, prohibiting the Federal Government from retaliating against schools, businesses, and organizations because of their religious beliefs about same-sex marriage failed.

**This has the potential to only intensify legal persecution against individuals, businesses, churches, and nonprofits holding to faith-based values. **

The American Cornerstone Institute is a non-profit that I founded to preserve and promote the cornerstones that laid the foundation for the greatest nation the world has ever seen: Faith, Liberty, Community, and Life.

Whether it is a football coach losing his job for praying at midfield after a game, or a baker being sued for not wanting to bake a cake that violates his religious values, **are you concerned as I am with the increase in legal persecution against Americans who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith?**

Please share your thoughts in this quick 2-minute survey concerning religious liberty in America.

**[https://offers.americancornerstone.org/religious-liberty-survey/](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=599363e8c7f04d008825f70b9fe9a6f9&_e=otj6sqefKF_ChqP5h-AQDWg_Sw6gIygEPb3Kes114Ov3BdBZT-X3k7TxtZ33QlxHlWUoTy1w86JDZ6QR0QO9iwFwgtT2P__nhe1lyu0yUNaNqMRWmaeOb92LJ_j8OvQ7a4ajQAIZl7CYiSuQNgf7cxvkYo7TB0wl3deZzTRkEFwZ7vn8FPkpDnHMPVMn4TwBtNFwYhvENUffrehHhhhhu5j3FOp3rUgHyoIbUNRIwWI8MQJGBNfVA4kjF_dNN-XXy4p1-TUt03zTjqrynLAH8m8MyXY1c5aPJn6LKeh9TRTUfYaP3m5N4CJBFgIIq3o5M4vIBS2AGMsC_F-CVkNHlSAf0wuCuVUVn5WyqFhyIZn934dGn12x0i6JxxLYmu-16KKHk3AHVDSKC9K5dWsCwlm6w4WLX07AeP3Btn28BIE%3D)**

Thank you for your consideration.

Regards,

Dr. Ben Carson
Founder & Chairman American Cornerstone Institute

name: Ro Khanna
subject: Congress must regulate the airline industry
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ro for Congress
body:
https://rokhanna.com [https://rokhanna.com]

Friend,

The airline industry is failing us.

American taxpayers provided airlines with over $54 billion [https://www.politico.com/news/2021/11/20/airlines-pandemic-bailout-cancellations-523100] in federal pandemic airline aid. Airlines promised to use the aid to prevent layoffs and maintain staffing levels for when demand returned. But despite the post-COVID return to travel, major airlines like American, Delta, United, and Southwest have dragged their feet on rehiring while reporting record revenues.

Between fare hikes and mismanagement, passengers are spending more and more money only to wait hours in limbo at airports until they can reach their destination. Meanwhile, airlines are overexerting their employees without a concrete plan to restore their staffing to pre-pandemic levels.

This cannot continue. Sign if you agree: It’s time to regulate the airline industry. [https://actionnetwork.org/forms/sign-the-petition-congress-must-regulate-the-airline-industry-3?source=20230712SWRegulateAirlines_RK&referrer=group-ro-khanna&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fdk-regulate-airline-industry-petition-swap]

Sign the Petition [https://actionnetwork.org/forms/sign-the-petition-congress-must-regulate-the-airline-industry-3?source=20230712SWRegulateAirlines_RK&referrer=group-ro-khanna&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fdk-regulate-airline-industry-petition-swap]

Congress has the power to enforce stronger consumer protection and labor requirements in the airline industry. By implementing strict regulations, Congress must discourage airlines from overbooking flights and ensure improved service.

Tell Congress: Protect passengers and the planet by regulating the airline industry. [https://actionnetwork.org/forms/sign-the-petition-congress-must-regulate-the-airline-industry-3?source=20230712SWRegulateAirlines_RK&referrer=group-ro-khanna&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fdk-regulate-airline-industry-petition-swap]

In solidarity,
Ro

---
**_Click on the image above for more information!_**
| **"The Switcher" is Jim Herring’s vivid, birds-eye account of the politicians, parties, and principles that competed for voters’ allegiances from the 1960s through 2008 in Mississippi.**

The son of passionate conservative Democrats, Jim ultimately became the only State Chairman of the Mississippi Republican Party to serve previously on the Mississippi Democratic Party Executive Committee. Jim currently serves on the Board of Directors for the Mississippi Center for Public Policy.

**Tickets to the event can be found[here](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=d27811809e&e=5703353baa). **Copies of "The Switcher" will be available for purchase.

name: Conservative Liberty Wire
subject: Learn from Victor Davis Hanson
body:
This sponsored message from Conservative Liberty Wire is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=60dae871a3534db09ea54638ac777a98&_e=gY7zeOymttkAvyzmTmQ5XfeKwyr2Qb8_uUKjVyaHjZnGBOB8sMVPU2QspCxjxPEBt_T-BW_eDebmFfCD-YYspSn1w8X4F93su9hGJqknSRkuOerr25IRrdtjvjbGNuuo4hyBBU9CFcaGV1r2VnqGmCsL6Fk-e2KZD6UGG5sZlvZ2G2t9Gs1f7bDX46r1uEpGaoMK8nl7GqdW0BTcGUfqBvYPt8VFBL2we8Y9KH7J8w6o5BIyYKAH1zueD-YUEdBdcgB0nKNeR_-izPwkD-G-9SYRw2ioh8RgB4I0Jtu3_5b0xTaALH0qqVvX8OCpDrnwVQ1dIpJILB3iTtTdBw7WKv-3-7YhGKWcflI-U1SB5yavlp-AsBT8QqMaoWtu5QS3nu4y8OC2MDvv-LpyeX9_007ltm7kOmwfxkq7_PLOYcM%3D) Dear Fellow American,
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we're losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important.
To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled "The Second World Wars."
Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict's diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=60dae871a3534db09ea54638ac777a98&_e=gY7zeOymttkAvyzmTmQ5XfeKwyr2Qb8_uUKjVyaHjZnGBOB8sMVPU2QspCxjxPEBt_T-BW_eDebmFfCD-YYspSn1w8X4F93su9hGJqknSRkuOerr25IRrdtjvjbGNuuo4hyBBU9CFcaGV1r2VnqGmCsL6Fk-e2KZD6UGG5sZlvZ2G2t9Gs1f7bDX46r1uEpGaoMK8nl7GqdW0BTcGUfqBvYPt8VFBL2we8Y9KH7J8w6o5BIyYKAH1zueD-YUEdBdcgB0nKNeR_-izPwkD-G-9dp0wwgnK0tnBs4l25DDjRXbPeZrX0ET6ibPL8__RY3-B1Gw-tVPdX4iluXVY4LlI4fdUPM4kXVdSf87m2UigPk72gjURokFKvrpYG7bnL_yJjbDua3YobwqrV2MAkZE4NTgM7FhkLrVd8QA2tJhvHc%3D) If you'd like to secure a DVD set before they're all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.
Here's a secure link to reserve your copy of "**The Second World Wars** " on DVD:
**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=60dae871a3534db09ea54638ac777a98&_e=gY7zeOymttkAvyzmTmQ5XfeKwyr2Qb8_uUKjVyaHjZnGBOB8sMVPU2QspCxjxPEBt_T-BW_eDebmFfCD-YYspSn1w8X4F93su9hGJqknSRkuOerr25IRrdtjvjbGNuuo4hyBBU9CFcaGV1r2VnqGmCsL6Fk-e2KZD6UGG5sZlvZ2G2t9Gs1f7bDX46r1uEpGaoMK8nl7GqdW0BTcGUfqBvYPt8VFBL2we8Y9KH7J8w6o5BIyYKAH1zueD-YUEdBdcgB0nKNeR_-izPwkD-G-9RlkWoKkHvSYs_fMz6NhbLnEBWEmja-b4ejkefkbSfQiKpSXFzOXGNd26WfP1t4gbdtTsfhPNe6gFnkuCvHwhYd3s5wNYR7Qjl2lLqjjJbsDJcehg2CTXTwVoH9OZ6yAZUAeov_AhRbW60SXzEFIHgA%3D)**

name: Jameson Ellis
subject: China, Fentanyl, and Border Security
body:
(Dan Crenshaw's dirty little secret?)

| | | |
---
**FELLOW PATRIOT:**
(and the Dan Crenshaw staffer spying on me)
Recently my opponent, Dan Crenshaw, posted a video of him sending a message to the Mexican government.

He's basically begging Mexico to join the U.S. in fight against the cartels.

Let's think this through and ask a few _simple_ questions...

**Who are supplying the majority of weapons and Fentanyl to the cartels in the first place?**

China.

**Guess who's gained strength by aligning themselves with Russia?**

China.

**Why has Russia been pushed towards China?**

The U.S. involvement in Ukraine.

**Who fully supports U.S. involvement in Ukraine?**
Mr. Dan Crenshaw.
**Who voted to send BILLIONS of U.S. taxpayer money to Ukraine?**
Mr. Dan Crenshaw.
_(and _unapologetically_ , I might add)_
**Here's a solution I will fight for** that I believe will help more than pleading with the Mexican government to voluntarily cut-off the kickbacks they get from the cartels...
Cut off _**ALL**_ aid to Ukraine, bring our troops home _**NOW**_ , and assure Russia that NATO will not admit Ukraine _so long_ as Putin exits his military alliance with China.
_(this will weaken China and will also prevent them going after Taiwan as a byproduct)_
Then... the financial and military resources that are no longer going to Ukraine should be redirected to protecting our Southern border.
_This_ is what putting America First looks like, wouldn't you agree?
_For Liberty,_
| | |
---
|
---

clean_body: (Dan Crenshaw's dirty little secret?) | | | | FELLOW PATRIOT: (and the Dan Crenshaw staffer spying on me) Recently my opponent, Dan Crenshaw, posted a video of him sending a message to the Mexican government. He's basically begging Mexico to join the U.S. in fight against the cartels. Let's think this through and ask a few simple questions... Who are supplying the majority of weapons and Fentanyl to the cartels in the first place? China. Guess who's gained strength by aligning themselves with Russia? China. Why has Russia been pushed towards China? The U.S. involvement in Ukraine. Who fully supports U.S. involvement in Ukraine? Mr. Dan Crenshaw. Who voted to send BILLIONS of U.S. taxpayer money to Ukraine? Mr. Dan Crenshaw. (and unapologetically , I might add) Here's a solution I will fight for that I believe will help more than pleading with the Mexican government to voluntarily cut-off the kickbacks they get from the cartels... Cut off ALL aid to Ukraine, bring our troops home NOW , and assure Russia that NATO will not admit Ukraine so long as Putin exits his military alliance with China. (this will weaken China and will also prevent them going after Taiwan as a byproduct) Then... the financial and military resources that are no longer going to Ukraine should be redirected to protecting our Southern border. This is what putting America First looks like, wouldn't you agree? For Liberty, | | | | | | | | | | | | ---|---|---|--- • • Sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com Jameson Ellis, 9803 Hwy 242 #162, Conroe, TX 77385, United States
