| | Hey, Peter, it's David Hogg, gun safety advocate and co-founder of March For Our Lives. Many of our elected officials can be described as one word: **_Cowards_****.** Our kids, our planet, our freedoms, our democracy — are all under attack by far-right extremists, from the State House to the U.S. Senate, who are willing to let children be slaughtered at school and watch our planet burn for their own personal gain. **We refuse to back down.** There were many who said after Parkland that we couldn't change anything because we were just a "bunch of kids." But we proved them wrong — **we passed gun laws in a state owned by the NRA.** There were many who said young people would never vote. But we proved them wrong in 2018 — _defeating more NRA backed politicians than ever before in U.S. history._ Then, in 2020, we defeated NRA puppet Donald Trump. **Both of these victories enabled us to pass the first federal gun law in 30 years.** There were many who said Maxwell Frost, March For Our Lives' first National Organizing Director, could never be the first Gen Z Member of Congress. **But we proved them wrong, again.** Badass young people have a habit of being underestimated — and I have a habit of scaring the shit out of Republicans by proving that, while we might be young, we are _powerful_. **That is why today, myself and Kevin Lata, Maxwell Frost's Campaign Manager and 2022 Campaign Manager of the Year, are launching Leaders We Deserve** — a grassroots organization dedicated to electing young leaders to Congress, and especially our State Legislatures, across the country to help defeat the far-right's agenda and advance a progressive vision for the future. Leaders We Deserve will work in partnership with a stacked Advisory Board, including Maxwell Frost, Justin Jones, and other influential leaders. [**Are you in? Split a donation between Leaders We Deserve and****Nick Melvoin****so we can win back our country and advance a progressive agenda.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67821228/420979587/463860583?refcode=2023-08-09-lwd&recurring=0&amount=3&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=a64094d1-c736-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQxNjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYTY0MDk0ZDEtYzczNi1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=HsAu1Pz4yyiV-BsRv7WtUlwKW1GoM46fgU0aLKl-no0=) [Donate Now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67821230/420979589/463860583?refcode=2023-08-09-lwd&recurring=0&amount=3&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=a64094d1-c736-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQxNjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYTY0MDk0ZDEtYzczNi1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=HsAu1Pz4yyiV-BsRv7WtUlwKW1GoM46fgU0aLKl-no0=) Why is this important? **Despite making up 45% of the electorate, Gen Z and Millennials only hold 21% of State Legislature seats.** Conversely, Republicans have made significant investments in down-ballot races, leading to the absolute assault on our rights and freedoms that we're seeing happen across states — from abortion bans to taking away LGBTQ+ rights to repealing life-saving common sense gun laws put into place after the Parkland shooting. Our political system is stacked against us, but incredible young leaders have fought back and beat the odds to get elected to office. It's time to take more young people from movements like March For Our Lives and elect them to office to be the leaders we deserve. **But grassroots support is what moves the needle, and it's what we need from you today.** [**Join us by splitting a donation of any amount between Leaders We Deserve and Nick Melvoin****today.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67821232/420979591/463860583?refcode=2023-08-09-lwd&recurring=0&amount=3&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=a64094d1-c736-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQxNjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYTY0MDk0ZDEtYzczNi1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=HsAu1Pz4yyiV-BsRv7WtUlwKW1GoM46fgU0aLKl-no0=) So how are we going to fight back against the 50-year chess game conservative special interest groups have been manipulating? **Leaders We Deserve will invest in young people, knock down barriers, and elect more young people to office. We're doing this by:**
1. **Recruitment** : Identifying candidates who will have the biggest impact on their states (that's where the real work is happening).
2. **Providing Day-to-Day Support:** We're helping campaigns build from the ground up and will work with them directly on fundraising, messaging, coalition building, voter contact, and volunteer recruitment.
3. **Volunteer Network:** Our grassroots volunteer army (that's you, Peter) will have person-to-person conversations with voters all across a candidate's district, advocating on their behalf.
4. **Running Paid Media Campaigns:** We'll run well-funded independent expenditure programs.

But there's a reason our political system favors those who are older, wealthier, and white — _running for office takes serious resources._ Which is one of the reasons I'm reaching out today. Young candidates aren't seen as viable and often struggle to raise money. They have lower personal wealth and smaller donor networks. [**So I'm asking: Will you join our movement by splitting a donation between Leaders We Deserve and Nick Melvoin****today?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67821235/420979594/463860583?refcode=2023-08-09-lwd&recurring=0&amount=3&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=a64094d1-c736-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQxNjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYTY0MDk0ZDEtYzczNi1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=HsAu1Pz4yyiV-BsRv7WtUlwKW1GoM46fgU0aLKl-no0=) **[Donate Now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67821237/420979596/463860583?refcode=2023-08-09-lwd&recurring=0&amount=3&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=a64094d1-c736-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQxNjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYTY0MDk0ZDEtYzczNi1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=HsAu1Pz4yyiV-BsRv7WtUlwKW1GoM46fgU0aLKl-no0=)** There's so much more I could say, Peter, but I'll end with this — **we absolutely cannot do this work without you.** [**Please, consider joining us so we can defeat the far-right extremists who have taken over our communities and our nation — and elect the leaders we deserve.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67821239/420979599/463860583?refcode=2023-08-09-lwd&recurring=0&amount=3&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=a64094d1-c736-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQxNjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYTY0MDk0ZDEtYzczNi1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=HsAu1Pz4yyiV-BsRv7WtUlwKW1GoM46fgU0aLKl-no0=) Thank you. clean_body: This is the biggest thing I’ve ever been a part of. | | | | Hey, Peter, it's David Hogg, gun safety advocate and co-founder of March For Our Lives. Many of our elected officials can be described as one word: Cowards. Our kids, our planet, our freedoms, our democracy — are all under attack by far-right extremists, from the State House to the U.S. Senate, who are willing to let children be slaughtered at school and watch our planet burn for their own personal gain. We refuse to back down. There were many who said after Parkland that we couldn't change anything because we were just a "bunch of kids." But we proved them wrong — we passed gun laws in a state owned by the NRA. There were many who said young people would never vote. But we proved them wrong in 2018 — defeating more NRA backed politicians than ever before in U.S. history. Then, in 2020, we defeated NRA puppet Donald Trump. Both of these victories enabled us to pass the first federal gun law in 30 years. There were many who said Maxwell Frost, March For Our Lives' first National Organizing Director, could never be the first Gen Z Member of Congress. But we proved them wrong, again. Badass young people have a habit of being underestimated — and I have a habit of scaring the shit out of Republicans by proving that, while we might be young, we are powerful. That is why today, myself and Kevin Lata, Maxwell Frost's Campaign Manager and 2022 Campaign Manager of the Year, are launching Leaders We Deserve — a grassroots organization dedicated to electing young leaders to Congress, and especially our State Legislatures, across the country to help defeat the far-right's agenda and advance a progressive vision for the future. Leaders We Deserve will work in partnership with a stacked Advisory Board, including Maxwell Frost, Justin Jones, and other influential leaders. = = Why is this important? Despite making up 45% of the electorate, Gen Z and Millennials only hold 21% of State Legislature seats. Conversely, Republicans have made significant investments in down-ballot races, leading to the absolute assault on our rights and freedoms that we're seeing happen across states — from abortion bans to taking away LGBTQ+ rights to repealing life-saving common sense gun laws put into place after the Parkland shooting. Our political system is stacked against us, but incredible young leaders have fought back and beat the odds to get elected to office. It's time to take more young people from movements like March For Our Lives and elect them to office to be the leaders we deserve. But grassroots support is what moves the needle, and it's what we need from you today. = So how are we going to fight back against the 50-year chess game conservative special interest groups have been manipulating? Leaders We Deserve will invest in young people, knock down barriers, and elect more young people to office. We're doing this by: 1. Recruitment : Identifying candidates who will have the biggest impact on their states (that's where the real work is happening). 2. Providing Day-to-Day Support: We're helping campaigns build from the ground up and will work with them directly on fundraising, messaging, coalition building, voter contact, and volunteer recruitment. 3. Volunteer Network: Our grassroots volunteer army (that's you, Peter) will have person-to-person conversations with voters all across a candidate's district, advocating on their behalf. 4. Running Paid Media Campaigns: We'll run well-funded independent expenditure programs. But there's a reason our political system favors those who are older, wealthier, and white — running for office takes serious resources. Which is one of the reasons I'm reaching out today. Young candidates aren't seen as viable and often struggle to raise money. They have lower personal wealth and smaller donor networks. = = There's so much more I could say, Peter, but I'll end with this — we absolutely cannot do this work without you. = Thank you. More soon, David Hogg Co-founder Leaders We Deserve | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution to Leaders We Deserve and Nick Melvoin instantly: | = | = | = | = ---|---|---|--- | | | Paid for by Nick Melvoin for Congress - FEC ID #C00831289 |

| Hearing aids just got their biggest upgrade yet... now everyone wants a pair
---
[ ](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJx0kDGTmzAQhX_N0uGBFRJ2QXExQyZFqviu1SzSymgiGSJEHP_7DI7numz53rf7dh7FJXj36KD9AoiTtysggngDxC2LD3p__54epfoly6_yA6-7iWdAzI-FP8nXkQNH8mFX276wXYNUO1NwV6tTLU-NlKKYOqWaRp2UGWvLEttqtIKdaI6IR2Nb2xa-wwpFdaxOtUQU9QGNRCdrlse2dcwVNNUz6OASc5787ScnSz48DmaOReimnJf1-dgAONzv98PElPztWpK3Jdnf3vCOAg4WcBh5zfpFaPJ21eRchfu2GMhkEP3b-VLtI1up6rfzBVBtOep13pJhEH2O9JIiW79FED0554OnzC_DUFzIX28g-m3VfNMU9ESkPzmdI-1KSX9KO29jYO2y1f-JXrYx-HXipL_1IPofmdI4U7KAat1G7S2IfkjMl3_19Hs9Rerscvch-FW10FTXZ4lmjn8DAAD__yM9o_U)
Ever heard the saying, "good things come in small packages?"

Well, it's certainly true for the latest breakthrough in hearing tech: a device that packs an extraordinary amount of power into a truly tiny design.

Two years ago, our engineers unveiled the virtually invisible Horizon hearing aids and it quickly became a best-seller. Now, they're back with yet another innovation—Horizon AX—and experts are calling it**the biggest upgrade in sound and speech clarity the industry has ever seen.**
[ ](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJx0kDGTmzAQhX_N0uGBFRJ2QXExQyZFqviu1SzSymgiGSJEHP_7DI7numz53rf7dh7FJXj36KD9AoiTtysggngDxC2LD3p__54epfoly6_yA6-7iWdAzI-FP8nXkQNH8mFX276wXYNUO1NwV6tTLU-NlKKYOqWaRp2UGWvLEttqtIKdaI6IR2Nb2xa-wwpFdaxOtUQU9QGNRCdrlse2dcwVNNUz6OASc5787ScnSz48DmaOReimnJf1-dgAONzv98PElPztWpK3Jdnf3vCOAg4WcBh5zfpFaPJ21eRchfu2GMhkEP3b-VLtI1up6rfzBVBtOep13pJhEH2O9JIiW79FED0554OnzC_DUFzIX28g-m3VfNMU9ESkPzmdI-1KSX9KO29jYO2y1f-JXrYx-HXipL_1IPofmdI4U7KAat1G7S2IfkjMl3_19Hs9Rerscvch-FW10FTXZ4lmjn8DAAD__yM9o_U)
**The big upgrade:** Horizon AX has the world's first-ever dual processing system, meaning it has not one, but two state-of-the-art computer chips. And with double the power comes double the clarity...
[ Check if you qualify ](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJx0kDGTmzAQhX_N0uGBFRJ2QXExQyZFqviu1SzSymgiGSJEHP_7DI7numz53rf7dh7FJXj36KD9AoiTtysggngDxC2LD3p__54epfoly6_yA6-7iWdAzI-FP8nXkQNH8mFX276wXYNUO1NwV6tTLU-NlKKYOqWaRp2UGWvLEttqtIKdaI6IR2Nb2xa-wwpFdaxOtUQU9QGNRCdrlse2dcwVNNUz6OASc5787ScnSz48DmaOReimnJf1-dgAONzv98PElPztWpK3Jdnf3vCOAg4WcBh5zfpFaPJ21eRchfu2GMhkEP3b-VLtI1up6rfzBVBtOep13pJhEH2O9JIiW79FED0554OnzC_DUFzIX28g-m3VfNMU9ESkPzmdI-1KSX9KO29jYO2y1f-JXrYx-HXipL_1IPofmdI4U7KAat1G7S2IfkjMl3_19Hs9Rerscvch-FW10FTXZ4lmjn8DAAD__yM9o_U)
Unlocking the power of two

Lead Audiologist, Dr. Hope Lanter, explains: "We haven't seen an innovation like this in decades. **The Horizon AX is the new gold standard for anyone who cares about speech clarity in conversation, especially in noisy environments."**

"I encourage all of my patients to try these devices and experience the sound quality for themselves, because there's truly nothing like it." **And with the 45-day trial and money-back guarantee, there's really no reason not to.**

You might be a good candidate for the Horizon AX if you meet the following criteria:

| [ ](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJx0kDGTmzAQhX_N0uGBFRJ2QXExQyZFqviu1SzSymgiGSJEHP_7DI7numz53rf7dh7FJXj36KD9AoiTtysggngDxC2LD3p__54epfoly6_yA6-7iWdAzI-FP8nXkQNH8mFX276wXYNUO1NwV6tTLU-NlKKYOqWaRp2UGWvLEttqtIKdaI6IR2Nb2xa-wwpFdaxOtUQU9QGNRCdrlse2dcwVNNUz6OASc5787ScnSz48DmaOReimnJf1-dgAONzv98PElPztWpK3Jdnf3vCOAg4WcBh5zfpFaPJ21eRchfu2GMhkEP3b-VLtI1up6rfzBVBtOep13pJhEH2O9JIiW79FED0554OnzC_DUFzIX28g-m3VfNMU9ESkPzmdI-1KSX9KO29jYO2y1f-JXrYx-HXipL_1IPofmdI4U7KAat1G7S2IfkjMl3_19Hs9Rerscvch-FW10FTXZ4lmjn8DAAD__yM9o_U) | • 50 years or older
• Having trouble hearing
• Live in the U.S. [ Check if you qualify ](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJx0kDGTmzAQhX_N0uGBFRJ2QXExQyZFqviu1SzSymgiGSJEHP_7DI7numz53rf7dh7FJXj36KD9AoiTtysggngDxC2LD3p__54epfoly6_yA6-7iWdAzI-FP8nXkQNH8mFX276wXYNUO1NwV6tTLU-NlKKYOqWaRp2UGWvLEttqtIKdaI6IR2Nb2xa-wwpFdaxOtUQU9QGNRCdrlse2dcwVNNUz6OASc5787ScnSz48DmaOReimnJf1-dgAONzv98PElPztWpK3Jdnf3vCOAg4WcBh5zfpFaPJ21eRchfu2GMhkEP3b-VLtI1up6rfzBVBtOep13pJhEH2O9JIiW79FED0554OnzC_DUFzIX28g-m3VfNMU9ESkPzmdI-1KSX9KO29jYO2y1f-JXrYx-HXipL_1IPofmdI4U7KAat1G7S2IfkjMl3_19Hs9Rerscvch-FW10FTXZ4lmjn8DAAD__yM9o_U)

**I’m running in a toss-up district again this cycle, and the stakes couldn’t be higher.**
As a top target of the NRCC, Republicans are pouring millions of dollars into this race to support my anti-choice extremist challengers. And already, THREE Republicans have entered the race.
With abortion, voting rights, and so much more on the line, the path to regaining our House majority in 2024 begins with protecting vulnerable seats like mine in PA-07.

name: Defend the Constitution
subject: The greatest armed conflict in human history
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us.

This sponsored message from Defending the Constitution is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=4a3b25d766754e39a14799602d0a77d3&_e=nIfinHLXpTADlYV6PZpe_RWTemeqe22SyRz38BNUJwltHBLNmpM0RA1BsvbXO0Wb762xOhXvwQ9JIBTvJRS-sl6ThqNWk4SyvpKg7z8A1ClxqMX4TH3i1IEJtOG44Har_gkVSdCe2YCiPrm6-oiHG6qZHZs6nL6FjozZr6l9FH4iHmjGOO51ig2fMzMqH2KiyodB0ZwMkGcAUshZWlLvrTT7s_5b1ethcskZ7RE73zsRuFTNoqVlUUOi4lUWsqsbThlcs1qdv-WtjSXSIjZjqxGFZQ4cUO6ixh0kokqwFahiD_wsDYuzt3eQnXSg07IQEpYgiwJUttQ3rRVqjuJKOS3iYvsbD0YHOMFHRZgICSLa2RaZGH8THDFuoR0qYQMtGgvNk8aqz2m2UOFrwFU60xPJxFx9nB4h2_aFV29uMdE%3D) Dear Fellow American,
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we're losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important.
To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled "The Second World Wars."
Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict's diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=4a3b25d766754e39a14799602d0a77d3&_e=nIfinHLXpTADlYV6PZpe_RWTemeqe22SyRz38BNUJwltHBLNmpM0RA1BsvbXO0Wb762xOhXvwQ9JIBTvJRS-sl6ThqNWk4SyvpKg7z8A1ClxqMX4TH3i1IEJtOG44Har_gkVSdCe2YCiPrm6-oiHG6qZHZs6nL6FjozZr6l9FH4iHmjGOO51ig2fMzMqH2KiyodB0ZwMkGcAUshZWlLvrTT7s_5b1ethcskZ7RE73zsRuFTNoqVlUUOi4lUWsqsbThlcs1qdv-WtjSXSIjZjq3aOEQN19H5b2plnl31qj3WQhRiqymKzibyoDNdk3KYQFqmgbW4Mj31F634SQqtxftTvYEX_XCl3G7eRQOklYIciCuzZ_J7tQOE8g49XcCBdPELyAU4nl_YqrOXgBOjCulWplCVfQJbFBvl9ahz0r3g%3D) If you'd like to secure a DVD set before they're all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.
Here's a secure link to reserve your copy of "**The Second World Wars** " on DVD:
**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=4a3b25d766754e39a14799602d0a77d3&_e=nIfinHLXpTADlYV6PZpe_RWTemeqe22SyRz38BNUJwltHBLNmpM0RA1BsvbXO0Wb762xOhXvwQ9JIBTvJRS-sl6ThqNWk4SyvpKg7z8A1ClxqMX4TH3i1IEJtOG44Har_gkVSdCe2YCiPrm6-oiHG6qZHZs6nL6FjozZr6l9FH4iHmjGOO51ig2fMzMqH2KiyodB0ZwMkGcAUshZWlLvrTT7s_5b1ethcskZ7RE73zsRuFTNoqVlUUOi4lUWsqsbThlcs1qdv-WtjSXSIjZjq99oDChOxm9atJ98-JBiWOggeHX1dWFjxB1_BnYcaMNtimxJlzewICds41ZC-wqt9BlSvArhlY8I7iEk_lP94WRG5DKXSCg1U4NnrDOme5qoEKMg3ajUOtRv09t73VVaIFkVNEI6lEP7rdGpgthPlBs%3D)**
Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College!
Best regards,
Kyle Murnen, '09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College
---

Defend the Constitution
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
[](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_s=4a3b25d766754e39a14799602d0a77d3&_t=GFYIHfOlhZZ1BabvTwvHv1fTpfDZckAdEJvONuVC4pZyKcEQ107AypFAxZ7NSO0HSFckMjZOqwaKPtmQNLn0PDolh1DgBHVCksvRq5hmj8zZJwTQawTA47V-mHzZB2dcHrUYZEHT5ykkb-91aPHwYDjfLTtrFr_ky7STppULTeI%3D)

In case you missed it, we set a goal of collecting 1,000 new donations over the last couple days to help cover the cost of the events, transportation, lodging, and getting her message out to voters. We were ecstatic to say that we CRUSHED our goal, thanks to you grassroots supporters like you, Peter! Your support allowed Nikki to attend events across the state, meet with packed crowds of fired up voters, and share her conservative message with every Granite Stater she crossed paths with. Take a look at the recap: Amherst, New Hampshire Nikki had a great event meeting with the New Hampshire Federation of Republican Women. She discussed her plans to hold China accountable, keep our streets safe, fix our education system, stop D.C.’s reckless spending, and most importantly—make America strong and proud. 🇺🇸 https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=25b0ee19ee8f18b471ca824cc1cca4a6a9d3957700c5a66518ac28bef29d12c69fc2a8234a43ee6646774ecf7b84f3f651853f7d721bd3f822eea8b9ebe607be https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=25b0ee19ee8f18b471ca824cc1cca4a6a9d3957700c5a66518ac28bef29d12c69fc2a8234a43ee6646774ecf7b84f3f651853f7d721bd3f822eea8b9ebe607be https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=25b0ee19ee8f18b471ca824cc1cca4a6a9d3957700c5a66518ac28bef29d12c69fc2a8234a43ee6646774ecf7b84f3f651853f7d721bd3f822eea8b9ebe607be https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=25b0ee19ee8f18b471ca824cc1cca4a6a9d3957700c5a66518ac28bef29d12c69fc2a8234a43ee6646774ecf7b84f3f651853f7d721bd3f822eea8b9ebe607be Meet and Greet: Hudson, New Hampshire Nikki had a wonderful time meeting Granite Staters in Hudson. She shared her plans to stand strong against China, unleash American energy, and keep our streets safe from drugs and crime. name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: What are your thoughts?
body:
There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried

|
---
| | | [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=5185d39f6aeb4515ad83e089adb7a670&_e=sS7k8U1YymzFv__wkpjRC7DQL-5vI-xNs-kFjvfIK-hXqrbU1DwfHHroXxybw6-_FAtSf-rOIsGjNJHS5FeOi3vTot-VT1UTanQhA_19kvnnlzlY1XmSYSw9mBIpOTt1YwGSeQJF8MEKRjOdFS01513RQhuVbA94ZtGUBoe1uiLgCimTQt6cCkkQJqBNQvalxWPpeNRA8XEO8gpajCXbPWMBxlRjafY0nZlhoqMAOW3eKj5TvtYvIepPlPHF572kQ0skGcwPmHXrYdOvd_HRgHc0jRxw9At8Y6w-w8HjUjN5erk92gUbmvuTwNTNqDvIOq0zB7H2P3Y86pRUxQPC9aQNhhZiBP7WzFVLntPb_Bc3lvhz8aElvWBv9HaWdx7lkHEGwIHXDrgk0VccQs3DkFQHEhamqwIJBk9KG4QfqHQ%3D)
---
| Fellow American,

There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried for Americans who hold to biblical & faith-based values. [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=5185d39f6aeb4515ad83e089adb7a670&_e=sS7k8U1YymzFv__wkpjRC7DQL-5vI-xNs-kFjvfIK-hXqrbU1DwfHHroXxybw6-_FAtSf-rOIsGjNJHS5FeOi3vTot-VT1UTanQhA_19kvnnlzlY1XmSYSw9mBIpOTt1YwGSeQJF8MEKRjOdFS01513RQhuVbA94ZtGUBoe1uiLgCimTQt6cCkkQJqBNQvalxWPpeNRA8XEO8gpajCXbPWMBxlRjafY0nZlhoqMAOW3eKj5TvtYvIepPlPHF572kQ0skGcwPmHXrYdOvd_HRgBQRYsZbHPPe1-PiM_P0vcxIFN4Ci2gtn7l85d-9dSF4JyGqqf6zEZMffnXcQbGORVcCL3yFm8KSgoOtBP90G27EdjY5dylM2j1HYjK4kaePPI5J2mgQ59raNLhJ_c5SPDIRGW6cTtgeTd2-8kg7eKU%3D) After the _Respect for Marriage Act_ was passed by a bi-partisan effort and signed into law, I am fearful that legal persecution will only intensify against Americans holding to faith-based values and who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

[**Are you concerned that America is abandoning a basic tenet of our founding -_Religious Liberty?_**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=5185d39f6aeb4515ad83e089adb7a670&_e=sS7k8U1YymzFv__wkpjRC7DQL-5vI-xNs-kFjvfIK-hXqrbU1DwfHHroXxybw6-_FAtSf-rOIsGjNJHS5FeOi3vTot-VT1UTanQhA_19kvnnlzlY1XmSYSw9mBIpOTt1YwGSeQJF8MEKRjOdFS01513RQhuVbA94ZtGUBoe1uiLgCimTQt6cCkkQJqBNQvalxWPpeNRA8XEO8gpajCXbPWMBxlRjafY0nZlhoqMAOW3eKj5TvtYvIepPlPHF572kQ0skGcwPmHXrYdOvd_HRgKgAfVTc-y3ftViKuQ9_e32Y-0mFj1DOUbAPy0AVXNYhyH0vVs2lpJkK7AGVN9mO5O6mSYqptmJ_uG2D5e2IYOU5eEcudguYARBF86avG_GWtAouMBFZqJpK19FrnwgEblaRjDaeqxW0do3afc5ZHgE%3D)

In addition to the passing of the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , numerous examples over the past decade have concerned me: KENNEDY v. BREMERTON SCHOOL DISTRICT, MASTERPIECE CAKESHOP v. COLORADO CIVIL RIGHTS COMMISSION, and 303 CREATIVE v. ELENIS are just a few examples of legal persecution against Americans holding to faith-based values who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

Furthermore, an amendment to the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , brought forth by Senator Mike Lee, prohibiting the Federal Government from retaliating against schools, businesses, and organizations because of their religious beliefs about same-sex marriage failed.

**This has the potential to only intensify legal persecution against individuals, businesses, churches, and nonprofits holding to faith-based values. **

The American Cornerstone Institute is a non-profit that I founded to preserve and promote the cornerstones that laid the foundation for the greatest nation the world has ever seen: Faith, Liberty, Community, and Life.

Whether it is a football coach losing his job for praying at midfield after a game, or a baker being sued for not wanting to bake a cake that violates his religious values, **are you concerned as I am with the increase in legal persecution against Americans who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith?**

Please share your thoughts in this quick 2-minute survey concerning religious liberty in America.

**[https://offers.americancornerstone.org/religious-liberty-survey/](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=5185d39f6aeb4515ad83e089adb7a670&_e=sS7k8U1YymzFv__wkpjRC7DQL-5vI-xNs-kFjvfIK-hXqrbU1DwfHHroXxybw6-_FAtSf-rOIsGjNJHS5FeOi3vTot-VT1UTanQhA_19kvnnlzlY1XmSYSw9mBIpOTt1YwGSeQJF8MEKRjOdFS01513RQhuVbA94ZtGUBoe1uiLgCimTQt6cCkkQJqBNQvalxWPpeNRA8XEO8gpajCXbPWMBxlRjafY0nZlhoqMAOW3eKj5TvtYvIepPlPHF572kQ0skGcwPmHXrYdOvd_HRgMh2N524KL4xcrBy1Ua2JwtqqJpzh9Zp0G-omFxvBKVDbYHut0B0pVNtU2Gf-NJZEJBQRD8tBqzx5c6aiUpk9KwFb9Fig_5fL_RuI5u6H5I7a50P4Sy7GiSYOGe40Q3pEyl2BFvQIBReUCH6ycOqkYY%3D)**

Thank you for your consideration.

Regards,

Dr. Ben Carson
Founder & Chairman American Cornerstone Institute
---
---
| |
---
---
Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country's most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government's role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation's citizens.
---
|
---
| _Copyright(C) 2023 American Cornerstone Institute, All rights reserved._

---

Reclaiming American Freedom

_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_

name: ICYMI News
subject: The key to Lincoln’s rhetorical success
body:
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills

| This sponsored message from ICYMI News is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zjuotcsi0kiopm0jkfdtmjc74fs401qr1vi60dfg_rp22sh2s8i66p74cdg69ob2chh2bs)
---
| | Dear fellow American,
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid.
While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law.
Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father’s cabin, and did not return until he could “give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight.”
By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly—plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun.
That’s why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic **“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry.”**
Through**“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,”** you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life.
---
| | **Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group.** **** **You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.**
Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because...
Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.
---
| [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z9ho2emcrh1o69s84vnhuegh05dqff49quj1s7q0_rp22sh2s8i66p74cdg69ob2chh2bs)
---
| | That’s why we need the support of friends like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.
Quantities of this special DVD box set are limited, so reserve your copy today. I’ve included a secure link for you to make your tax-deductible gift below:
[_**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/dvd-mathematics-and-logic-course**_](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z4mk009qbbflajealu2u0eej85u51r68krl5os2o_rp22sh2s8i66p74cdg69ob2chh2bs)

Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father’s cabin, and did not return until he could “give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight.” By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly—plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun. name: Sherrod Brown
subject: Massive victory in OH
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
Ohioans came out strong in this week’s special election
#
This is incredible news, Derek! Ohioans came out strong in yesterday’s special election to STOP an anti-democratic amendment and clear special interest power grab – which would’ve made it harder for us to enshrine reproductive rights in our state constitution this November.
Seeing Ohio voters turn out to the polls and decisively reject the GOP's proposal has me feeling more hopeful than ever about our ability to protect women’s health care.
This massive victory also makes clear that momentum is on our side heading into 2024 when I’ll be on the ballot. But we can’t take our foot off the gas. **So today, as we celebrate, I'm personally asking you to help me keep up our momentum:[Will you split $5 or more between myself and John Fetterman to defend Ohio's Democratic seat and our pro-choice Senate majority?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20230809-1?refcode=em20230809-1-8498&refcode2=8498_434096_lism3y&akid=8498%2E434096%2Elism3y)**
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20230809-1?amount=5&refcode=em20230809-8498&refcode2=8498_434096_lism3y&akid=8498%2E434096%2Elism3y)**
In solidarity,
Sherrod
Sherrod Brown
U.S. Senator from Ohio

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20230809-8498-footer&t=1&refcode2=8498_434096_lism3y&akid=8498%2E434096%2Elism3y)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)

name: Margaret Mary Dunn
subject: Thrown in jail by the woke mob?
body:
I'm praying God will touch your heart as you read this letter to help me save my son, Michael.

I'm praying God will touch your heart as you read this letter to help me save my son, Michael.

Michael is a police officer who dedicated his life to keeping our community safe in Farmers Branch, Texas.

_**But now he might be facing a life sentence in prison for shooting a dangerous career criminal who tried to run Michael down in a stolen truck.**_

[**Will you help my son?**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zfrg3p38434h39dv5jevbcrgvqujbdkno8bcnrm0_rp22sh2s8i66p74cdg69ob2chh2bs)

That's Michael in the photo.

[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z82ar4raee010cbg3mtvdlugc6q3836hpu0ijdj8_rp22sh2s8i66p74cdg69ob2chh2bs) [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z8ggrvc31fhegihmsomffqghnfl4gjhhrgmeiflg_rp22sh2s8i66p74cdg69ob2chh2bs)

In addition to being a police officer, Michael is also a Master Gunnery Sergeant in the United Stated Marine Corps Reserve.

I knew when he joined the police department that it was a dangerous job.

Every night on the news I saw another story of a police officer ambushed or killed in the line of duty.

It's been a heart wrenching time for the families of police officers in recent years.

What I didn't expect was that so many Americans would turn their backs on Michael in his time of need.

I now realize that it's all about fear. Fear of being attacked as a racist.

Fear of going against woke politicians and bureaucrats.

Fear of losing their jobs.

I assumed that the police department, the prosecutor's office, and everyone else in the government and the community would have Michael's back.

**But I was wrong.**

_So_ _now_ _Michael 's_ _life_ _is_ _at_ _stake_ _for_ _simply_ _doing_ _his_ _job_ _and_ _we_ _have_ _nobody_ _to_ _turn_ _to_ _except_ _for_ _good_ _hearted_ _strangers_ _like_ _you._

**[Will you please help me save my son Michael?](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z2udc9jabvgk9sdktlto3p0lr11g0e58ulq561q0_rp22sh2s8i66p74cdg69ob2chh2bs)**

Let me give you some more of the details...

Michael and other Farmers Branch Police detectives tracked a stolen pickup truck to the parking lot of an "adult arcade."

The truck was stolen by a convicted felon who was well-known to the police.

Michael was assigned the task of arresting this man.

When the suspect came back to the truck, Michael pulled up and stepped out of his police car.

The criminal sped the stolen truck toward him.

Michael had to do what every police officer hopes they never have to do: he drew his weapon and fired.

The man driving the stolen truck died at the scene.

My son suffered back and leg injuries.

Michael had a split-second to think about if the career criminal speeding toward him was going to crush him to death with that stolen truck.

In that split-second, he did what he needed to do in order to save his own life and the lives of his fellow officers and community.

There's no doubt in my mind, and many others, that Michael made the right choice that day.

He should be considered a hero for putting his life on the line to protect others.

But right and wrong seem to have been turned upside down in the last few years.

Why else would they be trying to put my son in prison for murder for what he did?

That's why I'm willing to do whatever it takes to clear his name. **[Even if that means asking folks like you for financial support to help my son afford the best possible attorneys and legal advice.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zna2q2usfvi2pa5dfsnkouugppffo4me163e9hlg_rp22sh2s8i66p74cdg69ob2chh2bs)**

After the incident, Michael was distraught to hear the criminal died.

But the other officers assured him the shooting was justified.

And then our whole world was rocked.

**Just 8 days after the incident Michael was indicted.**

Experts described the indictment as "unusually swift." The president of the Dallas Police Association said:

"We have never had an investigation completed in less than eight days ready to hand over to the District Attorney. Never."

I knew in my heart something was wrong - and we would be facing the fight of our lives to defend Michael in court.

We started a fundraising campaign on the internet site "GoFundMe" to raise money for a proper legal defense.

After a few days, "GoFundMe" shut down the fundraiser.

They claimed Michael's actions as a police officer were an "act of hate" \- and helping him violated their terms of service.

So in this anti-police climate, politically woke climate, the case was closed in their minds.

No "innocent until proven guilty." No due process.

Instead, my son was smeared as a "murderer" who committed a "hate crime."

Since then, my husband and I spent half our life savings on legal fees and bills to help Michael.

_With the investigation devastating my family... seeing Michael, an American hero, being smeared on the internet... and our family quickly running out of money to pay mounting court fees... hope was fading._

Until we heard about the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund (LELDF). **LELDF is the best friend a police officer could ever have.**

LELDF defends good officers, like my son, who have been unfairly prosecuted for split-second, use-of-force decisions in the line of duty.

The group's president, Jason Johnson, served over 20 years as a police officer, including as Deputy Commissioner of the Baltimore Police Department.

And praise the Lord, LELDF saw it fit to help my son!

**[Will you please consider sending a tax-deductible contribution to the LELDF so they can help my son beat his charges?](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z97am1g3ff6ho6tk6o1l0ahp2cf5pl0o3g6t995o_rp22sh2s8i66p74cdg69ob2chh2bs)**

You see, LELDF is a non-profit organization. It doesn't receive any funds from the government to help our police officers.

Or, if the Lord has blessed you with the means to help with a **[gift of $250, $500, or even $1,000 or more,](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zt4p7tm7ijak0lc0frq10hh205o3ij3qtjec4ar8_rp22sh2s8i66p74cdg69ob2chh2bs)** I pray you will consider doing so.

Please know any gift amount you can send today is truly a blessing.

If you can't help financially today, I understand. And please keep Michael and our family in your prayers.

My son Michael is an American hero who served our nation and his community. He shouldn't be locked behind bars for defending his life from a career criminal.
[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zg5i1et3ujfv0fcnunnfkujr46259bvg8n7vms30_rp22sh2s8i66p74cdg69ob2chh2bs)
_That 's a picture of Michael with his daughter - my granddaughter - Mary-Kaitlyn_
[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z8hnpu33a6juq27cru2a26790u2p35fjk1k0bve8_rp22sh2s8i66p74cdg69ob2chh2bs)
_That 's a picture of Michael with his Son - my grandson - William_

I pray you never go through something like this. But if you do, may God touch the hearts of kind people to help you - just as I'm praying He'll touch your heart to help my son today.

Sincerely,

Margaret Mary Dunn

PS: LELDF relies on caring people like you to send donations so they can fight tooth and nail to help wrongly-accused police officers like Michael. And because LELDF is a non-profit, all donations are tax-deductible. Your kind **[donation today of $35, $50, or $100](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zvlt307drq00ch60egudj3u4uptr1kgaof3ncbo8_rp22sh2s8i66p74cdg69ob2chh2bs)** to help Michael will mean so much to my family.

\----------------

_More such officers who sacrifice so much for will face similar fates unless we speak out and stand up for the brave men and women in blue. The next time you see a police officer in your community, please thank them for their service. To read more about our mission or the other Law Enforcement officers we 're defending, please visit **www.leldf.org**. And remember - Blue Lives Matter!_
_(C) Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund | www.PoliceDefense.org
2560 Huntington Ave. Suite 203, Alexandria, VA, 22303_

1600 Daily
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zmd7djj823bob393jk20gsc3g9la81gg3sb7euq8_rp22sh2s8i66p74cdg69ob2chh238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kuo72ttle5pq8or0c1gj8d5hmjpqcdtlmuin7djle8r7ccjkm8qjf9v56ngj0trkm6or9djjctg1eddk6ior79hnmmpi9df4chgm9pj4c9h2bs)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zou646qe00cq0ticaeji2rl2l5tbadv3p2k297e8_rp22sh2s8i66p74cdg69ob2chh2bs)_

[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z0pngc557ngeg5s2ubf60v1ts3q14252lvvbv3do_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28or4shhm0p71c9i649fg)

name: Courier Newsroom
subject: Joe Rogan 🤝 Kari Lake
body:
He’s taken his role in spreading bad information to a whole new level.
# [](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/go/83?t=1&akid=1361%2E120351%2Empfu18)
Peter, it’s about Joe Rogan.
He’s taken his role in spreading bad information to a whole new level. Rogan just used his podcast to **spread false election fraud claims** made by failed candidate for Governor of Arizona, Kari Lake.
What Rogan doesn’t mention is that these fraud claims have been struck down in court. Instead, he fans the flames on Lake’s conspiracy theories — all while reaching **tens of millions of listeners.**
[**If Joe Rogan won’t fact-check his own work, it’s up to us to do it. At Courier Newsroom, we’re taking on grifters like Rogan and debunking the misinformation he’s spreading by publishing accessible, trustworthy local news stories. If you believe in our mission, please chip in $5 now.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-courier-20230809?refcode=em20230809&amount=5&refcode2=1361_120351_mpfu18&akid=1361%2E120351%2Empfu18)
Peter, this isn’t Rogan’s first time platforming bad actors and misinformation. He’s hosted the likes of RFK Jr., Alex Jones, and Candace Owens, giving them the opportunity to share their extreme, misinformation-fueled beliefs with millions of people online.
**These controversial guests and sound bites drive clicks and profits all at the expense of the truth and, in this case, trust in our elections.**
Unlike Joe Rogan, we never put the truth last — especially when it comes to state and local elections. That’s why we have news teams working across 8 different battleground states, including Arizona.
[**As we get deeper and deeper into the 2024 election, it’s clear we have our work cut out for us. We’re setting a goal to raise $6,500 by midnight so we can hire more journalists, boost our stories, and grow our reach. Will you join us in the fight against bad information by chipping in $5?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-courier-20230809?refcode=em20230809&amount=5&refcode2=1361_120351_mpfu18&akid=1361%2E120351%2Empfu18)
**[Donate $5 now »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-courier-20230809?refcode=em20230809&amount=5&refcode2=1361_120351_mpfu18&akid=1361%2E120351%2Empfu18)**
Thanks for supporting us,
The Courier Newsroom Team
**[DONATE »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-footer?refcode=em-footer&t=2&refcode2=1361_120351_mpfu18&akid=1361%2E120351%2Empfu18)**
Email us: [**info@couriernewsroom.com**](mailto:info@couriernewsroom.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/signup/update-your-information)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=1361%2E120351%2Empfu18)

To give by check:
Courier Newsroom
Box 509
New York, NY 10032

body:
Police find TENS of thousands of fake registrations, bags of pre-paid gift cards, and burner phones. | | | | | Can't see images? [Browser View](https://mailchi.mp/65af439e23cd/massive-2020-voter-fraud-uncovered-in-michigan?e=a2af77507c)

| |
# Party of the Constitution
---
[](https://migop.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0bcd38e28909007274d8cce33&id=5b35d7878a&e=a2af77507c)
Criminals have captured our Republic. One of their primary mechanisms to maintain their stranglehold on power is systemic election corruption.
With the assistance of MIGOP’s Election Integrity Committee Chairman Phil O’Halloran and MIGOP’s Director of Poll Challenger Program Lori Skibo, Gateway Pundit were able to uncover the following evidence:
* 8,000 - 10000 voter registrations dropped off by ONE person many in the same handwriting
* Bogus addresses
* Bogus signatures

These were all dropped off at the Muskegon clerk’s office!
“Then a police raid at a building in Southfield in connection with the election fraud investigation in Muskegon discovered”:
* Voter registration forms
* Pelican cases containing firearms and silencers.
* Burner phones
* Illegal ballots

This is why people who speak the truth about systemic election corruption are demonized!
Let’s see how many “journalists” in Michigan will do their due diligence regarding the election fraud investigation in Muskegon, where damning evidence was found? Or will they just demonize the people wanting answers and behave like flunkies for the criminals running our government?

clean_body: | | If you want to help The Collective PAC build Black political power up and down the ballot, and across the country, then you’re in the right place. If you'd like to unsubscribe | | Peter — Election results are in from Ohio, and we couldn’t be happier to report that yesterday was a massive win for abortion rights. Ohioans decisively rejected an extremist right-wing attempt to change the state constitution that would make it easier to preserve Ohio’s draconian abortion restrictions. This is a huge win for democracy — And it’s also a massive loss for anti-abortion MAGA fearmongers like Jim Jordan!! But here’s the thing, Peter: We can’t get complacent. If we don’t seize this momentum and go on the OFFENSIVE, MAGA forces like Jim Jordan will re-group and keep trying to strike down abortion access — and your state could be next. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed. | | | | | | Thank you, The Collective PAC The Collective PAC is strategically focused on creating a truly equitable democracy where our nation’s local, state and federal governments have diverse and talented elected leadership and Black people are fully represented in positions of power to create the policies necessary to progress our communities forward. disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GABE VASQUEZ FOR CONGRESS
body:
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67824157/420990789/-1565799793?refcode=EM_FL_VAS_20230809_su_cardty_cand_oc_od30sub_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzAxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNjA4ZTkxMC1jZTM2LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WRRRczLy--qym3OlnHC49S5EqXWYL5CWGqRgjTjNXSg=)

Hey there, **I wanted to take a quick moment to thank everyone who sent in birthday wishes.** The team surprised me with all of your signatures and notes. It was the icing on the cake for an incredible birthday celebration back home in New Mexico. While I’m back in the district (with Suki by my side!) during August recess, I am trying to meet up with as many folks as possible to hear how life is going and what matters most to people right now. [**I'd love to know what's on your mind and impacting your life right now. Would you take 2 minutes to share your thoughts in my Summer Issues Survey?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67824162/420990792/-26332030?ms=EM_FL_VAS_20230809_su_cardty_cand_oc_od30sub_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzAxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNjA4ZTkxMC1jZTM2LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WRRRczLy--qym3OlnHC49S5EqXWYL5CWGqRgjTjNXSg=&emci=83801996-3236-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=2608e910-ce36-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=4482565) | [Take the Survey](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67824166/420990795/-26332030?ms=EM_FL_VAS_20230809_su_cardty_cand_oc_od30sub_xx_sbt&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzAxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNjA4ZTkxMC1jZTM2LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WRRRczLy--qym3OlnHC49S5EqXWYL5CWGqRgjTjNXSg=&emci=83801996-3236-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=2608e910-ce36-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=4482565)
---
It’s an honor to represent our district, and it’s one I do not take lightly.
Thank you,
- Gabe

| Gabe Vasquez is a first-generation American, former City Councilor, and conservation champion who flipped New Mexico’s 2nd Congressional District from red to blue in 2022 with the help of this people-powered movement. Now, he's taking his experience in office and passion for economic opportunities, the environment, and giving a voice to underserved communities in Congress to fight for the people of New Mexico.

clean_body: | = Hey there, I wanted to take a quick moment to thank everyone who sent in birthday wishes. The team surprised me with all of your signatures and notes. It was the icing on the cake for an incredible birthday celebration back home in New Mexico. While I’m back in the district (with Suki by my side!) during August recess, I am trying to meet up with as many folks as possible to hear how life is going and what matters most to people right now. | It’s an honor to represent our district, and it’s one I do not take lightly. Thank you, - Gabe | Gabe Vasquez is a first-generation American, former City Councilor, and conservation champion who flipped New Mexico’s 2nd Congressional District from red to blue in 2022 with the help of this people-powered movement. Now, he's taking his experience in office and passion for economic opportunities, the environment, and giving a voice to underserved communities in Congress to fight for the people of New Mexico. | = | PAID FOR BY GABE VASQUEZ FOR CONGRESS Gabe Vasquez for Congress Drawer L Mesilla, NM 88046 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

name: Ryan Zinke - Navy SEAL
subject: Closing the curtains on my campaign
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
I’m at my wits’ end

|
---
| | |
I’m at my wits’ end, Friend.

Biden and the Democrats just have too much power, too many connections, and too much in their fundraising war chest. Now their sights are set on me.

At this point, if I don’t do a total 180 on the fundraising front, not only will I lose my House seat, Republicans may never hold the majority in Congress again.

**Friend, this is Ryan Zinke. I served as President Trump’s Secretary of the Interior and I was the commander at SEAL Team 6.**
**I’m also running for Congress in the most critical race in the nation.**

But if Biden can destroy me in this race, I can guarantee you no other Republican will have a chance.

**In 2022, I lead the team of Navy SEAL’s that retook the House Majority, and I have more battle experience than anyone else. Point is, I’m one of the toughest, most battle-tested Republicans in Washington D.C. If I can’t beat the Democrats gunning for my seat - no one can.**

---
| [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z7s395j7ciita6ocqtel2sdktb4bh57ebqjvnk90_rp22sh2s8i66p74cdi68oj1chh2bs "STAND WITH RYAN")
---

So, I’m going to be blunt with you, Friend. **[If you chip in just $5 right now,](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z7lnoc91iob5invmv47ivqmvc269i6r7r8uqroso_rp22sh2s8i66p74cdi68oj1chh2bs "If you chip in just $5 right now,")** I can promise you that we will blow my fundraising goal out of the water and ruin Biden’s plan to destroy our nation.

I’m humbly asking you, as a warrior who’s fought for this nation for my entire life, will you help me out?
---
| | | [DONATE TODAY](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zal4dbhvb7pa6m3g6tdn7cft67lgblj41ctd2ts8_rp22sh2s8i66p74cdi68oj1chh2bs "DONATE TODAY")
---
You have my word, as a former Navy SEAL and commander at SEAL Team 6, if you help me out, I will continue to return the favor in Congress.

Thank you for your support,
Ryan Zinke

---
| | | [DONATE TODAY](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z2hk7b6m80po0ies6ks9otvkkgt60fe68du4np2o_rp22sh2s8i66p74cdi68oj1chh2bs "DONATE TODAY")

Under President Biden and the Democrats, the American Dream is nearly impossible to achieve.

As someone who’s parents fled similar failed policies in communist Cuba to seek freedom and the American Dream, I’m inspired by Bernie’s story.

He came to America from Colombia with his family in search of the American Dream, eventually achieved citizenship, and became a successful businessman who created thousands of jobs in Ohio.

**Becoming an American is one of the greatest honors of Bernie’s life** , and now he’s running to save the American Dream for his children and future generations.

**Thanks to Bernie jumping into this race, Ohio is one of the Top 3 Senate seats most likely to flip in 2024.** [**Will you help us get it done**?](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=e7b930edb1344fa9a275bd19ba60f5bc&_e=AsG1M2JjJmXb6yd_iPsG1ViZ26FXzj5-bhGXi_6iSb7LVSW0OQIZWDwPqDP3rchcp50O4zv1quF7VRKS2pIKmO0i10FPZWt2yqBPCwMKFqCSE_gcxiYXfYgOiO99aJjPMQwoH7ft42NdYgwSr4lspWRYIz0xJm0NUVWHn7TDkN9LceTnBXpQdx-uoQRyORz5DRqa7LxlxFnrxZpjexTDK-v48MNLB4ztpJxFnfMXI5DpCRbsbI0YHx3GsCeFBr7OCnF_shCBasDyJ8blmA7ZCkyz3oe_W4Vkkb9PmNKrX6yoXl15xbzmq5WAwjSugA7Z17_BwPVRQL96lr38FPlUjdLB_ggM0fSf6K7WObi07NuOaUQD9Gc3dhh0KbG-4QBs)

But this has spooked the Left, because their majority hinges on this race. So now, their elite coastal mega-donors have been pouring money into this race. They know Bernie has built a team that has what it takes to flip this seat and take back the Senate majority for Republicans.

If Bernie flips this seat, we can hold Joe Biden accountable and put America back on the right track.

**This will be one of the toughest, most competitive, and most expensive races in 2024. It could also be one of the closest.**

[**That’s why I’m asking you to send your support to Bernie and his campaign right now.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=e7b930edb1344fa9a275bd19ba60f5bc&_e=AsG1M2JjJmXb6yd_iPsG1ViZ26FXzj5-bhGXi_6iSb7LVSW0OQIZWDwPqDP3rchcp50O4zv1quF7VRKS2pIKmO0i10FPZWt2yqBPCwMKFqCSE_gcxiYXfYgOiO99aJjPMQwoH7ft42NdYgwSr4lspWRYIz0xJm0NUVWHn7TDkN9LceTnBXpQdx-uoQRyORz5DRqa7LxlxFnrxZpjexTDK-v48MNLB4ztpJxFnfMXI5C-UUsJ4jF8umZKmRmSFuInZA4fc8sRNSuy4f-hwlZfbp4ZWjG2iS1FpjpeB9r5sHW5wgrmdi53AkFrBW0sM3cVhue6jtXBNplWsGHmYVaVxrkrZrxQMLqMMpvB_GlDQ2eIbxCj7UIVahyl6_dQ0BpQ) We need to build up a network of grassroots conservatives who are motivated and committed to ending the Democrats’ attacks on our freedoms, prosperity, security, and values.

Will you join me in backing him to flip Ohio by rushing $10, $50, $100 or a customized donation to his campaign immediately?**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=e7b930edb1344fa9a275bd19ba60f5bc&_e=AsG1M2JjJmXb6yd_iPsG1ViZ26FXzj5-bhGXi_6iSb7LVSW0OQIZWDwPqDP3rchcp50O4zv1quF7VRKS2pIKmO0i10FPZWt2yqBPCwMKFqCSE_gcxiYXfYgOiO99aJjPMQwoH7ft42NdYgwSr4lspWRYIz0xJm0NUVWHn7TDkN9LceTnBXpQdx-uoQRyORz5DRqa7LxlxFnrxZpjexTDK-v48MNLB4ztpJxFnfMXI5C5EHsgTbWylrVKlsT6wr8u7KuCX8NgNBlIULmEHAlgWQI9TKd3Ka-lz_Csgx1fOhKIngdRZqkteoMOy940p7pafE17_hdgZSUg79dbdtgh5zVyNUFEDnU_qnACPf5kZGprA-ByuzzaUOt-XfsbEIKZ)

**Meet Bernie Moreno:** | Bernie Moreno fights for the American dream because he’s lived it. Bernie was born in Bogota, Colombia. At age five, his American dream began when he moved to the United States with his family. Bernie became an American citizen at age 18.

Through his relentless work ethic and untamable entrepreneurial spirit, he turned the first car dealership that he purchased in 2005 into one of the largest dealership groups in America.

In 2016, Bernie recognized the value and transformational potential of blockchain technology, before it received mainstream attention, and moved much of his volunteer time and investment dollars into the space. In 2018 he co-founded ChampTitles, which grew to be quite successful as Bernie served as Chairman of the Board.

After a long, successful career, Bernie sold most of his business to begin focusing on his calling: protecting the American dream for another generation.

Solving our country’s problems requires common sense. In Washington, Bernie will fight to shrink government, protect our freedoms, stop the Chinese Communist party from taking our data and land, and always put America First.

Ohioans are done with politicians who talk a big game and do nothing. Bernie wants to go to D.C. to get work done – just like he always has.

name: David Hogg
subject: I’m fed up
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY STOP GUN VIOLENCE PAC
body:
Gun reform, including universal background checks and an assault weapons ban, are supported by the majority of voters, yet Republicans refuse to act.

| Hey Peter, it’s David Hogg, gun violence prevention advocate, and school shooting survivor.

When a former classmate entered Marjory Stoneman Douglas in 2018 and opened fire on my classmates, killing 17 people, my life and my community were forever altered.

**I saw the toll it took on myself, my classmates, and their families – _no child or community should ever have to endure that type of pain._**

That’s why I committed myself to standing up to NRA-backed politicians and fighting for gun violence prevention legislation, including an assault weapons ban. [_**So, will you join me in supporting Stop Gun Violence PAC and Leaders We Deserve by splitting a donation to elect gun violence prevention advocates in 2024?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67825478/420995593/-68786849?refcode=BLU-SGVP-20230809-2-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQ0NTkiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOThiY2IzZTgtY2YzNi1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=NqEggRUFfkMzPd5f5u_SfpuDKL4A8PMT6EjBGIP8xsw=)
---
| [CONTRIBUTE ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67825480/420995595/-68786849?refcode=BLU-SGVP-20230809-2-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQ0NTkiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOThiY2IzZTgtY2YzNi1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=NqEggRUFfkMzPd5f5u_SfpuDKL4A8PMT6EjBGIP8xsw=)
---
Listen, I’m no stranger to criticism and harassment – even by elected officials like Marjorie Taylor Greene – but I will never stop fighting to ensure no other community goes through what my classmates and I did on February 14, 2018.

I’m also no stranger to being underestimated. After the shooting, people said that we couldn’t change gun laws because the NRA owned Florida, but we did. People then said well, young people won’t vote, but we did at the highest rates in US history and defeated more NRA-backed members of Congress than ever before. More recently, they said we could never elect Maxwell Frost, 25-year-old March For Our Lives organizer, but we did, and now he is now the youngest member of Congress.

Gun reform, including universal background checks and an assault weapons ban, are supported by the majority of voters, **yet Republicans refuse to act.**

We can’t sit idly by while other schools and communities are rocked by gun violence – we must do better for our generation and the next. To do this, we must repurpose the mantra we learned during school shooter drills alongside our ABCs of Run, Hide, Fight. It is time for the school shooting generation to Run for office, refuse to Hide from the responsibility we have to protect the next generation, and Fight for a better future by voting and organizing to hold elected officials accountable.

[_**So will you consider contributing anything to support our efforts to elect gun violence prevention champions and kick NRA-backed politicians out of office?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67825482/420995597/-68786849?refcode=BLU-SGVP-20230809-2-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQ0NTkiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOThiY2IzZTgtY2YzNi1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=NqEggRUFfkMzPd5f5u_SfpuDKL4A8PMT6EjBGIP8xsw=)
| | | [CONTRIBUTE $5 ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67825484/420995599/-68786849?refcode=BLU-SGVP-20230809-2-EM&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQ0NTkiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOThiY2IzZTgtY2YzNi1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=NqEggRUFfkMzPd5f5u_SfpuDKL4A8PMT6EjBGIP8xsw=)

clean_body: Gun reform, including universal background checks and an assault weapons ban, are supported by the majority of voters, yet Republicans refuse to act. | Hey Peter, it’s David Hogg, gun violence prevention advocate, and school shooting survivor. When a former classmate entered Marjory Stoneman Douglas in 2018 and opened fire on my classmates, killing 17 people, my life and my community were forever altered. I saw the toll it took on myself, my classmates, and their families – no child or community should ever have to endure that type of pain. That’s why I committed myself to standing up to NRA-backed politicians and fighting for gun violence prevention legislation, including an assault weapons ban. = | = Listen, I’m no stranger to criticism and harassment – even by elected officials like Marjorie Taylor Greene – but I will never stop fighting to ensure no other community goes through what my classmates and I did on February 14, 2018. I’m also no stranger to being underestimated. After the shooting, people said that we couldn’t change gun laws because the NRA owned Florida, but we did. People then said well, young people won’t vote, but we did at the highest rates in US history and defeated more NRA-backed members of Congress than ever before. More recently, they said we could never elect Maxwell Frost, 25-year-old March For Our Lives organizer, but we did, and now he is now the youngest member of Congress. Gun reform, including universal background checks and an assault weapons ban, are supported by the majority of voters, yet Republicans refuse to act. We can’t sit idly by while other schools and communities are rocked by gun violence – we must do better for our generation and the next. To do this, we must repurpose the mantra we learned during school shooter drills alongside our ABCs of Run, Hide, Fight. It is time for the school shooting generation to Run for office, refuse to Hide from the responsibility we have to protect the next generation, and Fight for a better future by voting and organizing to hold elected officials accountable. = | | | = | = | = | = | = Thank you, David Hogg Gun Violence Survivor & Gun Violence Prevention Advocate * | | = PAID FOR BY STOP GUN VIOLENCE PAC Stop Gun Violence PAC 600 Pennsylvania Ave SE #15180 Washington, DC 20003 United States | = If you do not wish to receive emails about this important movement to end gun violence, please

Team, did you see what President Obama said about this grassroots movement? | “Even when the cynics said the cause was hopeless, **we never wavered in our commitment** to fight for fair maps, fair representation, and a strong democracy. **That tenacity has fueled our grassroots efforts** to help secure the fairest congressional map in a generation.
---
**_And we’ve got to keep it going for the battles ahead.”_
_President Barack Obama_**
He couldn’t be more correct! **Thanks to supporters like you, the NDRC has remained steadfast in our fight for a strong democracy.** Together, we helped secure the fairest congressional maps in a generation, elected Democracy Defenders across the country, defeated dangerous election deniers, and so much more.

[**_But Republicans remain committed as ever to using tactics like gerrymandering and voter suppression so they can gain unearned power and implement their extreme, unpopular agenda. That’s why we’re counting on your continued support to help us fight for a level playing field in 2024._**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/67825540/420995663/-1466375647?amount=30&refcode=EM_RTI_20230809_FR_7V_redlight922_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjgyYmNiM2U4LWNmMzYtZWUxMS1hM2YxLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=dERGFzG2QtxzkbU1lf3olmjp_gPPgiDL94DlPI8E9QY=)

Friend,
I have a lot to say in this email - but it all comes from the HEART.
Since the moment I rode down the Golden Escalator at Trump Tower to announce my presidential campaign as a political outsider, the Deep State has put a bull's eye on my back.
My private communications were SPIED on, I was slandered by the Fake News, and a dossier was fabricated in an attempt to FRAME me as an asset of the Russian government.
But then, a line was crossed on August 8, 2022 at 9:00 in the morning when my own home was RAIDED by the FBI and staged to look like a made-for-TV crime scene.
_**When the Deep State invades your own home, it 's a sign that our nation has entered uncharted territory and things are about to get far worse.**_
The raid on my home was a stern warning from the federal government not to run for president in 2024 - and a sign of what's to come if I chose to defy their demands.
I could've obeyed. I could've said, "I got to be one of only 45 Americans to ever be president. We did a tremendous job in those 4 years. Now, I can just spend the rest of my life by the beach with my beautiful family."
But that thought never even crossed my mind.
_**I could never turn my back on the country that gave me everything I ever could 've dreamed of. America will always be worth saving.**_
Surrendering our country to tyrannical bureaucrats who've become drunk with power never was and never will be an option.
So, when I announced my re-election campaign in November of 2022, I knew the imminent storm I was walking straight into...
...I have since been INDICTED **THREE** TIMES as an innocent man. I've been ARRESTED for crimes that I did not commit. And the rabid left-wing prosecutors have signaled that this is only just the beginning.
**They 've made it clear that their end game is to JAIL ME FOR LIFE as an innocent man.**
Many pundits have remarked that if I were to drop out of the presidential race, the phony charges against me would be dropped and I would be guaranteed to live as a free man.
_**But here in America, our liberty is not a bargaining chip. Our freedom doesn 't come from a deal brokered by the government, our freedom is a natural right from God.**_
_**The second we allow our liberty and justice to be used as weapons of extortion, our nation will have forever succumbed to the dark forces of tyranny.**_
So, I will address those who are wondering if I would accept a deal with the Deep State and what this THIRD sham indictment means for the fate of our campaign...
...Let me make myself 100% clear: OUR CAMPAIGN GOES ON AND IT WILL _CONTINUE_ TO GO ON UNTIL WE THE PEOPLE WIN BACK THE WHITE HOUSE ON NOVEMBER 5, 2024.
We've built the greatest political movement in the history of our country - and I will NEVER ABANDON it.
**We are on a mission to save our country from a corrupt, self-serving ruling class - and I know in my heart, that we will prevail just as we always have, and on November 5, 2024, We The People will be celebrating America's TRIUMPH OVER TYRANNY.**
Friend, if you are doing poorly due to the very sinister people who are destroying our country, then you can stop reading here. I only wanted to share this note with you.
_But, if you can, never forget that even just $1 has the power to beat Crooked Joe and save America, because your $1 is never alone. It 's backed by millions of other patriots who share your values and love for our country._

name: Ted Cruz
subject: We cannot underestimate them
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ted Cruz for Senate**
body:
| | | [](http://trk.tedcruz.)
---
Fellow Conservative, I know it may seem like we have nothing to worry about here in Texas. That at the end of the day, our common-sense conservative values and principles will always prevail. **We cannot underestimate the left.** It could result in disaster on November 5, 2024. Silicon Valley, Hollywood, George Soros, and the liberal elites from coast to coast desperately want to flip Texas and silence my voice for you in the U.S. Senate – and Colin Allred is a serious candidate who _defeated an 11-term GOP incumbent in 2018_ and _raised $6.2 million in less than two months_ after his Senate campaign launch in early May! Today, we’re asking every supporter to donate $4 to fuel our fight.

Will you stand behind me to **KEEP TEXAS RED**?
---
[](http://trk.tedcruz.-CTjEryw)
---
It is my honor and privilege to serve you in the U.S. Senate, and I am humbled to have so many liberty-loving patriots like you on our team. **Together, I know we can prevail in the fight for our great nation’s future!** Our goal today is 100% participation. **[Follow this link to make a secure donation >>>](http://trk.tedcruz.)** For Liberty,
---
[](http://trk.tedcruz._1eDabw)
---
Ted Cruz

| | Hey it's David Hogg, gun safety advocate and co-founder of March For Our Lives. Our kids, our planet, our freedoms, our democracy — are all under attack by extremists, from the State House to the U.S. Senate, who are willing to let children be slaughtered at school and watch our planet burn for their own personal gain. **We refuse to back down.** There were many who said after Parkland that we couldn't change anything because we were just a "bunch of kids." But we proved them wrong — **we passed gun laws in a state owned by the NRA.** There were many who said young people would never vote. But we proved them wrong in 2018 — _defeating more NRA backed politicians than ever before in U.S. history._ Then, in 2020, we defeated NRA puppet Donald Trump. **Both of these victories enabled us to pass the first federal gun law in 30 years.** There were many who said Maxwell Frost, March For Our Lives' first National Organizing Director, could never be the first Gen Z Member of Congress. **But we proved them wrong, again.** Young people have a habit of being underestimated — and I have a habit of scaring Republicans by proving that, while we might be young, we are _powerful_. **That is why today, myself and Kevin Lata, Maxwell Frost's Campaign Manager and 2022 Campaign Manager of the Year, are launching Leaders We Deserve** — a grassroots organization dedicated to electing young leaders to Congress, and especially our State Legislatures, across the country to help defeat the extremis's agenda and advance a progressive vision for the future. Leaders We Deserve will work in partnership with a stacked Advisory Board, including Maxwell Frost, Justin Jones, and other influential leaders. **[Are you in? Split a donation between Leaders We Deserve and Andy Kim so we can win back our country and advance a progressive agenda.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67825766/420996393/1371794402?refcode=2023-08-09-lwd-split&recurring=&amount=12&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=ac6e3553-d036-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzk3MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYzZlMzU1My1kMDM2LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Y1fooRWC8LT08LPt2pLY3MYZRpqQZXadwAldWkpqlS4=)** **[Donate Now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67825768/420996395/1371794402?refcode=2023-08-09-lwd-split&recurring=&amount=12&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=ac6e3553-d036-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzk3MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYzZlMzU1My1kMDM2LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Y1fooRWC8LT08LPt2pLY3MYZRpqQZXadwAldWkpqlS4=)** Why is this important? **Despite making up 45% of the electorate, Gen Z and Millenials only hold 21% of State Legislature seats.** Conversely, Republicans have made significant investments in down-ballot races, leading to the absolute assault on our rights and freedoms that we're seeing happen across states — from abortion bans to taking away LGBTQ+ rights to repealing life-saving common sense gun laws put into place after the Parkland shooting. Our political system is stacked against us, but incredible young leaders have fought back and beat the odds to get elected to office. It's time to take more young people from movements like March For Our Lives and elect them to office to be the leaders we deserve. **But grassroots support is what moves the needle, and it's what we need from you today.** [**Join us by splitting a donation of any amount between Leaders We Deserve and Andy Kim today.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67825770/420996397/1371794402?refcode=2023-08-09-lwd-split&recurring=&amount=12&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=ac6e3553-d036-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzk3MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYzZlMzU1My1kMDM2LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Y1fooRWC8LT08LPt2pLY3MYZRpqQZXadwAldWkpqlS4=) So how are we going to fight back against the 50-year chess game conservative special interest groups have been manipulating? **Leaders We Deserve will invest in young people, knock down barriers, and elect more young people to office. 4. **Running Paid Media Campaigns:** We'll run well-funded independent expenditure programs.

Young candidates aren't seen as viable and often struggle to raise money. They have lower personal wealth and smaller donor networks. | | | [](http://links.right-gop.com/u/click?_t=2ba4f933732b46f5b6eae32741d1832c&_m=3e51c8e69913489daca5e8357b53268b&_e=eRlXlq-6TgWoMIb9J6owVQT2Ndsik3U3MOzvaLYxBJEnoNymbf73GHR42PdUlCY-ic9KkFYPIu2-lP-pnElAIqSrmFHEay0aBJ12AD29QXWATW7EymHeTrIlJsihHEOmdx5N1TRvTXnMrSI0PXquBJD8UJHuZKmJrdfpA2gfM24zHE1fcHGElVtPRdwYOdrlw0m4uSldOU-RHsnRTr4U79ap3AVECT8r_F530wu6d94UGcG3eJCMsjozLRymS8tnb8AWkc3uMoFZEAbCzOMIO4MPkhQk7ckmqwX01aqSmMa8EPD7HZ-Bf9r6rZwWaytlTg85fhP1aN2U7xwwWfiPmT8Ygr8EOLZs-ueQExfNXKKsXt6NunEvBL_jZ6B7WLX27Cwu5S3S5WDu6S41-yR0sg%3D%3D)

I’m going to let you in on a little-known secret, Friend.

There’s a reason why it’s **ILLEGAL** for our military to identify with a political party: because it would give that party total control.

**In the one-party controlled Communist China, the military is only loyal to the party, not The People. **

And when I see a new headline every week of Dem’s pushing a radical-left agenda on our men and women uniform, I tense up in fear.

The U.S. military following the marching orders of DEMOCRATS? None of us would be safe.....

**This is CAPT Hung Cao USN (RET), I announced my run for U.S. Senate in Virginia two weeks ago and the radical-left went nuts because I promised to put an END to their indoctrination of our military.**

I escaped a totalitarian state in 1975 - **Vietnam** \- Their behavior is lockstep with the communists who chased me out of the country. The radical left will do EVERYTHING to keep me out of power.

I want to keep up the offensive but their attacks are non-stop. **[Is there any way you could contribute to my campaign to help me put an END to the indoctrination?](http://links.right-gop.com/u/click?_t=2ba4f933732b46f5b6eae32741d1832c&_m=3e51c8e69913489daca5e8357b53268b&_e=eRlXlq-6TgWoMIb9J6owVQT2Ndsik3U3MOzvaLYxBJEnoNymbf73GHR42PdUlCY-ic9KkFYPIu2-lP-pnElAIqSrmFHEay0aBJ12AD29QXWATW7EymHeTrIlJsihHEOmdx5N1TRvTXnMrSI0PXquBJD8UJHuZKmJrdfpA2gfM24zHE1fcHGElVtPRdwYOdrlw0m4uSldOU-RHsnRTr4U79ap3AVECT8r_F530wu6d94UGcG3eJCMsjozLRymS8tn50SCM6hYd05IBiTDvgcIG7WiIm--9QrWEmLd_cBh86vp-ZBzzNbnjQRDnoxNXKhVoc1GLpb2-0iCNzYT54lJ7DMsvvS43LbOfOwXng9bWR9Rbl6rGqX61SjPAbt23O5uytPVOd0_xbBPSjvu4mGDXA%3D%3D)**

| | Last night in a special election, Ohioans delivered a resounding "NO" and rejected a proposed constitutional change that would have made it harder to pass future amendments to the Ohio Constitution. Ohio Republicans saw the writing on the wall — they were going to lose in November when Ohio voters got to weigh in on the right to access reproductive healthcare. So they tried to flip their state from majority rule to a minority chokehold and cheat the system. Thankfully, their effort failed last night. **But we know that they are going to throw every dirty trick they can come up with against my friend Senator Sherrod Brown when he runs for re-election next year.** There is no better fighter for Ohioans than Sherrod, and he is one of my closest friends and allies in the Senate fighting for working families. [**Sherrod is in the fight with me, and I need you to be in the fight for Sherrod. Please join me by making a donation of $3 right now to help us fight back against Republicans' dirty tricks and win this race. clean_body: | | | | Last night in a special election, Ohioans delivered a resounding "NO" and rejected a proposed constitutional change that would have made it harder to pass future amendments to the Ohio Constitution. Ohio Republicans saw the writing on the wall — they were going to lose in November when Ohio voters got to weigh in on the right to access reproductive healthcare. So they tried to flip their state from majority rule to a minority chokehold and cheat the system. Thankfully, their effort failed last night. But we know that they are going to throw every dirty trick they can come up with against my friend Senator Sherrod Brown when he runs for re-election next year. There is no better fighter for Ohioans than Sherrod, and he is one of my closest friends and allies in the Senate fighting for working families. = Donate Now If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | = | = ---|--- = | = = Onward! body:
| | | | |

| | |
# [Add your name: Tell Georgia to Hand Trump his 4th Indictment](https://default.salsalabs.org/T9d9198d0-6b58-4e45-9d65-cc2ae225947f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T021a219e-aef2-484b-a604-a97b3a17dd16/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | Trump has been under investigation in Georgia, and his fourth criminal indictment is now expected to come [as early as next week](https://default.salsalabs.org/T5f6dd286-1f78-48d4-87ec-8489e4c766df/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9). It was in Georgia where officials received multiple calls from Trump, including the infamous one where he pressured them to "find" enough votes to overturn the results. A call was also received from Lindsey Graham, suggesting that ballots could be thrown out in Democratic areas. Trump deserves to have the book thrown at him for this scheme to steal the election, and Georgia officials have every right to do it. [Add your name to tell everyone involved in the Georgia case that you support them handing Trump his 4th criminal indictment >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/T2767edba-5667-4a7c-97d3-fd4f239a9974/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
