name: Sherrod Brown via Blue Amp Action
subject: Massive victory in Ohio
body:
Ohioans came out strong in this week’s special election
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T48a84788-a0d5-4949-840b-7c594c1d2f49/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | This is incredible news, Peter! Ohioans came out strong in yesterday’s special election to STOP an anti-democratic amendment and clear special interest power grab – which would’ve made it harder for us to enshrine reproductive rights in our state constitution this November. Seeing Ohio voters turn out to the polls and decisively reject the GOP's proposal has me feeling more hopeful than ever about our ability to protect women’s health care. This massive victory also makes clear that momentum is on our side heading into 2024 when I’ll be on the ballot. But we can’t take our foot off the gas. [So today, as we celebrate, I'm personally asking you to help me keep up our momentum: Will you split $5 or more between myself and Blue Amp Action to defend Ohio's Democratic seat and our pro-choice Senate majority?](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tace160f1-5695-4d4a-938d-1414d1255cad/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Sen. Sherrod Brown and Blue Amp Action will go through immediately:_ **[Express Donate: $5](https://default.salsalabs.org/T5e764a8f-d0ce-47e2-93c8-296cab57f471/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** **[Express Donate: $10](https://default.salsalabs.org/T4d01ebec-881f-476e-81fa-906bb0c36933/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** **[Express Donate: $25](https://default.salsalabs.org/T1fc5b9f3-093e-488b-b809-b2f30475e72d/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** **[Or, donate another amount](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc992593a-2596-4e52-bf57-69c68324e8e5/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)**
|
---
| | | | | In solidarity, Sherrod
---

---
| | |
---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T9704f633-8b1b-495f-a981-fcb14a3bd426/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: David Hogg
subject: I’m getting into politics
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the HER Time PAC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee
body:
This is the biggest thing I’ve ever been a part of. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67826753/421000175/-2095412496?refcode=AU_HTP_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20230809_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDI1NDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZjU4YTExMDMtZDMzNi1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=DxzbtqbvwQjtTzEIvogXfFvlUM7IyQaXU23webexfmw=)
---
Hey Peter, it’s David Hogg, gun safety advocate and co-founder of March For Our Lives. Many of our elected officials can be described as one word: **_Cowards_.** Our kids, our planet, our freedoms, our democracy — are all under attack by far-right extremists, from the State House to the U.S. Senate, who are willing to let children be slaughtered at school and watch our planet burn for their own personal gain. **We refuse to back down.** There were many who said after Parkland that we couldn’t change anything because we were just a “bunch of kids.” But we proved them wrong — **we passed gun laws in a state owned by the NRA.** There were many who said young people would never vote. But we proved them wrong in 2018 — _defeating more NRA backed politicians than ever before in U.S. history._ Then, in 2020, we defeated NRA puppet Donald Trump. **Both of these victories enabled us to pass the first federal gun law in 30 years.** There were many who said Maxwell Frost, March For Our Lives' first National Organizing Director, could never be the first Gen Z Member of Congress. **But we proved them wrong, again.** Badass young people have a habit of being underestimated — and I have a habit of scaring the shit out of Republicans by proving that, while we might be young, we are _powerful_. **That is why today, myself and Kevin Lata, Maxwell Frost’s Campaign Manager and 2022 Campaign Manager of the Year, are launching Leaders We Deserve** — a grassroots organization dedicated to electing young leaders to Congress, and especially our State Legislatures, across the country to help defeat the far-right’s agenda and advance a progressive vision for the future. Leaders We Deserve will work in partnership with a stacked Advisory Board, including Maxwell Frost, Justin Jones, and other influential leaders. [_**Are you in? Split a donation between Leaders We Deserve and HER Time so we can win back our country and advance a progressive agenda.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67826754/421000176/-1130665371?refcode=AU_HTP_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20230809_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDI1NDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZjU4YTExMDMtZDMzNi1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=DxzbtqbvwQjtTzEIvogXfFvlUM7IyQaXU23webexfmw=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Leaders We Deserve and HER Time will go through immediately:_ | | [DONATE $10 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67826755/421000177/-547320995?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=AU_HTP_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20230809_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDI1NDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZjU4YTExMDMtZDMzNi1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=DxzbtqbvwQjtTzEIvogXfFvlUM7IyQaXU23webexfmw=)

Why is this important?
**Despite making up 45% of the electorate, Gen Z and Millennials only hold 21% of State Legislature seats. **
Conversely, Republicans have made significant investments in down-ballot races, leading to the absolute assault on our rights and freedoms that we’re seeing happen across states — from abortion bans to taking away LGBTQ+ rights to repealing life-saving common sense gun laws put into place after the Parkland shooting.
Our political system is stacked against us, but incredible young leaders have fought back and beat the odds to get elected to office. It’s time to take more young people from movements like March For Our Lives and elect them to office to be the leaders we deserve. **But grassroots support is what moves the needle, and it’s what we need from you today.**
[_**Join us by splitting a donation of any amount between Leaders We Deserve and HER Time today.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67826764/421000183/-1130665371?refcode=AU_HTP_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20230809_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDI1NDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZjU4YTExMDMtZDMzNi1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=DxzbtqbvwQjtTzEIvogXfFvlUM7IyQaXU23webexfmw=)
So how are we going to fight back against the 50-year chess game conservative special interest groups have been manipulating?
**Leaders We Deserve will invest in young people, knock down barriers, and elect more young people to office. We’re doing this by: **
1. **Recruitment** : Identifying candidates who will have the biggest impact on their states (that's where the real work is happening).
2. **Providing Day-to-Day Support:** We’re helping campaigns build from the ground up and will work with them directly on fundraising, messaging, coalition building, voter contact, and volunteer recruitment.
3. **Volunteer Network:** Our grassroots volunteer army (that’s you, Peter) will have person-to-person conversations with voters all across a candidate’s district, advocating on their behalf.
4. **Running Paid Media Campaigns:** We’ll run well-funded independent expenditure programs.

But there’s a reason our political system favors those who are older, wealthier, and white — _running for office takes serious resources. _
Which is one of the reasons I’m reaching out today. Young candidates aren’t seen as viable and often struggle to raise money. They have lower personal wealth and smaller donor networks.
[_**So I’m asking: Will you join our movement by splitting a donation between Leaders We Deserve and HER Time today?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67826766/421000186/-1130665371?refcode=AU_HTP_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20230809_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDI1NDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZjU4YTExMDMtZDMzNi1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=DxzbtqbvwQjtTzEIvogXfFvlUM7IyQaXU23webexfmw=)

We refuse to back down. There were many who said after Parkland that we couldn’t change anything because we were just a “bunch of kids.” But we proved them wrong — we passed gun laws in a state owned by the NRA. There were many who said young people would never vote. But we proved them wrong in 2018 — defeating more NRA backed politicians than ever before in U.S. history. **_[That's why I announced I am running for President of the United States.](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=16931e5815ea49b8b30c932c3570a7d1&_e=ETWcbJZS-ctFhj0-vxRNePC2tvugleqtFl3LhysFL5VI0KqNSpf1k2e_dz2hR4dW4yzmXhl_4lZ56fbqGYOd2w8D-e0l7ss3BHQuhE23-VxVoD6Tx3Rf0CaKIMtj5wvBv1UaL_6qqiLcRBHFGMAZwMcnRCzigGYOO1unrH-mr8XjXgcLU0QEAdKZCd0dKW9b29_IB-FHh55ebV-fHESxnETa8hvLNaibxLR8OIuv7RYs3BhqBqbGwoxwsbtQ5G8wAztG8ZI042NV5No_JOa7mIFE14uy8AweX10Uw5qtHpqenCF4Hw7ZZTzkC4m3vePkldX-PVelp6jE7ozcfPbL6xddUV0QIZuNYoAk4WyjisOtn1iiL1LYMbIHT2t79c51Lo3a0hrfTWhWWqR3PC01GOjYdLUo5zBkpxptRxeS5Y1DjNYogTuPruH3K5AfqU7hhsIqLYKY1gOOPtBT-0wImQ%3D%3D "That’s why I announced I am running for President of the United States.")_**

| Peter,

In a moment, I'm going to tell you how **our economy and our environment go hand in hand,** but first, I need to ask: [_**if you believe in a brighter future for every Washingtonian, will you contribute $1 right now to become a Founding Donor to my race for governor.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67827234/421001863/-165497492?refcode=BLU-HFFG-20230809-1-EM&amount=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDA1NzQiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMTFhMzc5MmQtZDQzNi1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=gO-6QzZH5uD6L6zS-ZKuWA1vYTlsxxdvZ6Bt0U2SvzQ=)

I've shown as Washington's commissioner of public lands that when we work together to tackle our problems with proper planning and strategy, every Washingtonian benefits.

_**I've shown as Washington's commissioner of public lands that when we create cross-cutting solutions to our most pressing problems, we can create jobs, put more money in more families' pockets, and boost local economies.**_

Now, I'm ready to continue creating cross-cutting solutions as Washington's next governor. By addressing our housing crisis and rising costs, protecting our land and water, and expanding healthcare access, we can deliver a brighter, more prosperous future for us all. [_**So, Peter, can I count on you to join me in working together to solve Washington's challenges and become a Founding Donor to my race for governor by contributing $1 or whatever you can afford to today?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67827237/421001866/-165497492?refcode=BLU-HFFG-20230809-1-EM&amount=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDA1NzQiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMTFhMzc5MmQtZDQzNi1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=gO-6QzZH5uD6L6zS-ZKuWA1vYTlsxxdvZ6Bt0U2SvzQ=)

I've shown as Washington's commissioner of public lands that when we create cross-cutting solutions to our most pressing problems, we can create jobs, put more money in more families' pockets, and boost local economies. Now, I'm ready to continue creating cross-cutting solutions as Washington's next governor. By addressing our housing crisis and rising costs, protecting our land and water, and expanding healthcare access, we can deliver a brighter, more prosperous future for us all. = | | | = | = | = | = | = Thank you, Hilary Franz * | | = Paid for by Friends of Hilary Franz (D) Friends of Hilary Franz (D) PO Box 9100 Seattle, WA 98109 United States | = Email is a critical way for our campaign to stay in touch with you. name: Conservative Liberty Wire
subject: Reason with precision
body:
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills

| This sponsored message from Conservative Liberty Wire is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=be9ff861972f47288e1c4a4f11519ebc&_e=4IiOH16DhrJwkq01c0Tq_oAaC_b3G9GWt76oKxgnqN-Nrq5dz0sn1o4TzliudjAD_TIbdGFBjOAaAzO08G8T44FKhvNCpzoOlcnesW1DMM5JIXxsJgZvBkkRIW2MDVCwNlnPgNt8oDBRHi-ONjuFlZtp9Eer4T0IKhgpRm0YIJV2oLNsPeQDRN6xQcjjRvRaV9EAhqOOngcUuq-9pPaEFIxqcO42ob4Lm9BGEePRnmDnSn8ogdKVqjQcYDqmKqvI9aIafjM0CksDBHmfyHLRy8SDTLf-cjmw57YknB5Q_Tea0Re56jdSlekrfPGYhMBZUxBbjB0QFKzcydeHtMJzPijUy1tcAS0Wq13-xW97JUetnDM8X36ZmGed1LJKuQ8lGPi7N-wOmbNjHUNLaphpToeI643uNQkJKwFf9MJ6mdI%3D)
---
| | Dear fellow American,
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid.
While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law.
Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father's cabin, and did not return until he could "give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight."
By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly--plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun.
That's why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic **" Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry." **
Through** "Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,"** you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life.
---
| | **Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group.** ** ** **You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.**
Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because...
Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.
---
| [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=be9ff861972f47288e1c4a4f11519ebc&_e=4IiOH16DhrJwkq01c0Tq_oAaC_b3G9GWt76oKxgnqN-Nrq5dz0sn1o4TzliudjAD_TIbdGFBjOAaAzO08G8T44FKhvNCpzoOlcnesW1DMM5JIXxsJgZvBkkRIW2MDVCwNlnPgNt8oDBRHi-ONjuFlZtp9Eer4T0IKhgpRm0YIJV2oLNsPeQDRN6xQcjjRvRaV9EAhqOOngcUuq-9pPaEFIxqcO42ob4Lm9BGEePRnmDnSn8ogdKVqjQcYDqmKqvI9aIafjM0CksDBHmfyHLRy8p9aH-azNfMR-IyoTYY2QCMjsateUWkjfi6H1uYYyl520TtK1Qa3jLFnRXykLIpgtfz5_yiF7E-kOB57ZGdxml-lyRYnoDUZGeY1X9GoVkc_8xfdStRWiPDNqjpJAzXXV8k7pfz54VEkQr5GOJMZBI%3D)
---
| | That's why we need the support of friends like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.
Quantities of this special DVD box set are limited, so reserve your copy today. I've included a secure link for you to make your tax-deductible gift below:
[_**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/dvd-mathematics-and-logic-course**_](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=be9ff861972f47288e1c4a4f11519ebc&_e=4IiOH16DhrJwkq01c0Tq_oAaC_b3G9GWt76oKxgnqN-Nrq5dz0sn1o4TzliudjAD_TIbdGFBjOAaAzO08G8T44FKhvNCpzoOlcnesW1DMM5JIXxsJgZvBkkRIW2MDVCwNlnPgNt8oDBRHi-ONjuFlZtp9Eer4T0IKhgpRm0YIJV2oLNsPeQDRN6xQcjjRvRaV9EAhqOOngcUuq-9pPaEFIxqcO42ob4Lm9BGEePRnmDnSn8ogdKVqjQcYDqmKqvI9aIafjM0CksDBHmfyHLRy_XkCpvzD89XqVYeRPGUGG_W3d-pS1zcSxagL-34zOpaJVc162yNVIGbeSbz7IvuSD90rZ54VwQaCEkig42T6dqldHv_ArKQFxWBiJu0KGuF44xW7eYFzi-gW5syHv_BCKgWcCvtr594z7WLG_0pjDc%3D)
Thank you for partnering with Hillsdale in its mission on behalf of liberty.
Warm regards,
Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

clean_body: Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills | This sponsored message from Conservative Liberty Wire is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | | | Dear fellow American, Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid. While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law. Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father's cabin, and did not return until he could "give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight." By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly--plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun. That's why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic " Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry." Through "Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry," you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life. | | Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group. You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because... Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. | | | That's why we need the support of friends like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty. Quantities of this special DVD box set are limited, so reserve your copy today. I've included a secure link for you to make your tax-deductible gift below: Thank you for partnering with Hillsdale in its mission on behalf of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 Conservative Liberty Wire 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 | _

Fellow conservative,

Under President Biden and the Democrats, the American Dream is nearly impossible to achieve.

Thanks to disastrous Democrat policies, the cost of living has skyrocketed, inflation has reached an all time high, and most good quality jobs have been moved overseas, making the American Dream nearly unattainable.

We need more patriots who will step into the fight to preserve the American Dream for generations to come.

**Bernie Moreno is that fighter.** He’s running for the U.S. Senate in the great state of Ohio – one of our top targets in 2024 – [**and I’m reaching out today to tell you he has my full support. He needs yours too if we’re going to take back the Senate and rescue America and the American Dream.**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=7b21060a5f054e868afad927466dc493&_e=jEeiYTYElUuaPuCLU_lcLN9WjKkYFDJezN7mgqw-nTAY-WckbxUBHRUC1Zs-uhTh2T7ABfb-2J9y6nOdEAlHGKEuA_rkg94bmEzFyDdz5m-jLrFihBGJnKX1nCfxEA8-bpztrceSdTq0swBCbUCM0xcmR93AJetZZ35GqJsju8bHQVFCPoWk7qSPVnIDZd8DOCYvhXI39CudHrNek0P-c484PhhBM2DMV6Q49PTG1PhvNZz67o5eYrI0295M57S2jcTvTE2PGf62027wZFQOtAtsW1FkumQNa5mp4fkYMhW0PEs97Sd-4lXX8vrXSBOlrRiqx3xWMpfWoheTzqovWm0B-C_rjQWI6Xx_s0VL6lqNlKj3oeMgi13YTZn325Ev)

As someone who’s parents fled similar failed policies in communist Cuba to seek freedom and the American Dream, I’m inspired by Bernie’s story.

He came to America from Colombia with his family in search of the American Dream, eventually achieved citizenship, and became a successful businessman who created thousands of jobs in Ohio.

**Becoming an American is one of the greatest honors of Bernie’s life** , and now he’s running to save the American Dream for his children and future generations.

**Thanks to Bernie jumping into this race, Ohio is one of the Top 3 Senate seats most likely to flip in 2024.** [**Will you help us get it done**?](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=7b21060a5f054e868afad927466dc493&_e=jEeiYTYElUuaPuCLU_lcLN9WjKkYFDJezN7mgqw-nTAY-WckbxUBHRUC1Zs-uhTh2T7ABfb-2J9y6nOdEAlHGKEuA_rkg94bmEzFyDdz5m-jLrFihBGJnKX1nCfxEA8-bpztrceSdTq0swBCbUCM0xcmR93AJetZZ35GqJsju8bHQVFCPoWk7qSPVnIDZd8DOCYvhXI39CudHrNek0P-c484PhhBM2DMV6Q49PTG1Ph8yjqWvj9ws6GuaK7HNgutbN9aurG-8nxxzMoPDQLD6sSocl5ll8XyWNdkzRW2ljWX_jYuV4-yrLDK7vW0FyaSNQjg38V2QEqzz9Gwo9hephqMCnBYjLsLiZADooq-hAJxTIST-kVngrL51HcPUWc7)

[ ** JOIN MARCO AND BACK BERNIE » **](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=7b21060a5f054e868afad927466dc493&_e=jEeiYTYElUuaPuCLU_lcLN9WjKkYFDJezN7mgqw-nTAY-WckbxUBHRUC1Zs-uhTh2T7ABfb-2J9y6nOdEAlHGKEuA_rkg94bmEzFyDdz5m-jLrFihBGJnKX1nCfxEA8-bpztrceSdTq0swBCbUCM0xcmR93AJetZZ35GqJsju8bHQVFCPoWk7qSPVnIDZd8DOCYvhXI39CudHrNek0P-c484PhhBM2DMV6Q49PTG1Pgg7Bj7B-T1JzttDvK0TyeyH7YTZJsGrF10ms-sPXXGdweS0L2s9mi3xL40KR6oSJC6OZ80HJbQfwbuX_RHTuWavXfA4KqWbzL2x8dTQhmljasSncfvFk3GCPt_Q0E7czUJBSjX11r-FU1LjU8oJdPF)
But this has spooked the Left, because their majority hinges on this race. So now, their elite coastal mega-donors have been pouring money into this race. They know Bernie has built a team that has what it takes to flip this seat and take back the Senate majority for Republicans.

If Bernie flips this seat, we can hold Joe Biden accountable and put America back on the right track.

**This will be one of the toughest, most competitive, and most expensive races in 2024. It could also be one of the closest.**

**Meet Bernie Moreno:** | Bernie Moreno fights for the American dream because he’s lived it. Bernie was born in Bogota, Colombia. At age five, his American dream began when he moved to the United States with his family. Bernie became an American citizen at age 18.

Through his relentless work ethic and untamable entrepreneurial spirit, he turned the first car dealership that he purchased in 2005 into one of the largest dealership groups in America.

In 2016, Bernie recognized the value and transformational potential of blockchain technology, before it received mainstream attention, and moved much of his volunteer time and investment dollars into the space. In 2018 he co-founded ChampTitles, which grew to be quite successful as Bernie served as Chairman of the Board.

After a long, successful career, Bernie sold most of his business to begin focusing on his calling: protecting the American dream for another generation.

Solving our country’s problems requires common sense. In Washington, Bernie will fight to shrink government, protect our freedoms, stop the Chinese Communist party from taking our data and land, and always put America First.

Ohioans are done with politicians who talk a big game and do nothing. Bernie wants to go to D.C. to get work done – just like he always has.

clean_body: As someone who’s parents fled similar failed policies in communist Cuba to seek freedom and the American Dream, I’m inspired by Bernie’s story. | | Fellow conservative, Under President Biden and the Democrats, the American Dream is nearly impossible to achieve. Thanks to disastrous Democrat policies, the cost of living has skyrocketed, inflation has reached an all time high, and most good quality jobs have been moved overseas, making the American Dream nearly unattainable. We need more patriots who will step into the fight to preserve the American Dream for generations to come. Bernie Moreno is that fighter. He’s running for the U.S. Senate in the great state of Ohio – one of our top targets in 2024 – As someone who’s parents fled similar failed policies in communist Cuba to seek freedom and the American Dream, I’m inspired by Bernie’s story. He came to America from Colombia with his family in search of the American Dream, eventually achieved citizenship, and became a successful businessman who created thousands of jobs in Ohio. Becoming an American is one of the greatest honors of Bernie’s life , and now he’s running to save the American Dream for his children and future generations. Thanks to Bernie jumping into this race, Ohio is one of the Top 3 Senate seats most likely to flip in 2024. But this has spooked the Left, because their majority hinges on this race. So now, their elite coastal mega-donors have been pouring money into this race. They know Bernie has built a team that has what it takes to flip this seat and take back the Senate majority for Republicans. If Bernie flips this seat, we can hold Joe Biden accountable and put America back on the right track. This will be one of the toughest, most competitive, and most expensive races in 2024. It could also be one of the closest. We need to build up a network of grassroots conservatives who are motivated and committed to ending the Democrats’ attacks on our freedoms, prosperity, security, and values. name: April Christenson
subject: July was the hottest month EVER
body:
| | | Dear Peter, This July was the hottest month ever recorded in human history. Yes, _ever_. The dire impacts of climate change were evident around the world: temperatures exceeded 120 degrees in China; red flag wildfire warnings were issued for the Willamette Valley over the Fourth of July; and marine heat waves have been developing in the Pacific Ocean, North Atlantic, and Caribbean Sea. In fact, July was so hot that experts were able to determine it was a record-breaking month of heat and high temperatures before the month even ended. They also found that human-caused climate pollution is mainly driving this abnormal heat and other out-of-the-ordinary weather patterns. It’s clear the time for climate action was, frankly, yesterday. We’ve made a lot of progress in recent years, but we still have a lot of work to do. [**Will you help by making a contribution to OLCV today? Your donation will ensure that we have the resources we need to continue working toward a just and equitable climate future.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/67830178/421012192/-1698714710?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjc1ZmJlNWI5LWQ5MzYtZWUxMS1hM2YxLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=l6cVRWJ5JaDiUFowA-0nxPiF066ZQnKku-skBRHGFXw=&emci=74d59818-cf36-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=75fbe5b9-d936-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=2107230) During this year’s legislative session we were able to get bold environment and climate action bills across the finish line, despite the senate Republican-led walkout stalling our efforts. These bills are on their way to becoming laws any day now, and some of them will unlock billions of federal dollars through President Biden’s Affordable Clean Energy Plan. None of this would have been possible without the help of generous supporters like you. [**Will you continue to support our work by making a contribution today?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/67830179/421012193/-1698714710?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjc1ZmJlNWI5LWQ5MzYtZWUxMS1hM2YxLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=l6cVRWJ5JaDiUFowA-0nxPiF066ZQnKku-skBRHGFXw=&emci=74d59818-cf36-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=75fbe5b9-d936-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=2107230) The record-breaking heat that we saw in July was not an outlier. We will continue to face the impacts of climate change and they will only worsen if we don’t continue to act. We’re gearing up for a big election year in 2024, and your donation now will ensure that we have the resources we need to elect leaders who will act on climate and help us continue to pass important legislation. [**Will you chip in today to help?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/67830180/421012194/-1698714710?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjc1ZmJlNWI5LWQ5MzYtZWUxMS1hM2YxLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=l6cVRWJ5JaDiUFowA-0nxPiF066ZQnKku-skBRHGFXw=&emci=74d59818-cf36-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=75fbe5b9-d936-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=2107230) Sincerely,
April Christenson

Development Director, OLCV **[PS: The time for climate action is now. Will you support our work by making a donation to OLCV today? We can’t do it without you.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/67830181/421012222/-1698714710?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjc1ZmJlNWI5LWQ5MzYtZWUxMS1hM2YxLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=l6cVRWJ5JaDiUFowA-0nxPiF066ZQnKku-skBRHGFXw=&emci=74d59818-cf36-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=75fbe5b9-d936-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=2107230)** |

name: Sherrod Brown
subject: We will win in November -
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
| | | Hi team – yesterday, Ohioans voted to stop an anti-democratic constitutional amendment aimed at making it harder for us to enshrine reproductive rights in our state's constitution. In doing so, they rejected special interests and made sure democracy remained where it belongs – in the hands of the voters, not the rich and powerful.

That’s why I’m in this fight, to give a voice to workers and families. I grew up in Mansfield, Ohio, in a community of ironworkers, carpenters, autoworkers, and electricians. I spent summers working on my family's farm. Today, I live in Cleveland with my wife, Connie, and our two rescue dogs, Franklin and Walter.

**I’ll be honest with you:** Over the years, in Ohio, we've seen manufacturing jobs shipped overseas because of bad trade deals, prices skyrocketing as wages failed to keep up, and hopes for a comfortable retirement dashed. That's why I've devoted my life to fighting for the Dignity of Work – the idea that hard work should pay off for everyone, no matter who you are, where you live, or what kind of work you do.

**Every day in the Senate, I’m fighting for _you_. But I’m facing my toughest race yet, and I need your help to win. [Will you chip in $5 or more now – split between my campaign and the DSCC – so I can keep up the fight in Ohio and defend the Senate for Democrats?](https://go.dscc.org/go/14452?amount=5&t=4&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FM-20230809-SherrodBrown-SpecialElectionBioFR-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FM-20230809-SherrodBrown-SpecialElectionBioFR-Pros-sl1&akid=11607%2E9716520%2ELNXDRS)**

Right now, Mitch McConnell and the GOP need to flip only two seats to retake Senate control – and experts at _Politico_ say it could all come down to Ohio. Last year's Senate race here was one of the most costly in the nation, and _NBC News_ reports this one could be "even nastier and more expensive."

**That's why I simply cannot win this race – and Democrats simply cannot hold on to our narrow Senate majority – without grassroots support from folks like you. As one of the most vulnerable senators in the country, I'm personally asking:**

**[Will you please split $5 between my campaign and the DSCC to help us hit our midnight fundraising goal, power our reelection campaign to victory, and keep the Senate blue?](https://go.dscc.org/go/14452?amount=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FM-20230809-SherrodBrown-SpecialElectionBioFR-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FM-20230809-SherrodBrown-SpecialElectionBioFR-Pros-sl1&akid=11607%2E9716520%2ELNXDRS)**

This is gonna be a heck of a fight, but with you by my side, I know we can beat the odds and continue making much-needed progress for workers and families. Thanks for being on our team.

With gratitude,

Sherrod

Sherrod Brown
U.S. Senator, Ohio

[](https://go.dscc.org/go/14452?amount=5&t=6&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FM-20230809-SherrodBrown-SpecialElectionBioFR-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FM-20230809-SherrodBrown-SpecialElectionBioFR-Pros-sl1&akid=11607%2E9716520%2ELNXDRS)

| A lifelong Ohioan, Sherrod Brown is running for reelection to the Senate to fight for the Dignity of Work and put money back in the pockets of workers and families.
_**[Chip in now to help keep Sherrod’s seat blue and defend our Democratic Senate majority>>](https://go.dscc.org/go/14452?amount=5&t=7&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FM-20230809-SherrodBrown-SpecialElectionBioFR-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FM-20230809-SherrodBrown-SpecialElectionBioFR-Pros-sl1&akid=11607%2E9716520%2ELNXDRS)**_

clean_body: | | | Hi team – yesterday, Ohioans voted to stop an anti-democratic constitutional amendment aimed at making it harder for us to enshrine reproductive rights in our state's constitution. In doing so, they rejected special interests and made sure democracy remained where it belongs – in the hands of the voters, not the rich and powerful. That’s why I’m in this fight, to give a voice to workers and families. I grew up in Mansfield, Ohio, in a community of ironworkers, carpenters, autoworkers, and electricians. I spent summers working on my family's farm. Today, I live in Cleveland with my wife, Connie, and our two rescue dogs, Franklin and Walter. I’ll be honest with you: Over the years, in Ohio, we've seen manufacturing jobs shipped overseas because of bad trade deals, prices skyrocketing as wages failed to keep up, and hopes for a comfortable retirement dashed. That's why I've devoted my life to fighting for the Dignity of Work – the idea that hard work should pay off for everyone, no matter who you are, where you live, or what kind of work you do. Every day in the Senate, I’m fighting for you. But I’m facing my toughest race yet, and I need your help to win. Right now, Mitch McConnell and the GOP need to flip only two seats to retake Senate control – and experts at Politico say it could all come down to Ohio. Last year's Senate race here was one of the most costly in the nation, and NBC News reports this one could be "even nastier and more expensive." That's why I simply cannot win this race – and Democrats simply cannot hold on to our narrow Senate majority – without grassroots support from folks like you. As one of the most vulnerable senators in the country, I'm personally asking: This is gonna be a heck of a fight, but with you by my side, I know we can beat the odds and continue making much-needed progress for workers and families. Thanks for being on our team. body:

[](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=7f692a9f519a4d42b93e7a042076d5dd&_e=fLBOHRHYPJmkXVUatKyNnWWCFqbIKsQRyI1alKWGle5ZjnX4Ew_iBHLaeeZBEPTNBlyoly749n22mJBfxtjf7Ef_DGm65LwFHFIgrYZ47uiDIERg-QQet1FG7nZ11CCSJGWKzNY99sVMRoUujGZXXR2z8xqvt0J4ap258cx5wsfF_xHA-V9WBBmupKs5ejnvpRdHvjxXLYm7bvVy7RONGMJybTrlBwXElpoZFr9qRPL-Q3i_9L02M1-1X9V_9L6nNte_iztW08pBc-SCCbqWhOTKG_pBko1qTi4Lv8hyybH25M-CWBWro0tFEGuAmi7jGDWiOusyOHDvQAkLtkM5LMZxWJdDBQvOK8zF3cIx7zo7nxnJnLV5-rkCeq-X83Kf)
---
Peter, **I believe there’s only one thing students should focus on in school:**_**their education.**_ Our children have been through the wringer these past few years. Between COVID and school violence, our students are spending more time worrying about basic safety than their studies. **_I think that’s a tragedy._** And that’s why I’ve worked to offer every possible advantage the Attorney General’s office can provide for Virginia’s students.
---
[**> >> HELP ME KEEP VIRGINIA’S STUDENTS SAFE <<<**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=7f692a9f519a4d42b93e7a042076d5dd&_e=fLBOHRHYPJmkXVUatKyNnWWCFqbIKsQRyI1alKWGle5ZjnX4Ew_iBHLaeeZBEPTNBlyoly749n22mJBfxtjf7Ef_DGm65LwFHFIgrYZ47uiDIERg-QQet1FG7nZ11CCSJGWKzNY99sVMRoUujGZXXR2z8xqvt0J4ap258cx5wsfF_xHA-V9WBBmupKs5ejnvpRdHvjxXLYm7bvVy7RONGMJybTrlBwXElpoZFr9qRPJ5bIDe9VeGUnAbf4Ku3ADJfGbSgCgK08q9hJiVP9GEX0mbr15c2Gs_if7yJ-otvQzA6YOtn0f9KtdZNAwybbJjgsWc7h-7x85cZNH7KYsSF6w1ATy2yWu2_4H7RVqlMqgj_v11vK_pzqj8UqCcSw0h)
---
We’ve built out:
* A new school safety curriculum for elementary school.
* New lesson plans for high schoolers about challenging issues like human trafficking.
* And new trainings for educators on when to intervene with students in crisis.

_And we’re not done yet._ I’m working to ensure that there is **a school resource officer in every school** , and my office is pursuing research into the negative effects Meta & TikTok have on our children’s mental health. Will you help us keep going? There’s so much work left to do.
---
| | [**SUPPORT OUR WORK TO KEEP KIDS SAFE**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=7f692a9f519a4d42b93e7a042076d5dd&_e=fLBOHRHYPJmkXVUatKyNnWWCFqbIKsQRyI1alKWGle5ZjnX4Ew_iBHLaeeZBEPTNBlyoly749n22mJBfxtjf7Ef_DGm65LwFHFIgrYZ47uiDIERg-QQet1FG7nZ11CCSJGWKzNY99sVMRoUujGZXXR2z8xqvt0J4ap258cx5wsfF_xHA-V9WBBmupKs5ejnvpRdHvjxXLYm7bvVy7RONGMJybTrlBwXElpoZFr9qRPKTC8n20UFYMpIsttMSTRemkDCBnNVySlPcjrMLUFBRnwrwIotgrQudBD0CavBCcUUcF2Pi-ztVClo78UPMYYrXwOEQGEldzzuiI8BU2-ArcWJCueS5nCCn47yvo3TkR36X8rzhhvxrk_x5oD2MTENY)

name: Sherrod Brown
subject: Massive victory in Ohio
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jared Moskowitz For Congress P
body:
Ohioans came out strong in this week’s special election

| This is incredible news, team! Ohioans came out strong in yesterday’s special election to STOP an anti-democratic amendment – which would’ve made it harder for us to enshrine reproductive rights in our state constitution this November.

Seeing Ohio voters turn out to the polls and decisively reject the GOP's proposal has me feeling more hopeful than ever about our ability to protect women’s health care.

This massive victory also makes clear that momentum is on our side heading into 2024, when I’ll be on the ballot. Ohioans came out strong in yesterday’s special election to STOP an anti-democratic amendment – which would’ve made it harder for us to enshrine reproductive rights in our state constitution this November. Seeing Ohio voters turn out to the polls and decisively reject the GOP's proposal has me feeling more hopeful than ever about our ability to protect women’s health care. This massive victory also makes clear that momentum is on our side heading into 2024, when I’ll be on the ballot. But we can’t take our foot off the gas. name: Team Bennet
subject: Shaking up the status quo
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BENNET FOR COLORADO
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/embutton?refcode=X_080923_IRA_act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/embutton?refcode=X_080923_IRA_act]
Friend –
This month marks an exciting milestone: it’s officially been one year since the Inflation Reduction Act (IRA) became law.
The IRA replaced forty years of failed, trickle-down economics with policies that actually help working families. It was a loss for corporate special interests and a victory for folks in Colorado and across the country.
Michael fought hard to make sure that the IRA passed through the Senate — despite efforts from Mitch McConnell and the Republican party to block it.
By chipping in now, you can help Michael elect Democrats across the country to keep fighting for us and pushing back against Republican obstruction. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/embutton?refcode=X_080923_IRA_act]
A year later, we’re already seeing the benefits of the Inflation Reduction Act. Here’s how the IRA has been helping Colorado families:
Lowering prescription drug and healthcare costs: Americans are often forced to choose between affording life-saving medication and putting food on the table — like Julia from Denver, whose dad was forced to spend $72,000 a year on medication for his heart condition. The IRA helped lower prescription drug costs. Under this law, Medicare is required to negotiate lower drug costs, and prescription drug costs are capped for seniors at $2,000 a year.
Making the economy work for everyone: The IRA ensures that the biggest corporations making over $1 billion in profit a year pay their fair share. Michael helped write this part of the law — because Colorado teachers, firefighters, and law enforcement officials shouldn’t be paying more in taxes than billion-dollar corporations.
Investing in climate action and clean energy: The IRA set aside billions of dollars to help confront climate change and invest in clean energy. It will help address the 1,200 year drought we face in the West, restore the health of our forests, and prevent wildfires from threatening our communities. We're already seeing clean energy companies expand their operations and create thousands of jobs in our state. Altogether, this historic law has put the United States on track to reduce emissions by 40% by 2030.
For too long, the status quo in the United States has allowed giant corporations and special interests to get ahead, while our communities are left behind. The Inflation Reduction Act is helping change that.
Michael’s hard work ensured that the IRA became law and it's now bringing home huge investments for Colorado’s working families.
It was a major victory — but this work isn’t done yet.
The Inflation Reduction Act was only possible because we had the votes to overcome Republican obstruction in Congress. That’s why Michael is working so hard to ensure we can protect and expand our majorities in Congress.
Michael is fighting for working people. It’s why he doesn’t accept a dime from corporate PACs or federal lobbyists — but it makes your grassroots support even more important. Will you donate now so he can keep up this vital work and elect Democrats who will work on the issues that really matter? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/embutton?refcode=X_080923_IRA_act]
DONATE NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/embutton?refcode=X_080923_IRA_act]
DONATE NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/embutton?refcode=X_080923_IRA_act]
Thank you!
More to come,
Team Bennet

Bennet for Colorado
PO Box 3078
Denver, CO 80201
United States

name: Team Alex Padilla
subject: If Republicans take control of the Senate. . .
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Alex Padilla for Senate
body:
We’re looking at a national abortion ban.
#

Hey there,
The Senate map this cycle is difficult for Democrats. No doubt about it.
There are twice as many Democrats up for re-election as Republicans, including Democrats like Sherrod Brown and Jon Tester that represent states Donald Trump won in 2020.
So we’ve got a lot of work to do if we want to keep Mitch McConnell from becoming Majority Leader again.
**And it’s important that we all get involved and do our part, because if we fall short and Republicans take control of the Senate. . .**
We’re looking at a _national abortion ban._**
We’re looking at _new restrictions on the right to vote._
And we’re looking at _deep cuts to essential programs like Social Security and Medicare in order to fund tax breaks for large corporations and the ultra-wealthy._
**There is so much on the line and we need everyone doing their part in order to win. So we’re humbly asking:**
[**Will you make a contribution today to support Alex’s work to maintain our Democratic majority in the Senate? Together, we can continue making progress for working families in California and across the country.](https://act.alex-padilla.com/go/553?c0=ap-em-august23.UMf084&refcode=em230809-1-30&t=1&akid=1469%2E159979%2EH9e-Cr)**
**[DONATE $3](https://act.alex-padilla.com/go/553?c0=ap-em-august23.UMf084&refcode=em230809-1-30%243&t=2&akid=1469%2E159979%2EH9e-Cr)**
**[DONATE ANOTHER AMOUNT](https://act.alex-padilla.com/go/553?c0=ap-em-august23.UMf084&refcode=em230809-1-30&t=3&akid=1469%2E159979%2EH9e-Cr)**
Thank you for everything you do, and will do, to hold our Democratic majority in the Senate.
Team Padilla

Paid For By Alex Padilla for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here.](https://act.alex-padilla.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=4&akid=1469%2E159979%2EH9e-Cr)

name: Working Families Party
subject: We can beat the GOP’s anti-abortion minority
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Working Families Party National PAC (77 Sands St
body:
In a resounding victory against election-rigging, Ohio voters overwhelmingly rejected a Republican ballot proposal that would have undercut a hugely popular abortion rights measure set to appear on the ballot this November. | | | **Peter, did you see what happened in Ohio last night?** In a resounding victory against election-rigging, Ohio voters overwhelmingly rejected a Republican ballot proposal that would have undercut a hugely popular abortion rights measure set to appear on the ballot this November. [](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zfh-ljwx9RuYYFFGz5HiYUNV1rRvOykQ2ZyWFZeR_hZWRFkOdeh0T9UtKBKjnD4qXDFUjWUjk1xVI6KS67mlzOoffGSpgt37gWVIOFRvOuH1wfSeMlBErN3aE0d8PqVV2ENd8_Y9DGrPZIOD3EsoLWIqxfbB2kSSaPjv8Jsa_6eXrBiVWdvmNYI87DqDhlAeI0Yma0S1lNJsFb5aqE45RhIWP1UGlSYjqHG_FF84838Hx2QrFpnAsLlv-EWbLMUhO3wA6h1Yfijkm3TXdYQae0ROXWsR2evUCHVFdxzuM8FJWRrZ8BHiT1kqhGs5ExcfA5OvZFhL1AdZznVnm51lq1_7iujxmGRj9kHJT46BGj5SCjvLnaz2S8ecYj0sTwizs/3yl/uMNpu47xRraidetSGYug8Q/h0/euCLC-9repcksbq17_I0wte0J6yLSVCVdSzv4qQX-Vs) To the surprise of Republican legislators who were counting on a low turnout summer election, over _3 million_ Ohio voters turned out to the polls and defeated the measure by almost 15 points. What these results tell us is that together, we are redefining what is possible. **We _can_ beat GOP mega-donors who bankroll efforts to corrupt our democracy. We _can_ turn out voters in numbers we have never seen before. And this November, we _can_ make Ohio the fourth state in U.S. history to enshrine abortion rights in their state constitution — and keep up the fight for abortion rights everywhere.** [**There are 89 days until Election Day, and Working Families Party organizers and members are going to be spending each and every one of them running full speed to reach as many voters as possible in Ohio and across the country so we can codify, protect, and expand abortion rights. Will you chip in $10 or more to fuel our work?**](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zfh-ljwx9RuYYFFGz5HiYUNV1rRvOykQ2ZyWFZeR_hZWRFkOdeh0T9UtKBKjnD4qXDFUjWUjk1xVI6KS67mlzOBT_tKfqvpOdz1I7NjjZkCUCDzAtK1CceIanjJcY-1C-Woq_s-8pgMblsaH9n25fQAmv6R55ntAurF1ZQqM8Zb1w5W90XepGie3GDKEUnGE5TVngtCz2LHHNB4jl3-W3499yiaRf9ccrBKwPI1ilFf5uHVi7kkhfuR_nQ7U5Kz_YUiUwABOa1oqoXlfCU0zjAvGQRZ2G86gPsvXa55ZiX5Ak0p2JxlEvKYXNqEuEmT0Ofg3mlSsLjv9RCzQxEIsqQf5qi_VTI5aAugdnm8ZZwMgFTVCi6HMy99iYCqggGV1E/3yl/uMNpu47xRraidetSGYug8Q/h1/6scvZkmZiqJoZx4ivaIsgYbUkRgKR8vnn2L0NhXLl1w) **[Contribute $10 »](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zfh-ljwx9RuYYFFGz5HiYUNV1rRvOykQ2ZyWFZeR_hZWRFkOdeh0T9UtKBKjnD4qWgGX1EZ5TaY_liuD58abAZltl2R9AJfOFmmP_KKezbn9d8ByL68ryAD3_2CLDkxl6cTkurovIOfg8WM2QXi3d81DcnIRNIYMA3QBDv43Rz72k_8l5rZwT0DFM-4Fqe7jFpuAom9dcXRCspD_zS3SQq6V2w-5MOAF7jvlttrjOQnOArW4nnuprh1cZ3GLVm8kKVdoxTYEKMCP57geuAMeDAjssXZ1-JECFQtKWP_2ybG6J93gvrk23uB8Ii5Zu3xisXW-PXvgkLA348UWrgOCOZAfYLbJwkywrAaAKQ53etPGrO1FQxZBTX0HJn9BN_EVDedkxFWk2zRr7XUGvIdLxB/3yl/uMNpu47xRraidetSGYug8Q/h2/DAPVFxZzbAPwL77_bV-qWX0NfAJdEt4posHj8oARyss)** The Ohio Republican proposal, known as Issue 1, would have raised the threshold for voters to pass ballot initiatives and state constitutional amendments from a simple majority to sixty percent. It was introduced as part of a broader national effort by the GOP’s anti-abortion minority to nullify direct democracy after a pro-choice majority in six states, including red ones such as Kansas and Kentucky, voted to protect or establish a right to abortion in their constitutions last year. Across the country, Republican-controlled legislatures in states like Ohio are frantically working to gerrymander maps to suppress voters and passing laws to restrict voting rights. **Why? Because they know they can't win a fair vote on issues like abortion unless they erode our democratic systems for their corruption.** Now, with Issue 1 in the dustbin, we know they will only double down on their efforts to stop Ohio voters from amending their state constitution to include abortion rights this November. [**After last night’s victory, we know we have the majority on our side, Peter. Will you rush a contribution of $10 or more to help us keep up the momentum in Ohio and across the country? Your donation — of any amount — will help us reach voters between now and November clean_body: In a resounding victory against election-rigging, Ohio voters overwhelmingly rejected a Republican ballot proposal that would have undercut a hugely popular abortion rights measure set to appear on the ballot this November. | | | Peter, did you see what happened in Ohio last night? In a resounding victory against election-rigging, Ohio voters overwhelmingly rejected a Republican ballot proposal that would have undercut a hugely popular abortion rights measure set to appear on the ballot this November. To the surprise of Republican legislators who were counting on a low turnout summer election, over 3 million Ohio voters turned out to the polls and defeated the measure by almost 15 points. What these results tell us is that together, we are redefining what is possible. We can beat GOP mega-donors who bankroll efforts to corrupt our democracy. We can turn out voters in numbers we have never seen before. And this November, we can make Ohio the fourth state in U.S. history to enshrine abortion rights in their state constitution — and keep up the fight for abortion rights everywhere. The Ohio Republican proposal, known as Issue 1, would have raised the threshold for voters to pass ballot initiatives and state constitutional amendments from a simple majority to sixty percent. It was introduced as part of a broader national effort by the GOP’s anti-abortion minority to nullify direct democracy after a pro-choice majority in six states, including red ones such as Kansas and Kentucky, voted to protect or establish a right to abortion in their constitutions last year. Across the country, Republican-controlled legislatures in states like Ohio are frantically working to gerrymander maps to suppress voters and passing laws to restrict voting rights. Why? Because they know they can't win a fair vote on issues like abortion unless they erode our democratic systems for their corruption. Now, with Issue 1 in the dustbin, we know they will only double down on their efforts to stop Ohio voters from amending their state constitution to include abortion rights this November. In solidarity, Working Families Party Thoughts? Feedback? We want to hear it. Reply directly to this email and let us know. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you received this email as a forward and want to get the latest updates from the Working Families Party directly, The Working Families Party is the party of the multiracial working class, fighting for a nation that cares for all of us. Wanna learn more? And if you need to update your contact information, Other political groups have corporate donors. But we can pool our resources too. Friend, The results are finally in—**and democracy is still alive and well in Ohio**.
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67832235/421014479/1649708063?refcode=win-issue1-8-8-23ngp_picture&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS8xMDAwNjciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNDY0ZmJkMGUtZGMzNi1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=_D3oosylArpv7GfdVsfWSHcD-gIRchdcrseiZLFAtg8=)

Issue 1, a desperate gambit by a radical conservative minority to raise the threshold for amending the Ohio state constitution, was engineered by out of state dark money interests to do one thing: thwart the majority’s will to protect abortion rights in Ohio next November. I am elated and _so proud_ that this cynical strategy did not succeed, in part because campaigns like ours were in the trenches canvassing at events, farmers markets, and going door to door to expose this issue for what it is and turn out our voters. Weeks ago, my team and I asked you for your support so that we could continue doing all that we could to make sure that Issue 1 failed when it came before the voters. The response we received from supporters like you, friend, was incredible—** _it is in no small part due to your help that we were able to knock on so many doors to help push the No on Issue 1 vote over the line._**** ** But while last night's victory is worth celebrating, we can’t allow ourselves to get complacent now. The real fight is just beginning; and now it is time to ratchet up the pressure on corrupt Jim Jordan and fight for a win on abortion rights AND unseat Jim Jordan this election. [**I need your help now more than ever—can you celebrate this incredible win and help me ride the momentum of this vote to victory with a contribution of $25 or more today?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67832236/421014480/1649708063?refcode=win-issue1-8-8-23NGP&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS8xMDAwNjciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNDY0ZmJkMGUtZGMzNi1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=_D3oosylArpv7GfdVsfWSHcD-gIRchdcrseiZLFAtg8=)

clean_body: Majority rule is alive and well—now we make our voices heard. | | | = Friend, The results are finally in—and democracy is still alive and well in Ohio. = Issue 1, a desperate gambit by a radical conservative minority to raise the threshold for amending the Ohio state constitution, was engineered by out of state dark money interests to do one thing: thwart the majority’s will to protect abortion rights in Ohio next November. I am elated and so proud that this cynical strategy did not succeed, in part because campaigns like ours were in the trenches canvassing at events, farmers markets, and going door to door to expose this issue for what it is and turn out our voters. Weeks ago, my team and I asked you for your support so that we could continue doing all that we could to make sure that Issue 1 failed when it came before the voters. The response we received from supporters like you, friend, was incredible— it is in no small part due to your help that we were able to knock on so many doors to help push the No on Issue 1 vote over the line. But while last night's victory is worth celebrating, we can’t allow ourselves to get complacent now. The real fight is just beginning; and now it is time to ratchet up the pressure on corrupt Jim Jordan and fight for a win on abortion rights AND unseat Jim Jordan this election. = | | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | | = = | = = | | Donate= or**= It is beyond pathetic to try and change the rules because you know that under a fair democratic system, your unpopular policies will fail. Today, we can take a moment to celebrate but it is imperative that we get back to work.** Thank you for helping make this victory possible! -Tamie | = To contribute via check, please address to: 273 SARATOGA ST. DELAWARE, OH 43015 you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please | |

name: Jon Tester
subject: back on the farm this month
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
body:
| This race will be the most expensive Senate election in Montana’s history.
# [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1&akid=849%2E35263%2EAhE3R0)
[](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-tester.Z0aSwr&refcode=AU_STB_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20230809_PM1_V1_S1&t=4&akid=849%2E35263%2EAhE3R0) Hey Peter, I’m back on the farm this month with Sharla, where we’ll be pulling 16-hour days in the fields now that the peas are ready for harvest. **I love being a farmer.** I knew I wanted to take over my family’s farm since I was eight years old. It gets my hands dirty and keeps me grounded. It’s tough — but it reminds me why I fight so hard for Montana’s families. It also means that since I’ll be working on the farm all month, **I have a lot less time to fundraise than our opponents.** And trust me, I hate asking for money. I know how hard you work for every dollar. But the truth is, this race will be the most expensive Senate election in Montana’s history. **Outside groups will pour upwards of $100 million into our state to distort my record and mislead voters. We really do need early money to combat attacks like that. So, here’s the part where I ask:** **[With farming taking up most of my time this month, we can’t afford to come up short in fundraising. Could you pitch in a split donation between my campaign and Tammy Baldwin to help us make up the difference? I’m counting on this grassroots team (that’s you!) in August for the resources we need to fight back >>](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-tester.Z0aSwr&refcode=AU_STB_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20230809_PM1_V1_S1&t=5&akid=849%2E35263%2EAhE3R0)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Jon Tester and Tammy Baldwin will go through immediately:_ | | [SPLIT $10 NOW](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2151?c0=tbe-em-tester.5zk3A_&refcode=AU_STB_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20230809_PM1_V1_S1&t=6&akid=849%2E35263%2EAhE3R0)

Yesterday's election results were disappointing. So where do we go from here?
This is my second article to write about the election results. My first was very dark; my wife called it doom and gloom. I understand that many of us feel defeated; we fought like conservatives fight, which is with every ounce that we have within us. We are not fighting for power, authority, or money; we fight because we love our nation, our state, and the people of Mississippi. We fight because we truly believe that the conservative principles on which our nation was built have created the greatest nation in the world. We fight because we want Mississippi to be the best place to work, rear our children, and live our lives. We fight because if we don't, evil takes over, and if that happens, we all lose.
Every conservative that fought and lost the election yesterday, from Chris McDaniel on down, should stand tall today, knowing they have not sat idly by watching and complaining; they made a difficult decision to take a stand. Campaigning isn't easy; you spend hours door-knocking, reading emails, and making speeches, and you take endless criticism and hits to your ego. I am proud of all of those who took the chance, who made the commitment, and who made the sacrifice.
I also make a personal commitment to not give up on principles and to keep fighting for the conservative values and policies that Mississippi needs to move forward. I make a personal commitment to move on past this election and work with and hold accountable those who were elected. This process is what makes our nation unique in the world and in history. Average citizens fight for the candidate who best represents their values, and once the election is over, we rally behind those elected.
We still have another election in November; this was just the primary election. The next fight is between two opposing ideologies. The Democrats on the ballot are of the party of Biden and Harris, who are responsible for destroying our nation's economy and who have opened our southern border to millions of human traffickers, drug dealers, and criminals. Our fight is now against those in the Democrat Party who wish to destroy our power grid and literally leave us in the dark.
Now we join with those elected from within the Republican Party to fight the real enemy of our freedom and liberty, the Democrat Party. There will be plenty of time come January, when the Mississippi legislature is in session, to fight over how we implement conservative policy. Now is the time to ensure we have Republicans in the fight.
**Read all of Dana 's post and stay informed about politics in Mississippi**

Some political pundits have written articles that spell doom for Republican candidates, opining that conservative candidates/causes have inundated you with too many texts and too much email to sift through in a day. While It's true that nearly every congressional campaign in the 2024 cycle will attempt to utilize online fundraising to propel them into the House/Senate, not every email or text is created equal; and **not every email or text will deliver the entirety of your donation to the candidate you think you 're donating to.**

Bad actors and political grifters have figured out that online fundraising is a good way to make a quick buck off your generosity. **Not me. Not now, not ever.**

* We must do everything within our power to hold onto the U.S. House - the future of our country absolutely depends on it

**About Jim Jordan:** Leading the fight to hold Washington accountable.

**
In Washington, Jim Jordan is focused on his oversight role, helping lead investigations into federal agencies

In Congress, Jim Jordan continued to fight for fiscal responsibility,and he offered the only balanced budget of any member of the House or Senate.

As a state legislator, he took on the powerful special interests and the leaders from both political parties who wanted to put Ohio on an unsustainable path of higher taxes and spending.

He built a conservative, pro-family voting record, and authored an alternative state budget that balanced without raising taxes. He became the only legislator in state history to win both the Defender of Life award from Ohio Right to Life and the Pro-Life Legislator of the Year award from the United Conservatives of Ohio.

Peter, We are facing a long fight and have a huge choice to make next November that will change the course of our country forever. Every day we risk letting our nation slip away...bowing to woke policies over common sense. Under Joe Biden's leadership, he has let the woke mob:
* **Distribute sexually explicit materials to young kids in school.**
* **Indoctrinate children with hate and the woke mentality that men can get pregnant.**
* **Destroy our economy with record-high inflation.**
* **Allow China and Russia to WALK all over the USA.**
* **Give the DC Swamp bureaucrats complete control of our country.**

| A native Floridian with blue-collar roots, Ron was raised in Dunedin by his mother, a nurse, and father, who installed cable boxes. He attended Dunedin High School and worked his way through Yale University, where he was the captain of the varsity baseball team. He also graduated with honors from Harvard Law School, where he earned a commission in the U.S. Navy as a JAG officer.

During his active-duty service, Ron deployed to Iraq in support of the SEAL mission in Fallujah, Ramadi and the rest of Al Anbar province. His military decorations include the Bronze Star Medal for Meritorious Service and the Iraq Campaign Medal.
---
Ron also served as a prosecutor in Florida, where he put child predators behind bars. He was elected to Congress in 2012 on a platform of government accountability, advocating for term limits and a balanced budget amendment.

In Congress, DeSantis spearheaded the fight to expose the weaponization of the IRS against conservatives. He also fought to hold accountable the rogue federal agencies involved in manufacturing the "Russia collusion" conspiracy theory. As a veteran, DeSantis was a champion for those who have served our country, pushing for reforms to the VA to better serve veterans and expand support for mental health.

In 2018, Ron DeSantis was elected the 46th Governor of Florida. As governor, he has fought for what's right and taken the arrows for the people he represents. During the darkest days of 2020, when the corrupt establishment, bureaucracy, and corporate media united to force lockdowns and mandates on Americans, DeSantis stood up for freedom - even when it wasn't popular.

Grounded in his unshakeable belief in America's founding principles, Governor DeSantis has enacted a bold agenda to transform Florida into a blueprint for the Nation's revival. Governor DeSantis has delivered win after win on conservative priorities:
* Saving livelihoods from job-killing lockdowns and vaccine mandates,

* Protecting citizens from the harmful impacts of Biden's border crisis by enacting E-Verify and other bold policies against illegal immigration, such as banning sanctuary cities,

* Defending parental rights and eliminating CRT,

* Defunding DEI bureaucracy in higher ed and holding tenured professors accountable,

* Waging war on woke power-grabs like ESG and central bank digital currency,

* Enacting the strongest medical freedom laws in the nation,

* Turning Florida into a model for election integrity,

* Protecting the unborn,

* Standing up for the 2nd Amendment by making Florida a constitutional carry state,

* Expanding education freedom,

* Prohibiting land purchases by the CCP and related individuals and entities,

* Lowering prescription drug costs,

* Holding woke corporations and school unions accountable,

* Creating a universal school choice program,

* Delivering record-breaking tax relief,

* Helping families achieve the American dream of homeownership,

* Supporting law enforcement and our veterans,

* Enacting tougher penalties for drug dealers and sex offenders,

* Appointing seven conservative justices to the Florida Supreme Court,

* ...and so much more.

After leading Florida with common sense and conviction throughout his first term, DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory of nearly 20 points in 2022. He earned his second term by the largest raw vote margin in state history, winning by more than 1.5 million votes.

But history didn't stop there:

Governor DeSantis flipped Miami-Dade County red, winning the majority-Hispanic urban county by double digits. Conventional wisdom assumed this was impossible for a Republican - as recently as 2016, Hillary Clinton won Miami-Dade County by nearly 30 points.

Governor DeSantis flipped several other blue counties red, including Palm Beach County. He won 62 out of 67 counties overall.

Compared to his first statewide election in 2018, Governor DeSantis was up +19% with Independents, up +30% with Hispanics, and up +9% with women.

Governor DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory with battle-tested leadership, a bold policy agenda, and never backing down to corporate media or special interests. As he said at his inauguration: "When the world lost its mind - when common sense suddenly became an uncommon virtue - Florida was a refuge of sanity, a citadel of freedom for our fellow Americans and even for people around the world. In captaining the ship of state, we choose to navigate the boisterous sea of liberty rather than cower in the calm docks of despotism."

Governor DeSantis has ensured that Florida is a free and safe place to raise a family. Thanks to the governor's leadership, Floridians enjoy a low tax burden, quality education opportunities, and a bulwark in place against the Biden Administration's overreach and various elite power grabs that seek to force people to adopt a particular ideology. Thanks to the governor's vision, this year's legislative session delivered the most ambitious conservative policy victories in Florida's history.

This year, Governor DeSantis signed:
* Record tax relief

* ESG prohibitions

* Measures counteracting the influence of the CCP

* The strongest medical freedom protections in the nation.

* Reforms reducing the costs of medications by delivering transparency

* Bold higher education reforms; defunding DEI

* Improvements to our state's infrastructure

* Tough-on-crime, law and order measures, including the death penalty for child rapists

* The strongest measures protecting Florida from Biden's border crisis

* Reforms for paycheck protection , holding accountable wayward school unions

* Prohibitions on centralized digital currencies in Florida

No leader has accomplished more for his state than Governor DeSantis. He is now sharing his bold vision with the country, leading a movement to deliver the Great American Comeback.

Ron is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy Award- winning television anchor. Together, they're the proud parents of their daughters, Madison and Mamie, and their son, Mason.
---
|
---
Contributions to Ron DeSantis for President are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without "green cards"), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general). Contribution rules
* I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder).
* This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution.
* I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person.
* I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source.

Ron DeSantis was a member of the United States Navy. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ANDY BESHEAR FOR GOVERNOR
body:
Andy's opponent and his allies have announced or spent a combined $8.6 MILLION on TV ads. We've got some bad news, Peter: **We're being outspent in this race for Kentucky governor.**

Andy's opponent and his allies have announced or spent a combined $8.6 MILLION on TV ads. They're flooding Kentucky's airwaves with attacks against Andy in an attempt to buy this race.

We know it's only a matter of time before millions more are spent to try and defeat Andy. **We can't let them drown us out.** That's why we need your help to ensure we have the resources to set the record straight.

name: NextGen PAC
subject: Gen Z is ready to fight for our planet
disclaimer_text: Paid for by NextGen Climate Action Committee; http://nextgenpac
body:
| **The Supreme Court has cleared the way for the construction of the Mountain Valley Pipeline to proceed. This is an absolute disaster for our planet.**

We can’t just sit around and scroll on TikTok while our climate emergency gets worse every day. And it’s clear that our government officials would rather stay besties with the fossil fuel industry than do anything to solve this crisis. **[Chip in $10 right away to help us fight the biggest issue for our generation: climate change.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/67838758/421021481/-2142219536?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_NGP_20230809_FR_Pipeline_0_3MO_NextGenPAC_NA_NA_Pipeline&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS85OTMyMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YTE4NWM0NC1lMDM2LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=c8yS3Xsb10hifkOwHywOZaMw-9zqaJOkvTxNE47Hcmk=)** **Now let us lay out the facts here:**

🌏The energy industry has been trying to build this pipeline for YEARS, 300 miles across Virginia and West Virginia.

🌏This pipeline is an absolute disaster for the communities around it — limiting their access to safe drinking water, clean air, and causing methane leaks.

🌏The Supreme Court gave basically ZERO reasoning on this dangerous decision.

clean_body: | The Supreme Court has cleared the way for the construction of the Mountain Valley Pipeline to proceed. This is an absolute disaster for our planet. We can’t just sit around and scroll on TikTok while our climate emergency gets worse every day. And it’s clear that our government officials would rather stay besties with the fossil fuel industry than do anything to solve this crisis. = Now let us lay out the facts here: 🌏The energy industry has been trying to build this pipeline for YEARS, 300 miles across Virginia and West Virginia. 🌏This pipeline is an absolute disaster for the communities around it — limiting their access to safe drinking water, clean air, and causing methane leaks. 🌏The Supreme Court gave basically ZERO reasoning on this dangerous decision. If we want to minimize the damage of climate change before it’s too late, we need to hold our leaders accountable. These officials are out of touch — and we need to show them that Gen Z is ready to fight for our planet (even if they refuse to give a shit)!!️ = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | | = | = | | = | = | | = — NextGen PAC | At NextGen, we Identify, Engage and Mobilize young voters , meeting them where they're at with issues that are directly affecting them. = NextGen PAC 268 Bush St. #2919 San Francisco CA 94104-3503

MEET RYAN

* * *
_When it comes to fighting for American freedoms and helping others, Ryan Mackenzie has had some great teachers.

A 9th generation resident of the Lehigh Valley, Ryan’s first ancestor to settle in our area fought in the Northampton County Militia during the Revolutionary War. In more recent generations, his family members helped build companies like Hercules Cement, served our country in both World Wars, and served our community here at home in professions like nursing and teaching.

It’s that spirit of service that inspired Ryan to fight back against the Far Left here in Pennsylvania. Ryan faced an all-out assault by the abortion industry in his first race, and he beat them back. Rush Limbaugh said of Ryan: “Planned Parenthood took it on the chin ... Mackenzie won by an 18-point margin.”

In Pennsylvania’s state capitol, Ryan is known by conservatives and feared by the establishment as one of the most effective and proven reformers in government. Ryan didn’t just talk – he got our values enacted into law._

Submit your thoughts before our poll closes at midnight. I believe in America. I believe that we are a nation built on principles and convictions from our Founding Fathers. I need your support to spread my message of 4 Principles For America. All the Best, Ryan Mackenzie MEET RYAN * When it comes to fighting for American freedoms and helping others, Ryan Mackenzie has had some great teachers. A 9th generation resident of the Lehigh Valley, Ryan’s first ancestor to settle in our area fought in the Northampton County Militia during the Revolutionary War. In more recent generations, his family members helped build companies like Hercules Cement, served our country in both World Wars, and served our community here at home in professions like nursing and teaching. It’s that spirit of service that inspired Ryan to fight back against the Far Left here in Pennsylvania. Ryan faced an all-out assault by the abortion industry in his first race, and he beat them back. Rush Limbaugh said of Ryan: “Planned Parenthood took it on the chin ... Mackenzie won by an 18-point margin.” In Pennsylvania’s state capitol, Ryan is known by conservatives and feared by the establishment as one of the most effective and proven reformers in government. Ryan didn’t just talk – he got our values enacted into law. | Paid for by Mackenzie for Congress
