If you don 't want to miss any of my hard-hitting reports and commentary, please subscribe today! | | ---|---|--- It has been widely reported that Florida is facing a of multiple Home owner insurance providers in the state of Florida is daunting, and with Hurricane season currently taking place, many Floridians are now wondering what that will look like for them if they find themselves facing a storm or other natural disaster. And now, it has been discovered that David Altmaier, Florida's former leading insurance regulator under DeSantis, has left his position to work for one of the largest lobbying firms in the state of Florida, after he played a leading role in shaping a pro-insurance industry bill that was signed into law by Governor DeSantis, despite being harmful to Florida homeowners. Early into the second week of July, Florida residents lost yet two more home insurance providers. Floridians who held home and auto policies with the company. Farmers to no longer offer coverage in Florida, ending home, auto and others policies in the state in a move that affects tens of thousands of residents. Their reasoning in doing so was due to high catastrophe costs and rising reconstruction expenses, which paints a grim picture of the insurance landscape in the state. By pulling out of Florida, Farmers became the fourth major insurer to pull out of Florida over the last year. In a statement, Farmers insurance spokesman Trevor Chapman said, " We have advised the Florida Office of Insurance Regulation of our decision to discontinue offering Farmers-branded auto, home and umbrella policies in the state. This business decision was necessary to effectively manage risk exposure." Directly after Farmers Insurance fled the state, , leaving thousands more Floridians without coverage in the middle of Florida's tropical storm and Hurricane season. In a statement to CBS News, AAA insurance said, " Unfortunately, Florida's insurance market has become challenging in recent years. Last year's catastrophic hurricane season contributed to an unprecedented rise in reinsurance rates, making it more costly for insurance companies to operate." Florida residents are already struggling with a myriad of economic issues because of run-away inflation and some of the highest utility rates in the nation, with Florida taking the prize for being that state with the . Additionally, the cost of rent has skyrocketed throughout Florida as landlords have had to increase monthly rentals in order to cover the drastic increase in property insurance and utility hikes, which has in turn created an affordable housing crisis in Florida, and is And now, in the middle of hurricane season, the looming home insurance crisis has taken center stage in the minds of Florida homeowners, and it is now a point of debate within the current GOP Presidential Primary, As insurance premiums continue to rise, the lives and financial well-being of the shrinking middle class will pay the price. However, despite this crisis which could very well cause the Florida housing market to crash given the growing insolvency of multiple insurance carriers in Florida, instead of addressing this escalating crisis, Florida Governor Ron DeSantis has chosen to divert valuable time and resources towards his 2024 presidential campaign, which is doomed to fail and will ultimately collapse on itself like a leaky Florida roof. There is no denying that Governor DeSantis is now an absentee Governor. In a of legislation that was generated from a special session in the Florida legislature, which gutted the ability of litigants' to collect legal fees from insurance providers that refuse to pay out insurance claims, DeSantis stated, " The issues in Florida's property insurance market did not occur overnight, and they will not be solved overnight". Senate Bill 2A was claimed by lawmakers to be an "overhaul" of the state's Insurance Statutes to combat the current insurance crisis that was created by a group of corrupt Florida officials, including Florida CFO Jimmy Patronis and now Former Florida Insurance Commissioner David Altmaier, allowing insurance companies that were supposed to be regulated by the Office of Insurance Regulation (OIR) to get a pass. A recently released report from FIGA proves this. | | ---|---|--- For the insurance companies still servicing policies in Florida, insurance premiums have continued to tick upward, with the average Florida annual home owner insurance premium reaching well over $6,000. For context, $1,700. When Ron DeSantis was sworn into office as Governor of Florida in January 2019, Floridians paid an average premium of $1,988, which means insurance premiums has tripled since he assumed office. In 2023, Florida's average homeowner insurance premium has increased 40% this year alone, which is four times the national increase. This is an unsustainable rate, and it has made homeownership and even home rentals completely unaffordable for Floridians, especially the many seniors who have flocked to Florida for retirement, only to discover they can't afford to live in Florida anymore on their fixed incomes. The rising cost of premiums has forced thousands of Floridians out of their homes due to surprise increases that the average person who is living paycheck to paycheck cannot afford. The constant pattern of staggering premium hikes or policy terminations is giving homeowners heartburn. There is no denying that the middle and lower classes, in particular will bear the brunt of this crisis in Florida, with their hard-earned incomes and little to no disposable income being drained to cover the costs of home repairs, or losing their homes all together via mass foreclosures due to unaffordable premiums, along with insurance carriers being delinquent on paying out claims. The reaction from the Florida state government to this crisis has not been encouraging. Jimmy Patronis, Florida's CFO, threatening to weaponize the Office of Insurance Regulation (OIR), (weaponized government is a tactic of the Democrats which is now being utilized by DeSantis's administration) against the private insurance company, which only serves to make other insurance carriers less likely to want to do business in Florida, where private insurance carriers are being threatened with retaliation by Florida state officials like Patronis. Farmers is a private market insurance carrier, but that doesn't seem to matter to the Governor and his cohorts. The message has been made clear to the insurance market in Florida: do exactly what we want, or you will pay a price. The consequences of such aggressive scare tactics is likely to cause even more insurance carriers to choose to leave Florida. WHAT DOES THIS MEAN FOR FLORIDIANS? Governor DeSantis has been entrusted with protecting the well-being and interests of Florida's residents, which is what he took an oath to do when he was re-elected for a second term as Governor. Yet, as each day passes, it's become more evident that DeSantis never had any intention of fully serving out his full second term as Governor of Florida, as he is now spending more time out of state than within, campaigning for President as an absentee Governor. During hurricane season, it is imperative that DeSantis return his focus towards the interests of Floridians, his actual constituents. But, will he do the right thing? Given his recent statements, it's highly unlikely.Hurricane season has already began in Florida, and DeSantis is an absentee Governor who has failed to present any real solutions for the insurance crisis as he jet sets on private jets across the country living his Presidential fantasy. When Governor DeSantis was recently asked about his plans to address the upcoming Hurricane Season and Florida insurance crisis, he just have to pray there isn't a hurricane, and hope that insurance carriers return to Florida next year. " So, knock on wood, we won't have a big storm this summer. Then I think you're going to start to see companies see an advantage," DeSantis added. | | ---|---|--- DeSantis is not only Sanctimonious in his belief that he can beat Donald Trump in a GOP primary, but instead of actually addressing corruption in Florida's insurance market, he has made it a habit of saying we just have to "pray" and hope that Hurricanes don't hit Florida. While speaking in Israel earlier this year, he single handedly stopped Hurricane Dorian from hitting Florida because he prayed at the Western Wall in Israel. However, DeSantis's claims were false, because Hurricane Dorian did hit Florida, killing six Floridians. During the last legislative session, many observed that DeSantis's attention was focused on collecting as many brownie points as possible from lobbyists, members of the Florida legislature, and the Trump base in an effort to lay the groundwork for his 2024 Presidential campaign and utilize the war chest of over $200 million that he raised prior to November 2022 in an effort to secure re-election. Ultimately, his political ambition prevented him from making better decisions for Floridians, whom he has now completely abandoned after promising them another term as their Governor, and then immediately neglecting them upon securing re-election. Along with abandoning Florida to run for President, Ron DeSantis has another reason why he is ignoring the escalating insurance crisis in Florida, and that is the fact that he, along with Florida CFO Jimmy Patronis and several key members of the Florida Republican legislature have and their lobbyists. In exchange for these donations, DeSantis allowed for the insurance companies to play a role in writing the new insurance legislation that came out of the 2022 Special session. While digging into Ron DeSantis's most recent campaign finance report for his Presidential campaign, a familiar name popped up. David Altmaier, now a Tallahassee lobbyist and DeSantis for President campaign donor, was once the top insurance official in the state of Florida when he served as the from May 2, 2016 until December 28, 2022. According to DeSantis's first FEC report since filing to run for President, he received a campaign contribution in the amount of $1,000 from Altmaier on May 25,2023, just one day after DeSantis officially filed to run for President. | | ---|---|--- As the State of Florida's top insurance regulator under CFO Jimmy Patronis, Former Florida Insurance Commissioner David Altmaier oversaw the OIR, which manages the State of Florida's insurer of last resort, Citizens property insurance, industry rate filings, and is also supposed to manage investigations into insurance companies, their conduct, and ultimately has the power to declare insurers insolvent. Like Gillway and Patronis, Commissioner David Altmaier was heavily involved in the passage of Florida Senate Bill 2A. However, after it passed the Florida Legislature, and just 12 days after Governor DeSantis , the now Former Florida Insurance Commissioner David Altmaier submitted his resignation to Governor DeSantis, and it was made effective on December 28, 2022. In March of 2023, it was reported that Former Florida Insurance Commissioner David Altmaier, was hired as a lobbyist by one of the largest and most influential lobbying firms in the state, Coincidentally, Altmaier filed his resignation from the OIR directly to Governor DeSantis just four days before a Florida law banning officials from lobbying for six years was supposed to take effect on January 1, 2023. At this time, prior to the changes to the law, a two year ban on lobbying was already in place for both elected and appointed officials who decided to leave for the private sector. While there have been legal challenges posed to the six year lobbying ban in Florida, which two year lobby ban in Florida , which is often referred to as the "Revolving Door Law", is still in effect, which means Altmaier may be in violation of Florida law that DeSantis himself signed into effect while Altmaier was still working as an agency head in DeSantis's cabinet as the agency head of Florida's Office of Insurance Regulation (OIR). As the Florida Insurance Commissioner under DeSantis's term as Governor, Altmaier was a member of Governor DeSantis's cabinet. Not only was he a cabinet member, but he was a favored member. As Governor, and while Altmaier serves as the Insurance Commissioner at OIR, Commissioner Altmaier serve as a member of Florida's Blockchain Task Force. Additionally, during the COVID-19 pandemic, he was selected as a member of the Governor's Re-Open Florida Task Force Industry Working Group on Agriculture, Finance, Government, Healthcare, Management and Professional Services. These are all positions that were considered to be plum positions in Florida. | | ---|---|--- This is further evidence of how Ron DeSantis has made a career out of saying one thing to gain public support, as he bends the rules and does the exact opposite of his public statements if it means that he himself will benefit financially. His lack of integrity is concerning given that he has demonstrated in the case of Altmaier that he is willing to allow him to bend Florida's two year ban on lobbying since Altmaier has contributed to DeSantis's 2024 Presidential campaign. It is worth noting that Altmaier left his position as Florida's Commissioner of Insurance Regulation nearly one month after DeSantis secured re-election as Governor in Florida. Since joining The Southern Group, Altmaier has been tasked with leading a new national insurance advisory practice to serve clients in both Florida and nationwide. | | ---|---|--- | | ---|---|--- DeSantis has been relatively quiet in public regarding the corruption and malfeasance involved in the Florida insurance industry, especially given the fact that he has abandoned Floridians who are still struggling to recover and get their claims paid following Hurricane Ian in 2022, which devastated thousands of Floridians in Southwest Florida when it landed as a Category 4 monster storm. | | ---|---|--- However, a May 2023 shows that behind the scenes, Ron DeSantis has raked in nearly $4 Million dollars in contributions from the insurance industry to both his official campaign, and the now shuttered Friends of Ron DeSantis PAC, which deceptively changed its name to the Empower Parents PAC in May 2023 before DeSantis filed to run for President, and transferred the $82.5 million of leftover campaign donations from his Gubernatorial state committee to the anti-Trump, pro-DeSantis Never Back Down Super PAC. Following the transfer of funds, which included funds from insurance companies, their executives, and their family members, DeSantis immediately shuddered the Empower Parents PAC. | | ---|---|--- This speaks volumes, as it reveals DeSantis is not only willing to sell out Floridians to the insurance industry, but he is also willing to do the same as a Presidential candidate, further proving that he does not have the best interest of the American people in mind when it comes to affordable homeownership and ethical insurance practices. Making matters worse, according to Florida insurance industry whistleblower Scott Thomas, who has exclusively provided me with a copy of a letter he sent Florida Attorney General Ashley Moody on March 15, 2023, just one day after The Southern Group announced they had hired Altmaier to join their lobbying firm, Thomas notified Moody that Altmaier appeared to possibly be in violation of Florida 's law banning employment as a lobbyist for 24 months after leaving state positions, but Moody never replied and she failed to take action. Thomas is a Marine Corps veteran who served in the Persian Gulf, and has 25 years of experience working as a claims professional in Florida for both insurance companies and consumers. | | ---|---|--- Thomas requested whistleblower protection in September 2019. In an email dated October 8, 2019, the Florida Department of Financial Services replied to Thomas's email notifying him that his request for Whistle blower status was being forwarded to the Office of Insurance regulation, which was overseen at the time by David Altmaier. However, despite receiving this letter, Thomas was never granted whistleblower protection, and he was targeted by DeSantis's administration in the time leading up to the 2022 election in which DeSantis was running for re-election. Since 2019, Mr. Thomas has attempted to come forward and speak out against the alleged corruption within the OIR, DFS, Citizens Property Insurance, and he has also reported former Citizens Insurance CEO Barry Gillway, FL CFO Jimmy Patronis and Former Insurance Commissioner David Altmaier to various state and federal agencies, including the Florida Attorney General 's office, as is seen in the documentation above that was provided to me by Thomas exclusively. That said, in March of 2022, Jimmy Patronis, who oversee's Florida's Department of Financial Services (DFS) attempted to silence Mr. Thomas by lodging an Administrative Action against him prior to the 2022 Election in order to silence Mr. Thomas. Patronis's acts of retaliation against Mr. Thomas came after Thomas attempted to secure whistleblower protection from the OIR & FDLE on numerous occasions, only to be ignored. After being refused whistleblower protection, Mr. Thomas was originally charged on March 2, 2022 with violations of administrative code by the DFS, and he was threatened by agents of DFS that if he kept speaking out against Governor Ron DeSantis and Jimmy Patronis (who were both seeking reelection at the time), more charges would be added and he would be stripped of his Florida 320 Public Adjusters license, which is what he needs in order to have a profession as public adjuster in the state of Florida. When Mr. Thomas continued to exercise his First Amendment right to speak out for the consumer in an effort to expose the looming Florida insurance crisis, Governor DeSantis and Jimmy Patronis via DFS attorneys made good on their threat and not only added more charges against Mr. Thomas, but additionally, Mr. Thomas 's case was transferred to another administrative Law Judge who not only failed to disclose his conflicts with Citizens Property Insurance, but also his conflict with his former boss, Division of Administrative hearings (DOAH) administrative law Judge John MacIver. When Maclver left DOAH, he became general council for Jimmy Patronis's DFS. Patronis has oversight over the administrative courts in Florida. It should be noted that Mr. Thomas has filed an appeal with the 4 th District Court of Appeals in Florida, and he has also filed a Declaratory Action against the DFS. | | ---|---|--- As suspect as Altmaier's donation to DeSantis's Presidential campaign may seem, it wasn't the only donation made on that particular day by a lobbyist from Tallahassee lobbying firm, The Southern Group. FEC reports reveal that on May 25, 2023, the same day Altmaier made his contribution, Paul Bradshaw, another lobbyist and Chairman of The Southern Group contributed $1,000 to DeSantis's Presidential campaign. As has been said, " there are no conspiracies in politics, but there are no coincidences either". | | ---|---|--- Along with working together at The Southern Group, Bradshaw and Altmaier also share a connection to the insurance industry. Bradshaw was previously registered as lobbyist in the state of Florida for Property Casualty Insurers Association of America. | | ---|---|--- As recently as 2022, Paul Bradshaw was for the Executive branch in the state of Florida. Among the clients he lobbied for was Disney, Florida Blue, and Tampa Electric company, further showing how lobbyists are playing a direct role in the insurance and utility markets in Florida. Being registered as a lobbyist for the Executive branch of Florida representing Disney means that Bradshaw lobbied Governor DeSantis directly on behalf of Disney. Why would a lobbyist for Disney personally support the campaign of a candidate for President who has publicly claimed, as Governor of Florida, that he is on a crusade to destroy Bradshaw's client, and therefore his own livelihood, which would negatively impact business for The Southern Group? | | ---|---|--- These are merely two more examples of hypocrisy and conflicts between DeSantis's public policy positions as both Governor of Florida, and as a current Presidential candidate that can be found in Ron DeSantis's FEC report as it pertains to contributions he received, especially with regards to lobbyists. While Ron DeSantis has been on a public crusade against Disney in an effort to deceptively and fraudulently present himself as the "anti-woke" "culture warrior" candidate, he has quietly and simultaneously been receiving campaign funds from the same lobbyists who have worked against him on behalf of Disney. Instead of taking responsibility for selling Florida homeowners out to lobbyists, people like Altmaier, Patronis, and DeSantis fabricated a bogyman and pointed the finger at plaintiff attorneys, roofers, and Public Adjusters with help from former Under Ron DeSantis's watch, Patronis, Gillway and Altmaier went on a media blitz attempting to secure public support for the insurance bill, known as Florida Senate Bill 2A by using scare tactics and out right deception, even going as far as having CFO Jimmy Patronis (in October 2022 just before the November 2022 election) go on live national television from Cape Coral, FL for an interview in which he stated that Public Adjusters are "locusts and predators". Months later, during a , CFO Patronis admitted that he himself used a Public Adjuster when his family restaurant secured a Public Adjuster after Hurricane Micheal. In Tallahassee, and on Ron DeSantis's presidential campaign, it's "do as I say, not as I do". I reached out the The Southern Group and former Florida Insurance Commissioner David Altmaier and asked him how he reconciles his new job as a lobbyist with The South Group given that Florida has a two year ban on lobbying for heads of state agencies once the leave office. Altmaier said he didn't have time to talk, adding, " Suggesting that I'm in violation of Florida lobbying laws is false." Given that HB 7001 applies to the leaders of state agencies under DeSantis or his Cabinet, which Altmaier was a member of until he resigned following submission of his resignation letter to DeSantis on December 28, 2022 , the Florida law that prohibits lobbying for two years after officials leave their state agency positions also applies to Altmaier. However, given that it is ultimately the Governor of Florida who decides the penalty for possible violations of the law, and given the fact that Altmaier and numerous of his colleagues at The Southern Group have donated thousands of dollars to DeSantis's presidential campaign, Floridians shouldn't hold their breath waiting for any accountability anytime soon. In August 2018, Missourians voted by 67.5% to reject an anti-union “Right-to-Work” law. Then, three months later, we voted to raise the minimum wage nearly five dollars higher than the federal level.

name: Katie Porter
subject: 2023 fundraising metrics
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
I'm all about transparency.
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=27924%2E3422442%2E3ldtpf)
Derek, I'm all about transparency. So here’s a look at what I see when I log on to ActBlue and check out our year’s fundraising progress:
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230809-1?refcode=EMAK09_1_AVG_20230809_V1_F&refcode2=27924_3422442_3ldtpf&akid=27924%2E3422442%2E3ldtpf)
We saw a groundswell of support on our Launch Day in January, but things have slowed down since then. **That’s to be expected, but around this time, things should be picking back up.**
Here’s the truth: grassroots fundraising is down for Democrats across the country. I get it, you probably get a lot of these emails, and it’s easy to wonder if $5 makes a difference.
For our campaign, it does. **Our average contribution this quarter is $22.14 and 99% of our donations are of $100 or less.** I don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or Big Oil, Big Pharma, or Big Bank CEOs. **But we’re up against opponents who have spent decades in power banking these checks.**
We need to ramp up our fundraising so we can run the robust campaign we’ll need to win. [**Can you chip in whatever makes sense for your budget today?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230809-1?refcode=EMAK09_1_AVG_20230809_V1_F&refcode2=27924_3422442_3ldtpf&akid=27924%2E3422442%2E3ldtpf)
[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230809-1?refcode=EMAK09_1_AVG_20230809_V1_F&refcode2=27924_3422442_3ldtpf&akid=27924%2E3422442%2E3ldtpf)
Many thanks!
Katie

Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. Our campaign is people-powered, we don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Oil or Big Pharma. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-footer?refcode=EMAK09_1_AVG_20230809_V1_F&t=2&refcode2=27924_3422442_3ldtpf&akid=27924%2E3422442%2E3ldtpf)**
---

* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/receive-fewer-kp4s-emails/?t=3&akid=27924%2E3422442%2E3ldtpf)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/kp4s-em-update-info-footer)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.katieporter.com/unsubscribe/kp4s-unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=27924%2E3422442%2E3ldtpf)

To give by check:
Katie Porter for Senate

Irvine, CA 92616
Email us: [info@katieporter.com](mailto:info@katieporter.com)

Here’s what happened:

Ohio Republicans rammed through a six-week abortion ban last summer in the wake of _Roe v. Wade_ being overturned. Voters were stunned, but quickly organized and gathered signatures for a ballot amendment to guarantee abortion access in their state.

Republicans knew their ban was on thin ice, so they tried to cheat the system. Last night's undemocratic ballot measure would have raised the threshold necessary to pass an amendment.

Thanks to local organizing efforts, Republicans failed.

**This episode highlights just how far extremists are willing to go to strip away reproductive rights -- and that includes Republicans in Congress. They will use every trick in the book, even if it means weakening democracy itself to impose their world view.**

My likely Republican opponent Scott Baugh is on the record opposing abortion “in any form” -- with no exceptions even for rape or incest. This is the same candidate who gave Katie Porter a run for her money in 2022 and now has the full weight of the national Republican Party behind him.

**[Last night’s election makes it clear that we have momentum, but we need to stay engaged and organized. So today, I am personally asking you to keep our momentum up in CA-47. **GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

clean_body: Adam Schiff is quite possibly the most corrupt politician in America and a national disgrace. We can’t allow him to reach the ranks of the Senate. | | BREAKING NEWS, Peter! Apparently, Adam Schiff is a censorship hitman. When Schiff’s own Los Angeles County instituted one of the nation’s most oppressive COVID lockdowns on individuals, schools, and businesses in the nation – which included one of the strictest lockdown and mask mandates – county officials turned to corrupt Adam Schiff to help them quell dissent and disobedience. It has just been revealed in court filings that Schiff used his political influence to help Los Angeles County officials bully Twitter, Facebook, and Instagram into censoring opposition to their COVID tyranny, which oppressed millions of people in the County. The lockdowns and mask mandates – and the corresponding censorship and demonization by the government toward anyone who would not conform – will go down as among the grossest abuses of government power and overreach in history. Adam Schiff was right at the heart of it. As a textbook liar, who now remarkably claims he is running to protect Democracy, Schiff works overtime to redirect guilt toward and discredit his opposition in order to get away with his corrupt dealings. He oppresses all Americans, and the positions he takes make it very clear that his version of “protecting Democracy” is to turn America into one-party rule like the tyrants to whom he appears to adore, like Chairman Xi. And, clearly , he’s available as a mercenary for other like-minded, power hungry and corrupt government officials. Always hungry for more power, Adam Schiff is now running to become a Senator, and I’m the conservative Republican standing in his way. Adam Schiff is quite possibly the most corrupt politician in America and a national disgrace. We can’t allow him to reach the ranks of the Senate. I am fighting this battle of good versus evil for all Americans who know that things have gone way too far... but I can’t do it without your support. I need your help to continue building momentum and maintain the early lead polls have shown us having in this race against Schiff. Thanks for your support! Eric Early Republican for Senate | | ABOUT ERIC EARLY Eric Early is a husband, father, attorney, businessman and son of a Marine. Not a career politician. Eric was raised to believe in America’s founding principles of limited government and free markets. He believes that every American should be given the opportunity to fulfill their American Dream, and his parents inspired Eric to achieve his personal goals. As the co-owner and Managing Partner of a nationally recognized law firm, Eric understands how difficult it is to start and run a successful business. As your next US Senator, Eric will work to cut overly-burdensome regulations that get in the way of entrepreneurship and job creation. Eric will stand-up to the Socialist woke interests that control Washington, DC, fight to preserve and protect our Democracy, and fight for ordinary Californians who are being left behind. | Hi Peter,

My annual lunch at one of my favorite spots in the district, Original Joe’s in Westlake, is booked for Friday, September 8th. Will you join me for this special lunch in Daly City?

name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: We can’t let a racist xenophobe back in the White House
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

Back when X was still called Twitter and Donald Trump was occupying the
White House, he made it his mission to turn the four original Squad
members into the GOP’s common enemy, constantly hurling racist tweets and
verbal attacks their way.

It started with Trump telling the four women of color to “go back” to the
countries they came from — when all four are U.S. citizens — because they
spoke out against his xenophobic, inhumane immigration policies.
Throughout the rest of his presidency, Trump continued to make Alexandria,
Ilhan, Ayanna, and Rashida his #1 target.

Flash forward to today: Trump is the first former president in American
history to be indicted not once, not twice, but three times. He is finally
being held accountable for inciting a violent insurrection and trying to
steal the 2020 election, and will go to trial while our Squad keeps
fighting for the people in Congress.

But we can’t let our guard down.

Right now, Trump is STILL the leading Republican contender in the 2024
presidential race, with fellow white nationalist Ron DeSantis’ campaign
floundering.

Despite his many crimes, Trump could very well be the GOP nominee for
president once again. We cannot let this racist xenophobe anywhere near
the White House or elected office. And we must re-elect ALL members of our
growing Squad to hold Trump, DeSantis, and any other far-right fascists
accountable.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/136870?refcode=em20230809-30295&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&akid=30295%2E1203867%2EvpOQLD ]Rush $3 or whatever you can to help Justice Democrats
work to defeat white nationalists like Trump, re-elect the Squad, and send
even more progressives to Congress →

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/136870?refcode=em20230809-30295&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1020&akid=30295%2E1203867%2EvpOQLD ]Donate $3

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=1021&akid=30295%2E1203867%2EvpOQLD ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong.

Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=1022&akid=30295%2E1203867%2EvpOQLD ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20230809-30295-footer&t=1023&refcode2=30295_1203867_vpOQLD&akid=30295%2E1203867%2EvpOQLD

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1024&akid=30295%2E1203867%2EvpOQLD

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
JusticeDemocrats.com
10629 Hardin Valley Rd, #226
Knoxville, TN 37932
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

name: Diane Sare
subject: Event tonight 7pm. Nagasaki 78 years ago today. Nuclear war must never be fought.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sare for Senate
body:
| | [](https://www.sareforsenate.com/?e=bd1d687cdeff164927fc1e159dca3e71&utm_source=sareforsenate&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2023_nagasaki&n=1)
---
Friend -- Today is the 78th anniversary of the 2nd nuclear bomb to be dropped by the United States on Japan, on the city of Nagasaki. Join me tonight at 7:00 pm at a special online event featuring former CIA analyst Ray McGovern and many other prominent peace activists. [Free tickets here.](https://www.sareforsenate.com/r?u=uuUyPGiVHWR_V3cUbcvCWZ3ijkw_Vk50lFA0X-2b3zaQbMk4HqZymGEoeCuDmfYZEtvpSrD5gCjPbqj45JN9LKSA7Hhuq9d0ooZWj7oLPx0oFQSQq1xXcWWr4e1GbPf9LAtWsj6f9AQr7_fd9CWgeeSNHNFa-ulveOG3PqXM9gM&e=bd1d687cdeff164927fc1e159dca3e71&utm_source=sareforsenate&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2023_nagasaki&n=2) The Humanity for Peace rally this past Sunday was a powerful intervention against the lunatic fringe billionaires' club who are propelling mankind to self-inflicted annihilation. Speakers included Scott Ritter, Garland Nixon, Gerald Celente and many more. Presidential candidate Robert Kennedy, Jr. sent a prerecorded endorsement of the rally which can be seen six minutes into the [livestream here.](https://www.sareforsenate.com/r?u=GQ96LxW7tJscudkL8mlwNzVEKXk7dMDJzwJlfbbiiRYPdzWrogxAOlvRgQy6DNwmg9KuF249ih6l6-ZmummvbQ&e=bd1d687cdeff164927fc1e159dca3e71&utm_source=sareforsenate&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2023_nagasaki&n=3) Following the rally, I participated in a [beautiful concert, featuring the Mozart Requiem,](https://www.sareforsenate.com/r?u=GQ96LxW7tJscudkL8mlwNzVEKXk7dMDJzwJlfbbiiRaxnVtqY8oVRu3ltMdlaiMO&e=bd1d687cdeff164927fc1e159dca3e71&utm_source=sareforsenate&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2023_nagasaki&n=4) directed by Maestro Gurer Aykal, a world-famous conductor, originally from Turkey. Immediately below is my speech at the UN rally. body:
Greta’s campaign is about restoring law in Mississippi

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67844076/421043468/-456841951?refcode=BEB_EM_FR_230809CF_B_logo&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQzNDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOWY5MGZhNzMtZjQzNi1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=G81yn8Tgi8lD7Ai3RJOHppAQsZMz8USYBeO1nwBGGYo=) _Greta Kemp Martin is running for Mississippi Attorney General to fight for Mississippians by curbing our state’s corruption and ending the abuses of our campaign finance laws. If you’re short on time, you can chip in to Greta’s campaign before reading ahead by clicking[here.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67844077/421043469/-456841951?refcode=BEB_EM_FR_230809CF_B_l1&amount=50&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQzNDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOWY5MGZhNzMtZjQzNi1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=G81yn8Tgi8lD7Ai3RJOHppAQsZMz8USYBeO1nwBGGYo=)_

Peter, as usual with Lynn Fitch the effort we’ve seen is much too little, far too late.

After failing to pursue consequences for Republican campaign finance violations amid public protest, Fitch is making a Hail Mary effort to save her reputation as Attorney General by saying she’ll “investigate.”

Given that we’ve yet to see any prosecutions for the millions of dollars in TANF funds that were stolen by state officials, we’re not holding our breath.

name: Adam Schiff
subject: re: The Protecting Our Democracy Act
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
| I recently introduced a major reform bill — the Protecting our Democracy Act — to ensure that no future president can do the kind of damage Donald Trump did to our democracy ever again.
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=3326%2E5257348%2EbH0r8w)
Derek,
I recently introduced a major reform bill — the _Protecting our Democracy Act_ — to ensure that no future president can do the kind of damage Donald Trump did to our democracy ever again.
**[Will you become a citizen co-sponsor of the _Protecting Our Democracy Act_ today?](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1024?c0=engagement-20230809-protecting-our-democracy-petition.ujRpG_&refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_PET_AC90_20230809_PM1_V1_S1&t=4&akid=3326%2E5257348%2EbH0r8w)**
[ADD MY NAME](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1024?c0=engagement-20230809-protecting-our-democracy-petition.ujRpG_&refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_PET_AC90_20230809_PM1_V1_S1&t=5&akid=3326%2E5257348%2EbH0r8w)
---
I hope you’ll give me a minute to explain why I’m introducing the _Protecting Our Democracy Act_ — especially now.
Over the last several years, our democracy has been put to the test over and over again. From the multiple efforts to overturn the 2020 election to their culmination in the assault on our nation’s Capitol on January 6th, many of our democratic norms and institutions have been battered — literally.
These recent actions have shown that we cannot take our democracy for granted.
The _Protecting Our Democracy Act_ is an ambitious set of reforms that would help ensure another wannabe demagogue like Donald Trump cannot push our democracy to the brink again.
This legislation will help us do three important things:
1. Stop the abuse of the president’s powers.
2. Restore checks and balances.
3. Protect our elections from interference, foreign and domestic.

**This isn’t a Democratic or Republican issue. This is a nonpartisan, pro-democracy effort — designed to strengthen our democracy for future generations.**
After the Watergate scandal, Congress took action to pass a series of landmark reforms to prevent future presidents from abusing their office in the way Richard Nixon did. It’s high time we do the same.
Those changes stood the test of time for half a century. Now, it is time for Congress to act again and pass new protections for our democratic institutions.
**[Add your name alongside mine to become a citizen co-sponsor of the _Protecting Our Democracy Act_.](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1024?c0=engagement-20230809-protecting-our-democracy-petition.ujRpG_&refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_PET_AC90_20230809_PM1_V1_S1&t=6&akid=3326%2E5257348%2EbH0r8w)**
[ADD MY NAME](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1024?c0=engagement-20230809-protecting-our-democracy-petition.ujRpG_&refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_PET_AC90_20230809_PM1_V1_S1&t=7&akid=3326%2E5257348%2EbH0r8w)
---
We must seize this moment to defend our democracy. Thank you for your support.
— Adam
[](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1024?c0=engagement-20230809-protecting-our-democracy-petition.ujRpG_&refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_PET_AC90_20230809_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=8&akid=3326%2E5257348%2EbH0r8w)
| | [DONATE MONTHLY](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2742?refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_PET_AC90_20230809_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=9&akid=3326%2E5257348%2EbH0r8w)
---
135 E. Olive Ave., #750 Burbank CA, 91502
**[www.adamschiff.com](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/60?t=2&akid=3326%2E5257348%2EbH0r8w) | [contact@adamschiff.com](mailto:contact@adamschiff.com) | [Privacy Policy](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/64?t=3&akid=3326%2E5257348%2EbH0r8w)**
PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
---

If you wish to no longer receive these messages, please [unsubscribe.](https://act.adamschiff.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=11&akid=3326%2E5257348%2EbH0r8w)

clean_body: Sharice has been working hard in Congress to deliver for Kansas families, and we wanted to give you a few updates from her work in Washington and right here in Kansas’ 3rd district. First, if you can, please chip in $20 or any amount to support our work. Every donation we receive is important to ensuring we stay on track to keep Sharice fighting for us beyond 2024. [==] Check out what Sharice has been working on below! == [==] Expanding rural broadband: At a Small Business Committee hearing, Sharice highlighted the importance of investing in rural broadband here in Kansas and across the nation. Sharice has led bipartisan legislation to invest in rural broadband so that families and businesses in rural Kansas can access high-speed internet. Creating jobs: Sharice announced that Kansas’ 3rd district has created more clean energy jobs than any other congressional district nationwide, thanks to the Inflation Reduction Act passed last year. Sharice was the only member of Kansas’ congressional delegation to vote for this critical legislation to create jobs, lower costs, and fight the climate crisis. Bipartisan wins for Kansas: Sharice wrote a guest column in the Kansas City Star to highlight the accomplishments of the bipartisan Federal Aviation Administration reauthorization, including two of Sharice’s amendments which will improve safety outcomes and invest in modernizing control towers. Read Sharice’s guest column here. [] Delivering for veterans: Sharice introduced legislation to support veteran small business owners and entrepreneurs. This bipartisan legislation was unanimously approved by the House Small Business Committee because our veterans deserve to be supported when they complete their service. Fighting the fentanyl crisis: Sharice joined local leaders at Shawnee Mission West to discuss the importance of addressing the fentanyl crisis and protecting everyone in our communities, especially young people. As the new school year begins, Sharice will continue working with local, state, and federal leaders to ensure this crisis is addressed. * Investing in public safety: Sharice joined the Overland Park Police Department for a tour and ride-along with a police officer. As a daughter of a law enforcement officer, Sharice knows the importance of supporting our local law enforcement so folks in our community feel safe and protected. **GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

body:
Ohioans came out strong in this week’s special election |
#
Hi there, this is Sherrod Brown from Ohio. This is incredible news: Ohioans came out strong in yesterday’s special election to STOP an anti-democratic amendment and clear special interest power grab – which would’ve made it harder for us to enshrine reproductive rights in our state constitution this November. Seeing Ohio voters turn out to the polls and decisively reject the GOP's proposal has me feeling more hopeful than ever about our ability to protect women’s health care. This massive victory also makes clear that momentum is on our side heading into 2024 when I’ll be on the ballot. clean_body: Ohioans came out strong in this week’s special election | Hi there, this is Sherrod Brown from Ohio. This is incredible news: Ohioans came out strong in yesterday’s special election to STOP an anti-democratic amendment and clear special interest power grab – which would’ve made it harder for us to enshrine reproductive rights in our state constitution this November. Seeing Ohio voters turn out to the polls and decisively reject the GOP's proposal has me feeling more hopeful than ever about our ability to protect women’s health care. This massive victory also makes clear that momentum is on our side heading into 2024 when I’ll be on the ballot. But we can’t take our foot off the gas. So today, as we celebrate, I'm personally asking you to help me keep up our momentum:= If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Sherrod Brown and Tina Smith will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = In solidarity, Sherrod Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota Tina Smith for Minnesota PO Box 14362 St. Paul, MN 55114 United States | | Contributions or gifts to Tina Smith for Minnesota are not tax-deductible.

Peter Willis — Did you see the massive news out of Ohio last night??

Ohioans turned out in droves and voted down a right-wing extremist plot to block abortion rights by changing the state constitution. It’s a massive win — and a testament to the hard work of grassroots organizers like Our Revolution’s Diane Morgan, who was on the ground mobilizing voters and fighting back against extremism.

We’ve proved time and again that when we organize, we win. Will you chip in $10 or more today so we can build off this momentum and take the fight to anti-abortion extremists across the country? We should celebrate yesterday’s victory. But we cannot be complacent. The extremist anti-abortion apparatus in Ohio spent $20 million of taxpayer money just to hold this election — and there’s no doubt they’ll try it again.

Right now, right-wing extremists and their billionaire backers are re-grouping and picking their next targets. If we get complacent, we won’t be able to fight off their next attack.

name: Ryan Franknberry
subject: Celebrating a Historic Milestone and Moving Forward Together
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by the WV State Democratic Executive Committee (www
body:
Last night, the House Democratic Caucus unanimously selected Delegate Sean Hornbuckle as the first African American Minority Leader in our state's history.
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP02/1/67825/images/IMG_9844.jpg]
Dear Friend ,
We are thrilled to share an exciting milestone that underscores the progress we are making in the West Virginia Democratic Party. Last night, the House Democratic Caucus unanimously selected Delegate Sean Hornbuckle as the first African American Minority Leader in our state's history. This historic moment marks a significant step towards a more inclusive and equitable future for all West Virginians.
Delegate Hornbuckle's dedication to public service and advocacy for economic opportunities for our state's residents make him a remarkable leader. As a Financial Advisor with Edward Jones and a holder of both a B.A. and an MBA from Marshall University, he brings a wealth of expertise to his new role. With his leadership, our party will continue to elevate the needs of our state while championing the interests of everyday West Virginians.
We have three asks that can help us continue this momentum:
Donate to Support Progress: [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wv] Help us continue the work of advancing policies that uplift all West Virginians. Your donation will directly contribute to our efforts in creating economic opportunities and addressing the unique challenges facing our state.
Spread the Word: Share this historic moment and our commitment to progress with your friends, family, and colleagues. Let's work together to build a broader coalition of individuals dedicated to positive change. Share on Facebook [https://www.facebook.com/photo?fbid=842921403859292&set=a.405249480959822] and Twitter [https://twitter.com/wvdemocrats/status/1689241574863998976?s=20]
Get Involved: [https://wvdemocrats.com/volunteer/] Join us in advocating for common-sense solutions that benefit our communities. Whether it's volunteering your time, participating in local events, or engaging in discussions, your involvement makes a difference.
We're excited about the possibilities that lie ahead, and with your support, we can achieve even more. Let's come together and continue shaping a brighter future for West Virginia.
Thank you for being a part of our journey.
Sincerely,
Ryan Frankenberry
Executive Director
WV Democratic Party
Donate [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wv]
Paid for and authorized by the WV State Democratic Executive Committee (www.wvdems.org). This communication is not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Public employees may disregard. Contributions are not tax-deductible.

PO Box 11926
Charleston , WV 25339
United States

---
Louisiana Republicans are lining up to try and flip the governorship from blue to red. Pundits are already saying it’ll come down to Shawn and a Trump-endorsed extremist — one sure to put special interests before the people of Louisiana.
**But unlike the GOP, Shawn Wilson will go to work for _ALL_ Louisianans. His vision includes: **
• Preserving the expansion of Medicaid and working with local leaders to increase health care affordability and accessibility
• Raising teacher salaries and strengthening Louisiana’s public education system
• Increasing public safety and reducing crime
We think a vote for Shawn is a vote for a stronger Louisiana, but we want to hear from the community! Take our flash poll before midnight and let us know: **Who do you think would make a better governor of Louisiana?**
**[SHAWN WILSON](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67844701/421046484/-2066807327?refcode=ea.764ae1bd-f736-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ms=ea.764ae1bd-f736-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQzOTkiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNzY0YWUxYmQtZjczNi1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=msSET_Ticn02OgErjXHUPgKo80EA2bYmeHeom-NQZ4M=)**

Fellow Conservative,

I’ve got a great life in Montana; four beautiful kids and a wife whom I adore. On June 27th, I launched my campaign to be the next United States Senator for Montana, and I’ve got to tell you that the most common question that I’ve received since my announcement has been, _**“why are you doing this?”**_

**Here is what I tell them:** it’s all about service; I’ve always tried to put myself in positions where I can have the greatest impact. Sometimes, the greatest impact is defending our freedoms oversees; sometimes it’s piloting an aerial fire-fighting aircraft. I love my country - I’ve fought and bled for Old Glory. **I would put my life on the line defending the United States of America.**
**
When your country calls and needs you, you answer. Right now, our nation is facing some very serious challenges and we need serious people in Washington to get our nation back on track.

It’s been a busy couple of weeks for us here in Montana, as I’m sure it has been for you as well. That’s why I took the liberty of putting together a few of the headlines news outlets around the country ran when I announced my campaign. **

[](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=a357c12479964649a4e025cc36484188&_e=CZWHBcQPmIITstSQB5sJxyEteTFu-CigPQffQ1dEo9ft0F8lLgPnrS5OdfcA92OmNc3G61msdqbMrH9d0LPKNCU5xU1XH3XdA0g1yuffKm79B7jDKew29vi7QgZTPW_uOUIrS_zPZU8-ZgRubgYKRHc919KwpuPbXmdWbivLNFL0GVb5SHRnGjKGBtxc-7tccw3Zqq5y_gHZhCf3uyKJCw9WH1l8faBUx2h_Yv69fKqfE5-bXGIKawxdHDeHmQPZqDjf8sc8RLw3p71Z69Jb_MbFTrfaYKx0o3zgB_MS-_rB0YrI_m1M09YHJQJZILvtW2dtKGzkSBrNNHD7KVpzZDTqQD3HWa2QsPdDHlRBOl1bdjan7WTnwY_bAI-YuIc6TqDJcqSwMhT9NcSEacHzA7l2XtO4gdgjiHmL9IRf5mE%3D)

I’m not sending you this to toot my own horn; I’m sending you this today because I need you to understand how important this race is going to be. My Democrat opponent has been in Washington since he was first elected back in 2006, meaning he is going to have a well-funded campaign. **[If you’re able to chip in a few dollars](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=a357c12479964649a4e025cc36484188&_e=CZWHBcQPmIITstSQB5sJxyEteTFu-CigPQffQ1dEo9ft0F8lLgPnrS5OdfcA92OmNc3G61msdqbMrH9d0LPKNCU5xU1XH3XdA0g1yuffKm79B7jDKew29vi7QgZTPW_uOUIrS_zPZU8-ZgRubgYKRHc919KwpuPbXmdWbivLNFL0GVb5SHRnGjKGBtxc-7tccw3Zqq5y_gHZhCf3uyKJCw9WH1l8faBUx2h_Yv69fKqfE5-bXGIKawxdHDeHmQPZNRV-Am_58umsxQHBwp0I1OKXzpXIzTM8w4DbMHlUUjrxoy2uS8uzun8RjzOfgs7LKS4a5BEsYyh7UOz5kJAF0v_8BAmo7F2f4S9AHJDJ4svxVgShHAOkYl2OsYafp9ArhHsFVf5Rux5r-2yVEz6SyIGoYa52zLWSx3-NHv9p94w%3D)** before closing out of this window today, you’d be doing me a huge favor as me and my team work to get this campaign off the ground.

clean_body: When your country calls and needs you, you answer. | | Fellow Conservative, I’ve got a great life in Montana; four beautiful kids and a wife whom I adore. On June 27th, I launched my campaign to be the next United States Senator for Montana, and I’ve got to tell you that the most common question that I’ve received since my announcement has been, “why are you doing this?” Here is what I tell them: it’s all about service; I’ve always tried to put myself in positions where I can have the greatest impact. Sometimes, the greatest impact is defending our freedoms oversees; sometimes it’s piloting an aerial fire-fighting aircraft. I love my country - I’ve fought and bled for Old Glory. I would put my life on the line defending the United States of America. When your country calls and needs you, you answer. Right now, our nation is facing some very serious challenges and we need serious people in Washington to get our nation back on track. It’s been a busy couple of weeks for us here in Montana, as I’m sure it has been for you as well. That’s why I took the liberty of putting together a few of the headlines news outlets around the country ran when I announced my campaign. I’m not sending you this to toot my own horn; I’m sending you this today because I need you to understand how important this race is going to be. My Democrat opponent has been in Washington since he was first elected back in 2006, meaning he is going to have a well-funded campaign. before closing out of this window today, you’d be doing me a huge favor as me and my team work to get this campaign off the ground. I want to create a brighter future for my kids and your children and grandchildren. Our campaign is about service, God, and country, not politics as usual. Hooyah, Tim Sheehy Former Navy SEAL Republican for U.S. Senate | " "I SERVED AS A NAVY SEAL, BUILT ONE OF THE LARGEST AERIAL FIREFIGHTING COMPANIES IN AMERICA CREATING OVER 200 MONTANA JOBS, AND STARTED A VETERAN-LED CATTLE RANCHING AND FEEDING OPERATION. WHETHER IT WAS IN WAR OR BUSINESS, I SEE PROBLEMS AND SOLVE THEM. AMERICA NEEDS CONSERVATIVE LEADERS WHO LOVE OUR COUNTRY. I'M RUNNING FOR THE U.S. SENATE BECAUSE OUR CAMPAIGN IS ABOUT SERVICE, DUTY, AND COUNTRY -- NOT POLITICS AS USUAL." | PAID FOR BY TIM SHEEHY FOR MONTANA Tim Sheehy is a former Navy SEAL. | A native Floridian with blue-collar roots, Ron was raised in Dunedin by his mother, a nurse, and father, who installed cable boxes. He attended Dunedin High School and worked his way through Yale University, where he was the captain of the varsity baseball team. He also graduated with honors from Harvard Law School, where he earned a commission in the U.S. Navy as a JAG officer.

During his active-duty service, Ron deployed to Iraq in support of the SEAL mission in Fallujah, Ramadi and the rest of Al Anbar province. His military decorations include the Bronze Star Medal for Meritorious Service and the Iraq Campaign Medal.
---
Ron also served as a prosecutor in Florida, where he put child predators behind bars. He was elected to Congress in 2012 on a platform of government accountability, advocating for term limits and a balanced budget amendment.

In Congress, DeSantis spearheaded the fight to expose the weaponization of the IRS against conservatives. He also fought to hold accountable the rogue federal agencies involved in manufacturing the "Russia collusion" conspiracy theory. As a veteran, DeSantis was a champion for those who have served our country, pushing for reforms to the VA to better serve veterans and expand support for mental health.

In 2018, Ron DeSantis was elected the 46th Governor of Florida. As governor, he has fought for what's right and taken the arrows for the people he represents. During the darkest days of 2020, when the corrupt establishment, bureaucracy, and corporate media united to force lockdowns and mandates on Americans, DeSantis stood up for freedom - even when it wasn't popular.

Grounded in his unshakeable belief in America's founding principles, Governor DeSantis has enacted a bold agenda to transform Florida into a blueprint for the Nation's revival. Governor DeSantis has delivered win after win on conservative priorities:
* Saving livelihoods from job-killing lockdowns and vaccine mandates,

* Protecting citizens from the harmful impacts of Biden's border crisis by enacting E-Verify and other bold policies against illegal immigration, such as banning sanctuary cities,

* Defending parental rights and eliminating CRT,

* Defunding DEI bureaucracy in higher ed and holding tenured professors accountable,

* Waging war on woke power-grabs like ESG and central bank digital currency,

* Enacting the strongest medical freedom laws in the nation,

* Turning Florida into a model for election integrity,

* Protecting the unborn,

* Standing up for the 2nd Amendment by making Florida a constitutional carry state,

* Expanding education freedom,

* Prohibiting land purchases by the CCP and related individuals and entities,

* Lowering prescription drug costs,

* Holding woke corporations and school unions accountable,

* Creating a universal school choice program,

* Delivering record-breaking tax relief,

* Helping families achieve the American dream of homeownership,

* Supporting law enforcement and our veterans,

* Enacting tougher penalties for drug dealers and sex offenders,

* Appointing seven conservative justices to the Florida Supreme Court,

* ...and so much more.

After leading Florida with common sense and conviction throughout his first term, DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory of nearly 20 points in 2022. He earned his second term by the largest raw vote margin in state history, winning by more than 1.5 million votes.

But history didn't stop there:

Governor DeSantis flipped Miami-Dade County red, winning the majority-Hispanic urban county by double digits. Conventional wisdom assumed this was impossible for a Republican - as recently as 2016, Hillary Clinton won Miami-Dade County by nearly 30 points.

Governor DeSantis flipped several other blue counties red, including Palm Beach County. He won 62 out of 67 counties overall.

Compared to his first statewide election in 2018, Governor DeSantis was up +19% with Independents, up +30% with Hispanics, and up +9% with women.

Governor DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory with battle-tested leadership, a bold policy agenda, and never backing down to corporate media or special interests. As he said at his inauguration: "When the world lost its mind - when common sense suddenly became an uncommon virtue - Florida was a refuge of sanity, a citadel of freedom for our fellow Americans and even for people around the world. In captaining the ship of state, we choose to navigate the boisterous sea of liberty rather than cower in the calm docks of despotism."

Governor DeSantis has ensured that Florida is a free and safe place to raise a family. Thanks to the governor's leadership, Floridians enjoy a low tax burden, quality education opportunities, and a bulwark in place against the Biden Administration's overreach and various elite power grabs that seek to force people to adopt a particular ideology. Thanks to the governor's vision, this year's legislative session delivered the most ambitious conservative policy victories in Florida's history.

This year, Governor DeSantis signed:
* Record tax relief

* ESG prohibitions

* Measures counteracting the influence of the CCP

* The strongest medical freedom protections in the nation.

* Reforms reducing the costs of medications by delivering transparency

* Bold higher education reforms; defunding DEI

* Improvements to our state's infrastructure

* Tough-on-crime, law and order measures, including the death penalty for child rapists

* The strongest measures protecting Florida from Biden's border crisis

* Reforms for paycheck protection , holding accountable wayward school unions

* Prohibitions on centralized digital currencies in Florida

No leader has accomplished more for his state than Governor DeSantis. He is now sharing his bold vision with the country, leading a movement to deliver the Great American Comeback.

Ron is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy Award- winning television anchor. Together, they're the proud parents of their daughters, Madison and Mamie, and their son, Mason.
---

clean_body: Are you fed up with CRT and DEI being shoved down your throats? | | | | | | | | | | Friend, We are facing a long fight and have a huge choice to make next November that will change the course of our country forever. Every day we risk letting our nation slip away...bowing to woke policies over common sense. Under Joe Biden's leadership, he has let the woke mob: Distribute sexually explicit materials to young kids in school. Indoctrinate children with hate and the woke mentality that men can get pregnant. Destroy our economy with record-high inflation. Allow China and Russia to WALK all over the USA. Give the DC Swamp bureaucrats complete control of our country. The list goes on, but you get the point. We're reaching out today because it's time to stand up and fight back. Governor DeSantis is working day and night on the campaign trail, and we are doing everything we can to back him on the ground. If we're going to make our Great American Comeback a reality, ****. | | August 23rd is the biggest make-or-break point this campaign has faced since our first FEC EOQ deadline. On August 23rd, it will be the Governor's FIRST time on the national debate stage, where he will showcase why this campaign's platform is the winning platform for America's revival. If we don't go into that debate with the momentum we need, and fail to show the nation why freedom is worth fighting for, then we're giving Joe Biden & the woke mob an opportunity to impose their policies for another 4 years. From critical race theory in schools and "diversity, equity, and inclusion" initiatives being shoved down people's throats, it's clear that the time to act is NOW. . | | | | | | | | Gov. Ron DeSantis is committed to ensuring that future generations of Americans get to grow up in a nation where freedom is the reality for ALL. Join us, Friend. It's time to put an end to this. In Freedom, Team DeSantis | | | Meet Ron DeSantis | | | | | A native Floridian with blue-collar roots, Ron was raised in Dunedin by his mother, a nurse, and father, who installed cable boxes. He attended Dunedin High School and worked his way through Yale University, where he was the captain of the varsity baseball team. He also graduated with honors from Harvard Law School, where he earned a commission in the U.S. Navy as a JAG officer. During his active-duty service, Ron deployed to Iraq in support of the SEAL mission in Fallujah, Ramadi and the rest of Al Anbar province. His military decorations include the Bronze Star Medal for Meritorious Service and the Iraq Campaign Medal. Ron also served as a prosecutor in Florida, where he put child predators behind bars. He was elected to Congress in 2012 on a platform of government accountability, advocating for term limits and a balanced budget amendment. In Congress, DeSantis spearheaded the fight to expose the weaponization of the IRS against conservatives. He also fought to hold accountable the rogue federal agencies involved in manufacturing the "Russia collusion" conspiracy theory. As a veteran, DeSantis was a champion for those who have served our country, pushing for reforms to the VA to better serve veterans and expand support for mental health. In 2018, Ron DeSantis was elected the 46th Governor of Florida. As governor, he has fought for what's right and taken the arrows for the people he represents. During the darkest days of 2020, when the corrupt establishment, bureaucracy, and corporate media united to force lockdowns and mandates on Americans, DeSantis stood up for freedom - even when it wasn't popular. Grounded in his unshakeable belief in America's founding principles, Governor DeSantis has enacted a bold agenda to transform Florida into a blueprint for the Nation's revival. Governor DeSantis has delivered win after win on conservative priorities: Saving livelihoods from job-killing lockdowns and vaccine mandates, Protecting citizens from the harmful impacts of Biden's border crisis by enacting E-Verify and other bold policies against illegal immigration, such as banning sanctuary cities, Defending parental rights and eliminating CRT, Defunding DEI bureaucracy in higher ed and holding tenured professors accountable, Waging war on woke power-grabs like ESG and central bank digital currency, Enacting the strongest medical freedom laws in the nation, Turning Florida into a model for election integrity, Protecting the unborn, Standing up for the 2nd Amendment by making Florida a constitutional carry state, Expanding education freedom, Prohibiting land purchases by the CCP and related individuals and entities, Lowering prescription drug costs, Holding woke corporations and school unions accountable, Creating a universal school choice program, Delivering record-breaking tax relief, Helping families achieve the American dream of homeownership, Supporting law enforcement and our veterans, Enacting tougher penalties for drug dealers and sex offenders, Appointing seven conservative justices to the Florida Supreme Court, ...and so much more. After leading Florida with common sense and conviction throughout his first term, DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory of nearly 20 points in 2022. He earned his second term by the largest raw vote margin in state history, winning by more than 1.5 million votes. But history didn't stop there: Governor DeSantis flipped Miami-Dade County red, winning the majority-Hispanic urban county by double digits. Conventional wisdom assumed this was impossible for a Republican - as recently as 2016, Hillary Clinton won Miami-Dade County by nearly 30 points. Governor DeSantis flipped several other blue counties red, including Palm Beach County. He won 62 out of 67 counties overall. Compared to his first statewide election in 2018, Governor DeSantis was up +19% with Independents, up +30% with Hispanics, and up +9% with women. Governor DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory with battle-tested leadership, a bold policy agenda, and never backing down to corporate media or special interests. As he said at his inauguration: "When the world lost its mind - when common sense suddenly became an uncommon virtue - Florida was a refuge of sanity, a citadel of freedom for our fellow Americans and even for people around the world. In captaining the ship of state, we choose to navigate the boisterous sea of liberty rather than cower in the calm docks of despotism." Governor DeSantis has ensured that Florida is a free and safe place to raise a family. Thanks to the governor's leadership, Floridians enjoy a low tax burden, quality education opportunities, and a bulwark in place against the Biden Administration's overreach and various elite power grabs that seek to force people to adopt a particular ideology. Thanks to the governor's vision, this year's legislative session delivered the most ambitious conservative policy victories in Florida's history. This year, Governor DeSantis signed: Record tax relief ESG prohibitions Measures counteracting the influence of the CCP The strongest medical freedom protections in the nation. Reforms reducing the costs of medications by delivering transparency Bold higher education reforms; defunding DEI Improvements to our state's infrastructure Tough-on-crime, law and order measures, including the death penalty for child rapists The strongest measures protecting Florida from Biden's border crisis Reforms for paycheck protection , holding accountable wayward school unions Prohibitions on centralized digital currencies in Florida No leader has accomplished more for his state than Governor DeSantis. He is now sharing his bold vision with the country, leading a movement to deliver the Great American Comeback. Ron is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy Award- winning television anchor. Together, they're the proud parents of their daughters, Madison and Mamie, and their son, Mason. | Contributions to Ron DeSantis for President are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: Can I get your thoughts on religious liberty in America?
body:
There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried

|
---
| | | [](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=318a73ba664041aaaee36f1fcf1326d0&_e=xd4pVtFmkpDHDC4xFQJQJYon_qH-lNhOorY0CFoUXCuHgCoFe69saIrigC-3hjkhsXQ3lKpfzIQOs4_2gn63xNq-H-jIjHVZiIgWyZooSQ5iR5yuz_2aMf5ZiR6ywRrAkyYCgCvQAl6WIcxdPP0Xcreliz4fmW4Tu_puDUum_lvxCPFv2VPVuWVnrDFnPJ2CXTDuyaPhi9CcjB2lefRXESx6CILHLL2xf-ig2yIhBReo9ga-MCRRbYq1917vMbnXVZ0xYAnz4LOG_krhcvEsYEccKXCyfgUxQut0oUeys3BM0-8VOlZw6Rz3pEPMC_nOJkgeahER8WxkKqVTUxehQhag5DWzbQCaVWQwE6FbWIISvHhvn75UmcgjDOg259ZjP9oQV2LoNOtcw9O4QjdXb7wubg70KGObVXASp2GZxTQ%3D)
---
| Fellow American,

There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried for Americans who hold to biblical & faith-based values. [](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=318a73ba664041aaaee36f1fcf1326d0&_e=xd4pVtFmkpDHDC4xFQJQJYon_qH-lNhOorY0CFoUXCuHgCoFe69saIrigC-3hjkhsXQ3lKpfzIQOs4_2gn63xNq-H-jIjHVZiIgWyZooSQ5iR5yuz_2aMf5ZiR6ywRrAkyYCgCvQAl6WIcxdPP0Xcreliz4fmW4Tu_puDUum_lvxCPFv2VPVuWVnrDFnPJ2CXTDuyaPhi9CcjB2lefRXESx6CILHLL2xf-ig2yIhBReo9ga-MCRRbYq1917vMbnXVZ0xYAnz4LOG_krhcvEsYB8fRPL3ws9yKeqBleBdWubBswskxKBj6Cg5RepBDDpenZczr90ZaFvSGxGHpE-s_GTH6eJiTeAm_ftvTGWBIR9-mwqz7Li2S290SMZ-xIAc4vMH_FqBegtoU-0QO_BhMm08Xh_eno42JUwi3RO_408%3D) After the _Respect for Marriage Act_ was passed by a bi-partisan effort and signed into law, I am fearful that legal persecution will only intensify against Americans holding to faith-based values and who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

[**Are you concerned that America is abandoning a basic tenet of our founding -_Religious Liberty?_**](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=318a73ba664041aaaee36f1fcf1326d0&_e=xd4pVtFmkpDHDC4xFQJQJYon_qH-lNhOorY0CFoUXCuHgCoFe69saIrigC-3hjkhsXQ3lKpfzIQOs4_2gn63xNq-H-jIjHVZiIgWyZooSQ5iR5yuz_2aMf5ZiR6ywRrAkyYCgCvQAl6WIcxdPP0Xcreliz4fmW4Tu_puDUum_lvxCPFv2VPVuWVnrDFnPJ2CXTDuyaPhi9CcjB2lefRXESx6CILHLL2xf-ig2yIhBReo9ga-MCRRbYq1917vMbnXVZ0xYAnz4LOG_krhcvEsYFr2sUPKMc-1p3ZGkJhBorJvzSms67Kg2IC4YNNurs7CaSOdA-bLp_PRbeOQx4g38z8HsPP-_BM_Y_DTozyL-ZCdFkKvwNRutZWbKvvBz5LTdnBrx_J0gbfpApsjPE7E0EmJRiEMRFGX8_EUdAJWSqc%3D)

In addition to the passing of the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , numerous examples over the past decade have concerned me: KENNEDY v. BREMERTON SCHOOL DISTRICT, MASTERPIECE CAKESHOP v. COLORADO CIVIL RIGHTS COMMISSION, and 303 CREATIVE v. ELENIS are just a few examples of legal persecution against Americans holding to faith-based values who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

Furthermore, an amendment to the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , brought forth by Senator Mike Lee, prohibiting the Federal Government from retaliating against schools, businesses, and organizations because of their religious beliefs about same-sex marriage failed.

**This has the potential to only intensify legal persecution against individuals, businesses, churches, and nonprofits holding to faith-based values. **

The American Cornerstone Institute is a non-profit that I founded to preserve and promote the cornerstones that laid the foundation for the greatest nation the world has ever seen: Faith, Liberty, Community, and Life.

Whether it is a football coach losing his job for praying at midfield after a game, or a baker being sued for not wanting to bake a cake that violates his religious values, **are you concerned as I am with the increase in legal persecution against Americans who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith?**

Please share your thoughts in this quick 2-minute survey concerning religious liberty in America.

**[https://offers.americancornerstone.org/religious-liberty-survey/](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=318a73ba664041aaaee36f1fcf1326d0&_e=xd4pVtFmkpDHDC4xFQJQJYon_qH-lNhOorY0CFoUXCuHgCoFe69saIrigC-3hjkhsXQ3lKpfzIQOs4_2gn63xNq-H-jIjHVZiIgWyZooSQ5iR5yuz_2aMf5ZiR6ywRrAkyYCgCvQAl6WIcxdPP0Xcreliz4fmW4Tu_puDUum_lvxCPFv2VPVuWVnrDFnPJ2CXTDuyaPhi9CcjB2lefRXESx6CILHLL2xf-ig2yIhBReo9ga-MCRRbYq1917vMbnXVZ0xYAnz4LOG_krhcvEsYNG627XPv6UjSlwxGjbc-ujerc1udWzmmirvgtYof4HJp3gfbtwtmMTNgw-bJKcq6sNfSrkT_nmAFGLtySvhEjDs1SFF3q9wJrTykrcBXivlARFMyNA9QTogWY3stCZTGKq57AqcXCCBZiMSSoZSitQ%3D)**

Thank you for your consideration.

Regards,

Dr. Ben Carson
Founder & Chairman American Cornerstone Institute
---

---
| | FROM THE DESK OF ALAN DERSHOWITZ
---
| | Dear Sun Reader,
---
| | In over sixty years in the legal profession, I’ve experienced first hand the impact of both good journalism and bad journalism — mostly the latter — and just how important and rare it is to get things right.

In today’s media landscape there are far too many publications that get things wrong. Many are more concerned with the political implications of a story than the basic facts.

The New York Sun is different. It’s a paper that places principle over politics and people over party.

Its in-depth coverage of the legal challenges faced by President Trump serve as a case in point.

When I defended President Trump during his first impeachment, I faced an avalanche of criticism, but few papers made sufficient effort to fully appreciate the significance of the legal arguments.

The Sun’s deeply knowledgeable leadership, including its editor Seth Lipsky and associate editor A.R. Hoffman are themselves students of the Constitution. It shows in their coverage, which I find to be first rate.

It will be no secret to you that I don’t agree with everything that can be found in the Sun’s pages, but I can say with confidence that its re-emergence is among the most important recent developments in American journalism.

I’ve been impressed by the Sun’s growth so far, but I know it faces an uphill battle, one that I have pledged to join.

The Sun’s success will be a gift to the American people and to the cause of truth. But to succeed, we need you to join us. I highly encourage you to join the Sun today.

Every person matters in this effort.

Don’t wait. The battle to restore American journalism starts now.
---

Alan Dershowitz
