clean_body: In today’s media landscape there are far too many publications that get things wrong. Many are more concerned with the political implications of a story than the basic facts. | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | FROM THE DESK OF ALAN DERSHOWITZ | | Dear Sun Reader, | | In over sixty years in the legal profession, I’ve experienced first hand the impact of both good journalism and bad journalism — mostly the latter — and just how important and rare it is to get things right. In today’s media landscape there are far too many publications that get things wrong. Many are more concerned with the political implications of a story than the basic facts. The New York Sun is different. It’s a paper that places principle over politics and people over party. Its in-depth coverage of the legal challenges faced by President Trump serve as a case in point. When I defended President Trump during his first impeachment, I faced an avalanche of criticism, but few papers made sufficient effort to fully appreciate the significance of the legal arguments. The Sun’s deeply knowledgeable leadership, including its editor Seth Lipsky and associate editor A.R. Hoffman are themselves students of the Constitution. It shows in their coverage, which I find to be first rate. It will be no secret to you that I don’t agree with everything that can be found in the Sun’s pages, but I can say with confidence that its re-emergence is among the most important recent developments in American journalism. I’ve been impressed by the Sun’s growth so far, but I know it faces an uphill battle, one that I have pledged to join. The Sun’s success will be a gift to the American people and to the cause of truth. But to succeed, we need you to join us. I highly encourage you to join the Sun today. Every person matters in this effort. Don’t wait. The battle to restore American journalism starts now. | | | | | Alan Dershowitz Columnist, The New York Sun | | | | | | | | | |

name: Laphonza Butler, EMILYs List
subject: Introducing Her House: A new project from EMILYs List
disclaimer_text: Paid for by EMILYs List [www
body:
EMILYs List women, in their own words |
---
| | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/67845257/421048116/1714615580?sourceid=1051693&refcode=20230809_HHIntro&refcode2=WTEFE819&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYjAzMmMwMC1mODM2LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pMkCuXnFWYSnsqi4RIHtLIerl7kGjHj4aYQmHir6omE=#) Peter,

**We're launching a new project at EMILYs List today** , and I want you to be among the first to know about it. It's called **Her House** , and it's an opportunity for you to learn more about some of the incredible women we've endorsed for must-win House seats this cycle.

You already know how high the stakes are — that the current Republican majority has _already voted to limit abortion access_ , and that **we only need to flip five seats to take back the chamber** and stop them in their tracks. What you might _not_ know is the boots-on-the-ground update about how these races are going. You might see news headlines go by with these candidates' names, but don't know much about them, why they're running, or why EMILYs List is proud to stand beside them. Our Her House project will change that.

**If you know someone else who might want to be part of our Her House project from the very beginning, please: Forward this email to them now!**

Over the next several weeks, you'll get insider information on our endorsed House candidates, _in their own words_. You'll then have the chance to **support these fearless women directly** — while also supporting EMILYs List in our work to elect women just like them, year after year, cycle after cycle. **You'll start hearing from the candidates later today. In the meantime, please forward this email to three friends who may want to be part of this movement to help Democratic pro-choice candidates win now AND for years to come.** Thanks for being a part of this,

Laphonza Butler
President, EMILYs List

[**P.S. Already fired up to support EMILYs List and our work to elect more women up and down the ballot, year after year? Thanks for being a part of this, Laphonza Butler President, EMILYs List =# **=# ****** | ---|---|--- EMILYs List is a community of over five million members that helps elect Democratic pro-choice women to office. | Paid for by EMILYs List and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. name: David Hogg
subject: Announcing Leaders We Deserve
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Their Future PAC
body:
| | | Hey, it’s David Hogg, gun safety advocate and co-founder of March For Our Lives.

Many of our elected officials can be described as one word: **_Cowards._**

Our kids, our planet, our freedoms, our democracy — are all under attack by far-right extremists, from the State House to the U.S. Senate, who are willing to let children be slaughtered at school and watch our planet burn for their own personal gain.

**We refuse to back down.**

There were many who said after Parkland that we couldn’t change anything because we were just a “bunch of kids.” But we proved them wrong — **we passed gun laws in a state owned by the NRA.**

There were many who said young people would never vote. But we proved them wrong in 2018 — _defeating more NRA backed politicians than ever before in U.S. history._ Then, in 2020, we defeated NRA puppet Donald Trump. **Both of these victories enabled us to pass the first federal gun law in 30 years.**

There were many who said Maxwell Frost, March For Our Lives' first National Organizing Director, could never be the first Gen Z Member of Congress. **But we proved them wrong, again.**

Badass young people have a habit of being underestimated — and I have a habit of scaring the shit out of Republicans by proving that, while we might be young, we are _powerful._

**That is why today, myself and Kevin Lata, Maxwell Frost’s Campaign Manager and 2022 Campaign Manager of the Year, are launching Leaders We Deserve** — a grassroots organization dedicated to electing young leaders to Congress, and especially our State Legislatures, across the country to help defeat the far-right’s agenda and advance a progressive vision for the future. Leaders We Deserve will work in partnership with a stacked Advisory Board, including Maxwell Frost, Justin Jones, and other influential leaders.

**_[Are you in? Split a donation between Leaders We Deserve and Their Future PAC so we can win back our country and advance a progressive agenda.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yWqaAipSuLnSvVaNc1k1n-L5Q7FL_A_rYYIYrPP6hZKSpM1FZVLvn_mipnF5n7KFqj4iEbFLZyAC_WE1WYfavbkl5bWArHo3G7gHrM37WiAqLbbaMXtZTcyd0UbJdv3tKZammwIVzuJsqTxonvpcxD19iDzbgAC7NQ7F2vc68544pA9z0_Izv7lzb3R8UwaUgx9Fl_2ZY0SczuWYvX26U79Ne5gyp7M7h2vPIPVPsgLkRHRvWodtzsQf2pONL_6db4cbOqCziVz-DGuGAzsMtEQGTqSwyJ6IDnKHnV0pujzAdSqXeQydjyQ7Wx_uZEYLGD04g0lnHe2p68QfabvB7Bby5HQkXwZtGusn4gaHuXKw/3yl/JItnXN_WRTOJhgPEJFPd4Q/h0/uFLIGl7iKowFUSwQLGcsEECOVSIxzB9ZeKmobL2Ib_c)_**

| | [Donate >>](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yWqaAipSuLnSvVaNc1k1n-L5Q7FL_A_rYYIYrPP6hZKSpM1FZVLvn_mipnF5n7KFqj4iEbFLZyAC_WE1WYfavbkl5bWArHo3G7gHrM37WiAqLbbaMXtZTcyd0UbJdv3tLGpQTH9DHgDYxM8UDMs7tZRFBbzmsnHV_kcF2UO5m-I5cykV59V-pwvOFRvorrpAmILq0jvbti8NTdMP6iMgh-YFwAEf0dUD8zna2byfiO1w5dhgeZA6J2XWb-jD5FaESCyGQaKJP3yvTB6XHvyz6KYx1M4Dx-Ksaa3BV58aZ2J0YP-zx71vu3EvzdUTMJm_jDkV1o7sNA34U_3NpzjdfWM7NlLd_eU-Ek6YRnXive_Q/3yl/JItnXN_WRTOJhgPEJFPd4Q/h1/WP0kd6ISBcJFcZgZJN05H_Hbl1wVx9B_8K9cIrKz56s)
---

Why is this important?

**Despite making up 45% of the electorate, Gen Z and Millennials only hold 21% of State Legislature seats.**

Conversely, Republicans have made significant investments in down-ballot races, leading to the absolute assault on our rights and freedoms that we’re seeing happen across states — from abortion bans to taking away LGBTQ+ rights to repealing life-saving common sense gun laws put into place after the Parkland shooting.

Our political system is stacked against us, but incredible young leaders have fought back and beat the odds to get elected to office. It’s time to take more young people from movements like March For Our Lives and elect them to office to be the leaders we deserve. **But grassroots support is what moves the needle, and it’s what we need from you today.

_[Join us by splitting a donation of any amount between Leaders We Deserve and Their Future PAC today.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yWqaAipSuLnSvVaNc1k1n-L5Q7FL_A_rYYIYrPP6hZKSpM1FZVLvn_mipnF5n7KFqj4iEbFLZyAC_WE1WYfavbkl5bWArHo3G7gHrM37WiAqLbbaMXtZTcyd0UbJdv3tIqaz248Qgmc5GG2TlktN1qZ6AQzCGVVlwliv6lPSaHwW1dorKsoEA4qM4jx2tOTTpJaM7Z1ww_YCY5Jv-ZqPF8Ii3J7Fsu3jhkxfhwYvi2Le10mMT0V9jZq89ExheUEYdxctpBEvitU7NXK7mjJ25yiEdH8XyuJvj1Um49ra2fLjAd1_wVIwicJPCAyZq-5x1Gt8AYcMRiefG8QhgqwmEIBmIQTbM1Olxml0XhVo0pXA/3yl/JItnXN_WRTOJhgPEJFPd4Q/h2/Z4AYyI4BusPnEO-ZkPqAF433OgoeC_hFd0D-fDyHSVI)_**

So how are we going to fight back against the 50-year chess game conservative special interest groups have been manipulating?

**Leaders We Deserve will invest in young people, knock down barriers, and elect more young people to office. We’re doing this by:**
1. **Recruitment:** Identifying candidates who will have the biggest impact on their states (that's where the real work is happening).
2. **Providing Day-to-Day Support:** We’re helping campaigns build from the ground up and will work with them directly on fundraising, messaging, coalition building, voter contact, and volunteer recruitment.
3. **Volunteer Network:** Our grassroots volunteer army (that’s you) will have person-to-person conversations with voters all across a candidate’s district, advocating on their behalf.
4. **Running Paid Media Campaigns:** We’ll run well-funded independent expenditure programs.

But there’s a reason our political system favors those who are older, wealthier, and white — _running for office takes serious resources._

Which is one of the reasons I’m reaching out today. Young candidates aren’t seen as viable and often struggle to raise money. They have lower personal wealth and smaller donor networks.

**_[So I’m asking: Will you join our movement by splitting a donation between Leaders We Deserve and Their Future PAC today?](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yWqaAipSuLnSvVaNc1k1n-L5Q7FL_A_rYYIYrPP6hZKSpM1FZVLvn_mipnF5n7KFqj4iEbFLZyAC_WE1WYfavbkl5bWArHo3G7gHrM37WiAqLbbaMXtZTcyd0UbJdv3tJdJQBrVgPXYEeZtD9WrD9a0SMcwnCljuR77QLeozx6O7Za0Ec_QTyYzSeSnf4ppb9cCUsVGPXgCLWHvKbNiS58gaD9foSa2LbHudb9i2HoJPqpd8pIme5EnGvKH15EJUJ4HQ-DjjZ8ONwr9d1MC9xSesHD6yYKlyyTUBP7SJEUD6IVHmc5d5U-ADsyZ2pCJvxoSvdTffvBs0wpsb0toRPiLi0Ucnjse4re_ARG5dJh7Q/3yl/JItnXN_WRTOJhgPEJFPd4Q/h3/O-UycmD9FbFYuGBg8f_efxGfyb5kn-lOtgFANn4S8zc)_**

| [Donate >>](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yWqaAipSuLnSvVaNc1k1n-L5Q7FL_A_rYYIYrPP6hZKSpM1FZVLvn_mipnF5n7KFqj4iEbFLZyAC_WE1WYfavbkl5bWArHo3G7gHrM37WiAqLbbaMXtZTcyd0UbJdv3tJRuRUAG0KVwLOXgQIFC2K0NrT4d_WJ4MdUAlQv6thXEeKGf-IQAK4Qo5igJaY-DW7Uj_Wmnp2jpJz1G8y2biidN5_JaNOSsE0ebx4UeJZ46baJM_hfzkAlO6gbEXrKNFk201GW2h8GejcCteh9GD53tmhyqAoE13nL_K5r-4xGAEUcKpaN9pOkEYp1s9aCQr3yea0_IAeEYf2EPFKAat0fGouGJ3ygo7cCBPSTgjVgLQ/3yl/JItnXN_WRTOJhgPEJFPd4Q/h4/cbW2jZ3Rqsz3Ic4Dl9_IcLDjSoHKVDSu_N_ppY0v82U)
---

There’s so much more I could say, but I’ll end with this — **we absolutely cannot do this work without you.

_[Please, consider joining us so we can defeat the far-right extremists who have taken over our communities and our nation — and elect the leaders we deserve.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yWqaAipSuLnSvVaNc1k1n-L5Q7FL_A_rYYIYrPP6hZKSpM1FZVLvn_mipnF5n7KFqj4iEbFLZyAC_WE1WYfavbkl5bWArHo3G7gHrM37WiAqLbbaMXtZTcyd0UbJdv3tISx3a3H9lv861FdlrjHvLx785IY4Roa_UC2kuD3fNKCd4wKALNdOgWGxitAwslVPgSCd2KzidMOtVD2H9DMJXomVrfHgtr0xHDeA_9rGM1rY_9wzi2pwcSIfdg8yhe-EoEKjG1OcaFjATf-ImAZRk_xrK0ppHrRohgB-GqoHj8JUaMkDR9pmZgD92gXyWrYhZ1KBqyY4hsFw0iq9VIgSDSLwJPLukUEc1wIk-afGrMwA/3yl/JItnXN_WRTOJhgPEJFPd4Q/h5/HsVHfXEUZF09yrIJBBC-g8TDHI8EEave2bmlty5Tq3Q)_**

Thank you.

More soon,

David Hogg
Co-founder
Leaders We Deserve

* * *
[](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zKMyJxzQ4bKAUZ6TCs94LCsp1duozFuMMPrhq3Yf_-WP5nnWGdMjNWxqO7vz8SxtrKVM2vHi8c5wJ7t4ao828Ij34_V4FnWuMsfEZ1moXSsWyRiFmpo3nhzbchBAF7LGI9_Vv-oFmgZ4zqQJ7-MpNmCMc7P1mLnuMbGhSNH-OCyBxID4ad6iqQTTYnUXvjRXDxroqN0lgDmnMqOeSGoTZKsodu8217ad6Xdg50A8nxwGeostLT_sO9NYdei5BI_sdPrGfqQcZp3QWNNgx6Lu6lCjpsDl2mzLV4IGaH2c9y6IFkY3xcS0h7hJeiftq6bozLhTGH4NFxhGm4n3j32lp8/3yl/JItnXN_WRTOJhgPEJFPd4Q/h6/AEfnZ7fPofx3U0iTVzaZCyXoMOCrfuOMcoaM1GEJf40)

name: Josh Harder
subject: asking for $9
body:
I don’t take a dime of corporate PAC money. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67845313/421048292/657127102?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZTU0NTgwNDItZjgzNi1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=mv29d8A7gP0jkyUeaVmrkpLKimvT_n0NtrJgq3GGx9M=) | Hey Peter, I’m one of the few members of Congress who doesn’t take a single dime or corporate PAC money. I rely strictly on grassroots supporters like you, Peter. | | This is incredible news, Peter! Ohioans came out strong in yesterday’s special election to STOP an anti-democratic amendment and clear special interest power grab – which would’ve made it harder for us to enshrine reproductive rights in our state constitution this November.

Seeing Ohio voters turn out to the polls and decisively reject the GOP's proposal has me feeling more hopeful than ever about our ability to protect women’s health care.

This massive victory also makes clear that momentum is on our side heading into 2024 when I’ll be on the ballot. But we can’t take our foot off the gas. **So today, as we celebrate, I'm personally asking you to help me keep up our momentum:** [**_Will you split $15 or more between myself and the Democratic Party of Georgia to defend Ohio's Democratic seat and our pro-choice Senate majority?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67845475/421049056/-843865763?refcode=20230809.2_ShB_8P&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMTU0MjBmZS1mODM2LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-J04tKut5uXCIlYDYDxIT2tThH-vRPKBSlaohh1m4ic=)**_

In solidarity,

Sherrod

Hi, it’s Dan with the Jane Fonda Climate PAC. We’re over halfway through 2023, and everyone on our team is grateful for your ongoing support.

The work we do to elect true climate champions is only possible because thousands of people like you across the country believe that together we can build a livable future for everyone.

Because our work is only possible because of your support, we would love to hear from you. While we rely on our email program for grassroots donations, we want to ensure that you’re receiving the kind of updates and information that you want to see.

We’re working to get at least [500] responses from PA to reach statistical significance, so please take a moment to respond below. [_**Take our survey today!**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/67845837/421050396/-282845914?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjFiMzk2MWFmLWZhMzYtZWUxMS1hM2YxLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=fc9jgiYFB8Cyl9f-NKec4K6vHJj0G8_GxZO7X1eFYuU=&emci=143961af-fa36-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=1b3961af-fa36-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=4823105)

The work we do to elect true climate champions is only possible because thousands of people like you across the country believe that together we can build a livable future for everyone. Because our work is only possible because of your support, we would love to hear from you. While we rely on our email program for grassroots donations, we want to ensure that you’re receiving the kind of updates and information that you want to see. We’re working to get at least [500] responses from PA to reach statistical significance, so please take a moment to respond below. | We can’t ignore the impacts of the climate crisis, and it will take all of us to protect our planet and our communities from the deadly practices of the fossil fuel industry as they continue to exploit our natural resources and put profits over people. That’s why we want to hear from you. | Let’s protect our planet together, Dan Rowe Jane Fonda Climate PAC | | Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee. # KLAYMAN: LEFTIST OBAMA BIDEN HACK DC FEDERAL JUDGES AGAIN VIOLATE TRUMPS CONSTITUTIONAL RIGHTS!
CNN

The special counsel investigation into Donald Trump secured a search warrant of the former president’s Twitter account, [@realDonaldTrump](https://freedomwatchusa.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=72bc9b8de1fa17e6901eb23e7&id=056d132a2b&e=8edd2b8f7d), according to a newly unsealed court filing.
The search was so secret that Twitter was initially barred from telling Trump the search warrant had been obtained for his account, and the company, now known as “X,” was fined $350,000 because it delayed producing the records sought under the search warrant.
The search warrant special counsel Jack Smith obtained sought “data and records related” to Trump’s account, and ultimately, the platform was allowed to share some information about the search warrant with the former president.
The special counsel’s office, which is now working on the criminal case against Trump in DC District Court related to his efforts to overturn the 2020 presidential election, sought the warrant in January 2023.
[Continue reading...](https://freedomwatchusa.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=72bc9b8de1fa17e6901eb23e7&id=f931dcb197&e=8edd2b8f7d)

name: Walter Campbell
subject: Can you make it? Event next Thursday.
body:
My good friends the Troyanowskis are hosting a meet and greet/ fundraiser for me next Thursday.

| Hey Peter Willis, Yesterday, at around 9:20 AM, I officially qualified to appear on the October 14th ballot to become our next Lafayette Parish Assessor. Election Day is rapidly approaching (65 days away), and I am asking for your continued support, your financial backing, and your vote. Next Thursday, my friends Donna and James Troyanowski will be hosting an event at their home in Lafayette from 6:00 PM- 8:00 PM off of Eureka Plantation Road. I would love for you to be able to attend. If you can make it, please RSVP using the link below: [https://www.campbellforassessor.com/troyanowskievent](https://campbell.nationbuilder.com/r?u=I7EQWtSXpLHY99C3gTR1eqeB0V1DE0WSJ6ytEVG3PqOk1e0aLS0Yl2t9Szllf7Zvd7W4sX6oE9H8Aqibma48yg&e=9606837076878e6c91f38e508acac8a7&utm_source=campbell&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=troyanowski_event&n=1) I hope to see you there,
Walter Campbell
Candidate for Lafayette Parish Assessor
337-251-6500
---
-=-=- Campbell for Assessor · LA 70508, United States
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://campbell.nationbuilder.com/unsubscribe?e=9606837076878e6c91f38e508acac8a7&utm_source=campbell&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=troyanowski_event&n=2). -=-=-

clean_body: Is this the beginning? Is this the beginning? | | | Friend, I've been briefed on reports that Atlanta has begun setting up security barricades, shutting down roads surrounding the courthouse, and the Grand Jury is expected to reconvene. All signs indicate that your favorite president - whose only offense is challenging the political ruling class - may be INDICTED yet again as an innocent man. | [SOURCE: WSB-TV Atlanta] The prosecutor leading the witch hunt is so corrupt that even CNN (!!!) has called her out after she "intermixed her political fortunes with this case." Her bias was so terrible that she was REMOVED from one part of this witch hunt because of a "political conflict of interest" of her own creation. Do you think she's going to treat me fairly and put aside her extreme political biases? Not a chance! This is yet another political persecution of the ONLY candidate who can beat Crooked Joe and restore power to YOU, the American people. As I 've always said, they're not after me. They're after YOU. I'm only standing in the way. And even as a possible fourth indictment hangs over my head, I will continue to stand in their way, because the fate of our nation hangs in the balance in the 2024 election. It 's not just my freedom on the line, but yours as well - and I will NEVER let them take it from you. If you 're doing poorly due to the evil and corrupt people in Washington, D.C. who are destroying our country right now, then just hit the back button and go about your day. But if not, I don't have to tell you that the stakes of this election have never been greater. Our Republic is hanging by a thread, and America needs you right now. | Thank you, | Donald J. Trump 45th President of the United States Contributions to Trump Save America JFC are not deductible for federal income tax purposes. name: Callie Barr
subject: “Mom, if you do this, are people going to hate us?”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Callie Barr for Congress
body:
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67846174/421051904/-926527472?refcode=EM_FL_BAR_20230809_fr_courage_cand_sm_full_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDUwMDUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMmM5ZTE1YTAtZmMzNi1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=iOu8JREZXAlrXoutnCX72Be4fku1_nfVhTfosDqHu8A=)
---
Dear Peter, When I was considering running for Congress, we sat the family down at the kitchen table to talk it through. The thing I remember most about that conversation was a question from my nine-year-old daughter, Evie: **"Mom, if you do this, are people going to hate us?"** | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67846175/421051905/-926527472?refcode=EM_FL_BAR_20230809_fr_courage_cand_sm_full_xx_img&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDUwMDUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMmM5ZTE1YTAtZmMzNi1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=iOu8JREZXAlrXoutnCX72Be4fku1_nfVhTfosDqHu8A=)
---
The sad truth is, she had a point.
The response I gave is something that I repeat often now: That when you stand up for what you believe is right, there will always be people who will and won't like you. **Standing up means having the courage to be disliked.**
I’m running for Congress because we need to stand up for our democracy, our middle class, and our kids. And regardless of the emails or comments questioning my motivations or my ability to campaign and be a good mom (yes, that’s happened) – I’m not backing down.
**And I want to thank you for standing with me.** Every time I see someone pitch in $10 or get a kind response to one of our emails, it helps drown out the haters and detractors because I know we’re standing tall together.
[**So here’s the ask: Will you keep being the support system that keeps us going by chipping in $5?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67846176/421051906/-926527472?refcode=EM_FL_BAR_20230809_fr_courage_cand_sm_full_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDUwMDUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMmM5ZTE1YTAtZmMzNi1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=iOu8JREZXAlrXoutnCX72Be4fku1_nfVhTfosDqHu8A=)
(Can't chip in right now? That's ok! Talk to your friends and neighbors; spread the word about what we’re doing and why. Tell them we’re standing up for our way of life here in Northern and Upper Michigan - for our families and ourselves- and we’re not stopping any time soon.)
Together, we are setting an example for the next generation.
Gratefully,
Callie
Callie Barr
Candidate for Congress in Michigan’s First District

https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2308-q3-wn-tester?refcode=230809-email [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2308-q3-wn-tester?refcode=230809-email] http://secure.actblue.com/donate/2308-q3-wn-tester?refcode=230809-email [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/2308-q3-wn-tester?refcode=230809-email] \Hey Peter,
I’m back on the farm this month with Sharla, where we’ll be pulling 16-hour days in the fields now that the peas are ready for harvest.
I love being a farmer. I knew I wanted to take over my family’s farm since I was eight years old. It gets my hands dirty and keeps me grounded. It’s tough—but it reminds me why I fight so hard for Montana’s families.
It also means that since I’ll be working on the farm all month, I have a lot less time to fundraise than our opponents.
And trust me, I hate asking for money. I know how hard you work for every dollar. But the truth is, this race will be the most expensive Senate election in Montana’s history.
Outside groups will pour upwards of $100 million into our state to distort my record and mislead voters. We really do need early money to combat attacks like that. So, here’s the part where I ask:
With farming taking up most of my time this month, we can’t afford to come up short in fundraising. Could you pitch in a split donation between my campaign and Wiley Nickel to help us make up the difference? I’m counting on this grassroots team (that’s you!) in August for the resources we need to fight back >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/2308-q3-wn-tester?refcode=230809-email]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
RUSH IN $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2308-q3-wn-tester?refcode=230809-email&express_lane=true&amount=10] RUSH IN $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2308-q3-wn-tester?refcode=230809-email&express_lane=true&amount=25]
RUSH IN $50 [secure.actblue.com/donate/2308-q3-wn-tester?refcode=230809-email&express_lane=true&amount=50] RUSH IN $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2308-q3-wn-tester?refcode=230809-email&express_lane=true&amount=100]
RUSH IN $250 [secure.actblue.com/donate/2308-q3-wn-tester?refcode=230809-email&express_lane=true&amount=250] RUSH IN ANY AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2308-q3-wn-tester?refcode=230809-email]
Appreciate anything you can give.
-Jon
Paid for by Wiley Nickel for Congress
Wiley Nickel for Congress
PO Box 563
Raleigh, NC 27602
United States

---
| | | My birthday celebration is TODAY and I'd love to see you at my party in Burlingame! Come by to dance, eat and meet new friends. Wednesday, August 9th
5:30 pm Plumbers Union Hall
1519 Rollins Road, Burlingame

[](https://davidcanepa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c7592558e548bc8cc150aa5&id=e2eeb8fa48&e=c0babbc643) Turning another year older is a good reminder of how much I love the job of representing you on the Board of Supervisors, and how much important work we still have to do together:
* Preparing for climate change by making investments to combat wildfires, flooding and sea level rise
* Improving health care, including greater access to mental health services and interventions
* Housing homeless individuals and families and providing intensive wraparound services such as job training

[](https://davidcanepa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c7592558e548bc8cc150aa5&id=dffa848006&e=c0babbc643) I would still very much appreciate anything you can donate – the limit for this race is $2,000 per donor and every dollar helps get our message out! Hope to see you August 9th! Best regards, David Canepa, San Mateo County Supervisor, District 5 P.S. No matter the size of your contribution, donating today is the best birthday present you could give me – I would be so grateful if you could [pitch in](https://davidcanepa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c7592558e548bc8cc150aa5&id=2b620aac7d&e=c0babbc643) today. **Paid for by David Canepa for Supervisor 2024, ID# 1399463**

name: Lateefah Simon
subject: The movement in CA-12
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LATEEFAH FOR CONGRESS
body:
# [](https://act.lateefahsimon.com/go/39?t=1&akid=84%2E1163%2Eq92ar5)
Big news!
I know that my story isn’t possible without the progressive leaders who paved the way for me — and for the movement we’re building right here in California’s 12th.
I’m honored to have those leaders standing with me in this campaign — which is why I am incredibly humbled to have earned the support of the Congressional Progressive Caucus PAC. (And not just their full and enthusiastic support, but THE FIRST endorsement of 2024!)
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ls-em-20230809?amount=10&refcode=em20230809&refcode2=84_1163_q92ar5&akid=84%2E1163%2Eq92ar5)
We’re not the only ones with eyes on our district — folks around the country are watching our race.
As we watch the far-right attempt to roll back progress and block critical legislation, the progressive bloc holds them accountable. We’ll stay in the fight because better IS possible.
I’m proud to share that commitment to realizing a better future for this country with the Congressional Progressive Caucus PAC.
**Here’s what Congressional Progressive Caucus PAC Co-Chairs Reps. Mark Pocan, Pramila Jayapal and Jamie Raskin had to say about my endorsement****:**
“ _With more than a quarter century of work organizing for civil rights and social justice, Lateefah Simon is a proven leader and the best candidate to represent California’s 12th congressional district. Lateefah’s track record speaks for itself – she has affected material change in her community, championing critical progressive priorities like transit justice, economic equality, and women’s rights._ _Lateefah’s life’s work has been to give a voice to the voiceless. She is informed by her lived experience and has proven – through her tireless work on behalf of working folks and families, women, and people of color – that she is the candidate best equipped to represent the diverse communities of CA-12.**Congress needs more voices like Lateefah’s and we could not be more excited to support her campaign.** ”_
---
It’s an honor to receive this type of support for the work that I’ve been doing, but my fight is far from over. I’ve spent my life organizing for civil rights and social justice, and I’m ready to take on the challenge of fighting for you in Congress.
[**If you’re ready to join our fight for the future of California’s 12th, please add a donation now to support my campaign. I can only do this with your support.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ls-em-20230809?amount=10&refcode=em20230809&refcode2=84_1163_q92ar5&akid=84%2E1163%2Eq92ar5)
**[Donate $10 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ls-em-20230809?amount=10&refcode=em20230809&refcode2=84_1163_q92ar5&akid=84%2E1163%2Eq92ar5)**
I am honored to have you on my team,
Lateefah Simon
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ls-em-wrapper?refcode=em20230809&t=2&refcode2=84_1163_q92ar5&akid=84%2E1163%2Eq92ar5)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.lateefahsimon.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=84%2E1163%2Eq92ar5)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.lateefahsimon.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.lateefahsimon.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=84%2E1163%2Eq92ar5)

To give by check:
Lateefah for Congress
1714 Franklin St #100 - 438,
Oakland, CA, 94612
Email us: [info@lateefahsimon.com](mailto:info@lateefahsimon.com)
PAID FOR BY LATEEFAH FOR CONGRESS

name: GallegoForArizona.com
subject: Lake Watch 👀 👀
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
An article came out yesterday about how Kari Lake is hiring staff and preparing to announce her Senate campaign.
#

Peter -
We send a good amount of fundraising emails, and we don’t expect you to give to every one that hits your inbox. But we do hope you’ll give to this one.
Please let us explain why:
**FIRST:** In May, Kari Lake met with Steve Daines — the head of the Senate GOP's campaign arm — for TWO hours. Presumably to discuss her campaign for Senate in Arizona.
**THEN:** An article came out YESTERDAY about how Kari Lake is hiring staff and preparing to announce her Senate campaign. We have to be ready for that, because she’s going to rake in tons of cash from the MAGA crowd when she does announce.
**NOW:** We’re approaching the halfway point of August and this quarter has not been off to the kind of start we need.
If everyone reading this email contributed just $10, we’d reach our goals today and have the resources we need to beat Kari Lake and stop her for good.
But not everyone does give. Which is why we need people who understand the stakes of this race; who understand how important this Senate race is; who understand how important grassroots donations are to our campaign — to chip in.
Can you?
[**Please use this link to contribute $5, $10 or whatever you can afford to Ruben Gallego’s campaign for Senate today. It all adds up when we’re all chipping in and your support will get us back on track.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-aug23.NWxa9e&refcode=em230809-2-f&t=1&akid=903%2E734936%2ECB02v9)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._

name: Carl DeMaio
subject: Gavin Newsom to replace Joe Biden
disclaimer_text: paid for by Reform California
body:
| | | | I want you to be the first to know what we’re hearing out here about the Democrats plan for 2024. I hope you can help in this fight!
---
Derek \- Even though you do not live in California, I want you to be the first to know what we’re hearing out here about the Democrats plan for 2024.

California Governor Gavin Newsom is being positioned as the consensus back-up candidate by national Democratic Party power barons who want to dump an ailing and increasingly unpopular and scandal-plagued Joe Biden.

Newsom is already running a shadow campaign – and recently arranged a national debate one-on-one with Ron DeSantis.

As someone leading the fight for freedom behind enemy lines here in California, let me warn you how bad this will be. There are many reasons Americans should be very, _**very**_ worried about Newsom becoming President. Unfortunately, Newsom has benefitted from California’s liberal media who refuse to hold him accountable for his failings and corruption.

I think it is best we get ready for the reality of Newsom being the Democrat’s nominee. That's why Reform California has launched a project to investigate and catalogue all of Newsom’s failings – and present them to the entire nation as a warning of what would happen to our country if Newsom’s failed policies ever were implemented nationally.

**Can you help us execute this project by chipping in a contribution today?
**
[_**CONTRIBUTE SECURELY: Expose the Failings and Corruption of Gavin Newsom Before 2024

clean_body: | | | | I want you to be the first to know what we’re hearing out here about the Democrats plan for 2024. I hope you can help in this fight! Derek \- Even though you do not live in California, I want you to be the first to know what we’re hearing out here about the Democrats plan for 2024. California Governor Gavin Newsom is being positioned as the consensus back-up candidate by national Democratic Party power barons who want to dump an ailing and increasingly unpopular and scandal-plagued Joe Biden. Newsom is already running a shadow campaign – and recently arranged a national debate one-on-one with Ron DeSantis. As someone leading the fight for freedom behind enemy lines here in California, let me warn you how bad this will be. There are many reasons Americans should be very, very worried about Newsom becoming President. Unfortunately, Newsom has benefitted from California’s liberal media who refuse to hold him accountable for his failings and corruption. I think it is best we get ready for the reality of Newsom being the Democrat’s nominee. That's why Reform California has launched a project to investigate and catalogue all of Newsom’s failings – and present them to the entire nation as a warning of what would happen to our country if Newsom’s failed policies ever were implemented nationally. Can you help us execute this project by chipping in a contribution today? No one knows Gavin Newsom’s failings and corruption better than we do – and it is vital that the entire nation learn how bad he is before it is too late! I hope you can help us “freedom fighters behind enemy lines” in California execute this project - Best, Carl DeMaio Chairman Reform California PS: Last cycle Reform California helped win victories in all 6 of our “defense” House seats – and even flipped a 7th seat from Blue to Red! With a House Majority hanging by just 5 seats, you can thank a California Republican for staying here and fighting to secure the House Majority and provide a check on the Democrats’ dangerous agenda nationally! We don’t want to let happen to America what has happened to California! Carl DeMaio PO Box 27227, San Diego, CA 92198 - Ad paid for by Reform California. Advertisement was not authorized by a candidate or a committee controlled by a candidate.

**Team, far-right Republicans continue to attack the LGBTQ+ community:**

_First,_ legislators across the country pushed extreme anti-trans bills...

_Then,_ the Supreme Court struck down anti-discrimination protections...

_Now,_ Republicans in Congress have set their sights on targeting trans youth.

[I’m running for Congress to push back against these awful Republican attacks – and I need everyone on my side, from allies to members of our community, to get there. **Friend, it’s despicable that Republicans are targeting trans youth.** Young LGBTQ+ people face enough hardship without the GOP picking on them.

The truth is, Republicans in Congress are no better than middle school bullies.

But the fact is, they have real power to cause real harm to people across the country – _and not nearly enough people are willing to stand up to them._

[That’s why I’m stepping up and fighting back, friend. Representation is important – now more than ever – especially as the GOP attacks on my community ramp up. subject: I'm Going Everywhere
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BECKY EDWARDS FOR CONGRESS
body:
“I’m Becky Edwards and I’m running for Congress.” That’s the introduction I’ve shared with thousands of voters throughout CD2. | | | | |
---
|
---
Team Becky,
“I’m Becky Edwards and I’m running for Congress.”
That’s the introduction I’ve shared with thousands of voters throughout CD2. From St. George to Stansbury Park, my family and team have loaded up our cars and gone and met incredible people.
I’ve heard people loud and clear: they’re sick of political cliches and want to hear real solutions to tough problems. They are sick of cable news soundbites and partisan bickering. And you know what? So am I.
I know that you probably get a lot of fundraising emails. But, we are so close to this election and I really need your help with a donation.

| [DONATE](https://beckyforutah.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9cc818aa94e94ffd36a8547b3&id=3e1423b77b&e=6484bb6dd5)
---
Any donation you give will go directly towards helping me travel throughout our great district and share my message.
You’ve trusted me with your support, I’m asking for it once again. My family and I are truly so grateful for you.
Becky
|
---

body:
Most Americans, including responsible gun owners, agree that we need change, and we need it now [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67846828/421054700/693975070?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMTM0MTMxZS0wMDM3LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HndLMy9VrcSaNzVDQ6MaAY5iy_tdBgoanppwOzaJfME=&emci=6391f7ae-e836-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=f134131e-0037-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=15820338)
---
Peter,

In 2023 alone, there have been more than 430 mass shootings, with more than 11,000 Americans losing their lives due to an act of gun violence. From Monterey Park, California, and Allen, Texas, to Louisville, Kentucky, and Nashville, Tennessee – all of these deadly shootings were carried out by a person using an assault weapon.

**What's happening is unacceptable.**

Assault weapons are consistently the weapon of choice in mass shootings. The solution to ending this tragic and uniquely American epidemic starts with banning these weapons of war – and two-thirds of Americans agree.

That's why Kim and her Democratic colleagues were proud to pass an assault weapons ban last year in the House. While this legislation would have been a step forward in ending gun violence, the bill was held up by Republicans in the Senate.

Kim is continuing to fight to get these weapons of war off our streets, but she wants to know what you think. **[Do you support a federal assault weapons ban, Peter? Take our one-question poll today>> ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67846830/421054705/-983886787?ms=em23_230809_gunpt_e1srv_gq_act___SH_ettx&refcode=em23_230809_gunpt_e1srv_gq_act___SH_ettx&source=em23_230809_gunpt_e1srv_gq_act___SH_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230809_gunpt_e1srv_gq_act___SH_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=4fbde9yD4xcvA1sTXS57O1eaXi2C6zw+14ZEP8w/zGff3Be93OZQKElqcpUYAh+k4tZIIfJeZxN/lyGHi3vi0/49j6Pcs/yD838adYT8zWwSpRoVnW8dm5mDsQ6TZ67Hau4m/IrA3G9apBn7DBnXIFUHr4k2ZIPfm/I9XmWMsDg=&refcode2=f134131e-0037-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMTM0MTMxZS0wMDM3LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HndLMy9VrcSaNzVDQ6MaAY5iy_tdBgoanppwOzaJfME=&emci=6391f7ae-e836-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=f134131e-0037-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=15820338)** | [YES!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67846832/421054708/-983886787?ms=em23_230809_gunpt_e1srv_gq_act___SH_ettx&refcode=em23_230809_gunpt_e1srv_gq_act___SH_ettx&source=em23_230809_gunpt_e1srv_gq_act___SH_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230809_gunpt_e1srv_gq_act___SH_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=4fbde9yD4xcvA1sTXS57O1eaXi2C6zw+14ZEP8w/zGff3Be93OZQKElqcpUYAh+k4tZIIfJeZxN/lyGHi3vi0/49j6Pcs/yD838adYT8zWwSpRoVnW8dm5mDsQ6TZ67Hau4m/IrA3G9apBn7DBnXIFUHr4k2ZIPfm/I9XmWMsDg=&refcode2=f134131e-0037-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMTM0MTMxZS0wMDM3LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HndLMy9VrcSaNzVDQ6MaAY5iy_tdBgoanppwOzaJfME=&emci=6391f7ae-e836-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=f134131e-0037-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=15820338)

clean_body: Most Americans, including responsible gun owners, agree that we need change, and we need it now Peter, In 2023 alone, there have been more than 430 mass shootings, with more than 11,000 Americans losing their lives due to an act of gun violence. From Monterey Park, California, and Allen, Texas, to Louisville, Kentucky, and Nashville, Tennessee – all of these deadly shootings were carried out by a person using an assault weapon. What's happening is unacceptable. Assault weapons are consistently the weapon of choice in mass shootings. The solution to ending this tragic and uniquely American epidemic starts with banning these weapons of war – and two-thirds of Americans agree. That's why Kim and her Democratic colleagues were proud to pass an assault weapons ban last year in the House. While this legislation would have been a step forward in ending gun violence, the bill was held up by Republicans in the Senate. Kim is continuing to fight to get these weapons of war off our streets, but she wants to know what you think. | | Thanks, Schrier HQ Rep. Kim Schrier is a doctor, scientist, and mom, fighting for Washington's 8th District in Congress. This is one of the most competitive districts in the country, so we need your help to keep Kim in Congress. Chip in now to help protect Kim's seat in 2024. = Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress Contributions or gifts to Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress are not tax deductible. Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress PO Box 2728 Issaquah, WA 98027 United States

Peter,
Oregon is a state of so much natural beauty and such wonderful people – I’m so honored to represent its 5th District.

But my heart is breaking for our citizens, because every time they leave their houses, this is what they see:

We have a homelessness problem, we have a drug problem, and we have a crime problem – and you, Peter, deserve better than that.

Just think, 14,000 Oregonians are homeless on any given night.

Our police budget has been slashed by $26 MILLION.

Homicides are up 800%.

This is not good enough for the people of Oregon, and it’s high time our leaders address these issues head-on.

That’s what I ran for Congress to do, and that’s what I’m fighting every day to do, but if I’m going to be reelected next fall, I need your help.

clean_body: | | | | Oregon is so naturally beautiful – how have we gotten to this point? Peter, Oregon is a state of so much natural beauty and such wonderful people – I’m so honored to represent its 5th District. But my heart is breaking for our citizens, because every time they leave their houses, this is what they see: We have a homelessness problem, we have a drug problem, and we have a crime problem – and you, Peter, deserve better than that. Just think, 14,000 Oregonians are homeless on any given night. Our police budget has been slashed by $26 MILLION. Homicides are up 800%. This is not good enough for the people of Oregon, and it’s high time our leaders address these issues head-on. That’s what I ran for Congress to do, and that’s what I’m fighting every day to do, but if I’m going to be reelected next fall, I need your help. I know that with you on my team, we can make Oregon a better home for all of us. Thank you, Lori Chavez-DeRemer Congresswoman OR-05 | | | | | | | | | Even as a Congresswoman, Lori’s most important title is mom. That’s how she knows the issues your family faces, and that’s why she fights everyday to make life better for every Oregon family, and every American. Aside from that, all you need to know are the issues she’s fighting for in Congress: If that sounds like the kind of agenda you can get behind, If you’d prefer to give by check, please use the below address: Lori Chavez-DeRemer for Congress 13203 SE 172nd Ave Suite 166 #399 Happy Valley, OR 97086 Forward This message to FIVE FRIENDS AND FAMILY to spread the word on how to achieve a better future for Oregon and America → ** Also text “LORI” to 71800 or click here to receive all of Lori’s messages | | | | Lori Chavez-DeRemer 13203 SE 172nd Ave, Suite 166 #399, Happy Valley, OR 97086 \-

Do you think she's going to treat me fairly and put aside her extreme political biases? _Not a chance! _
This is yet another political persecution of the ONLY candidate who can beat Crooked Joe and restore power to YOU, the American people.

clean_body: Is this the beginning? Is this the beginning? | | | Friend, I've been briefed on reports that Atlanta has begun setting up security barricades, shutting down roads surrounding the courthouse, and the Grand Jury is expected to reconvene. All signs indicate that your favorite president - whose only offense is challenging the political ruling class - may be INDICTED yet again as an innocent man. | [SOURCE: WSB-TV Atlanta] The prosecutor leading the witch hunt is so corrupt that even CNN (!!!) has called her out after she "intermixed her political fortunes with this case." Her bias was so terrible that she was REMOVED from one part of this witch hunt because of a "political conflict of interest" of her own creation. Do you think she's going to treat me fairly and put aside her extreme political biases? Not a chance! This is yet another political persecution of the ONLY candidate who can beat Crooked Joe and restore power to YOU, the American people. As I 've always said, they're not after me. They're after YOU. I'm only standing in the way. And even as a possible fourth indictment hangs over my head, I will continue to stand in their way, because the fate of our nation hangs in the balance in the 2024 election. It 's not just my freedom on the line, but yours as well - and I will NEVER let them take it from you. If you 're doing poorly due to the evil and corrupt people in Washington, D.C. who are destroying our country right now, then just hit the back button and go about your day. But if not, I don't have to tell you that the stakes of this election have never been greater. Our Republic is hanging by a thread, and America needs you right now. | Thank you, | Donald J. Fellow Conservative,

I’ve got a great life in Montana; four beautiful kids and a wife whom I adore. On June 27th, I launched my campaign to be the next United States Senator for Montana, and I’ve got to tell you that the most common question that I’ve received since my announcement has been, _**“why are you doing this?”**_

**Here is what I tell them:** it’s all about service; I’ve always tried to put myself in positions where I can have the greatest impact. Sometimes, the greatest impact is defending our freedoms oversees; sometimes it’s piloting an aerial fire-fighting aircraft. I love my country - I’ve fought and bled for Old Glory. **I would put my life on the line defending the United States of America.**
**
When your country calls and needs you, you answer. Right now, our nation is facing some very serious challenges and we need serious people in Washington to get our nation back on track.

It’s been a busy couple of weeks for us here in Montana, as I’m sure it has been for you as well. That’s why I took the liberty of putting together a few of the headlines news outlets around the country ran when I announced my campaign. **

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=2760de4f809c4b9ca191da675191b64e&_e=D0fEh1wY3q_Jlqwcv4wYzX-SXAqv8dOetQuq_wHe7FffnCRVsQH3xVvmLH-nWLemNdKNFENHiH89WEIXftXba86gE5IOkoLLzjh6IjyVBIXY6LfytBwQenQ1m3fskZk7uNXbA9yTjSdQOtv4mx4pQQorBSlM2Npf_9tVLgpYKy-VKeZa8nSHxyWmV0_UraA7wujKGT-63hKl7NMWWlvja8R3zOxd726TUq45a0wE4pAhNthG4gfF7yIRvNkyRcKpV0jAVxTjygqMf0O4XtYFKy-xp-eR1165CV-xKQoRhbmEKhPrT2MfmBnix9MKwGUfUGClgYImAOaOCfs5VfSmbucXmVsmMebgztSkDPQkJNwb6f4NlvM_dMhdvKhVT1sLya_YaTb5ktgPsHifdA25qXuHAWuiKq1WDm2CunF9p9A%3D)

CHIP IN TODAY
**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=2760de4f809c4b9ca191da675191b64e&_e=D0fEh1wY3q_Jlqwcv4wYzX-SXAqv8dOetQuq_wHe7FffnCRVsQH3xVvmLH-nWLemNdKNFENHiH89WEIXftXba86gE5IOkoLLzjh6IjyVBIXY6LfytBwQenQ1m3fskZk7uNXbA9yTjSdQOtv4mx4pQQorBSlM2Npf_9tVLgpYKy-VKeZa8nSHxyWmV0_UraA7wujKGT-63hKl7NMWWlvja8R3zOxd726TUq45a0wE4pAhNthG4gfF7yIRvNkyRcKpVmKBjPhrWCOlj_-8wkiy_zjAT79MWciZ-7eC5Ywps9zuTVpYVPxpH7naZCpJhxRQP1p7MAPAed9s5JgQMenKRyQ74XyTJomBMFcGiTGZ_wu8Pluc1zW-iD6nnTImeGuSDnoF9UkBOBR4MxrWFZo3W062yO6sms-m0LjyzRbi5rg%3D)
I’m not sending you this to toot my own horn; I’m sending you this today because I need you to understand how important this race is going to be. My Democrat opponent has been in Washington since he was first elected back in 2006, meaning he is going to have a well-funded campaign. **[If you’re able to chip in a few dollars](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=2760de4f809c4b9ca191da675191b64e&_e=D0fEh1wY3q_Jlqwcv4wYzX-SXAqv8dOetQuq_wHe7FffnCRVsQH3xVvmLH-nWLemNdKNFENHiH89WEIXftXba86gE5IOkoLLzjh6IjyVBIXY6LfytBwQenQ1m3fskZk7uNXbA9yTjSdQOtv4mx4pQQorBSlM2Npf_9tVLgpYKy-VKeZa8nSHxyWmV0_UraA7wujKGT-63hKl7NMWWlvja8R3zOxd726TUq45a0wE4pAhNthG4gfF7yIRvNkyRcKpCCM2sj8bkOC_H8X6bNz_Lm7Av3p0eHDT28Ee2EsT6SUwzVpAQ_rxbTWzAfHYi5Vm8uzb1nSuoB52vTWvF9Ori-ZXmboTGZ2zgSFwlXNErqTk_Zzu2xRXyoWNabMKBSBaRkelG8w_Yyc1ccBOsTbm3I2IK0mZS2NuqsbGqtGmx00%3D)** before closing out of this window today, you’d be doing me a huge favor as me and my team work to get this campaign off the ground.

I want to create a brighter future for my kids and your children and grandchildren. Our campaign is about service, God, and country, not politics as usual.

Hooyah,

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=2760de4f809c4b9ca191da675191b64e&_e=D0fEh1wY3q_Jlqwcv4wYzX-SXAqv8dOetQuq_wHe7FffnCRVsQH3xVvmLH-nWLemNdKNFENHiH89WEIXftXba86gE5IOkoLLzjh6IjyVBIXY6LfytBwQenQ1m3fskZk7uNXbA9yTjSdQOtv4mx4pQQorBSlM2Npf_9tVLgpYKy-VKeZa8nSHxyWmV0_UraA7wujKGT-63hKl7NMWWlvja8R3zOxd726TUq45a0wE4pAhNthG4gfF7yIRvNkyRcKpxmRfGPJ-VE_8BuDRzyHkkZIfkSqZm2FG2qxOj2XRhfxKSifMpgr8N9D5HdYtxSrtNwwV8cjbZzLBR05OFKMGJXoN6M2jwaNXP0ZL1c45Ehbj-ltJNRDdEOTBCh9dV0vGo2BdvfB7-JwCxfV4tgaxiVq8fmmqI4S150AkH4aIuMk%3D)

"
"I SERVED AS A NAVY SEAL, BUILT ONE OF THE LARGEST AERIAL FIREFIGHTING COMPANIES IN AMERICA CREATING OVER 200 MONTANA JOBS, AND STARTED A VETERAN-LED CATTLE RANCHING AND FEEDING OPERATION. WHETHER IT WAS IN WAR OR BUSINESS, I SEE PROBLEMS AND SOLVE THEM. AMERICA NEEDS CONSERVATIVE LEADERS WHO LOVE OUR COUNTRY. I'M RUNNING FOR THE U.S. SENATE BECAUSE OUR CAMPAIGN IS ABOUT SERVICE, DUTY, AND COUNTRY -- NOT POLITICS AS USUAL."

clean_body: I took the liberty of putting together a few of the headlines news outlets around the country ran when I announced my campaign | | Fellow Conservative, I’ve got a great life in Montana; four beautiful kids and a wife whom I adore. On June 27th, I launched my campaign to be the next United States Senator for Montana, and I’ve got to tell you that the most common question that I’ve received since my announcement has been, “why are you doing this?” Here is what I tell them: it’s all about service; I’ve always tried to put myself in positions where I can have the greatest impact. Sometimes, the greatest impact is defending our freedoms oversees; sometimes it’s piloting an aerial fire-fighting aircraft. I love my country - I’ve fought and bled for Old Glory. I would put my life on the line defending the United States of America. When your country calls and needs you, you answer. Right now, our nation is facing some very serious challenges and we need serious people in Washington to get our nation back on track. It’s been a busy couple of weeks for us here in Montana, as I’m sure it has been for you as well. That’s why I took the liberty of putting together a few of the headlines news outlets around the country ran when I announced my campaign. I’m not sending you this to toot my own horn; I’m sending you this today because I need you to understand how important this race is going to be. My Democrat opponent has been in Washington since he was first elected back in 2006, meaning he is going to have a well-funded campaign. before closing out of this window today, you’d be doing me a huge favor as me and my team work to get this campaign off the ground. I want to create a brighter future for my kids and your children and grandchildren. Our campaign is about service, God, and country, not politics as usual. Hooyah, Tim Sheehy Former Navy SEAL Republican for U.S. Senate | " "I SERVED AS A NAVY SEAL, BUILT ONE OF THE LARGEST AERIAL FIREFIGHTING COMPANIES IN AMERICA CREATING OVER 200 MONTANA JOBS, AND STARTED A VETERAN-LED CATTLE RANCHING AND FEEDING OPERATION. WHETHER IT WAS IN WAR OR BUSINESS, I SEE PROBLEMS AND SOLVE THEM. AMERICA NEEDS CONSERVATIVE LEADERS WHO LOVE OUR COUNTRY. I'M RUNNING FOR THE U.S. SENATE BECAUSE OUR CAMPAIGN IS ABOUT SERVICE, DUTY, AND COUNTRY -- NOT POLITICS AS USUAL." | PAID FOR BY TIM SHEEHY FOR MONTANA Tim Sheehy is a former Navy SEAL. name: Sherrod Brown
subject: Massive victory in Ohio
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gillibrand for Senate
body:
[https://als-totem.s3.amazonaws.com/core/spacer.gif] This is incredible news, friends! Ohioans came out strong in yesterday’s special election to STOP an anti-democratic amendment and clear special interest power grab – which would’ve made it harder for us to enshrine reproductive rights in our state constitution this November. [https://als-totem.s3.amazonaws.com/core/spacer.gif]
Seeing Ohio voters turn out to the polls and decisively reject the GOP's proposal has me feeling more hopeful than ever about our ability to protect women’s health care.
This massive victory also makes clear that momentum is on our side heading into 2024 when I’ll be on the ballot. But we can’t take our foot off the gas. So today, as we celebrate, I'm personally asking you to help me keep up our momentum: Will you split $5 or more between myself and Kirsten Gillibrand to defend Ohio's Democratic seat and our pro-choice Senate majority? [https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/gfs_sherrodbrown?amounts=5,25,50,100,250]
In solidarity,
Sherrod
[https://als-totem.s3.amazonaws.com/core/spacer.gif] This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [https://als-totem.s3.amazonaws.com/core/spacer.gif]

name: Jon Tester
subject: I love being a farmer.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fight for Progress PAC and not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee
body:
With farming taking up most of my time this month, we can’t afford to come up short in fundraising.

| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/67847256/421056217/404438934?refcode=BLU-FFP-20230809-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc3NDA2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjU3NjBlNjYzLTAxMzctZWUxMS1hM2YxLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=jx3zYSNL9NYgC21NNf9qb2zZYjNV9AS7y4M2jt1aGhY=)
---

Hey Peter,

I’m back on the farm this month with Sharla, where we’ll be pulling 16-hour days in the fields now that the peas are ready for harvest.

**I love being a farmer.** I knew I wanted to take over my family’s farm since I was eight years old. It gets my hands dirty and keeps me grounded. It’s tough—but it reminds me why I fight so hard for Montana’s families.

It also means that since I’ll be working on the farm all month,**I have a lot less time to fundraise than our opponents.**

And trust me, I hate asking for money. I know how hard you work for every dollar. But the truth is, this race will be the most expensive Senate election in Montana’s history.

**Outside groups will pour upwards of $100 million into our state to distort my record and mislead voters. We really do need early money to combat attacks like that. So, here’s the part where I ask:**

[_**With farming taking up most of my time this month, we can’t afford to come up short in fundraising. Could you pitch in a split donation between my campaign and Fight for Progress to help us make up the difference? I’m counting on this grassroots team (that’s you!) in August for the resources we need to fight back >>**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/67847257/421056218/665036970?refcode=BLU-FFP-20230809-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc3NDA2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjU3NjBlNjYzLTAxMzctZWUxMS1hM2YxLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=jx3zYSNL9NYgC21NNf9qb2zZYjNV9AS7y4M2jt1aGhY=)

clean_body: With farming taking up most of my time this month, we can’t afford to come up short in fundraising. | = Hey Peter, I’m back on the farm this month with Sharla, where we’ll be pulling 16-hour days in the fields now that the peas are ready for harvest. I love being a farmer. I knew I wanted to take over my family’s farm since I was eight years old. It gets my hands dirty and keeps me grounded. It’s tough—but it reminds me why I fight so hard for Montana’s families. It also means that since I’ll be working on the farm all month,I have a lot less time to fundraise than our opponents. And trust me, I hate asking for money. I know how hard you work for every dollar. But the truth is, this race will be the most expensive Senate election in Montana’s history. Outside groups will pour upwards of $100 million into our state to distort my record and mislead voters. We really do need early money to combat attacks like that. name: Eric Sorensen
subject: NEW: Endorsed by League of Conservation Voters!
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67847311/421056475/2043242937?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MzM2MzVlZi0wMTM3LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tnFdlixU7YFIOnx7EXT5F6EWTHc8jbnFNEDKysiLFF8=)
Good news, Peter.

**I was recently endorsed by the League of Conservation Voters (LCV) Action Fund, which works to elect pro-environment candidates across the country.**

LCV is one of the most important environmental groups in the nation, and I’m proud to be a part of their first round of endorsements for the 2024 cycle. Their work is about building grassroots support for candidates and policies protecting the planet. They also help hold members of Congress who vote _against_ pro-environment measures accountable by keeping a National Environmental Scorecard.****

This is critical work, especially with the impacts of climate change clearer than ever – including in IL-17. I’m eager to continue fighting alongside LCV for commonsense policies that protect the planet we call home. After all, as a former meteorologist, I’m acutely aware of the challenges we face.

**[But I’m always interested to hear from my supporters: what environmental issues are on your mind? clean_body: | = Good news, Peter. I was recently endorsed by the League of Conservation Voters (LCV) Action Fund, which works to elect pro-environment candidates across the country. LCV is one of the most important environmental groups in the nation, and I’m proud to be a part of their first round of endorsements for the 2024 cycle. Their work is about building grassroots support for candidates and policies protecting the planet. They also help hold members of Congress who vote against pro-environment measures accountable by keeping a National Environmental Scorecard.** This is critical work, especially with the impacts of climate change clearer than ever – including in IL-17. I’m eager to continue fighting alongside LCV for commonsense policies that protect the planet we call home. After all, as a former meteorologist, I’m acutely aware of the challenges we face. ** | Thanks for making your voice heard, Peter. Eric = | Eric Sorensen is a meteorologist born and raised in Rockford, IL representing IL-17 in Congress. He’s seen firsthand the importance of establishing trust with the community, and he’s determined to use his expertise as a climate communicator to fight for Illinoisans on environmental justice and more in Washington. We are very excited to bring our town hall series to New Hampshire!
[We plan on holding town halls in cities and towns all across America but we can only do it with the support of people like you. Chris Christie is a proven leader who fearlessly tells it like it is. As a successful governor in a blue state with a track record of real accomplishments, Christie has consistently confronted challenging issues head-on, making difficult decisions without hesitation. To ensure a conservative Republican victory in the 2024 presidential election, we deserve an open, honest debate that focuses on critical issues. Governor Christie's voice at the debates will ensure our party engages in the robust, direct, truth-telling conversation we need to start winning again. Join us in supporting Chris Christie's candidacy for president and ensuring his direct, no-nonsense agenda at the RNC-sponsored presidential debates. Your participation is vital in making this happen. Sign up today to "Tell It Like It Is" and help our party and country select a president we can all be proud of. Together, we can shape a brighter future for America.

name: Sherrod Brown (via. Shontel Brown for Congress)
subject: This is incredible news, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Shontel Brown for Congress
body:
Ohioans came out strong in this week’s special election
This is incredible news, Peter! Ohioans came out strong in yesterday’s special election to STOP an anti-democratic amendment and clear special interest power grab – which would’ve made it harder for us to enshrine reproductive rights in our state constitution this November.

Seeing Ohio voters turn out to the polls and decisively reject the GOP's proposal has me feeling more hopeful than ever about our ability to protect women’s health care.

This massive victory also makes clear that momentum is on our side heading into 2024 when I’ll be on the ballot. But we can’t take our foot off the gas. **So today, as we celebrate, I'm personally asking you to help me keep up our momentum:** [**_Will you split $5 or more between myself and Shontel Brown to defend Ohio's Democratic seats and our pro-choice Senate majority?_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67847406/421056856/1120164213?refcode=EM_FR_230809SherrodSplit_Sherrod_Openers_3_NG_N&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NmI3NTczNi0wMjM3LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Y9gsMUcpUvk_oYteDMUyhOIkCefqIJhfHA2yH04gJT0=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Shontel Brown and Sherrod Brown will go through immediately:_ | | **[$1 »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67847407/421056857/1120164213?refcode=EM_FR_230809SherrodSplit_Sherrod_Openers_3_NG_N&express_lane=true&amount=1&refcode2=EL1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NmI3NTczNi0wMjM3LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Y9gsMUcpUvk_oYteDMUyhOIkCefqIJhfHA2yH04gJT0=)**

name: Special Election Alert (via DLCC.org)
subject: re: New Hampshire, New York, and Pennsylvania
body:
In the final weeks before must-win races, donations play a critical role in fueling our on-the-ground work to reach every voter. Can we count on you to help power state Dems to victory? | | |
---

body:
As our campaign momentum continues to build, we’d like to share with you some significant developments, including the release of “Midnight at the Border,” a 19-minute documentary film on RFK, Jr.’s visit to the Arizona-California border with Mexico.

| | | [ ](https://www.kennedy24.com/r?u=PWsynw72KdR9Cp_NDTL7PZ5fdohdTNs6F5il0eeNY98&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=august_9th_newsletter_non_dono&n=1)

Dear Peter, As **our campaign momentum continues to build** , we’d like to share with you some significant developments, including the release of [**“Midnight at the Border,”**](https://www.kennedy24.com/running-on-truth-episode-2?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=august_9th_newsletter_non_dono&n=2) a 19-minute documentary film on RFK, Jr.’s visit to the Arizona-California border with Mexico.

**Thanks for supporting this campaign.** Every like, share, and conversation you have online or in person helps put RFK, Jr. one step closer to the White House.

**We can't do this without you!**

Thanks,
Team Kennedy
---

# [**Watch RFK, Jr.'s Video on His Economic Policy**](https://www.kennedy24.com/r?u=GQ96LxW7tJscudkL8mlwNzVEKXk7dMDJzwJlfbbiiRaWXACdszO670x-s3BOFmNL&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=august_9th_newsletter_non_dono&n=3)

The average income in our country is $5,000 less than the basic cost of living. I'm going to change that. Over the course of the next few weeks, I'll be releasing an economic plan that focuses on ending the corrupt merger of state and corporate power to make sure Americans can once again afford their most essential expenses — housing, food, childcare, commuting to work + healthcare we need to survive.
---
* * *

# **[Kennedy Announces Border Policy](https://www.kennedy24.com/running-on-truth-episode-2?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=august_9th_newsletter_non_dono&n=5)**
---
[ ](https://www.kennedy24.com/running-on-truth-episode-2?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=august_9th_newsletter_non_dono&n=6)
---
“After visiting the border, I’ve come to understand that the open border policy is just a way of funding a multi-billion dollar drug and human trafficking operation for the Mexican drug cartels. **When I am President, I will secure the border which will end the cartel’s drug trafficking economy and I will build wide doors for those who wish to enter legally so that the U.S. can continue to be a beacon to the world where diversity and culture make us great.”** — Robert F. Kennedy, Jr.
---
* * *
---
# [**Kennedy Sues Google for Censoring Political Speech**](https://www.kennedy24.com/kennedy_sues_google_censoring_political_speech_youtube?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=august_9th_newsletter_non_dono&n=7)

[ ](https://www.kennedy24.com/kennedy_sues_google_censoring_political_speech_youtube?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=august_9th_newsletter_non_dono&n=8)
---
**“The government cannot censor its critics.** It cannot do so directly and it cannot do so by empowering private entities like Google to act as the censor. **That principle is fundamental to American democracy, especially when it involves political speech.”** — Scott Street, attorney who is leading the litigation

Accompanied by an enthusiastic crowd of Granite State voters, Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. opened his Manchester, New Hampshire headquarters Sunday at 34 Hanover St. If you live in New Hampshire, or know someone who does, please make sure they know the office is open to supporters and volunteers.

# [**RFK, Jr. on the Future of Food and Agriculture**](https://www.kennedy24.com/sustainable-food-roundtable?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=august_9th_newsletter_non_dono&n=11)

---
Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. is going to make agricultural policy a top priority to turn the nation's farms around. How will he do that? He started by learning from some of America's most innovative farmers. Listen to this game-changing discussion with nine farmers working to transform the U.S. food and farming system.

We need to decouple the health regulatory agencies from these financial entanglements that they have with the pharmaceutical industry.” RFK, Jr.

name: Bob Lorinser
subject: America's New Labor Movement
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE FRIENDS OF DR
body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP12/1/92793/images/TOP.png]
Friend
I'm Bob Lorinser, running for Congress in Michigan's First District, and a fierce advocate for unions and labor reform.
America's first labor movement took us from despair to progress, but the myth of trickle-down economics set us backward. Now, we need to translate progress into true equity and fight for everyday hardworking rural Americans.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/about-bob [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/about-bob]
There is no such thing as an unskilled worker.
As a product of the rural working class, I know all labor has value . From factories to classrooms, ERs to farms, workers are the engines of our economy.
CONTRIBUTE TO LABOR REFORM [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/about-bob]
Investing in people yields profit. Cutting social programs neglects our economy's greatest asset: people.
I'm committed to empowering and growing the middle class.
The CEO-to-worker pay ratio is now 399-to-1. Trickle-down economics doesn't work, has never worked, and will never work. With your help getting to Congress [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/about-bob] , I'll work tirelessly to invest in everyday hardworking people and fight for labor reform.
Workers are people first, and then, they remain the main driving force that moves the economy forward.
Workers are happier and better at what they do when society meets workers' needs — unions, family-sustaining wages, healthcare, education, housing, and childcare .
Trickle-down economics was designed to benefit the ultra-wealthy, not everyday hardworking Americans.
Tonight, I'm asking for your support. Help me bring real change to rural America. Your generous donation will enable me to reach more voters and spread our message. Together, we can reignite the American dream and build a brighter future. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/about-bob]
Friend, thank you for your support, loyalty, and generosity.
Don't hesitate to contact me personally at bob@votedrbob.com [bob@votedrbob.com] if you have any questions about my campaign or platform.
I appreciate your consideration.
Bob
Bob Lorinser
Candidate for US Congress
Northern Michigan and the Upper Peninsula
Democrat, MI01

## Why Chris Christie:

Chris Christie is a proven leader who fearlessly tells it like it is. As a successful governor in a blue state with a track record of real accomplishments, Christie has consistently confronted challenging issues head-on, making difficult decisions without hesitation. To ensure a conservative Republican victory in the 2024 presidential election, we deserve an open, honest debate that focuses on critical issues. Governor Christie's voice at the debates will ensure our party engages in the robust, direct, truth-telling conversation we need to start winning again. Join us in supporting Chris Christie's candidacy for president and ensuring his direct, no-nonsense agenda at the RNC-sponsored presidential debates. Your participation is vital in making this happen. Sign up today to "Tell It Like It Is" and help our party and country select a president we can all be proud of. Together, we can shape a brighter future for America.

name: Sherrod Brown
subject: Ohioans stood up for what is right
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Upset The Setup PAC
body:
| Hi Peter – yesterday, Ohioans voted to stop an anti-democratic constitutional amendment aimed at making it harder for us to enshrine reproductive rights in our state's constitution. In doing so, they rejected special interests and made sure democracy remained where it belongs – in the hands of the voters, not the rich and powerful.

That’s why I’m in this fight, Peter, to give a voice to workers and families. I grew up in Mansfield, Ohio, in a community of ironworkers, carpenters, autoworkers, and electricians. I spent summers working on my family's farm. Today, I live in Cleveland with my wife, Connie, and our two rescue dogs, Franklin and Walter.

**I’ll be honest with you, Peter:** Over the years, in Ohio, we've seen manufacturing jobs shipped overseas because of bad trade deals, prices skyrocketing as wages failed to keep up, and hopes for a comfortable retirement dashed. That's why I've devoted my life to fighting for the Dignity of Work – the idea that hard work should pay off for everyone, no matter who you are, where you live, or what kind of work you do.

**Every day in the Senate, I’m fighting for _you._ But I’m facing my toughest race yet, and I need your help to win. [Will you chip in $10 or more now – split between my campaign and Upset the Setup – so I can keep up the fight in Ohio and defend the Senate for Democrats?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/67847467/421057145/1084654965?amount=10&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,250&refcode=UTS_20230809_EMSPL_E2_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5NDc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImViOTBlNWU4LTAyMzctZWUxMS1hM2YxLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=ruX1Gb_S9eohisSE3mAnR4DrZsdb36VMDrkAdNlGUC4=)** | ****[CHIP IN $10 »](https://click.everyaction.com/k/67847468/421057146/1084654965?amount=10&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,250&refcode=UTS_20230809_EMSPL_E2_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5NDc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImViOTBlNWU4LTAyMzctZWUxMS1hM2YxLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=ruX1Gb_S9eohisSE3mAnR4DrZsdb36VMDrkAdNlGUC4=)****

Right now, Mitch McConnell and the GOP need to flip only two seats to retake Senate control – and experts at _Politico_ say it could all come down to Ohio. Last year’s Senate race here was one of the most costly in the nation, and _NBC News_ reports this one could be “even nastier and more expensive.”

**That's why I simply cannot win this race – and Democrats simply cannot hold on to our narrow Senate majority – without grassroots support from folks like you. As one of the most vulnerable senators in the country, I'm personally asking:**

[**Will you please split $10 between my campaign and Upset the Setup to help us hit our midnight fundraising goal, power our reelection campaign to victory, and keep the Senate blue?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/67847469/421057147/1084654965?amount=10&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,250&refcode=UTS_20230809_EMSPL_E2_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5NDc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImViOTBlNWU4LTAyMzctZWUxMS1hM2YxLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=ruX1Gb_S9eohisSE3mAnR4DrZsdb36VMDrkAdNlGUC4=)
