name: James Carville
subject: Ignoring this race is as smart as a lead parachute
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC
body:
As someone who’s spent nearly half a century electing Democrats and winning tough elections across the country, let me tell ya:
# [](https://go.bobcasey.com/go/181?t=1&akid=429%2E552475%2EmlMjpj)
I’ll get right to it, Peter:
**I think overlooking Pennsylvania in our battle to hold Democrats’ Senate majority is about as smart as a lead parachute.** Let me say more...
Listen, if you think Pennsylvania is a safe blue state, I envy ya! Personally, I sure can’t forget that Donald Trump won the Commonwealth on Election Night in 2016.
Now it’s true that we’ve had some big victories since then. But look closer under the hood, and you’ll see challenges like:
* Down-ballot Dems losing winnable races
* Razor-thin margins in rural counties
* A fight to turnout voters in hubs like Philadelphia

As someone who’s spent nearly half a century electing Democrats and winning tough elections across the country, including in the Keystone State, let me assure you: _Pennsylvania is as competitive a battleground as it ever was._
[**I’m urgently asking folks today: Will you chip in $5 or more to Bob Casey? We CANNOT take Pennsylvania’s Senate seat for granted!**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20230809-1?amount=5&refcode=em20230809-1&refcode2=429_552475_mlMjpj&akid=429%2E552475%2EmlMjpj)
**[Donate Now ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20230809-1?refcode=em20230809-1&refcode2=429_552475_mlMjpj&akid=429%2E552475%2EmlMjpj)**
Seriously — I’m worried folks don’t realize just how bad we need to gin up major grassroots resources to fight back tooth and nail in Pennsylvania.
Not only is this one of the most competitive races of 2024, Mitch McConnell and national Republicans are recruiting a mega-millionaire hedge fund guy who can start spending HUGE sums of his own money the minute he jumps into the race.
(And don’t forget the GOP super PACs who will have this guy’s back and fund plenty of nasty attack ads against Bob...)
The fact is, Peter, if we don’t rally around Bob Casey early in this race, we’re toast. And truthfully I think we need to see a LOT more grassroots donations than we have to date.
[**So I’ll ask one more time: Will you ensure we don’t take Pennsylvania for granted and chip in $5 or any amount to defend Bob Casey and our blue Senate majority?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20230809-1?amount=5&refcode=em20230809-1&refcode2=429_552475_mlMjpj&akid=429%2E552475%2EmlMjpj)
**[Donate Now ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20230809-1?refcode=em20230809-1&refcode2=429_552475_mlMjpj&akid=429%2E552475%2EmlMjpj)**
Thanks for hearing me out,
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20230809-1?refcode=em20230809-1&refcode2=429_552475_mlMjpj&akid=429%2E552475%2EmlMjpj)
James Carville

* * *

* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://go.bobcasey.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=2&akid=429%2E552475%2EmlMjpj)

* [Unsubscribe](https://go.bobcasey.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=429%2E552475%2EmlMjpj)

Bob Casey for Senate

Philadelphia, PA 19102

name: David Hogg
subject: Time to fix the system
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Democrats Win Seats PAC
body:
| Hey Peter, it’s David Hogg, gun safety advocate and co-founder of March For Our Lives.

Many of our elected officials can be described as one word: **_Cowards._**

Our kids, our planet, our freedoms, our democracy — are all under attack by far-right extremists, from the State House to the U.S. Senate, who are willing to let children be slaughtered at school and watch our planet burn for their own personal gain.

**We refuse to back down.**

There were many who said after Parkland that we couldn’t change anything because we were just a “bunch of kids.” But we proved them wrong — **we passed gun laws in a state owned by the NRA.**

There were many who said young people would never vote. But we proved them wrong in 2018 — _defeating more NRA backed politicians than ever before in U.S. history._ Then, in 2020, we defeated NRA puppet Donald Trump. **Both of these victories enabled us to pass the first federal gun law in 30 years.**

There were many who said Maxwell Frost, March For Our Lives' first National Organizing Director, could never be the first Gen Z Member of Congress. **But we proved them wrong, again.**

Badass young people have a habit of being underestimated — and I have a habit of scaring the shit out of Republicans by proving that, while we might be young, we are _powerful._

**That is why today, myself and Kevin Lata, Maxwell Frost’s Campaign Manager and 2022 Campaign Manager of the Year, are launching Leaders We Deserve** — a grassroots organization dedicated to electing young leaders to Congress, and especially our State Legislatures, across the country to help defeat the far-right’s agenda and advance a progressive vision for the future. Leaders We Deserve will work in partnership with a stacked Advisory Board, including Maxwell Frost, Justin Jones, and other influential leaders.

**_[Are you in? Split a donation between Leaders We Deserve and Democrats Win Seats so we can win back our country and advance a progressive agenda.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67847715/421058116/-1896636305?amount=25&refcode=EM_NBI_DWSPAC_20230809_FR_1.1_0_12MO_hogg_NA_NA_hoggsplit&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzkvMS84ODcwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNjFmMjQ0Zi0wNDM3LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BYT4k-HZLbx5pZXl-3tWHC2gVDSyTjlWgkBjfcyzMdI=)_** | | **[Donate>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67847717/421058118/-1896636305?amount=25&refcode=EM_NBI_DWSPAC_20230809_FR_1.1_0_12MO_hogg_NA_NA_hoggsplit&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzkvMS84ODcwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNjFmMjQ0Zi0wNDM3LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BYT4k-HZLbx5pZXl-3tWHC2gVDSyTjlWgkBjfcyzMdI=)**
---
Why is this important?

**Despite making up 45% of the electorate, Gen Z and Millennials only hold 21% of State Legislature seats.**

Conversely, Republicans have made significant investments in down-ballot races, leading to the absolute assault on our rights and freedoms that we’re seeing happen across states — from abortion bans to taking away LGBTQ+ rights to repealing life-saving common sense gun laws put into place after the Parkland shooting.

Our political system is stacked against us, but incredible young leaders have fought back and beat the odds to get elected to office. It’s time to take more young people from movements like March For Our Lives and elect them to office to be the leaders we deserve. **But grassroots support is what moves the needle, and it’s what we need from you today.**

**_[Join us by splitting a donation of any amount between Leaders We Deserve and Democrats Win Seats today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67847719/421058120/-1896636305?amount=25&refcode=EM_NBI_DWSPAC_20230809_FR_1.1_0_12MO_hogg_NA_NA_hoggsplit&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzkvMS84ODcwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNjFmMjQ0Zi0wNDM3LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BYT4k-HZLbx5pZXl-3tWHC2gVDSyTjlWgkBjfcyzMdI=)_**

So how are we going to fight back against the 50-year chess game conservative special interest groups have been manipulating?

**Leaders We Deserve will invest in young people, knock down barriers, and elect more young people to office. We’re doing this by:**
1. **Recruitment:** Identifying candidates who will have the biggest impact on their states (that's where the real work is happening).
2. **Providing Day-to-Day Support:** We’re helping campaigns build from the ground up and will work with them directly on fundraising, messaging, coalition building, voter contact, and volunteer recruitment.
3. **Volunteer Network:** Our grassroots volunteer army (that’s you, team) will have person-to-person conversations with voters all across a candidate’s district, advocating on their behalf.
4. **Running Paid Media Campaigns:** We’ll run well-funded independent expenditure programs.

But there’s a reason our political system favors those who are older, wealthier, and white — _running for office takes serious resources._

Which is one of the reasons I’m reaching out today. Young candidates aren’t seen as viable and often struggle to raise money. They have lower personal wealth and smaller donor networks.

**_[So I’m asking: Will you join our movement by splitting a donation between Leaders We Deserve and Democrats Win Seats today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67847721/421058122/-1896636305?amount=25&refcode=EM_NBI_DWSPAC_20230809_FR_1.1_0_12MO_hogg_NA_NA_hoggsplit&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzkvMS84ODcwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNjFmMjQ0Zi0wNDM3LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BYT4k-HZLbx5pZXl-3tWHC2gVDSyTjlWgkBjfcyzMdI=)_**
| **[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67847723/421058124/-1896636305?amount=25&refcode=EM_NBI_DWSPAC_20230809_FR_1.1_0_12MO_hogg_NA_NA_hoggsplit&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzkvMS84ODcwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNjFmMjQ0Zi0wNDM3LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BYT4k-HZLbx5pZXl-3tWHC2gVDSyTjlWgkBjfcyzMdI=)**
---
There’s so much more I could say, but I’ll end with this — **we absolutely cannot do this work without you.**

**_[Please, consider joining us so we can defeat the far-right extremists who have taken over our communities and our nation — and elect the leaders we deserve.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67847725/421058126/-1896636305?amount=25&refcode=EM_NBI_DWSPAC_20230809_FR_1.1_0_12MO_hogg_NA_NA_hoggsplit&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzkvMS84ODcwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNjFmMjQ0Zi0wNDM3LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BYT4k-HZLbx5pZXl-3tWHC2gVDSyTjlWgkBjfcyzMdI=)_**

Thank you.

More soon,

David Hogg
Co-founder

clean_body: | Hey Peter, it’s David Hogg, gun safety advocate and co-founder of March For Our Lives. Many of our elected officials can be described as one word: Cowards. Our kids, our planet, our freedoms, our democracy — are all under attack by far-right extremists, from the State House to the U.S. Senate, who are willing to let children be slaughtered at school and watch our planet burn for their own personal gain. We refuse to back down. There were many who said after Parkland that we couldn’t change anything because we were just a “bunch of kids.” But we proved them wrong — we passed gun laws in a state owned by the NRA. There were many who said young people would never vote. But we proved them wrong in 2018 — defeating more NRA backed politicians than ever before in U.S. history. Then, in 2020, we defeated NRA puppet Donald Trump. Both of these victories enabled us to pass the first federal gun law in 30 years. There were many who said Maxwell Frost, March For Our Lives' first National Organizing Director, could never be the first Gen Z Member of Congress. But we proved them wrong, again. Badass young people have a habit of being underestimated — and I have a habit of scaring the shit out of Republicans by proving that, while we might be young, we are powerful. That is why today, myself and Kevin Lata, Maxwell Frost’s Campaign Manager and 2022 Campaign Manager of the Year, are launching Leaders We Deserve — a grassroots organization dedicated to electing young leaders to Congress, and especially our State Legislatures, across the country to help defeat the far-right’s agenda and advance a progressive vision for the future. Leaders We Deserve will work in partnership with a stacked Advisory Board, including Maxwell Frost, Justin Jones, and other influential leaders. = | | = Why is this important? Despite making up 45% of the electorate, Gen Z and Millennials only hold 21% of State Legislature seats. Conversely, Republicans have made significant investments in down-ballot races, leading to the absolute assault on our rights and freedoms that we’re seeing happen across states — from abortion bans to taking away LGBTQ+ rights to repealing life-saving common sense gun laws put into place after the Parkland shooting. subject: 🎯Hunting & archery programs have been targeted
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Elizabeth for Nevada]( "Paid for by Elizabeth for Nevada")
body:
by the Biden Admin. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/9bed182efe6a/elizabeth-helgelien-for-congress-12619190?e=54a81bd33c)
---
| | [ ](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ab8092551f57aee37054250c5&id=d7d0463b63&e=54a81bd33c)
---
| Peter,
---
| | Nevada Counties were up in arms over the passage of AB 355, which would have prohibited Nevadans under the age of 21 from possessing firearms, _including hunting rifles_.

But **THANKFULLY** Governor Lombardo vetoed the bill in defense of our 2nd Amendment rights!

**Joe Biden doesn’t feel the same – SHOCKER, right?** Hunting education groups have shared that new regulatory guidance is cutting federal funding for school hunting and archery classes!

Last year _**we had 618 student archers from across Nevada**_ participate in a state tournament facilitated by the National Archery in the Schools Program (NASP).
---
| [ ](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ab8092551f57aee37054250c5&id=c16a1dddee&e=54a81bd33c)
---
| By withholding funding from these programs, the Biden administration is effectively preventing our children from learning valuable life skills and firearm safety, traditions that have been passed down for generations.

It's truly astonishing that while our nation faces so many challenges, President Biden finds it necessary to wage an assault on our deeply-rooted societal traditions.

**It’s even MORE disgusting that the Biden Admin has directed taxpayer dollars on promoting the transgender agenda while these impactful programs are being targeted!**

**As your Congresswoman, I will work tirelessly to reverse the damage caused by the Biden Admin and ensure that our American traditions and Constitutional rights are upheld!**

[**Peter, your support is crucial in sending me to Congress to fight for our Constitutional freedoms and national traditions for today, tomorrow and generations to come!**](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ab8092551f57aee37054250c5&id=82ec2483e5&e=54a81bd33c)

TO: President Biden
FROM: A grateful Democrat
Subject: Thank you. **Dear President Biden,**

**_I’m so thankful for everything you’ve done as President!_**

Over the last two and a half years, you’ve fought TIRELESSLY for the American people — defending abortion rights, confirming an incredible Supreme Court Justice, saving Social Security from GOP cuts, and creating millions of jobs.

**I know standing up to MAGA Republican attacks isn’t easy, especially now that Donald Trump is running for President again.**

So as your reelection race kicks into high gear, I wanted to show my support and thank you for being such an amazing leader for our country! [**I hope you know that there are MILLIONS of us across the nation who stand with you. That’s why I’m signing this letter and chipping in $3 to Voter Protection Project to thank you and to keep electing incredible Democrats up and down the ballot »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/51174?t=9&akid=9772%2E878179%2E64Rfu2) | [Donate $3 to sign now »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/51174?t=10&akid=9772%2E878179%2E64Rfu2)

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67847783/421058391/-1105104057?refcode=BLU-SWC-20230809-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODczMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NDc1YzAzOS0wNTM3LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FrJ15BBFJKmo7KhjO7Q5hFlS6cteq08w2iuYZpe0NXs=)

| **_BREAKING NEWS FROM USA TODAY:_
Donald Trump threatens House Republicans to impeach Biden or risk losing their jobs** Peter,

Donald Trump was just indicted for the third time on charges related to the January 6th insurrection and his attempts to overturn the 2020 election.

Even amidst all of this, he is pressuring House Republicans to impeach President Biden!

These silly impeachment claims have no basis or legitimacy. I won’t stand for this in the House.

Did you see this in Newsday?

A recent Moody’s report has found that “Long Island ranks fourth among major American population centers for exposure to the physical and economic risks of climate change.”

Yet we’ve seen no progress on combating climate change. Passing climate-conscious legislation to protect Long Island and updating our infrastructure to improve our roads, bridges and tunnels to withstand extreme climate events will help us tremendously in the race against time. In Congress, I will fight to protect Long Island.

[_**Will you contribute $10 today to support our campaign and join our fight to save our communities?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67847996/421059314/-182071910?refcode=BLU-LGC-20230809-1-EM&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NzIwMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZTc5MzFjZS0wNzM3LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YhIq_YMvGnB3yl2vaGN69wntjblj46eLagrxEkrR3pQ=)

clean_body: It is up to all of us to protect our planet for our children and future generations. | = Did you see this in Newsday? A recent Moody’s report has found that “Long Island ranks fourth among major American population centers for exposure to the physical and economic risks of climate change.” Yet we’ve seen no progress on combating climate change. Passing climate-conscious legislation to protect Long Island and updating our infrastructure to improve our roads, bridges and tunnels to withstand extreme climate events will help us tremendously in the race against time. In Congress, I will fight to protect Long Island. = | = It is up to all of us to protect our planet for our children and future generations. = | = Thank you, Laura Gillen * | | = Paid for and authorized by Gillen for NY. clean_body: Democrats in trouble | = Hey Peter, Mark here. I know summer is a busy time for family time, vacations, and relaxation. But summer – and August specifically – is a notoriously difficult time for fundraising for political campaigns. = | = I don’t need to remind you: MAGA Republicans are already waging war on our country and our values. And they’re not going to stop. They’ll do anything to spread their lies and hatred throughout the country. In fact, Republicans in Congress are attempting to undo everything we accomplished in Washington: = = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = Thank you so much. It’s because of you that we’ve come so far. But we can’t slow down our efforts now or all of our progressive priorities go down the drain! In gratitude, Mark Takano | | Paid for by Mark Takano For Congress P.O. Box 5214, Riverside, CA 92517 www.marktakano.com Mark Takano represents the good people of California's Inland Empire in Congress, fighting for the region's progressive priorities. He's been a voice for veterans, seniors, students, local businesses and hardworking families. But now, Republicans have captured a slim House Majority. The leadership of progressive Democrats like Mark will be critical to holding Republicans accountable and ensuring the healing of our country during this challenging time. | | **A Note from CAPT Hung Cao USN (RET)** I came to America with little besides the clothes on my back. But with faith, dedication, and hard work, my family and I made it in America. I’m running for Senate to defend the American Dream that gave me everything. The Left is on a war path against the values that make us the greatest country on Earth. I didn’t put my life on the line defending those values in the Navy to let the Left destroy them. It’s time to take back our country, but I can’t do it without your help. I need you to help us keep the momentum going through election day. Join Team Cao today [here](http://links.hungcaoforva.com/u/click?_t=c514f30bd6cd4b1bb0e09a0456675c53&_m=bae981db5bee4305925be71654e90e97&_e=mgGxWJWBb9MQbHNsc23axboiFfSlX8nYhO2eLpmzkex02KVFhQsUmt_h0UWnOduKiloCLNH6nt6fQd-dZ7ITXYhgPsQxrt8nKYax7GTYZZ-s65R476Kq7m0O4pPVKRpMe0G6sSlkl5LdrxQkSg2O9cEAUDzS597LcOaNT6-G_dOJfuGvUPb3plnOn83t-JO6K2pOTmqa9JTRpjX763Oh9wHpwETpQe-H1rCvKMrFPVvYzyqKfigSdrl5SohVxeYduUQjyLAqxg0rM8QZkPF5xaHSoGawgrSbXiP4lU576pfQvNoH0RpQvx_-14OZ7P4h)! \- CAPT Hung Cao USN (RET)

clean_body: | | | | | August 9, 2023 | WEEKLY NEWSLETTER | Issue 3 | | A Note from CAPT Hung Cao USN (RET) I came to America with little besides the clothes on my back. But with faith, dedication, and hard work, my family and I made it in America. I’m running for Senate to defend the American Dream that gave me everything. The Left is on a war path against the values that make us the greatest country on Earth. I didn’t put my life on the line defending those values in the Navy to let the Left destroy them. It’s time to take back our country, but I can’t do it without your help. I need you to help us keep the momentum going through election day. Join Team Cao today ! \- CAPT Hung Cao USN (RET) | In Case You Missed It Hung kicked off the week with an eventful day at the NASCAR Cup Series in Richmond meeting with voters and cheering on Chris Buescher for his first win of the season. Later in the week, Hung joined the Ruthless Podcast to talk about the lessons he learned from his Congressional race and why Virginia is winnable in 2024. He also shared stories from his days diving in the Navy and told the listeners what he has to do to get his message out to as many voters as possible ahead of election day. Be sure to check it out! | | | Store If you haven't picked up your Hung Cao gear yet, check out our online store! | Social Media to Share Here are a few of our top posts from social media this week. ---
| | FROM THE DESK OF ALAN DERSHOWITZ
---
| | Dear Sun Reader,
---
| | In over sixty years in the legal profession, I’ve experienced first hand the impact of both good journalism and bad journalism — mostly the latter — and just how important and rare it is to get things right.

In today’s media landscape there are far too many publications that get things wrong. Many are more concerned with the political implications of a story than the basic facts.

The New York Sun is different. It’s a paper that places principle over politics and people over party.

Its in-depth coverage of the legal challenges faced by President Trump serve as a case in point.

When I defended President Trump during his first impeachment, I faced an avalanche of criticism, but few papers made sufficient effort to fully appreciate the significance of the legal arguments.

The Sun’s deeply knowledgeable leadership, including its editor Seth Lipsky and associate editor A.R. Hoffman are themselves students of the Constitution. It shows in their coverage, which I find to be first rate.

It will be no secret to you that I don’t agree with everything that can be found in the Sun’s pages, but I can say with confidence that its re-emergence is among the most important recent developments in American journalism.

I’ve been impressed by the Sun’s growth so far, but I know it faces an uphill battle, one that I have pledged to join.

The Sun’s success will be a gift to the American people and to the cause of truth. But to succeed, we need you to join us. I highly encourage you to join the Sun today.

Every person matters in this effort.

Don’t wait. The battle to restore American journalism starts now.
---
| | [ Join the Sun Now → ](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=a57d5aa5fb7c48358653620c76c0d93d&_e=HKsE4o5n8-Mxhm6azn86D_3vtS_kmUnq6FjjIjA4x0U4HsjyZmWy0-J83N9tdTPI3KrNBHw5qQpHn_ccOPmIGSh0TNwG4NxJjtF76eKDyYrOwpA_vf4VpkKQ-J1iQvU94cAvtXoWGSRqIJ0gyk_2GCLzTX70uyW6LVjLaWcAJFMTj2EvPby63K0cu3aMxHLklCD1px9UjJCk-42ZDvORYwC11Z0GdKNhFt-gDUwlFfLAAr4cpuuAJciqg7lQILzM0PL_Ume-XAEfopv5FHt9IIgEXCEB7yOCI7tVq04r4Pre7qg9mvNYd8bdD15S1xQx)
---
| | |
---
Alan Dershowitz

The New York Sun

Fellow Conservative,

It’s Sheriff Mark Lamb with an invitation to set a reminder in your phone for August 6th, 2024. It’s an important date not just for me personally, but also for the people of Arizona because next year on August 6th, Arizona voters will nominate one Democrat and one Republican to faceoff in our state’s upcoming Senate election.

I'm going to cut straight to the point: **[I am in sincere need of your help.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=0f1d506f51b745c59b8b8831eefcefd3&_e=Q7id7kiogs8ataqfF6tZwpxQHvQ6AMGg4Eo-O_s9K6_Z8EXEZm3S4CY8UTpogUIYYay1vdEBHzCItk68nKellQV2v7Tp95kdjEte9c-LwqX1a3Vv1mxE_aGaK8bw-kSXKH6X6walodVecm-Kn5dc-3T5sYaeSPIAwH62AC1vd9JAig-bBCofDCSDtw9-yDHOhu8EFwqyhP1bovXl8B4gaz-fjLFC-LsXJidKINxnhXjtjHZlflozp9rS1uHq_5O4wYlknIV-rx_4eCkA2bLXnAALGDLJD5bBgYZkcieMKjoJeddPql_mgoeDAIqaVnbx6VagF4dCdEVtcmH_TlwMJ6GC4sDHm1DkGFbK8SWlnX0hBHVCnmNkLmnfeuym4NTsW3wuf97MKO0hK7zxcGVgrg%3D%3D)** Polls have shown that Republicans CAN win back this Senate seat from Democrats, but only if we have the necessary resources to compete. **Meet Sheriff Lamb:** GOD. FAMILY. FREEDOM.

Sheriff Mark Lamb is a husband, father, grandfather, and God-fearing patriot. From Hawaii to Manila, Arizona, Mark Lamb's rich experirences inspired his life of service. As the 24th Sheriff of Pinal County, Arizona, he drives a powerful agenda to ensure community safety and prosperity.

Sheriff Lamb trained with the Maricopa County Sheriff's Office Deputy Academy and was named Valedictorian of his class. He was hired by the Salt River Pima-Maricopa Indian Community, where he excelled as a police officer and was named Rookie of the Year. The following year, he received the Officer of the Year award. He was later promoted as a Detective to the Gang Enforcement Unit and in his first year was named Detective of the Year.

name: Nikki Haley
subject: This is personal
body:
I'm the proud daughter of Indian immigrants who came to America legally over 50 years ago to live in a country that was strong and proud and full of opportunities. My dad was an educator. My mom started a clothing store out of our living room.

| |
---
| | |

Fellow Conservative,

Hey it's Nikki Haley. I wanted to take a minute to share something personal with you - **[why I'm running for President.](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=e4b4eb4cb3654d108322bf3de092078b&_e=HFBxnwnj5l9j-XqJMptz-WAmzUvHQsCaemiFblJMDLedZuhaZOz4Gz3IDPpq8YZPc4chsXxgOHANNx8NzoMvGjqyXclhQg3j2YitjP3kwFHg14-weKqenryHxZU9qEXg1a65zFiQoz_qa5KWZoSsIVuN5-BU5n43obun0GpZImZkZJ3c7ONqbT4fz_3wokNOO4IVjhYogL2QChNIPqKX7Kum6L8AVgS-FGU8xTETKRIL6ZU6K8nfayMoLFypNmnNEAMlBa-Zqe3H6HU3Pd92Dktv8wlUGBOelmngbiOGEtWroMlrl9aO_70Kbi2HXjuk0et6VlDLNE1aR1mq7VTGLVaG8Uq2b9EZI8YVnCHCyqR61-lifEQ0ZeyGxZA6pRQF "why I’m running for President.")**

I'm the proud daughter of Indian immigrants who came to America legally over 50 years ago to live in a country that was strong and proud and full of opportunities. My dad was an educator. My mom started a clothing store out of our living room.

---
| [](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=e4b4eb4cb3654d108322bf3de092078b&_e=HFBxnwnj5l9j-XqJMptz-WAmzUvHQsCaemiFblJMDLedZuhaZOz4Gz3IDPpq8YZPc4chsXxgOHANNx8NzoMvGjqyXclhQg3j2YitjP3kwFHg14-weKqenryHxZU9qEXg1a65zFiQoz_qa5KWZoSsIVuN5-BU5n43obun0GpZImZkZJ3c7ONqbT4fz_3wokNOO4IVjhYogL2QChNIPqKX7Kum6L8AVgS-FGU8xTETKRIKskH23BTQmoN0j2wk1jUd6aNwF6t-OhCU7tftw2dTb57ciPKTZSJ-QUOOVeUQzfRBazAt1EEU47_Qa2fWwGpfKiEs4pDlSVUyhfCgAFN-dK-26esBiNFkRyRRkvsD7pp1qwweQngKTsjTrab-mnu0)
---

At the age of 13, I started doing the books at my mom's store. When my mom moved the store from our living room to a storefront, I'll never forget the American flag she had painted on a ceiling in her store to remind us about the freedom America has to offer.

_**As a young girl I learned two lessons that I 'll carry with me forever:**_ the importance of a strong work ethic, and to never take the freedom that America has to offer for granted.

---
| [](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=e4b4eb4cb3654d108322bf3de092078b&_e=HFBxnwnj5l9j-XqJMptz-WAmzUvHQsCaemiFblJMDLedZuhaZOz4Gz3IDPpq8YZPc4chsXxgOHANNx8NzoMvGjqyXclhQg3j2YitjP3kwFHg14-weKqenryHxZU9qEXg1a65zFiQoz_qa5KWZoSsIVuN5-BU5n43obun0GpZImZkZJ3c7ONqbT4fz_3wokNOO4IVjhYogL2QChNIPqKX7Kum6L8AVgS-FGU8xTETKRLNXRhs7XzqM-fJWdQMznRumFpdBduJVMf-BUXWm-9t-bVnqPCYZn1sPz1_Uzbi-O5ovGV70zJNdvJ9VufinK8Zub7WWdhDYPLDOEALNuQHhcNYagIShb8cjeI5PQQjcTMpGZVsjWQNrqvzrEk2vct-)
---

I graduated from Clemson with an accounting degree. Then, I worked in a corporate job before going back to work at my mom's small business. That's where I saw firsthand how hard it is to make a dollar and how easy it is for the government to take it away.

I was frustrated, but my parents always told me, _**" Don't complain. Do something about it." **_

**So I did. I ran for the State House.** No one thought I had a chance, but I never gave up. I won the district not just once, but two more times before deciding to run for governor.

---
| [](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=e4b4eb4cb3654d108322bf3de092078b&_e=HFBxnwnj5l9j-XqJMptz-WAmzUvHQsCaemiFblJMDLedZuhaZOz4Gz3IDPpq8YZPc4chsXxgOHANNx8NzoMvGjqyXclhQg3j2YitjP3kwFHg14-weKqenryHxZU9qEXg1a65zFiQoz_qa5KWZoSsIVuN5-BU5n43obun0GpZImZkZJ3c7ONqbT4fz_3wokNOO4IVjhYogL2QChNIPqKX7Kum6L8AVgS-FGU8xTETKRIWVKfMYLcVUY17VkGM6hGxBjif2IDVB-9laL_g08f0iNCNbRpNozHvwWNdmcT_ZMfICEZdCJUjEuQNSIOm94QIH70Kkj9nP22i2NSJLiUfzqClhL-BsYfhbGgZ47PZhKBli_nt8E6xlDlHUEtHTHLJ)
---

**I became governor when I was 38.** Michael and I had two young kids. Being governor was one of the most rewarding jobs I've ever had. But it wasn't easy. I had to balance the demands of the job, lead our state through historic floods and horrific tragedies, all while we raised our two young children. On top of the basic demands that come with the titles of governor and mom, I'm a proud military wife. While I was governor, my husband, Michael, was deployed to a combat zone for a year. It was the first time the spouse of a sitting governor was deployed to a combat zone.

---
| [](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=e4b4eb4cb3654d108322bf3de092078b&_e=HFBxnwnj5l9j-XqJMptz-WAmzUvHQsCaemiFblJMDLedZuhaZOz4Gz3IDPpq8YZPc4chsXxgOHANNx8NzoMvGjqyXclhQg3j2YitjP3kwFHg14-weKqenryHxZU9qEXg1a65zFiQoz_qa5KWZoSsIVuN5-BU5n43obun0GpZImZkZJ3c7ONqbT4fz_3wokNOO4IVjhYogL2QChNIPqKX7Kum6L8AVgS-FGU8xTETKRK4I-FHZhz6LleRjE39SjguSqigTMJraBWSJWNWA1rOGJ3Rg5uEcMXPyhsbIiPyADAHrjU0OeE7-qvIwurPnvmYQkZwjKeFAVGriS-I8HNx5g3uIqeeoC-q5wxdl6j3aNhajXPTU9x28JpYEhi2knJz)
---

After I served as governor, I served as U.S. ambassador to the United Nations. I stood up for America on the world stage, fought for our allies, and held accountable those who didn't support us. I proudly took "kick me" sign off America's back and restored respect for America by the international community.

---
| [](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=e4b4eb4cb3654d108322bf3de092078b&_e=HFBxnwnj5l9j-XqJMptz-WAmzUvHQsCaemiFblJMDLedZuhaZOz4Gz3IDPpq8YZPc4chsXxgOHANNx8NzoMvGjqyXclhQg3j2YitjP3kwFHg14-weKqenryHxZU9qEXg1a65zFiQoz_qa5KWZoSsIVuN5-BU5n43obun0GpZImZkZJ3c7ONqbT4fz_3wokNOO4IVjhYogL2QChNIPqKX7Kum6L8AVgS-FGU8xTETKRIKPODtvEEghnHom5anmKJG_Xl19MM2q2u-IaD7N4DrfgGcdHaMnoVN11EQRHaqV-EpTKP3eUe13wGacSsU6nMSfPK_-3U1d6f-pabIT_OYlwfLcTUU_Do-EGx7Hl4NDW-TPt9_s0fJQmNlI1nyZQLG)
---

**This brings me to my main point: why I 'm running for president. **
I've watched the American Dream unfold before me. I've seen that even on our worst days, we are blessed to live in America. But I also know that under Biden's leadership, times are tough and America can be doing so much better.

**[I'm running for President because America can do better, and I know how.](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=e4b4eb4cb3654d108322bf3de092078b&_e=HFBxnwnj5l9j-XqJMptz-WAmzUvHQsCaemiFblJMDLedZuhaZOz4Gz3IDPpq8YZPc4chsXxgOHANNx8NzoMvGjqyXclhQg3j2YitjP3kwFHg14-weKqenryHxZU9qEXg1a65zFiQoz_qa5KWZoSsIVuN5-BU5n43obun0GpZImZkZJ3c7ONqbT4fz_3wokNOO4IVjhYogL2QChNIPqKX7Kum6L8AVgS-FGU8xTETKRLkWsGzCwKUx2XFsRsGfoFsus2MzeofIRDDQQg8E-CAcYjHspdSetRBjJCwAEub8rdwcJ5TCZBcudKF0J5qabIjgTbX_bPgJs_5ZlyuqlZTY49c6qTDS5J4WIASb9dlA9GQghU3FwlipSWStxlHwK4s "I’m running for President because America can do better, and I know how. ")**

---
| [](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=e4b4eb4cb3654d108322bf3de092078b&_e=HFBxnwnj5l9j-XqJMptz-WAmzUvHQsCaemiFblJMDLedZuhaZOz4Gz3IDPpq8YZPc4chsXxgOHANNx8NzoMvGjqyXclhQg3j2YitjP3kwFHg14-weKqenryHxZU9qEXg1a65zFiQoz_qa5KWZoSsIVuN5-BU5n43obun0GpZImZkZJ3c7ONqbT4fz_3wokNOO4IVjhYogL2QChNIPqKX7Kum6L8AVgS-FGU8xTETKRJlcOYsV9QZ0LQAt_AQSUwnGZTkunKjxz8dfmWL_RqwL3y2yNJvlWGHBJO26edLHVsvEl8GaTvQiK9zIqyljopyc5n1AnvYZ40c8U09aPvfcTqu-GP9De5ZehMfRj5myYxl2tUm9sU__D_zBTG_6z6Y)
---

**As governor, I was dubbed a "jobs governor"** because I slashed our unemployment rate, brought jobs back to our state, and shepherded in a successful economic recovery.

**At the UN I fought for America,** made sure our allies knew we had their backs, stood up for Israel even when others refused, and stood up to murderers and dictators to let them know that America was taking names.

I know how to make America strong and proud because I've done it before. **[And I'll do it as your next President.](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=e4b4eb4cb3654d108322bf3de092078b&_e=HFBxnwnj5l9j-XqJMptz-WAmzUvHQsCaemiFblJMDLedZuhaZOz4Gz3IDPpq8YZPc4chsXxgOHANNx8NzoMvGjqyXclhQg3j2YitjP3kwFHg14-weKqenryHxZU9qEXg1a65zFiQoz_qa5KWZoSsIVuN5-BU5n43obun0GpZImZkZJ3c7ONqbT4fz_3wokNOO4IVjhYogL2QChNIPqKX7Kum6L8AVgS-FGU8xTETKRIiC5x8iXJj316wh_MBkehLGef7aAJ95npe3Fk27zYUfLU3WHVvdMTIciERI6TAjTZlzCY5WoW0JgPq3ocUENBvgxXK7hjv8YFtRBsULG8zlV5gr-EBm9omEUIj58fHtGqPsOAZf7XTkqFjSFSzYVg9 "And I’ll do it as your next President. ")**

As president, I'll revitalize the economy, support small businesses, stop Washington's spending sprees, protect our border, champion school choice, and save America's future.

**[Will you chip in today and help me save our country?](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=e4b4eb4cb3654d108322bf3de092078b&_e=HFBxnwnj5l9j-XqJMptz-WAmzUvHQsCaemiFblJMDLedZuhaZOz4Gz3IDPpq8YZPc4chsXxgOHANNx8NzoMvGjqyXclhQg3j2YitjP3kwFHg14-weKqenryHxZU9qEXg1a65zFiQoz_qa5KWZoSsIVuN5-BU5n43obun0GpZImZkZJ3c7ONqbT4fz_3wokNOO4IVjhYogL2QChNIPqKX7Kum6L8AVgS-FGU8xTETKRK_KVxuFgyfN_M8jp_nkpZmqGAin7Ko0FB-3-QGt5fhxjzwJgfYn5iekpCd29XYRA0acPQXhtBZLZfev7QceIBhhkG6Fif2jeTabXYqxiuGgt09lMqeGqs2g6ZOYv7zpU-87KJL2jUr30lNemWjZy13 "Will you chip in today and help me save our country?")**

My mom started a clothing store out of our living room. | | | | | | | | | Fellow Conservative, Hey it's Nikki Haley. I wanted to take a minute to share something personal with you - "why I’m running for President." I'm the proud daughter of Indian immigrants who came to America legally over 50 years ago to live in a country that was strong and proud and full of opportunities. My dad was an educator. My mom started a clothing store out of our living room. | At the age of 13, I started doing the books at my mom's store. When my mom moved the store from our living room to a storefront, I'll never forget the American flag she had painted on a ceiling in her store to remind us about the freedom America has to offer. As a young girl I learned two lessons that I 'll carry with me forever: the importance of a strong work ethic, and to never take the freedom that America has to offer for granted. | - I graduated from Clemson with an accounting degree. Then, I worked in a corporate job before going back to work at my mom's small business. That's where I saw firsthand how hard it is to make a dollar and how easy it is for the government to take it away. I was frustrated, but my parents always told me, " Don't complain. Do something about it." So I did. I ran for the State House. No one thought I had a chance, but I never gave up. I won the district not just once, but two more times before deciding to run for governor. | I became governor when I was 38. Michael and I had two young kids. Being governor was one of the most rewarding jobs I've ever had. But it wasn't easy. I had to balance the demands of the job, lead our state through historic floods and horrific tragedies, all while we raised our two young children. On top of the basic demands that come with the titles of governor and mom, I'm a proud military wife. While I was governor, my husband, Michael, was deployed to a combat zone for a year. It was the first time the spouse of a sitting governor was deployed to a combat zone. | After I served as governor, I served as U.S. ambassador to the United Nations. I stood up for America on the world stage, fought for our allies, and held accountable those who didn't support us. I proudly took "kick me" sign off America's back and restored respect for America by the international community. | This brings me to my main point: why I 'm running for president. I've watched the American Dream unfold before me. I've seen that even on our worst days, we are blessed to live in America. But I also know that under Biden's leadership, times are tough and America can be doing so much better. "I’m running for President because America can do better, and I know how. " | As governor, I was dubbed a "jobs governor" because I slashed our unemployment rate, brought jobs back to our state, and shepherded in a successful economic recovery. At the UN I fought for America, made sure our allies knew we had their backs, stood up for Israel even when others refused, and stood up to murderers and dictators to let them know that America was taking names. I know how to make America strong and proud because I've done it before. "And I’ll do it as your next President. " As president, I'll revitalize the economy, support small businesses, stop Washington's spending sprees, protect our border, champion school choice, and save America's future. name: Judicial Watch Corruption Chronicles
subject: No CBP Outbound Inspections: Mexican Cartels Get Ammo, Guns, Money from U.S.
body:
While Mexican drug cartels seize unprecedented control of the
southwest border, the frontline Homeland Security agency charged with
safeguarding the U.S. fails to regularly conduct outbound inspections
that could disrupt the Transnational Criminal Organizations (TCO).

[alt_text]

[*****]
August 09, 2023

[article-image]
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=64525&L=12663&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS05ODUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWNvcnJ1cHRpb24rY2hyb25pY2xlcyZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=151cb10a6eca090ea5e83af459ba8470121861a2bbf238b13cc3e7eb21e42356]

While Mexican drug cartels seize unprecedented control of the
southwest border, the frontline Homeland Security agency charged with
safeguarding the U.S. fails to regularly conduct outbound inspections
that could disrupt the Transnational Criminal Organizations (TCO). The
checks for traffic departing the country at ports of entry (POE) would
be detrimental to the illicit operations because they prevent illegal
exportation of currency, firearms, explosives, ammunition, and
narcotics. Nevertheless, Customs and Border Protection (CBP) does not
consistently inspect outbound traffic, according to a federal
audit that reveals there is no structural outbound inspection with
oversight from the agency’s Office of Field Operations (OFO).

Read More
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=64525&L=12663&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS05ODUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWNvcnJ1cHRpb24rY2hyb25pY2xlcyZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=151cb10a6eca090ea5e83af459ba8470121861a2bbf238b13cc3e7eb21e42356]

clean_body: While Mexican drug cartels seize unprecedented control of the southwest border, the frontline Homeland Security agency charged with safeguarding the U.S. fails to regularly conduct outbound inspections that could disrupt the Transnational Criminal Organizations (TCO). [alt_text] [*****] August 09, 2023 [article-image] [] While Mexican drug cartels seize unprecedented control of the southwest border, the frontline Homeland Security agency charged with safeguarding the U.S. fails to regularly conduct outbound inspections that could disrupt the Transnational Criminal Organizations (TCO). The checks for traffic departing the country at ports of entry (POE) would be detrimental to the illicit operations because they prevent illegal exportation of currency, firearms, explosives, ammunition, and narcotics. Nevertheless, Customs and Border Protection (CBP) does not consistently inspect outbound traffic, according to a federal audit that reveals there is no structural outbound inspection with oversight from the agency’s Office of Field Operations (OFO). Read More [] [FITTON on TimCast: Rule of Law Crisis: Will America Survive?] [] FITTON on TimCast: Rule of Law Crisis: Will America Survive? Friend,

You wouldn't believe what leftist Rep. Jackson Lee said about the Kash Foundation.
[](http://email.email.a1warroom.com/c/eJw8jj-PozAQRz_N0IHMGEwoKO4OccVK26daDf4TnLUxMSYo334FirZ9v6eZR35x1rw6aP4C4mTVCojA_wDi47r7uN39x_9cXF3-EJ--Pkb8B4jptehf832k0J6sO2jTZ6ojQUarTHelaEuBiNhkUzeaSjSXFtmFNGv5SHUtK9W0NI5SGaYy2yFDzi6sRc54hYWpm9oYYoyXmtW8hoqdjwoqd4oxBF_I4DPXTSkt61k0AA5p0vk3rVNuwjYrSjbMRdTPZyED4BB8rsJMSQMftuS_1rBFqYH3s3SA4kBeK7t54P0Y30SSX8jeZuD9enf52ciQv9ek42Hvscxip5bdOmdX0UDFbmeuDP4nAAD__x2icV4)

I did exactly what I set out to do when I founded the Kash Foundation. We provided legal and financial support to whistleblowers after they brought forth credible information on corruption.

While it's shocking that a member of Congress would go so far out of her way to try and vilify us, I couldn't be happier.

**_We are pissing off the right people_.**

The members of the Deep State are getting scared. Their days are over. As the Kash Foundation encourages more and more whistleblowers are coming forward, we will expose all their corruption.

[That's why I need your help. My goal is to raise $50,000 before the end of the week to protect whistleblowers from Deep State retaliation.

Can you imagine giving up your career, financial livelihood, privacy, and peace of mind to do what you feel is right and expose the FBI's corruption to the rest of your fellow American citizens?

**And Rep. Jackson Lee has the nerve to accuse _the whistleblowers_ of corruption!**

We provided legal and financial support to whistleblowers after they brought forth credible information on corruption. The members of the Deep State are getting scared. Their days are over. As the Kash Foundation encourages more and more whistleblowers are coming forward, we will expose all their corruption. | | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/67848575/421061457/-699096633?refcode=20230809_HHMGP&refcode2=WTEFC822&sourceid=1051694&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMzdmZWU5ZS0wODM3LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0rGkLtdK-IiVlhUkXpcTSTmgWORPWbOnS9MufdkASo0=) Peter, it's Marie Gluesenkamp Perez.

I ran for Congress in 2022 as an auto-repair shop owner and a mom to represent Washington's 3rd District in the U.S. House. I came to Congress to stop extremism from taking over my district and my country. **I knew that our next representative needed to be a true voice for our community – and that means finding real, workable solutions for Southwest Washington.** As an EMILYs List candidate, I'm proud of the progress we've made together. But once again, our district is being targeted by right-wing extremists who want to turn this seat red. [**If you're with me, can you split a donation between my campaign and EMILYs List today?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/67848576/421061458/-699096633?refcode=20230809_HHMGP&refcode2=WTEFC822&sourceid=1051694&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMzdmZWU5ZS0wODM3LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0rGkLtdK-IiVlhUkXpcTSTmgWORPWbOnS9MufdkASo0=) | [SPLIT A DONATION](https://click.everyaction.com/k/67848577/421061459/-699096633?recurring=true&refcode=20230809_HHMGP&refcode2=WTEFC822&sourceid=1051694&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMzdmZWU5ZS0wODM3LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0rGkLtdK-IiVlhUkXpcTSTmgWORPWbOnS9MufdkASo0=)

While I'm focused on getting things done in Congress, my right-wing opponent Joe Kent is still standing strong with the MAGA wing of his party. I am fighting tooth and nail to make sure working families and rural communities don't get left out in the cold. I'm working to fund rural broadband access and make child care more affordable for working families like mine.
I'm also committed to protecting reproductive freedom. **The last thing women need is extreme politicians like Joe Kent standing between us and critical medical care. My opponent would outlaw abortion with no exceptions — even when a mother's life is at risk. **

[](https://davidcanepa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c7592558e548bc8cc150aa5&id=475317410d&e=c0babbc643) Turning another year older is a good reminder of how much I love the job of representing you on the Board of Supervisors, and how much important work we still have to do together:
* Preparing for climate change by making investments to combat wildfires, flooding and sea level rise
* Improving health care, including greater access to mental health services and interventions
* Housing homeless individuals and families and providing intensive wraparound services such as job training

[](https://davidcanepa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c7592558e548bc8cc150aa5&id=4112dbd96b&e=c0babbc643) I would still very much appreciate anything you can donate – the limit for this race is $2,000 per donor and every dollar helps get our message out! Hope to see you August 9th! Best regards, David Canepa, San Mateo County Supervisor, District 5 P.S. No matter the size of your contribution, donating today is the best birthday present you could give me – I would be so grateful if you could [pitch in](https://davidcanepa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c7592558e548bc8cc150aa5&id=7dfa29adba&e=c0babbc643) today. **Paid for by David Canepa for Supervisor 2024, ID# 1399463**

| | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/5befca8e076d/breaking-fbi-put-spy-inside-disabled-marines-legal-defense-team-11855823?e=8edd2b8f7d)

[](https://freedomwatchusa.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=72bc9b8de1fa17e6901eb23e7&id=707ea6e179&e=8edd2b8f7d)
|
---
# KLAYMAN: LEFTIST OBAMA BIDEN HACK DC FEDERAL JUDGES AGAIN VIOLATE TRUMP’S CONSTITUTIONAL RIGHTS!
CNN

The special counsel investigation into Donald Trump secured a search warrant of the former president’s Twitter account, [@realDonaldTrump](https://freedomwatchusa.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=72bc9b8de1fa17e6901eb23e7&id=dfc83d0630&e=8edd2b8f7d), according to a newly unsealed court filing.
The search was so secret that Twitter was initially barred from telling Trump the search warrant had been obtained for his account, and the company, now known as “X,” was fined $350,000 because it delayed producing the records sought under the search warrant.
The search warrant special counsel Jack Smith obtained sought “data and records related” to Trump’s account, and ultimately, the platform was allowed to share some information about the search warrant with the former president.
The special counsel’s office, which is now working on the criminal case against Trump in DC District Court related to his efforts to overturn the 2020 presidential election, sought the warrant in January 2023.
[Continue reading...](https://freedomwatchusa.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=72bc9b8de1fa17e6901eb23e7&id=83ac6447f4&e=8edd2b8f7d)

name: Tim Sheehy, Navy SEAL
subject: When your country calls and needs you, you must answer
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TIM SHEEHY FOR MONTANA
body:
Putting oneself at the greatest point of impact is necessary to get things done. | [Unsubscribe](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_s=a664348ed3c44e67aeff5800059adb0b&_t=VPJrqNG0munaisyoEtoKUFdBcqn9o8srUoh81fGOMBF_pAAtatVp3nfT_zTFuW87BngMiEFSYZyKdEOyaV1Qpwtd4sYrlD84fE-s7B2dArU%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_s=a664348ed3c44e67aeff5800059adb0b&_t=VPJrqNG0munaisyoEtoKUFdBcqn9o8srUoh81fGOMBF_pAAtatVp3nfT_zTFuW87BngMiEFSYZyKdEOyaV1Qpwtd4sYrlD84fE-s7B2dArU%3D)
---
[](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=a664348ed3c44e67aeff5800059adb0b&_e=NwuVf5I5lR2z0QENcSrOu0XZX2zeIm73mPFK4rLAz-MELjX-W2euxiNhuzHX-cr3ewG_HPRh1rqEwcqnDJIte3hucYpeQ9gZ-5a9atO1L3mRdhwy39IJ5lT8mMhM3eSMrvV9BiSIeSfxkn7wsmAsvdG_qQg6VvIW6edT8dnjYecjgoy8ecj1KW9v6tN-Zv0YfO4ZfSe3spLwIsmrfiwRCuOSx33rZK_5Yws8wRNn-zs8LPqiLdG6lojED7zKx9kNi0NIu2U7lyf-ych_6YB2GrPOYPE355ECXOhvfIftD2ePFPCI5HUXdm2hdL-Wb3M4i_vL1FEBf0rjSdjRFQx7A74i4Cd0h3nqGBNwn2YydCxPaFseGL729uc-EjswpnRq-e0KKJFevX4mW6W0shaFoKl5CMjWtbvkwGej8pM81sw%3D)

Peter,

I’ve got a great life in Montana; four beautiful kids and a wife whom I adore. On June 27th, I launched my campaign to be the next United States Senator for Montana, and I’ve got to tell you that the most common question that I’ve received since my announcement has been, _**“why are you doing this?”**_

**Here is what I tell them:** it’s all about service; I’ve always tried to put myself in positions where I can have the greatest impact. Sometimes, the greatest impact is defending our freedoms oversees; sometimes it’s piloting an aerial fire-fighting aircraft. I love my country - I’ve fought and bled for Old Glory. **I would put my life on the line defending the United States of America.**
**
When your country calls and needs you, you answer. Right now, our nation is facing some very serious challenges and we need serious people in Washington to get our nation back on track.

It’s been a busy couple of weeks for us here in Montana, as I’m sure it has been for you as well. That’s why I took the liberty of putting together a few of the headlines news outlets around the country ran when I announced my campaign. **

clean_body: Putting oneself at the greatest point of impact is necessary to get things done. | | Peter, I’ve got a great life in Montana; four beautiful kids and a wife whom I adore. On June 27th, I launched my campaign to be the next United States Senator for Montana, and I’ve got to tell you that the most common question that I’ve received since my announcement has been, “why are you doing this?” Here is what I tell them: it’s all about service; I’ve always tried to put myself in positions where I can have the greatest impact. Sometimes, the greatest impact is defending our freedoms oversees; sometimes it’s piloting an aerial fire-fighting aircraft. I love my country - I’ve fought and bled for Old Glory. I would put my life on the line defending the United States of America. When your country calls and needs you, you answer. Right now, our nation is facing some very serious challenges and we need serious people in Washington to get our nation back on track. It’s been a busy couple of weeks for us here in Montana, as I’m sure it has been for you as well. That’s why I took the liberty of putting together a few of the headlines news outlets around the country ran when I announced my campaign. I’m not sending you this to toot my own horn; I’m sending you this today because I need you to understand how important this race is going to be. My Democrat opponent has been in Washington since he was first elected back in 2006, meaning he is going to have a well-funded campaign. before closing out of this window today, you’d be doing me a huge favor as me and my team work to get this campaign off the ground. I want to create a brighter future for my kids and your children and grandchildren. Our campaign is about service, God, and country, not politics as usual. name: Sherrod Brown
subject: This is incredible news, Peter
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PEOPLE FOR PATTY MURRAY
body:
Ohioans came out strong in this week’s special election
| | |
---
This is incredible news, Peter! Ohioans came out strong in yesterday’s special election to STOP an anti-democratic amendment and clear special interest power grab – which would’ve made it harder for us to enshrine reproductive rights in our state constitution this November.

Seeing Ohio voters turn out to the polls and decisively reject the GOP's proposal has me feeling more hopeful than ever about our ability to protect women’s health care.
This massive victory also makes clear that momentum is on our side heading into 2024 when I’ll be on the ballot. But we can’t take our foot off the gas. **So today, as we celebrate, I'm personally asking you to help me keep up our momentum:[Will you split $5 or more between myself and Patty Murray to defend Ohio's Democratic seat and our pro-choice Senate majority?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67848932/421063169/348274074?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&refcode=jtk115-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3Y2Y0N2Q2My0wZDM3LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BYrsCSeJtODNljOGE8UetTkMYzQdgHmNp6o8HaOM8VU=)**
In solidarity,

Sherrod

| Peter,

My entire career has been about service.

When I graduated law school from St. Mary’s in San Antonio, I decided to become an immigration attorney so I could help people achieve the American dream just like my parents did.

On the San Antonio city council, I worked to ensure our kids had sidewalks so they could walk safely to school.

As a State Representative, I prioritized mental health programs by establishing the Warrior Resiliency Center in San Antonio to focus on the treatment of PTSD for Texas veterans.

In the State Senate, when 19 children and 2 teachers were murdered in Uvalde, I fought side by side with the parents and families of the victims to pass common sense gun reform.

Texas needs a Senator who is going to serve Texans. Ted Cruz doesn’t care about service. He only cares about himself.

[_**Peter, we have a real chance of beating Ted Cruz. CNN has already named Ted Cruz one of the most vulnerable Senate Republicans. Roland Gutierrez is running to defeat Ted Cruz for Senate. We need your support to elect Roland, but if you’d prefer not to receive emails from our campaign, you can . = | Peter, My entire career has been about service. When I graduated law school from St. Mary’s in San Antonio, I decided to become an immigration attorney so I could help people achieve the American dream just like my parents did. On the San Antonio city council, I worked to ensure our kids had sidewalks so they could walk safely to school. As a State Representative, I prioritized mental health programs by establishing the Warrior Resiliency Center in San Antonio to focus on the treatment of PTSD for Texas veterans. In the State Senate, when 19 children and 2 teachers were murdered in Uvalde, I fought side by side with the parents and families of the victims to pass common sense gun reform. Texas needs a Senator who is going to serve Texans. Ted Cruz doesn’t care about service. 6. She’s working to destroy Medicare and Medicaid, which would impact over 1,000,000 Arizonans who currently rely on the program.
7. Lesko is opposed to enacting the Equality Act which would expand discrimination protections to protect LGBTQ+ Arizonans.
8. Despite Debbie’s work to sabotage President Biden’s agenda, **we were able to add nearly 2,800 jobs across Arizona in the month of June.**
